authors_text: Zhihao Chen,Yang Zhou,Anh Tran,Junting Zhao,Liang Wan,Gideon Ooi,Lionel Cheng,Choon Hua Thng,Xinxing Xu,Yong Liu,Huazhu Fu
title: Medical Phrase Grounding with Region-Phrase Context Contrastive Alignment
title_zh: 具有区域短语上下文对比对齐的医学短语基础
abstract: Medical phrase grounding (MPG) aims to locate the most relevant region in a medical image, given a phrase query describing certain medical findings, which is an important task for medical image analysis and radiological diagnosis. However, existing visual grounding methods rely on general visual features for identifying objects in natural images and are not capable of capturing the subtle and specialized features of medical findings, leading to sub-optimal performance in MPG. In this paper, we propose MedRPG, an end-to-end approach for MPG. MedRPG is built on a lightweight vision-language transformer encoder and directly predicts the box coordinates of mentioned medical findings, which can be trained with limited medical data, making it a valuable tool in medical image analysis. To enable MedRPG to locate nuanced medical findings with better region-phrase correspondences, we further propose Tri-attention Context contrastive alignment (TaCo). TaCo seeks context alignment to pull both the features and attention outputs of relevant region-phrase pairs close together while pushing those of irrelevant regions far away. This ensures that the final box prediction depends more on its finding-specific regions and phrases. Experimental results on three MPG datasets demonstrate that our MedRPG outperforms state-of-the-art visual grounding approaches by a large margin. Additionally, the proposed TaCo strategy is effective in enhancing finding localization ability and reducing spurious region-phrase correlations.

However, existing visual grounding methods rely on general visual features for identifying objects in natural images and are not capable of capturing the subtle and specialized features of medical findings, leading to sub-optimal performance in MPG. In this paper, we propose MedRPG, an end-to-end approach for MPG. MedRPG is built on a lightweight vision-language transformer encoder and directly predicts the box coordinates of mentioned medical findings, which can be trained with limited medical data, making it a valuable tool in medical image analysis. To enable MedRPG to locate nuanced medical findings with better region-phrase correspondences, we further propose Tri-attention Context contrastive alignment (TaCo). TaCo seeks context alignment to pull both the features and attention outputs of relevant region-phrase pairs close together while pushing those of irrelevant regions far away. This ensures that the final box prediction depends more on its finding-specific regions and phrases. Experimental results on three MPG datasets demonstrate that our MedRPG outperforms state-of-the-art visual grounding approaches by a large margin. Additionally, the proposed TaCo strategy is effective in enhancing finding localization ability and reducing spurious region-phrase correlations.
abstract_zh: 医学短语基础（MPG）旨在给定描述某些医学发现的短语查询来定位医学图像中最相关的区域，这是医学图像分析和放射诊断的重要任务。然而，现有的视觉基础方法依赖于一般视觉特征来识别自然图像中的对象，并且无法捕捉医学发现的微妙和专门的特征，导致 MPG 的性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了 MedRPG，一种 MPG 的端到端方法。 MedRPG 基于轻量级视觉语言转换器编码器构建，可直接预测上述医学发现的框坐标，可以使用有限的医学数据进行训练，使其成为医学图像分析中的宝贵工具。为了使 MedRPG 能够通过更好的区域短语对应来定位细微的医学发现，我们进一步提出了三注意上下文对比对齐（TaCo）。 TaCo 寻求上下文对齐，以将相关区域短语对的特征和注意力输出拉近，同时将不相关区域的特征和注意力输出推远。这确保了最终的框预测更多地取决于其发现的特定区域和短语。三个 MPG 数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 MedRPG 大幅优于最先进的视觉基础方法。此外，所提出的 TaCo 策略可有效增强查找定位能力并减少虚假区域短语相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MedRPG的端到端方法，用于医疗图像中的短语定位任务，通过区域-短语上下文对比对齐策略提升定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位方法依赖通用视觉特征，难以捕捉医疗图像中细微且专业的医学发现特征，导致医疗短语定位（MPG）效果不佳。
AI.method: 基于轻量级视觉-语言Transformer编码器构建MedRPG，直接预测医学发现的框坐标；提出Tri-attention Context对比对齐（TaCo）策略，通过拉近相关区域-短语对的特征与注意力输出，推远无关对的距离，增强定位相关性。
AI.result: 在三个MPG数据集上，MedRPG显著优于现有最先进方法，且TaCo策略有效提升了定位能力并减少了虚假区域-短语关联。
AI.conclusion: MedRPG结合TaCo策略，有效解决了医疗图像中细微医学发现的定位问题，为医学影像分析提供了有价值的工具。

authors_text: Huanqing Wang,Kaixiang Zhang,Keyi Zhu,Ziyou Song,Zhaojian Li
title: ABatRe-Sim: A Comprehensive Framework for Automated Battery Recycling Simulation
title_zh: ABatRe-Sim：自动化电池回收模拟的综合框架
abstract: With the rapid surge in the number of on-road Electric Vehicles (EVs), the amount of spent lithium-ion (Li-ion) batteries is also expected to explosively grow. The spent battery packs contain valuable metal and materials that should be recovered, recycled, and reused. However, only less than 5% of the Li-ion batteries are currently recycled, due to a multitude of challenges in technology, logistics and regulation. Existing battery recycling is performed manually, which can pose a series of risks to the human operator as a consequence of remaining high voltage and chemical hazards. Therefore, there is a critical need to develop an automated battery recycling system. In this paper, we present ABatRe-sim, an open-source robotic battery recycling simulator, to facilitate the research and development in efficient and effective battery recycling au-omation. Specifically, we develop a detailed CAD model of the battery pack (with screws, wires, and battery modules), which is imported into Gazebo to enable robot-object interaction in the robot operating system (ROS) environment. It also allows the simulation of battery packs of various aging conditions. Furthermore, perception, planning, and control algorithms are developed to establish the benchmark to demonstrate the interface and realize the basic functionalities for further user customization. Discussions on the utilization and future extensions of the simulator are also presented.
summary: With the rapid surge in the number of on-road Electric Vehicles (EVs), the amount of spent lithium-ion (Li-ion) batteries is also expected to explosively grow. The spent battery packs contain valuable metal and materials that should be recovered, recycled, and reused. However, only less than 5% of the Li-ion batteries are currently recycled, due to a multitude of challenges in technology, logistics and regulation. Existing battery recycling is performed manually, which can pose a series of risks to the human operator as a consequence of remaining high voltage and chemical hazards. Therefore, there is a critical need to develop an automated battery recycling system. In this paper, we present ABatRe-sim, an open-source robotic battery recycling simulator, to facilitate the research and development in efficient and effective battery recycling au-omation. Specifically, we develop a detailed CAD model of the battery pack (with screws, wires, and battery modules), which is imported into Gazebo to enable robot-object interaction in the robot operating system (ROS) environment. It also allows the simulation of battery packs of various aging conditions. Furthermore, perception, planning, and control algorithms are developed to establish the benchmark to demonstrate the interface and realize the basic functionalities for further user customization. Discussions on the utilization and future extensions of the simulator are also presented.
abstract_zh: 随着道路上电动汽车（EV）数量的迅速激增，废旧锂离子（Li-ion）电池的数量预计也会出现爆炸式增长。废电池组含有有价值的金属和材料，应回收、再循环和再利用。然而，由于技术、物流和监管方面的诸多挑战，目前只有不到 5% 的锂离子电池得到回收。现有的电池回收是手动进行的，由于残留的高电压和化学危险，这可能会给操作人员带来一系列风险。因此，迫切需要开发自动化的电池回收系统。在本文中，我们提出了 ABatRe-sim，一种开源机器人电池回收模拟器，以促进高效且有效的电池回收自动化的研究和开发。具体来说，我们开发了电池组的详细 CAD 模型（包含螺钉、电线和电池模块），并将其导入到 Gazebo 中，以在机器人操作系统 (ROS) 环境中实现机器人与物体的交互。它还允许模拟各种老化条件的电池组。此外，还开发了感知、规划和控制算法，以建立演示界面的基准并实现进一步用户定制的基本功能。还讨论了模拟器的使用和未来的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ABatRe-Sim，一个用于自动化电池回收的开源机器人模拟框架，旨在解决当前锂电池回收率低及人工回收存在的安全隐患问题。
AI.motivation: 随着电动汽车数量激增，废弃锂电池回收需求迫切，但现有回收方式效率低且存在高电压和化学危害风险，亟需开发自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含螺丝、电线和电池模块的详细CAD电池包模型，集成至Gazebo与ROS环境，模拟不同老化状态的电池包，并开发感知、规划与控制算法作为功能基准。
AI.result: 实现了一个支持机器人-物体交互的开源模拟器，为后续用户定制化研究提供接口和基准，可拓展至多种电池老化场景的自动化回收测试。
AI.conclusion: ABatRe-Sim为电池回收自动化研究提供了有效工具，未来可进一步优化算法并扩展至实际工业场景应用。

authors_text: Jaspreet Ranjit,Tianlu Wang,Baishakhi Ray,Vicente Ordonez
title: Variation of Gender Biases in Visual Recognition Models Before and After Finetuning
title_zh: 视觉识别模型微调前后性别偏差的变化
abstract: We introduce a framework to measure how biases change before and after fine-tuning a large scale visual recognition model for a downstream task. Deep learning models trained on increasing amounts of data are known to encode societal biases. Many computer vision systems today rely on models typically pretrained on large scale datasets. While bias mitigation techniques have been developed for tuning models for downstream tasks, it is currently unclear what are the effects of biases already encoded in a pretrained model. Our framework incorporates sets of canonical images representing individual and pairs of concepts to highlight changes in biases for an array of off-the-shelf pretrained models across model sizes, dataset sizes, and training objectives. Through our analyses, we find that (1) supervised models trained on datasets such as ImageNet-21k are more likely to retain their pretraining biases regardless of the target dataset compared to self-supervised models. We also find that (2) models finetuned on larger scale datasets are more likely to introduce new biased associations. Our results also suggest that (3) biases can transfer to finetuned models and the finetuning objective and dataset can impact the extent of transferred biases.
summary: We introduce a framework to measure how biases change before and after fine-tuning a large scale visual recognition model for a downstream task. Deep learning models trained on increasing amounts of data are known to encode societal biases. Many computer vision systems today rely on models typically pretrained on large scale datasets. While bias mitigation techniques have been developed for tuning models for downstream tasks, it is currently unclear what are the effects of biases already encoded in a pretrained model. Our framework incorporates sets of canonical images representing individual and pairs of concepts to highlight changes in biases for an array of off-the-shelf pretrained models across model sizes, dataset sizes, and training objectives. Through our analyses, we find that (1) supervised models trained on datasets such as ImageNet-21k are more likely to retain their pretraining biases regardless of the target dataset compared to self-supervised models. We also find that (2) models finetuned on larger scale datasets are more likely to introduce new biased associations. Our results also suggest that (3) biases can transfer to finetuned models and the finetuning objective and dataset can impact the extent of transferred biases.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个框架来衡量在为下游任务微调大规模视觉识别模型之前和之后偏差如何变化。众所周知，根据越来越多的数据训练的深度学习模型会编码社会偏见。如今，许多计算机视觉系统依赖于通常在大规模数据集上预训练的模型。虽然已经开发了偏差缓解技术来调整下游任务的模型，但目前尚不清楚预训练模型中已编码的偏差会产生什么影响。我们的框架包含代表个体和概念对的规范图像集，以突出一系列现成的预训练模型在模型大小、数据集大小和训练目标方面的偏差变化。通过我们的分析，我们发现（1）与自监督模型相比，无论目标数据集如何，在 ImageNet-21k 等数据集上训练的监督模型更有可能保留其预训练偏差。我们还发现（2）在更大规模的数据集上微调的模型更有可能引入新的有偏见的关联。我们的结果还表明，（3）偏差可以转移到微调模型，并且微调目标和数据集可以影响转移偏差的程度。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种框架，用于评估视觉识别模型在微调前后性别偏见的变化，并分析不同模型规模、数据集大小和训练目标对偏见的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有偏见缓解技术，但预训练模型中已有的偏见对下游任务的影响尚不明确，需系统分析微调过程中偏见的变化。
AI.method: 通过构建包含个体和概念对典型图像的数据集，评估不同规模预训练模型、数据集大小及训练目标下的偏见变化。
AI.result: （1）监督模型更易保留预训练偏见；（2）微调大数据集可能引入新偏见；（3）偏见可能转移到微调模型，且微调目标和数据集影响偏见程度。
AI.conclusion: 微调过程可能保留原有偏见或引入新偏见，需在模型选择和微调策略上注意以减少偏见影响。

authors_text: Haibo Shen,Juyu Xiao,Yihao Luo,Xiang Cao,Liangqi Zhang,Tianjiang Wang
title: Training Robust Spiking Neural Networks with ViewPoint Transform and SpatioTemporal Stretching
title_zh: 使用 ViewPoint 变换和时空拉伸训练鲁棒尖峰神经网络
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.11659
comments: Accepted by ICASSP 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.11659
abstract: Neuromorphic vision sensors (event cameras) simulate biological visual perception systems and have the advantages of high temporal resolution, less data redundancy, low power consumption, and large dynamic range. Since both events and spikes are modeled from neural signals, event cameras are inherently suitable for spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are considered promising models for artificial intelligence (AI) and theoretical neuroscience. However, the unconventional visual signals of these cameras pose a great challenge to the robustness of spiking neural networks. In this paper, we propose a novel data augmentation method, ViewPoint Transform and SpatioTemporal Stretching (VPT-STS). It improves the robustness of SNNs by transforming the rotation centers and angles in the spatiotemporal domain to generate samples from different viewpoints. Furthermore, we introduce the spatiotemporal stretching to avoid potential information loss in viewpoint transformation. Extensive experiments on prevailing neuromorphic datasets demonstrate that VPT-STS is broadly effective on multi-event representations and significantly outperforms pure spatial geometric transformations. Notably, the SNNs model with VPT-STS achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 84.4\% on the DVS-CIFAR10 dataset.
summary: Neuromorphic vision sensors (event cameras) simulate biological visual perception systems and have the advantages of high temporal resolution, less data redundancy, low power consumption, and large dynamic range. Since both events and spikes are modeled from neural signals, event cameras are inherently suitable for spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are considered promising models for artificial intelligence (AI) and theoretical neuroscience. However, the unconventional visual signals of these cameras pose a great challenge to the robustness of spiking neural networks. In this paper, we propose a novel data augmentation method, ViewPoint Transform and SpatioTemporal Stretching (VPT-STS). It improves the robustness of SNNs by transforming the rotation centers and angles in the spatiotemporal domain to generate samples from different viewpoints. Furthermore, we introduce the spatiotemporal stretching to avoid potential information loss in viewpoint transformation. Extensive experiments on prevailing neuromorphic datasets demonstrate that VPT-STS is broadly effective on multi-event representations and significantly outperforms pure spatial geometric transformations. Notably, the SNNs model with VPT-STS achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 84.4\% on the DVS-CIFAR10 dataset.
abstract_zh: 神经形态视觉传感器（事件相机）模拟生物视觉感知系统，具有时间分辨率高、数据冗余少、功耗低、动态范围大等优点。由于事件和尖峰都是根据神经信号建模的，因此事件相机本质上适合尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，这被认为是人工智能 (AI) 和理论神经科学的有前途的模型。然而，这些相机的非常规视觉信号对尖峰神经网络的鲁棒性提出了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据增强方法，即视点变换和时空拉伸（VPT-STS）。它通过变换时空域中的旋转中心和角度来生成不同视点的样本，从而提高了 SNN 的鲁棒性。此外，我们引入时空拉伸以避免视点转换中潜在的信息丢失。对流行的神经形态数据集进行的大量实验表明，VPT-STS 在多事件表示上广泛有效，并且显着优于纯空间几何变换。值得注意的是，采用 VPT-STS 的 SNN 模型在 DVS-CIFAR10 数据集上达到了 84.4% 的最先进准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VPT-STS的数据增强方法，通过空间-时间域变换提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）对神经形态视觉传感器（事件相机）数据的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 事件相机产生的非传统视觉信号（事件流）导致SNN在处理时面临鲁棒性挑战，现有空间几何变换方法难以充分应对这种动态数据特性。
AI.method: 设计ViewPoint Transform（视角变换）与SpatioTemporal Stretching（时空拉伸）联合方法，在时空域中变换旋转中心和角度生成多视角样本，并通过时空拉伸补偿信息损失。
AI.result: 在DVS-CIFAR10等主流神经形态数据集上，VPT-STS方法使SNN准确率达到84.4%，显著优于纯空间变换方法，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: VPT-STS通过时空域联合变换有效增强了SNN对事件相机数据的鲁棒性，为神经形态计算中的模型训练提供了新的数据增强范式。

Since both events and spikes are modeled from neural signals, event cameras are inherently suitable for spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are considered promising models for artificial intelligence (AI) and theoretical neuroscience. However, the unconventional visual signals of these cameras pose a great challenge to the robustness of spiking neural networks. It improves the robustness of SNNs by transforming the rotation centers and angles in the spatiotemporal domain to generate samples from different viewpoints. Furthermore, we introduce the spatiotemporal stretching to avoid potential information loss in viewpoint transformation. Extensive experiments on prevailing neuromorphic datasets demonstrate that VPT-STS is broadly effective on multi-event representations and significantly outperforms pure spatial geometric transformations. Notably, the SNNs model with VPT-STS achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 84.4\% on the DVS-CIFAR10 dataset. 神经形态视觉传感器（事件相机）模拟生物视觉感知系统，具有时间分辨率高、数据冗余少、功耗低、动态范围大等优点。由于事件和尖峰都是根据神经信号建模的，因此事件相机本质上适合尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，这被认为是人工智能 (AI) 和理论神经科学的有前途的模型。然而，这些相机的非常规视觉信号对尖峰神经网络的鲁棒性提出了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据增强方法，即视点变换和时空拉伸（VPT-STS）。它通过变换时空域中的旋转中心和角度来生成不同视点的样本，从而提高了 SNN 的鲁棒性。此外，我们引入时空拉伸以避免视点转换中潜在的信息丢失。对流行的神经形态数据集进行的大量实验表明，VPT-STS 在多事件表示上广泛有效，并且显着优于纯空间几何变换。值得注意的是，采用 VPT-STS 的 SNN 模型在 DVS-CIFAR10 数据集上达到了 84.4% 的最先进准确率。 本文提出一种名为VPT-STS的数据增强方法，通过空间-时间域变换提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）对神经形态视觉传感器（事件相机）数据的鲁棒性。 Haibo Shen,Juyu Xiao,Yihao Luo,Xiang Cao,Liangqi Zhang,Tianjiang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaoshuai Qi,Xiaojun Liu,Xiaolin Liu,Jiaqi Yang,Yanning Zhang
title: PSNet: a deep learning model based digital phase shifting algorithm from a single fringe image
title_zh: PSNet：基于深度学习模型的单条纹图像数字相移算法
abstract: As the gold standard for phase retrieval, phase-shifting algorithm (PS) has been widely used in optical interferometry, fringe projection profilometry, etc. However, capturing multiple fringe patterns in PS limits the algorithm to only a narrow range of application. To this end, a deep learning (DL) model based digital PS algorithm from only a single fringe image is proposed. By training on a simulated dataset of PS fringe patterns, the learnt model, denoted PSNet, can predict fringe patterns with other PS steps when given a pattern with the first PS step. Simulation and experiment results demonstrate the PSNet's promising performance on accurate prediction of digital PS patterns, and robustness to complex scenarios such as surfaces with varying curvature and reflectance.
summary: As the gold standard for phase retrieval, phase-shifting algorithm (PS) has been widely used in optical interferometry, fringe projection profilometry, etc. However, capturing multiple fringe patterns in PS limits the algorithm to only a narrow range of application. To this end, a deep learning (DL) model based digital PS algorithm from only a single fringe image is proposed. By training on a simulated dataset of PS fringe patterns, the learnt model, denoted PSNet, can predict fringe patterns with other PS steps when given a pattern with the first PS step. Simulation and experiment results demonstrate the PSNet's promising performance on accurate prediction of digital PS patterns, and robustness to complex scenarios such as surfaces with varying curvature and reflectance.
abstract_zh: 相移算法（PS）作为相位恢复的黄金标准，已广泛应用于光学干涉测量、条纹投影轮廓测量等领域。然而，PS中捕获多个条纹图案限制了该算法的应用范围。为此，提出了一种基于深度学习（DL）模型的仅来自单个条纹图像的数字PS算法。通过在 PS 条纹图案的模拟数据集上进行训练，学习模型（表示为 PSNet）可以在给定第一个 PS 步骤的图案时预测其他 PS 步骤的条纹图案。仿真和实验结果表明，PSNet 在准确预测数字 PS 图案方面具有良好的性能，并且对复杂场景（例如具有不同曲率和反射率的表面）具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的数字相位移算法PSNet，仅从单幅条纹图像预测相位移图案。
AI.motivation: 传统相位移算法需捕获多幅条纹图样，应用受限；本文旨在通过单幅图像实现相位移预测，提升算法适用性。
AI.method: 基于模拟的相位移条纹数据集训练深度学习模型PSNet，输入单幅含首个相位移步的条纹图像，输出其他相位移步的预测图样。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明PSNet能准确预测数字相位移图案，且在曲率和反射率变化的复杂表面场景中表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: PSNet通过深度学习实现单幅图像相位移预测，为数字相位移技术提供了高效且适用性更广的解决方案。

search_text: PSNet: a deep learning model based digital phase shifting algorithm from a single fringe image PSNet：基于深度学习模型的单条纹图像数字相移算法 As the gold standard for phase retrieval, phase-shifting algorithm (PS) has been widely used in optical interferometry, fringe projection profilometry, etc. However, capturing multiple fringe patterns in PS limits the algorithm to only a narrow range of application. To this end, a deep learning (DL) model based digital PS algorithm from only a single fringe image is proposed. By training on a simulated dataset of PS fringe patterns, the learnt model, denoted PSNet, can predict fringe patterns with other PS steps when given a pattern with the first PS step. Simulation and experiment results demonstrate the PSNet's promising performance on accurate prediction of digital PS patterns, and robustness to complex scenarios such as surfaces with varying curvature and reflectance. 相移算法（PS）作为相位恢复的黄金标准，已广泛应用于光学干涉测量、条纹投影轮廓测量等领域。然而，PS中捕获多个条纹图案限制了该算法的应用范围。为此，提出了一种基于深度学习（DL）模型的仅来自单个条纹图像的数字PS算法。通过在 PS 条纹图案的模拟数据集上进行训练，学习模型（表示为 PSNet）可以在给定第一个 PS 步骤的图案时预测其他 PS 步骤的条纹图案。仿真和实验结果表明，PSNet 在准确预测数字 PS 图案方面具有良好的性能，并且对复杂场景（例如具有不同曲率和反射率的表面）具有鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的数字相位移算法PSNet，仅从单幅条纹图像预测相位移图案。 Zhaoshuai Qi,Xiaojun Liu,Xiaolin Liu,Jiaqi Yang,Yanning Zhang physics.optics,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhipeng Luo,Gongjie Zhang,Changqing Zhou,Zhonghua Wu,Qingyi Tao,Lewei Lu,Shijian Lu
title: Modeling Continuous Motion for 3D Point Cloud Object Tracking
title_zh: 为 3D 点云对象跟踪建模连续运动
abstract: The task of 3D single object tracking (SOT) with LiDAR point clouds is crucial for various applications, such as autonomous driving and robotics. However, existing approaches have primarily relied on appearance matching or motion modeling within only two successive frames, thereby overlooking the long-range continuous motion property of objects in 3D space. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel approach that views each tracklet as a continuous stream: at each timestamp, only the current frame is fed into the network to interact with multi-frame historical features stored in a memory bank, enabling efficient exploitation of sequential information. To achieve effective cross-frame message passing, a hybrid attention mechanism is designed to account for both long-range relation modeling and local geometric feature extraction. Furthermore, to enhance the utilization of multi-frame features for robust tracking, a contrastive sequence enhancement strategy is proposed, which uses ground truth tracklets to augment training sequences and promote discrimination against false positives in a contrastive manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art method by significant margins on multiple benchmarks.
summary: The task of 3D single object tracking (SOT) with LiDAR point clouds is crucial for various applications, such as autonomous driving and robotics. However, existing approaches have primarily relied on appearance matching or motion modeling within only two successive frames, thereby overlooking the long-range continuous motion property of objects in 3D space. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel approach that views each tracklet as a continuous stream: at each timestamp, only the current frame is fed into the network to interact with multi-frame historical features stored in a memory bank, enabling efficient exploitation of sequential information. To achieve effective cross-frame message passing, a hybrid attention mechanism is designed to account for both long-range relation modeling and local geometric feature extraction. Furthermore, to enhance the utilization of multi-frame features for robust tracking, a contrastive sequence enhancement strategy is proposed, which uses ground truth tracklets to augment training sequences and promote discrimination against false positives in a contrastive manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art method by significant margins on multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 使用 LiDAR 点云进行 3D 单目标跟踪 (SOT) 的任务对于自动驾驶和机器人等各种应用至关重要。然而，现有方法主要依赖于仅两个连续帧内的外观匹配或运动建模，从而忽略了 3D 空间中物体的长距离连续运动特性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的方法，将每个轨迹视为连续流：在每个时间戳，只有当前帧被输入到网络中，与存储在存储体中的多帧历史特征进行交互，从而能够有效地利用顺序信息。为了实现有效的跨框架消息传递，设计了一种混合注意机制来考虑远程关系建模和局部几何特征提取。此外，为了增强多帧特征对鲁棒跟踪的利用，提出了一种对比序列增强策略，该策略使用地面实况轨迹来增强训练序列并以对比方式促进对误报的区分。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在多个基准测试中明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR点云的3D单目标跟踪方法，通过建模连续运动提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖相邻两帧的运动建模或外观匹配，忽略了3D空间中目标的长距离连续运动特性，导致跟踪效果受限。
AI.method: 将跟踪片段视为连续流，利用记忆库存储多帧历史特征并与当前帧交互；设计混合注意力机制实现跨帧信息传递，并提出对比序列增强策略优化多帧特征利用。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了连续运动建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模连续运动和优化跨帧特征交互，本文方法为3D点云目标跟踪提供了新思路，提升了复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Nabeel Gillani,Doug Beeferman,Christine Vega-Pourheydarian,Cassandra Overney,Pascal Van Hentenryck,Deb Roy
title: Redrawing attendance boundaries to promote racial and ethnic diversity in elementary schools
title_zh: 重新划定出勤界限以促进小学的种族和民族多样性
abstract: Most US school districts draw "attendance boundaries" to define catchment areas that assign students to schools near their homes, often recapitulating neighborhood demographic segregation in schools. Focusing on elementary schools, we ask: how much might we reduce school segregation by redrawing attendance boundaries? Combining parent preference data with methods from combinatorial optimization, we simulate alternative boundaries for 98 US school districts serving over 3 million elementary-aged students, minimizing White/non-White segregation while mitigating changes to travel times and school sizes. Across districts, we observe a median 14% relative decrease in segregation, which we estimate would require approximately 20\% of students to switch schools and, surprisingly, a slight reduction in travel times. We release a public dashboard depicting these alternative boundaries (https://www.schooldiversity.org/) and invite both school boards and their constituents to evaluate their viability. Our results show the possibility of greater integration without significant disruptions for families.
summary: Most US school districts draw "attendance boundaries" to define catchment areas that assign students to schools near their homes, often recapitulating neighborhood demographic segregation in schools. Focusing on elementary schools, we ask: how much might we reduce school segregation by redrawing attendance boundaries? Combining parent preference data with methods from combinatorial optimization, we simulate alternative boundaries for 98 US school districts serving over 3 million elementary-aged students, minimizing White/non-White segregation while mitigating changes to travel times and school sizes. Across districts, we observe a median 14% relative decrease in segregation, which we estimate would require approximately 20\% of students to switch schools and, surprisingly, a slight reduction in travel times. We release a public dashboard depicting these alternative boundaries (https://www.schooldiversity.org/) and invite both school boards and their constituents to evaluate their viability. Our results show the possibility of greater integration without significant disruptions for families.
abstract_zh: 大多数美国学区都会划定“出勤边界”来定义学区，将学生分配到离家较近的学校，这通常会重现学校中的社区人口隔离。我们以小学为中心，提出这样的问题：通过重新划定出勤界限，我们可以在多大程度上减少学校隔离？将家长偏好数据与组合优化方法相结合，我们模拟了 98 个美国学区的替代边界，为超过 300 万小学生提供服务，最大限度地减少白人/非白人隔离，同时减轻出行时间和学校规模的变化。在各个学区，我们观察到隔离现象中位数相对减少了 14%，我们估计这将需要大约 20% 的学生转校，而且令人惊讶的是，出行时间也会略有减少。我们发布了一个公共仪表板，描述了这些替代边界（https://www.schooldiversity.org/），并邀请学校董事会及其选民评估其可行性。我们的结果表明，在不对家庭造成重大干扰的情况下实现更大程度的融合是可能的。

AI.tldr: 研究通过重新划定美国小学出勤边界以减少种族和民族隔离的可行性
AI.motivation: 现有出勤边界导致学校种族隔离，需探索减少隔离的方法，同时尽量减少对家庭出行时间和学校规模的影响
AI.method: 结合家长偏好数据与组合优化算法，模拟不同出勤边界方案，优化种族隔离程度并控制出行时间与学校规模变化
AI.result: 模拟显示，98个学区的种族隔离中位数减少14%，约20%学生需换校，同时出行时间略有缩短
AI.conclusion: 重新划定出勤边界可在不显著影响家庭的情况下提升学校多样性，为政策制定提供参考

Across districts, we observe a median 14% relative decrease in segregation, which we estimate would require approximately 20\% of students to switch schools and, surprisingly, a slight reduction in travel times. Our results show the possibility of greater integration without significant disruptions for families. 大多数美国学区都会划定“出勤边界”来定义学区，将学生分配到离家较近的学校，这通常会重现学校中的社区人口隔离。我们以小学为中心，提出这样的问题：通过重新划定出勤界限，我们可以在多大程度上减少学校隔离？将家长偏好数据与组合优化方法相结合，我们模拟了 98 个美国学区的替代边界，为超过 300 万小学生提供服务，最大限度地减少白人/非白人隔离，同时减轻出行时间和学校规模的变化。在各个学区，我们观察到隔离现象中位数相对减少了 14%，我们估计这将需要大约 20% 的学生转校，而且令人惊讶的是，出行时间也会略有减少。我们发布了一个公共仪表板，描述了这些替代边界（https://www.schooldiversity.org/），并邀请学校董事会及其选民评估其可行性。我们的结果表明，在不对家庭造成重大干扰的情况下实现更大程度的融合是可能的。 研究通过重新划定美国小学出勤边界以减少种族和民族隔离的可行性 Nabeel Gillani,Doug Beeferman,Christine Vega-Pourheydarian,Cassandra Overney,Pascal Van Hentenryck,Deb Roy cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Runsheng Xu,Xin Xia,Jinlong Li,Hanzhao Li,Shuo Zhang,Zhengzhong Tu,Zonglin Meng,Hao Xiang,Xiaoyu Dong,Rui Song,Hongkai Yu,Bolei Zhou,Jiaqi Ma
title: V2V4Real: A Real-world Large-scale Dataset for Vehicle-to-Vehicle Cooperative Perception
title_zh: V2V4Real：真实世界的大规模车对车协同感知数据集
abstract: Modern perception systems of autonomous vehicles are known to be sensitive to occlusions and lack the capability of long perceiving range. It has been one of the key bottlenecks that prevents Level 5 autonomy. Recent research has demonstrated that the Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) cooperative perception system has great potential to revolutionize the autonomous driving industry. However, the lack of a real-world dataset hinders the progress of this field. To facilitate the development of cooperative perception, we present V2V4Real, the first large-scale real-world multi-modal dataset for V2V perception. The data is collected by two vehicles equipped with multi-modal sensors driving together through diverse scenarios. Our V2V4Real dataset covers a driving area of 410 km, comprising 20K LiDAR frames, 40K RGB frames, 240K annotated 3D bounding boxes for 5 classes, and HDMaps that cover all the driving routes. V2V4Real introduces three perception tasks, including cooperative 3D object detection, cooperative 3D object tracking, and Sim2Real domain adaptation for cooperative perception. We provide comprehensive benchmarks of recent cooperative perception algorithms on three tasks. The V2V4Real dataset can be found at https://research.seas.ucla.edu/mobility-lab/v2v4real/.
summary: Modern perception systems of autonomous vehicles are known to be sensitive to occlusions and lack the capability of long perceiving range. It has been one of the key bottlenecks that prevents Level 5 autonomy. Recent research has demonstrated that the Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) cooperative perception system has great potential to revolutionize the autonomous driving industry. However, the lack of a real-world dataset hinders the progress of this field. To facilitate the development of cooperative perception, we present V2V4Real, the first large-scale real-world multi-modal dataset for V2V perception. The data is collected by two vehicles equipped with multi-modal sensors driving together through diverse scenarios. Our V2V4Real dataset covers a driving area of 410 km, comprising 20K LiDAR frames, 40K RGB frames, 240K annotated 3D bounding boxes for 5 classes, and HDMaps that cover all the driving routes. V2V4Real introduces three perception tasks, including cooperative 3D object detection, cooperative 3D object tracking, and Sim2Real domain adaptation for cooperative perception. We provide comprehensive benchmarks of recent cooperative perception algorithms on three tasks. The V2V4Real dataset can be found at https://research.seas.ucla.edu/mobility-lab/v2v4real/.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，现代自动驾驶汽车的感知系统对遮挡很敏感，并且缺乏长感知范围的能力。它一直是阻碍 5 级自治的关键瓶颈之一。最近的研究表明，车对车（V2V）协作感知系统具有彻底改变自动驾驶行业的巨大潜力。然而，缺乏真实世界的数据集阻碍了该领域的进展。为了促进合作感知的发展，我们提出了 V2V4Real，这是第一个用于 V2V 感知的大规模现实世界多模态数据集。这些数据是由两辆配备多模态传感器的车辆在不同的场景中一起行驶来收集的。我们的 V2V4Real 数据集覆盖了 410 公里的驾驶区域，包括 20K LiDAR 帧、40K RGB 帧、240K 5 个类别的带注释 3D 边界框以及覆盖所有驾驶路线的 HDMap。 V2V4Real 引入了三个感知任务，包括协作 3D 对象检测、协作 3D 对象跟踪和用于协作感知的 Sim2Real 域适应。我们提供了近期协作感知算法在三个任务上的综合基准。 V2V4Real 数据集可在 https://research.seas.ucla.edu/mobility-lab/v2v4real/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 提出V2V4Real数据集，用于车对车协同感知研究，解决自动驾驶中的遮挡和感知范围问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶感知系统对遮挡敏感且感知范围有限，缺乏真实场景的大型数据集阻碍了V2V协同感知技术的发展。
AI.method: 通过两辆配备多模态传感器的车辆在多样化场景中行驶，采集410公里数据，包含20K LiDAR帧、40K RGB帧、240K标注框及HD地图，并设计三个协同感知任务。
AI.result: 提供了协同3D检测、跟踪及Sim2Real域适应的基准测试，验证了数据集对算法评估的有效性。
AI.conclusion: V2V4Real填补了真实场景V2V数据的空白，为协同感知算法研究提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Leila Ismail,Huned Materwala,Alain Hennebelle
title: Forecasting COVID-19 Infections in Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) Countries using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习预测海湾合作委员会 (GCC) 国家的 COVID-19 感染情况
comment: 9 pages, Proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Computer Modeling and Simulation, ICCMS 2021, Autoregressive integrated moving average, ARIMA, Coronavirus, COVID-19, Damped Trend, Holt Linear Trend, Machine learning, Pandemic, Time series
comments: 9 pages, Proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Computer Modeling and Simulation, ICCMS 2021, Autoregressive integrated moving average, ARIMA, Coronavirus, COVID-19, Damped Trend, Holt Linear Trend, Machine learning, Pandemic, Time series
abstract: COVID-19 has infected more than 68 million people worldwide since it was first detected about a year ago. Machine learning time series models have been implemented to forecast COVID-19 infections. In this paper, we develop time series models for the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries using the public COVID-19 dataset from Johns Hopkins. The dataset set includes the one-year cumulative COVID-19 cases between 22/01/2020 to 22/01/2021. We developed different models for the countries under study based on the spatial distribution of the infection data. Our experimental results show that the developed models can forecast COVID-19 infections with high precision.
summary: COVID-19 has infected more than 68 million people worldwide since it was first detected about a year ago. Machine learning time series models have been implemented to forecast COVID-19 infections. In this paper, we develop time series models for the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries using the public COVID-19 dataset from Johns Hopkins. The dataset set includes the one-year cumulative COVID-19 cases between 22/01/2020 to 22/01/2021. We developed different models for the countries under study based on the spatial distribution of the infection data. Our experimental results show that the developed models can forecast COVID-19 infections with high precision.
abstract_zh: 自大约一年前首次发现以来，COVID-19 已在全球范围内感染了超过 6800 万人。机器学习时间序列模型已用于预测 COVID-19 感染。在本文中，我们使用约翰·霍普金斯大学的公共 COVID-19 数据集为海湾合作委员会 (GCC) 国家开发时间序列模型。该数据集包括2020年1月22日至2021年1月22日期间一年累计的COVID-19病例。我们根据感染数据的空间分布为所研究的国家开发了不同的模型。我们的实验结果表明，开发的模型可以高精度预测 COVID-19 感染。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用机器学习时间序列模型预测海湾合作委员会（GCC）国家的COVID-19感染情况。
AI.motivation: 全球COVID-19疫情持续蔓延，准确预测感染趋势对公共卫生政策制定至关重要，而针对GCC国家的特定研究仍显不足。
AI.method: 基于约翰霍普金斯大学公开的累计病例数据（2020年1月22日至2021年1月22日），根据感染数据的空间分布特征，为每个GCC国家开发定制化的时间序列模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，所开发的模型能够以高精度预测GCC国家的COVID-19感染情况。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习时间序列模型可有效用于预测GCC国家的疫情发展，为疫情防控提供数据支持。

authors_text: Xiao Wang,Ying Wang,Ziwei Xuan,Guo-Jun Qi
title: AdPE: Adversarial Positional Embeddings for Pretraining Vision Transformers via MAE+
title_zh: AdPE：通过 MAE+ 预训练视觉 Transformer 的对抗性位置嵌入
abstract: Unsupervised learning of vision transformers seeks to pretrain an encoder via pretext tasks without labels. Among them is the Masked Image Modeling (MIM) aligned with pretraining of language transformers by predicting masked patches as a pretext task. A criterion in unsupervised pretraining is the pretext task needs to be sufficiently hard to prevent the transformer encoder from learning trivial low-level features not generalizable well to downstream tasks. For this purpose, we propose an Adversarial Positional Embedding (AdPE) approach -- It distorts the local visual structures by perturbing the position encodings so that the learned transformer cannot simply use the locally correlated patches to predict the missing ones. We hypothesize that it forces the transformer encoder to learn more discriminative features in a global context with stronger generalizability to downstream tasks. We will consider both absolute and relative positional encodings, where adversarial positions can be imposed both in the embedding mode and the coordinate mode. We will also present a new MAE+ baseline that brings the performance of the MIM pretraining to a new level with the AdPE. The experiments demonstrate that our approach can improve the fine-tuning accuracy of MAE by $0.8\%$ and $0.4\%$ over 1600 epochs of pretraining ViT-B and ViT-L on Imagenet1K. For the transfer learning task, it outperforms the MAE with the ViT-B backbone by $2.6\%$ in mIoU on ADE20K, and by $3.2\%$ in AP$^{bbox}$ and $1.6\%$ in AP$^{mask}$ on COCO, respectively. These results are obtained with the AdPE being a pure MIM approach that does not use any extra models or external datasets for pretraining. The code is available at https://github.com/maple-research-lab/AdPE.

The experiments demonstrate that our approach can improve the fine-tuning accuracy of MAE by $0.8\%$ and $0.4\%$ over 1600 epochs of pretraining ViT-B and ViT-L on Imagenet1K. These results are obtained with the AdPE being a pure MIM approach that does not use any extra models or external datasets for pretraining. The code is available at https://github.com/maple-research-lab/AdPE.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器的无监督学习旨在通过没有标签的借口任务来预训练编码器。其中包括通过预测蒙版补丁作为借口任务来与语言转换器的预训练相结合的蒙版图像建模（MIM）。无监督预训练的一个标准是借口任务需要足够困难，以防止 Transformer 编码器学习不能很好地推广到下游任务的琐碎低级特征。为此，我们提出了一种对抗性位置嵌入（AdPE）方法——它通过扰乱位置编码来扭曲局部视觉结构，使得学习到的变换器不能简单地使用局部相关的补丁来预测丢失的补丁。我们假设它迫使 Transformer 编码器在全局上下文中学习更多判别性特征，并对下游任务具有更强的泛化性。我们将考虑绝对和相对位置编码，其中可以在嵌入模式和坐标模式中施加对抗性位置。我们还将推出新的 MAE+ 基线，利用 AdPE 将 MIM 预训练的性能提升到新的水平。实验表明，在 Imagenet1K 上预训练 ViT-B 和 ViT-L 的 1600 个 epoch 中，我们的方法可以将 MAE 的微调精度提高 $0.8\%$ 和 $0.4\%$。对于迁移学习任务，它在 ADE20K 上的 mIoU 上优于采用 ViT-B 主干的 MAE，性能优于采用 ViT-B 主干的 MAE，在 COCO 上的 AP$^{bbox}$ 上性能优于具有 ViT-B 主干的 MAE，性能优于具有 ViT-B 主干的 MAE $2.6\%$，在 AP$^{bbox}$ 上性能优于具有 $3.2\%$ 的性能，在 AP$^{mask}$ 上性能优于具有 $1.6\%$ 的 MAE。这些结果是通过 AdPE 获得的，AdPE 是一种纯 MIM 方法，不使用任何额外的模型或外部数据集进行预训练。该代码可从 https://github.com/maple-research-lab/AdPE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdPE方法，通过对抗性位置嵌入改进视觉Transformer的预训练，提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 无监督预训练中，传统掩码图像建模（MIM）任务过于简单，导致模型仅学习局部特征而缺乏全局判别能力，影响下游任务表现。
AI.method: 通过扰动位置编码破坏局部视觉结构，迫使模型在全局上下文中学习更判别性特征，同时提出改进的MAE+基线框架。
AI.result: 在ImageNet1K上提升ViT-B/L微调准确率0.8%/0.4%，ADE20K mIoU提升2.6%，COCO目标检测指标提升3.2%/1.6%。
AI.conclusion: AdPE纯MIM方法无需额外模型或数据即可增强特征泛化能力，有效提升视觉Transformer的预训练效果。

search_text: AdPE: Adversarial Positional Embeddings for Pretraining Vision Transformers via MAE+ AdPE：通过 MAE+ 预训练视觉 Transformer 的对抗性位置嵌入 Unsupervised learning of vision transformers seeks to pretrain an encoder via pretext tasks without labels. Among them is the Masked Image Modeling (MIM) aligned with pretraining of language transformers by predicting masked patches as a pretext task. A criterion in unsupervised pretraining is the pretext task needs to be sufficiently hard to prevent the transformer encoder from learning trivial low-level features not generalizable well to downstream tasks. For this purpose, we propose an Adversarial Positional Embedding (AdPE) approach -- It distorts the local visual structures by perturbing the position encodings so that the learned transformer cannot simply use the locally correlated patches to predict the missing ones. We hypothesize that it forces the transformer encoder to learn more discriminative features in a global context with stronger generalizability to downstream tasks. We will consider both absolute and relative positional encodings, where adversarial positions can be imposed both in the embedding mode and the coordinate mode. We will also present a new MAE+ baseline that brings the performance of the MIM pretraining to a new level with the AdPE. The experiments demonstrate that our approach can improve the fine-tuning accuracy of MAE by $0.8\%$ and $0.4\%$ over 1600 epochs of pretraining ViT-B and ViT-L on Imagenet1K. For the transfer learning task, it outperforms the MAE with the ViT-B backbone by $2.6\%$ in mIoU on ADE20K, and by $3.2\%$ in AP$^{bbox}$ and $1.6\%$ in AP$^{mask}$ on COCO, respectively. These results are obtained with the AdPE being a pure MIM approach that does not use any extra models or external datasets for pretraining. The code is available at https://github.com/maple-research-lab/AdPE. 视觉变换器的无监督学习旨在通过没有标签的借口任务来预训练编码器。其中包括通过预测蒙版补丁作为借口任务来与语言转换器的预训练相结合的蒙版图像建模（MIM）。无监督预训练的一个标准是借口任务需要足够困难，以防止 Transformer 编码器学习不能很好地推广到下游任务的琐碎低级特征。为此，我们提出了一种对抗性位置嵌入（AdPE）方法——它通过扰乱位置编码来扭曲局部视觉结构，使得学习到的变换器不能简单地使用局部相关的补丁来预测丢失的补丁。我们假设它迫使 Transformer 编码器在全局上下文中学习更多判别性特征，并对下游任务具有更强的泛化性。我们将考虑绝对和相对位置编码，其中可以在嵌入模式和坐标模式中施加对抗性位置。我们还将推出新的 MAE+ 基线，利用 AdPE 将 MIM 预训练的性能提升到新的水平。实验表明，在 Imagenet1K 上预训练 ViT-B 和 ViT-L 的 1600 个 epoch 中，我们的方法可以将 MAE 的微调精度提高 $0.8\%$ 和 $0.4\%$。对于迁移学习任务，它在 ADE20K 上的 mIoU 上优于采用 ViT-B 主干的 MAE，性能优于采用 ViT-B 主干的 MAE，在 COCO 上的 AP$^{bbox}$ 上性能优于具有 ViT-B 主干的 MAE，性能优于具有 ViT-B 主干的 MAE $2.6\%$，在 AP$^{bbox}$ 上性能优于具有 $3.2\%$ 的性能，在 AP$^{mask}$ 上性能优于具有 $1.6\%$ 的 MAE。这些结果是通过 AdPE 获得的，AdPE 是一种纯 MIM 方法，不使用任何额外的模型或外部数据集进行预训练。该代码可从 https://github.com/maple-research-lab/AdPE 获取。 本文提出AdPE方法，通过对抗性位置嵌入改进视觉Transformer的预训练，提升下游任务性能。 Xiao Wang,Ying Wang,Ziwei Xuan,Guo-Jun Qi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yi Zhang,Xiaoyang Huang,Bingbing Ni,Teng Li,Wenjun Zhang
title: Frequency-Modulated Point Cloud Rendering with Easy Editing
title_zh: 易于编辑的调频点云渲染
abstract: We develop an effective point cloud rendering pipeline for novel view synthesis, which enables high fidelity local detail reconstruction, real-time rendering and user-friendly editing. In the heart of our pipeline is an adaptive frequency modulation module called Adaptive Frequency Net (AFNet), which utilizes a hypernetwork to learn the local texture frequency encoding that is consecutively injected into adaptive frequency activation layers to modulate the implicit radiance signal. This mechanism improves the frequency expressive ability of the network with richer frequency basis support, only at a small computational budget. To further boost performance, a preprocessing module is also proposed for point cloud geometry optimization via point opacity estimation. In contrast to implicit rendering, our pipeline supports high-fidelity interactive editing based on point cloud manipulation. Extensive experimental results on NeRF-Synthetic, ScanNet, DTU and Tanks and Temples datasets demonstrate the superior performances achieved by our method in terms of PSNR, SSIM and LPIPS, in comparison to the state-of-the-art.
summary: We develop an effective point cloud rendering pipeline for novel view synthesis, which enables high fidelity local detail reconstruction, real-time rendering and user-friendly editing. In the heart of our pipeline is an adaptive frequency modulation module called Adaptive Frequency Net (AFNet), which utilizes a hypernetwork to learn the local texture frequency encoding that is consecutively injected into adaptive frequency activation layers to modulate the implicit radiance signal. This mechanism improves the frequency expressive ability of the network with richer frequency basis support, only at a small computational budget. To further boost performance, a preprocessing module is also proposed for point cloud geometry optimization via point opacity estimation. In contrast to implicit rendering, our pipeline supports high-fidelity interactive editing based on point cloud manipulation. Extensive experimental results on NeRF-Synthetic, ScanNet, DTU and Tanks and Temples datasets demonstrate the superior performances achieved by our method in terms of PSNR, SSIM and LPIPS, in comparison to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种有效的点云渲染管道，用于新颖的视图合成，从而实现高保真局部细节重建、实时渲染和用户友好的编辑。我们管道的核心是一个称为自适应频率网络（AFNet）的自适应频率调制模块，它利用超网络来学习局部纹理频率编码，该编码被连续注入自适应频率激活层以调制隐式辐射信号。该机制仅在较小的计算预算下就以更丰富的频率基础支持提高了网络的频率表达能力。为了进一步提高性能，还提出了一个预处理模块，通过点不透明度估计来进行点云几何优化。与隐式渲染相比，我们的管道支持基于点云操作的高保真交互式编辑。 NeRF-Synthetic、ScanNet、DTU 以及 Tanks 和 Temples 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 PSNR、SSIM 和 LPIPS 方面取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种支持高保真局部细节重建、实时渲染和用户友好编辑的点云渲染流水线，核心是自适应频率调制模块AFNet。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式渲染方法在局部细节表达和交互编辑方面存在局限，亟需一种兼顾高质量重建与高效编辑的点云渲染方案。
AI.method: 设计自适应频率网络AFNet，通过超网络学习局部纹理频率编码并注入到自适应频率激活层，结合点不透明度估计的预处理模块优化几何结构。
AI.result: 在NeRF-Synthetic等数据集上，相较最先进方法在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS指标上取得显著提升，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过频率调制机制和几何优化模块，在保证渲染质量的同时实现了高效的点云交互编辑，为新型视图合成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lishuang Zhan,Yancheng Cao,Qitai Chen,Haole Guo,Jiasi Gao,Yiyue Luo,Shihui Guo,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong
title: Enable Natural Tactile Interaction for Robot Dog based on Large-format Distributed Flexible Pressure Sensors
title_zh: 基于大幅面分布式柔性压力传感器为机器狗实现自然触觉交互
abstract: Touch is an important channel for human-robot interaction, while it is challenging for robots to recognize human touch accurately and make appropriate responses. In this paper, we design and implement a set of large-format distributed flexible pressure sensors on a robot dog to enable natural human-robot tactile interaction. Through a heuristic study, we sorted out 81 tactile gestures commonly used when humans interact with real dogs and 44 dog reactions. A gesture classification algorithm based on ResNet is proposed to recognize these 81 human gestures, and the classification accuracy reaches 98.7%. In addition, an action prediction algorithm based on Transformer is proposed to predict dog actions from human gestures, reaching a 1-gram BLEU score of 0.87. Finally, we compare the tactile interaction with the voice interaction during a freedom human-robot-dog interactive playing study. The results show that tactile interaction plays a more significant role in alleviating user anxiety, stimulating user excitement and improving the acceptability of robot dogs.
summary: Touch is an important channel for human-robot interaction, while it is challenging for robots to recognize human touch accurately and make appropriate responses. In this paper, we design and implement a set of large-format distributed flexible pressure sensors on a robot dog to enable natural human-robot tactile interaction. Through a heuristic study, we sorted out 81 tactile gestures commonly used when humans interact with real dogs and 44 dog reactions. A gesture classification algorithm based on ResNet is proposed to recognize these 81 human gestures, and the classification accuracy reaches 98.7%. In addition, an action prediction algorithm based on Transformer is proposed to predict dog actions from human gestures, reaching a 1-gram BLEU score of 0.87. Finally, we compare the tactile interaction with the voice interaction during a freedom human-robot-dog interactive playing study. The results show that tactile interaction plays a more significant role in alleviating user anxiety, stimulating user excitement and improving the acceptability of robot dogs.
abstract_zh: 触摸是人机交互的重要渠道，而机器人如何准确识别人类的触摸并做出适当的反应是一个挑战。在本文中，我们在机器狗上设计并实现了一组大型分布式柔性压力传感器，以实现自然的人机触觉交互。通过启发式研究，我们整理出了人类与真实狗互动时常用的 81 种触觉手势和 44 种狗的反应。提出一种基于ResNet的手势分类算法来识别这81个人体手势，分类准确率达到98.7%。此外，还提出了一种基于 Transformer 的动作预测算法，用于根据人类手势预测狗的动作，达到 1-gram BLEU 分数 0.87。最后，我们在自由人-机器人-狗互动游戏研究中比较了触觉交互和语音交互。结果表明，触觉交互对于缓解用户焦虑、激发用户兴奋、提高机器狗的接受度等方面发挥着更为显着的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种基于大尺寸分布式柔性压力传感器的机器人狗触觉交互系统，以提升人与机器人狗之间的自然交互体验。
AI.motivation: 触觉是人机交互的重要渠道，但机器人难以准确识别人类触碰并作出恰当反应，现有语音交互在情感传递上存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过启发式研究整理人类与真实犬类交互的81种触觉手势及44种犬类反应，提出基于ResNet的触觉手势分类算法和基于Transformer的动作预测算法，并对比触觉交互与语音交互的效果。
AI.result: 手势分类准确率达98.7%，动作预测BLEU得分0.87，触觉交互在缓解用户焦虑、激发兴奋感及提升机器人狗可接受度方面显著优于语音交互。

search_text: Enable Natural Tactile Interaction for Robot Dog based on Large-format Distributed Flexible Pressure Sensors 基于大幅面分布式柔性压力传感器为机器狗实现自然触觉交互 Touch is an important channel for human-robot interaction, while it is challenging for robots to recognize human touch accurately and make appropriate responses. In this paper, we design and implement a set of large-format distributed flexible pressure sensors on a robot dog to enable natural human-robot tactile interaction. Through a heuristic study, we sorted out 81 tactile gestures commonly used when humans interact with real dogs and 44 dog reactions. A gesture classification algorithm based on ResNet is proposed to recognize these 81 human gestures, and the classification accuracy reaches 98.7%. In addition, an action prediction algorithm based on Transformer is proposed to predict dog actions from human gestures, reaching a 1-gram BLEU score of 0.87. Finally, we compare the tactile interaction with the voice interaction during a freedom human-robot-dog interactive playing study. The results show that tactile interaction plays a more significant role in alleviating user anxiety, stimulating user excitement and improving the acceptability of robot dogs. 触摸是人机交互的重要渠道，而机器人如何准确识别人类的触摸并做出适当的反应是一个挑战。在本文中，我们在机器狗上设计并实现了一组大型分布式柔性压力传感器，以实现自然的人机触觉交互。通过启发式研究，我们整理出了人类与真实狗互动时常用的 81 种触觉手势和 44 种狗的反应。提出一种基于ResNet的手势分类算法来识别这81个人体手势，分类准确率达到98.7%。此外，还提出了一种基于 Transformer 的动作预测算法，用于根据人类手势预测狗的动作，达到 1-gram BLEU 分数 0.87。最后，我们在自由人-机器人-狗互动游戏研究中比较了触觉交互和语音交互。结果表明，触觉交互对于缓解用户焦虑、激发用户兴奋、提高机器狗的接受度等方面发挥着更为显着的作用。 本文设计并实现了一种基于大尺寸分布式柔性压力传感器的机器人狗触觉交互系统，以提升人与机器人狗之间的自然交互体验。 Lishuang Zhan,Yancheng Cao,Qitai Chen,Haole Guo,Jiasi Gao,Yiyue Luo,Shihui Guo,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Hyungjun Lim,Younggwan Kim,Kiho Yeom,Eunjoo Seo,Hoodong Lee,Stanley Jungkyu Choi,Honglak Lee
title: Lightweight feature encoder for wake-up word detection based on self-supervised speech representation
title_zh: 基于自监督语音表示的轻量级唤醒词检测特征编码器
abstract: Self-supervised learning method that provides generalized speech representations has recently received increasing attention. Wav2vec 2.0 is the most famous example, showing remarkable performance in numerous downstream speech processing tasks. Despite its success, it is challenging to use it directly for wake-up word detection on mobile devices due to its expensive computational cost. In this work, we propose LiteFEW, a lightweight feature encoder for wake-up word detection that preserves the inherent ability of wav2vec 2.0 with a minimum scale. In the method, the knowledge of the pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 is compressed by introducing an auto-encoder-based dimensionality reduction technique and distilled to LiteFEW. Experimental results on the open-source "Hey Snips" dataset show that the proposed method applied to various model structures significantly improves the performance, achieving over 20% of relative improvements with only 64k parameters.
summary: Self-supervised learning method that provides generalized speech representations has recently received increasing attention. Wav2vec 2.0 is the most famous example, showing remarkable performance in numerous downstream speech processing tasks. Despite its success, it is challenging to use it directly for wake-up word detection on mobile devices due to its expensive computational cost. In this work, we propose LiteFEW, a lightweight feature encoder for wake-up word detection that preserves the inherent ability of wav2vec 2.0 with a minimum scale. In the method, the knowledge of the pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 is compressed by introducing an auto-encoder-based dimensionality reduction technique and distilled to LiteFEW. Experimental results on the open-source "Hey Snips" dataset show that the proposed method applied to various model structures significantly improves the performance, achieving over 20% of relative improvements with only 64k parameters.
abstract_zh: 提供广义语音表示的自监督学习方法最近受到越来越多的关注。 Wav2vec 2.0 是最著名的例子，在众多下游语音处理任务中表现出了卓越的性能。尽管它取得了成功，但由于其昂贵的计算成本，直接将其用于移动设备上的唤醒词检测仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LiteFEW，一种用于唤醒词检测的轻量级特征编码器，它以最小的规模保留了 wav2vec 2.0 的固有能力。在该方法中，通过引入基于自动编码器的降维技术来压缩预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 的知识，并将其提炼为 LiteFEW。在开源“Hey Snips”数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法应用于各种模型结构显着提高了性能，仅用 64k 参数就实现了超过 20% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级特征编码器LiteFEW，用于基于自监督语音表示的唤醒词检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管Wav2vec 2.0等自监督学习方法在语音处理中表现优异，但其高昂的计算成本限制了其在移动设备上直接用于唤醒词检测。
AI.method: 通过引入基于自编码器的降维技术和知识蒸馏方法，将预训练的Wav2vec 2.0模型知识压缩到LiteFEW中。
AI.result: 在开源数据集"Hey Snips"上，LiteFEW在多种模型结构中实现超过20%的相对性能提升，参数量仅为64k。
AI.conclusion: LiteFEW在保持Wav2vec 2.0性能优势的同时显著降低了计算成本，适用于移动设备的唤醒词检测场景。

authors_text: Steven Shaw,Kanishka Tyagi,Shan Zhang
title: Teacher-Student Knowledge Distillation for Radar Perception on Embedded Accelerators
title_zh: 嵌入式加速器雷达感知师生知识蒸馏
abstract: Many radar signal processing methodologies are being developed for critical road safety perception tasks. Unfortunately, these signal processing algorithms are often poorly suited to run on embedded hardware accelerators used in automobiles. Conversely, end-to-end machine learning (ML) approaches better exploit the performance gains brought by specialized accelerators. In this paper, we propose a teacher-student knowledge distillation approach for low-level radar perception tasks. We utilize a hybrid model for stationary object detection as a teacher to train an end-to-end ML student model. The student can efficiently harness embedded compute for real-time deployment. We demonstrate that the proposed student model runs at speeds 100x faster than the teacher model.
summary: Many radar signal processing methodologies are being developed for critical road safety perception tasks. Unfortunately, these signal processing algorithms are often poorly suited to run on embedded hardware accelerators used in automobiles. Conversely, end-to-end machine learning (ML) approaches better exploit the performance gains brought by specialized accelerators. In this paper, we propose a teacher-student knowledge distillation approach for low-level radar perception tasks. We utilize a hybrid model for stationary object detection as a teacher to train an end-to-end ML student model. The student can efficiently harness embedded compute for real-time deployment. We demonstrate that the proposed student model runs at speeds 100x faster than the teacher model.
abstract_zh: 许多雷达信号处理方法正在开发用于关键的道路安全感知任务。不幸的是，这些信号处理算法通常不太适合在汽车中使用的嵌入式硬件加速器上运行。相反，端到端机器学习 (ML) 方法可以更好地利用专用加速器带来的性能提升。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对低级雷达感知任务的师生知识蒸馏方法。我们利用用于静止物体检测的混合模型作为教师来训练端到端 ML 学生模型。学生可以有效地利用嵌入式计算进行实时部署。我们证明了所提出的学生模型的运行速度比教师模型快 100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于教师-学生知识蒸馏的雷达感知方法，旨在优化嵌入式加速器上的实时部署。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达信号处理算法难以适配车载嵌入式硬件加速器，而端到端机器学习方法能更好发挥加速器性能，需解决模型轻量化与实时性问题。
AI.method: 采用混合模型作为教师模型训练端到端学生模型，通过知识蒸馏实现模型压缩，使学生模型适配嵌入式计算资源。
AI.result: 学生模型在保持性能的同时，运行速度较教师模型提升100倍，满足实时部署需求。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏方法有效解决了雷达感知模型在嵌入式硬件上的部署难题，为车载安全系统提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Haohan Wang,Liang Liu,Boshen Zhang,Jiangning Zhang,Wuhao Zhang,Zhenye Gan,Yabiao Wang,Chengjie Wang,Haoqian Wang
title: Calibrated Teacher for Sparsely Annotated Object Detection
title_zh: 用于稀疏注释对象检测的校准教师
abstract: Fully supervised object detection requires training images in which all instances are annotated. This is actually impractical due to the high labor and time costs and the unavoidable missing annotations. As a result, the incomplete annotation in each image could provide misleading supervision and harm the training. Recent works on sparsely annotated object detection alleviate this problem by generating pseudo labels for the missing annotations. Such a mechanism is sensitive to the threshold of the pseudo label score. However, the effective threshold is different in different training stages and among different object detectors. Therefore, the current methods with fixed thresholds have sub-optimal performance, and are difficult to be applied to other detectors. In order to resolve this obstacle, we propose a Calibrated Teacher, of which the confidence estimation of the prediction is well calibrated to match its real precision. In this way, different detectors in different training stages would share a similar distribution of the output confidence, so that multiple detectors could share the same fixed threshold and achieve better performance. Furthermore, we present a simple but effective Focal IoU Weight (FIoU) for the classification loss. FIoU aims at reducing the loss weight of false negative samples caused by the missing annotation, and thus works as the complement of the teacher-student paradigm. Extensive experiments show that our methods set new state-of-the-art under all different sparse settings in COCO. Code will be available at https://github.com/Whileherham/CalibratedTeacher.

abstract_zh: 完全监督的对象检测需要对所有实例进行注释的训练图像。由于高昂的人力和时间成本以及不可避免的注释缺失，这实际上是不切实际的。因此，每张图像中不完整的注释可能会提供误导性的监督并损害训练。最近关于稀疏注释对象检测的工作通过为丢失的注释生成伪标签来缓解这个问题。这种机制对伪标签分数的阈值敏感。然而，不同的训练阶段和不同的目标检测器之间的有效阈值是不同的。因此，当前具有固定阈值的方法性能欠佳，并且难以应用于其他检测器。为了解决这个障碍，我们提出了一个校准教师，其中预测的置信度估计被很好地校准以匹配其真实精度。这样，不同训练阶段的不同检测器将共享相似的输出置信度分布，从而多个检测器可以共享相同的固定阈值并获得更好的性能。此外，我们为分类损失提出了一个简单但有效的焦点 IoU 权重（FIoU）。 FIoU旨在减少由于缺失标注而导致的假阴性样本的损失权重，从而作为师生范式的补充。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 COCO 中所有不同的稀疏设置下设置了新的最先进技术。代码将在 https://github.com/Whileherham/CalibrateTeacher 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于稀疏标注目标检测的校准教师方法，通过动态调整置信度估计和引入聚焦IoU权重来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏标注目标检测方法依赖固定阈值生成伪标签，但不同训练阶段和检测器的阈值需求差异导致性能次优，且难以泛化。
AI.method: 设计校准教师模块使预测置信度与真实精度分布对齐，实现跨检测器的统一阈值；提出聚焦IoU权重（FIoU）降低缺失标注导致的假阴性样本损失权重。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上所有稀疏标注设置下均达到新SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 校准教师与FIoU的联合优化有效解决了稀疏标注目标检测中阈值敏感性和假阴性问题，为多检测器协作提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Yuma Torikoshi,Yasuharu Nishi,Juichi Takahashi
title: Sensitive Region-based Metamorphic Testing Framework using Explainable AI
title_zh: 使用可解释人工智能的基于敏感区域的变形测试框架
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) is one of the most popular research topics in machine learning and DL-driven image recognition systems have developed rapidly. Recent research has employed metamorphic testing (MT) to detect misclassified images. Most of them discuss metamorphic relations (MR), with limited attention given to which regions should be transformed. We focus on the fact that there are sensitive regions where even small transformations can easily change the prediction results and propose an MT framework that efficiently tests for regions prone to misclassification by transforming these sensitive regions. Our evaluation demonstrated that the sensitive regions can be specified by Explainable AI (XAI) and our framework effectively detects faults.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) is one of the most popular research topics in machine learning and DL-driven image recognition systems have developed rapidly. Recent research has employed metamorphic testing (MT) to detect misclassified images. Most of them discuss metamorphic relations (MR), with limited attention given to which regions should be transformed. We focus on the fact that there are sensitive regions where even small transformations can easily change the prediction results and propose an MT framework that efficiently tests for regions prone to misclassification by transforming these sensitive regions. Our evaluation demonstrated that the sensitive regions can be specified by Explainable AI (XAI) and our framework effectively detects faults.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）是机器学习领域最热门的研究课题之一，DL驱动的图像识别系统发展迅速。最近的研究采用变形测试（MT）来检测错误分类的图像。他们中的大多数讨论了变质关系（MR），而对哪些区域应该转变的关注有限。我们关注这样一个事实，即存在敏感区域，即使很小的变换也很容易改变预测结果，并提出了一种 MT 框架，通过变换这些敏感区域来有效地测试容易错误分类的区域。我们的评估表明，敏感区域可以通过可解释的人工智能（XAI）来指定，并且我们的框架可以有效地检测故障。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于敏感区域的可解释AI metamorphic测试框架，通过识别图像中易受微小变换影响的敏感区域，提升深度学习图像识别系统的故障检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有metamorphic测试方法过度关注变换关系定义，忽视了图像中关键敏感区域的定位，而这些区域的微小扰动易导致预测结果突变，需针对性测试。
AI.method: 结合可解释AI技术定位图像敏感区域，构建针对这些区域的metamorphic测试用例，通过变换敏感区域验证系统鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明敏感区域可通过XAI准确识别，所提框架相比传统方法能更高效检测出图像识别系统的分类错误和潜在缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 将可解释AI与metamorphic测试结合，聚焦敏感区域进行测试能显著提升深度学习系统故障检测能力，为安全测试提供新思路。

authors_text: Rohan Badlani,Akshit Arora,Subhankar Ghosh,Rafael Valle,Kevin J. Shih,João Felipe Santos,Boris Ginsburg,Bryan Catanzaro
title: VANI: Very-lightweight Accent-controllable TTS for Native and Non-native speakers with Identity Preservation
title_zh: VANI：非常轻量级的口音可控 TTS，适用于母语和非母语人士，具有身份保护功能
abstract: We introduce VANI, a very lightweight multi-lingual accent controllable speech synthesis system. Our model builds upon disentanglement strategies proposed in RADMMM and supports explicit control of accent, language, speaker and fine-grained $F_0$ and energy features for speech synthesis. We utilize the Indic languages dataset, released for LIMMITS 2023 as part of ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge, to synthesize speech in 3 different languages. Our model supports transferring the language of a speaker while retaining their voice and the native accent of the target language. We utilize the large-parameter RADMMM model for Track $1$ and lightweight VANI model for Track $2$ and $3$ of the competition.
summary: We introduce VANI, a very lightweight multi-lingual accent controllable speech synthesis system. Our model builds upon disentanglement strategies proposed in RADMMM and supports explicit control of accent, language, speaker and fine-grained $F_0$ and energy features for speech synthesis. We utilize the Indic languages dataset, released for LIMMITS 2023 as part of ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge, to synthesize speech in 3 different languages. Our model supports transferring the language of a speaker while retaining their voice and the native accent of the target language. We utilize the large-parameter RADMMM model for Track $1$ and lightweight VANI model for Track $2$ and $3$ of the competition.
abstract_zh: 我们推出VANI，一个非常轻量级的多语言口音可控语音合成系统。我们的模型建立在 RADMMM 中提出的解缠结策略的基础上，支持对口音、语言、说话者以及语音合成的细粒度 $F_0$ 和能量特征的显式控制。我们利用印度语言数据集（作为 ICASSP 信号处理大挑战赛的一部分）在 LIMMITS 2023 上发布的数据集来合成 3 种不同语言的语音。我们的模型支持传输说话者的语言，同时保留他们的声音和目标语言的母语口音。我们对比赛的赛道 $1$ 使用大参数 RADMMM 模型，对赛道 $2$ 和 $3$ 使用轻量级 VANI 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VANI，一种轻量级多语言口音可控语音合成系统，支持保留说话人身份的同时转换语言和口音。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS系统难以在保持说话人身份的同时实现多语言口音控制，且模型参数量较大。
AI.method: 基于RADMMM解耦策略，利用Indic语言数据集，通过轻量级VANI模型实现语言、口音、说话人及声学特征的显式控制。
AI.result: 在LIMMITS 2023竞赛中，VANI模型在Track 2和3中成功合成三种语言语音，实现语言转换与身份保留。
AI.conclusion: VANI验证了轻量级模型在多语言口音可控语音合成中的有效性，为实际应用提供高效解决方案。

search_text: VANI: Very-lightweight Accent-controllable TTS for Native and Non-native speakers with Identity Preservation VANI：非常轻量级的口音可控 TTS，适用于母语和非母语人士，具有身份保护功能 We introduce VANI, a very lightweight multi-lingual accent controllable speech synthesis system. Our model builds upon disentanglement strategies proposed in RADMMM and supports explicit control of accent, language, speaker and fine-grained $F_0$ and energy features for speech synthesis. We utilize the Indic languages dataset, released for LIMMITS 2023 as part of ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge, to synthesize speech in 3 different languages. Our model supports transferring the language of a speaker while retaining their voice and the native accent of the target language. We utilize the large-parameter RADMMM model for Track $1$ and lightweight VANI model for Track $2$ and $3$ of the competition. 我们推出VANI，一个非常轻量级的多语言口音可控语音合成系统。我们的模型建立在 RADMMM 中提出的解缠结策略的基础上，支持对口音、语言、说话者以及语音合成的细粒度 $F_0$ 和能量特征的显式控制。我们利用印度语言数据集（作为 ICASSP 信号处理大挑战赛的一部分）在 LIMMITS 2023 上发布的数据集来合成 3 种不同语言的语音。我们的模型支持传输说话者的语言，同时保留他们的声音和目标语言的母语口音。我们对比赛的赛道 $1$ 使用大参数 RADMMM 模型，对赛道 $2$ 和 $3$ 使用轻量级 VANI 模型。 本文提出VANI，一种轻量级多语言口音可控语音合成系统，支持保留说话人身份的同时转换语言和口音。 Rohan Badlani,Akshit Arora,Subhankar Ghosh,Rafael Valle,Kevin J. Shih,João Felipe Santos,Boris Ginsburg,Bryan Catanzaro cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuansong Zhu,Yu Zhao
title: Diffusion Models in NLP: A Survey
title_zh: NLP 中的扩散模型：一项调查
abstract: Diffusion models have become a powerful family of deep generative models, with record-breaking performance in many applications. This paper first gives an overview and derivation of the basic theory of diffusion models, then reviews the research results of diffusion models in the field of natural language processing, from text generation, text-driven image generation and other four aspects, and analyzes and summarizes the relevant literature materials sorted out, and finally records the experience and feelings of this topic literature review research.
summary: Diffusion models have become a powerful family of deep generative models, with record-breaking performance in many applications. This paper first gives an overview and derivation of the basic theory of diffusion models, then reviews the research results of diffusion models in the field of natural language processing, from text generation, text-driven image generation and other four aspects, and analyzes and summarizes the relevant literature materials sorted out, and finally records the experience and feelings of this topic literature review research.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型已成为强大的深度生成模型系列，在许多应用中具有破纪录的性能。本文首先对扩散模型的基本理论进行了概述和推导，然后从文本生成、文本驱动的图像生成等四个方面回顾了扩散模型在自然语言处理领域的研究成果，并对整理的相关文献资料进行了分析和总结，最后记录了本课题文献综述研究的经验和感受。

AI.tldr: 本文概述扩散模型的基本理论，并综述其在自然语言处理领域的研究进展，涵盖文本生成、文本驱动图像生成等方向。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成模型中表现优异，但其在自然语言处理中的应用仍需系统性梳理与总结，以推动后续研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，从文本生成、图像生成等四个方向整理相关研究，分析并总结现有成果。
AI.result: 系统归纳了扩散模型在NLP领域的应用现状，总结了不同任务下的技术路线与挑战，并记录了文献调研的体会。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型在NLP中具有广阔前景，未来需进一步优化理论框架并探索跨模态应用潜力。

authors_text: Julian Neri,Sebastian Braun
title: Towards Real-Time Single-Channel Speech Separation in Noisy and Reverberant Environments
title_zh: 在嘈杂和混响环境中实现实时单通道语音分离
abstract: Real-time single-channel speech separation aims to unmix an audio stream captured from a single microphone that contains multiple people talking at once, environmental noise, and reverberation into multiple de-reverberated and noise-free speech tracks, each track containing only one talker. While large state-of-the-art DNNs can achieve excellent separation from anechoic mixtures of speech, the main challenge is to create compact and causal models that can separate reverberant mixtures at inference time. In this paper, we explore low-complexity, resource-efficient, causal DNN architectures for real-time separation of two or more simultaneous speakers. A cascade of three neural network modules are trained to sequentially perform noise-suppression, separation, and de-reverberation. For comparison, a larger end-to-end model is trained to output two anechoic speech signals directly from noisy reverberant speech mixtures. We propose an efficient single-decoder architecture with subtractive separation for real-time recursive speech separation for two or more speakers. Evaluation on real monophonic recordings of speech mixtures, according to speech separation measures like SI-SDR, perceptual measures like DNS-MOS, and a novel proposed channel separation metric, show that these compact causal models can separate speech mixtures with low latency, and perform on par with large offline state-of-the-art models like SepFormer.
summary: Real-time single-channel speech separation aims to unmix an audio stream captured from a single microphone that contains multiple people talking at once, environmental noise, and reverberation into multiple de-reverberated and noise-free speech tracks, each track containing only one talker. While large state-of-the-art DNNs can achieve excellent separation from anechoic mixtures of speech, the main challenge is to create compact and causal models that can separate reverberant mixtures at inference time. In this paper, we explore low-complexity, resource-efficient, causal DNN architectures for real-time separation of two or more simultaneous speakers. A cascade of three neural network modules are trained to sequentially perform noise-suppression, separation, and de-reverberation. For comparison, a larger end-to-end model is trained to output two anechoic speech signals directly from noisy reverberant speech mixtures. We propose an efficient single-decoder architecture with subtractive separation for real-time recursive speech separation for two or more speakers. Evaluation on real monophonic recordings of speech mixtures, according to speech separation measures like SI-SDR, perceptual measures like DNS-MOS, and a novel proposed channel separation metric, show that these compact causal models can separate speech mixtures with low latency, and perform on par with large offline state-of-the-art models like SepFormer.
abstract_zh: 实时单通道语音分离旨在将从单个麦克风捕获的包含多人同时讲话、环境噪声和混响的音频流分解为多个去混响且无噪声的语音轨道，每个轨道仅包含一个讲话者。虽然大型、最先进的 DNN 可以实现与消声混合语音的出色分离，但主要挑战是创建紧凑的因果模型，以便在推理时分离混响混合物。在本文中，我们探索了低复杂度、资源高效、因果 DNN 架构，用于实时分离两个或多个同时说话者。三个神经网络模块的级联经过训练，可以顺序执行噪声抑制、分离和去混响。为了进行比较，训练了一个更大的端到端模型，直接从噪声混响语音混合物中输出两个消声语音信号。我们提出了一种高效的单解码器架构，具有减法分离功能，用于两个或多个说话者的实时递归语音分离。根据 SI-SDR 等语音分离测量、DNS-MOS 等感知测量以及一种新提出的通道分离度量，对语音混合的真实单音录音进行评估，结果表明这些紧凑的因果模型可以低延迟地分离语音混合，并且与 SepFormer 等大型离线最先进模型的性能相当。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究在嘈杂和混响环境中实现实时单通道语音分离的方法，将单一麦克风捕获的多人语音、环境噪声和混响信号分离为多个清晰的语音轨道。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有深度神经网络在无混响语音分离中表现优异，但实时处理混响环境下的语音分离仍面临模型复杂度高、延迟大等挑战，需开发轻量级因果模型以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 提出级联三模块神经网络架构（噪声抑制→分离→去混响），并设计单解码器减法分离架构；同时对比训练端到端大模型直接输出无混响语音信号。
AI.result: 在真实单通道语音混合数据集上，基于SI-SDR、DNS-MOS等指标的评估表明，轻量模型在低延迟下性能可与SepFormer等大型离线模型媲美。
AI.conclusion: 通过级联模块化设计与单解码器架构，本文实现了兼顾实时性与分离性能的高效语音分离方案，为实际部署提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Hanyu Zhou,Yi Chang,Wending Yan,Luxin Yan
title: Unsupervised Cumulative Domain Adaptation for Foggy Scene Optical Flow
title_zh: 雾场景光流的无监督累积域适应
abstract: Optical flow has achieved great success under clean scenes, but suffers from restricted performance under foggy scenes. To bridge the clean-to-foggy domain gap, the existing methods typically adopt the domain adaptation to transfer the motion knowledge from clean to synthetic foggy domain. However, these methods unexpectedly neglect the synthetic-to-real domain gap, and thus are erroneous when applied to real-world scenes. To handle the practical optical flow under real foggy scenes, in this work, we propose a novel unsupervised cumulative domain adaptation optical flow (UCDA-Flow) framework: depth-association motion adaptation and correlation-alignment motion adaptation. Specifically, we discover that depth is a key ingredient to influence the optical flow: the deeper depth, the inferior optical flow, which motivates us to design a depth-association motion adaptation module to bridge the clean-to-foggy domain gap. Moreover, we figure out that the cost volume correlation shares similar distribution of the synthetic and real foggy images, which enlightens us to devise a correlation-alignment motion adaptation module to distill motion knowledge of the synthetic foggy domain to the real foggy domain. Note that synthetic fog is designed as the intermediate domain. Under this unified framework, the proposed cumulative adaptation progressively transfers knowledge from clean scenes to real foggy scenes. Extensive experiments have been performed to verify the superiority of the proposed method.

To bridge the clean-to-foggy domain gap, the existing methods typically adopt the domain adaptation to transfer the motion knowledge from clean to synthetic foggy domain. However, these methods unexpectedly neglect the synthetic-to-real domain gap, and thus are erroneous when applied to real-world scenes. Specifically, we discover that depth is a key ingredient to influence the optical flow: the deeper depth, the inferior optical flow, which motivates us to design a depth-association motion adaptation module to bridge the clean-to-foggy domain gap. Moreover, we figure out that the cost volume correlation shares similar distribution of the synthetic and real foggy images, which enlightens us to devise a correlation-alignment motion adaptation module to distill motion knowledge of the synthetic foggy domain to the real foggy domain. Note that synthetic fog is designed as the intermediate domain. Under this unified framework, the proposed cumulative adaptation progressively transfers knowledge from clean scenes to real foggy scenes. Extensive experiments have been performed to verify the superiority of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 光流在干净场景下取得了巨大成功，但在雾天场景下表现受到限制。为了弥合干净域与雾域之间的差距，现有方法通常采用域自适应将运动知识从干净域转移到合成雾域。然而，这些方法出乎意料地忽略了合成域与真实域的差距，因此在应用于现实场景时会出现错误。为了处理真实雾场景下的实际光流，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督累积域自适应光流（UCDA-Flow）框架：深度关联运动自适应和相关对齐运动自适应。具体来说，我们发现深度是影响光流的关键因素：深度越深，光流越差，这促使我们设计一个深度关联运动自适应模块来弥合干净到雾气的域差距。此外，我们发现合成和真实有雾图像的成本体积相关性具有相似的分布，这启发我们设计一种相关对齐运动自适应模块，将合成有雾域的运动知识提取到真实有雾域。请注意，合成雾被设计为中间域。在这个统一的框架下，所提出的累积适应逐步将知识从干净的场景转移到真实的有雾场景。进行了大量的实验来验证所提出方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督累积领域自适应框架UCDA-Flow，用于解决雾天场景下光流估计的领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注干净到合成雾的领域迁移，忽视了合成雾到真实雾的领域差距，导致在真实场景中性能不足。
AI.method: 设计深度关联运动自适应模块（利用深度与光流的关系）和相关对齐运动自适应模块（对齐合成与真实雾的代价体积分布），通过合成雾作为中间领域实现累积迁移。
AI.result: 在真实雾天场景的光流估计任务中，所提方法优于现有领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度关联与相关对齐的双重自适应机制，累积迁移框架有效弥合了多阶段领域差距，提升了雾天光流估计的准确性。

authors_text: Kostas Alexandridis
title: Machine Learning Computer Vision Applications for Spatial AI Object Recognition in Orange County, California
title_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥兰治县用于空间人工智能对象识别的机器学习计算机视觉应用
abstract: We provide an integrated and systematic automation approach to spatial object recognition and positional detection using AI machine learning and computer vision algorithms for Orange County, California. We describe a comprehensive methodology for multi-sensor, high-resolution field data acquisition, along with post-field processing and pre-analysis processing tasks. We developed a series of algorithmic formulations and workflows that integrate convolutional deep neural network learning with detected object positioning estimation in 360° equirectancular photosphere imagery. We provide examples of application processing more than 800 thousand cardinal directions in photosphere images across two areas in Orange County, and present detection results for stop-sign and fire hydrant object recognition. We discuss the efficiency and effectiveness of our approach, along with broader inferences related to the performance and implications of this approach for future technological innovations, including automation of spatial data and public asset inventories, and near real-time AI field data systems.
summary: We provide an integrated and systematic automation approach to spatial object recognition and positional detection using AI machine learning and computer vision algorithms for Orange County, California. We describe a comprehensive methodology for multi-sensor, high-resolution field data acquisition, along with post-field processing and pre-analysis processing tasks. We developed a series of algorithmic formulations and workflows that integrate convolutional deep neural network learning with detected object positioning estimation in 360° equirectancular photosphere imagery. We provide examples of application processing more than 800 thousand cardinal directions in photosphere images across two areas in Orange County, and present detection results for stop-sign and fire hydrant object recognition. We discuss the efficiency and effectiveness of our approach, along with broader inferences related to the performance and implications of this approach for future technological innovations, including automation of spatial data and public asset inventories, and near real-time AI field data systems.
abstract_zh: 我们使用人工智能机器学习和计算机视觉算法为加利福尼亚州奥兰治县提供集成且系统的自动化方法来进行空间物体识别和位置检测。我们描述了多传感器、高分辨率现场数据采集的综合方法，以及现场后处理和分析前处理任务。我们开发了一系列算法公式和工作流程，将卷积深度神经网络学习与 360° 等矩形光球图像中检测到的物体定位估计相结合。我们提供了应用程序处理奥兰治县两个区域的光球图像中超过 80 万个基本方向的示例，并提供了停车标志和消防栓对象识别的检测结果。我们讨论了我们方法的效率和有效性，以及与该方法的性能和对未来技术创新的影响相关的更广泛的推论，包括空间数据和公共资产清单的自动化，以及近实时的人工智能现场数据系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器学习与计算机视觉的自动化方法，用于加州橙县的空间物体识别与定位。
AI.motivation: 为提高空间数据处理效率及公共资产管理精度，需开发高效、可扩展的AI技术以实现实时物体检测与空间分析。
AI.method: 采用多传感器高分辨率数据采集，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与360°等距投影图像处理技术，构建物体定位与识别算法流程，并处理超80万张图像进行验证。
AI.result: 成功实现停车标志与消防栓的高精度识别，验证了方法在效率与准确性上的优势，并为未来自动化数据系统提供技术参考。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效提升空间数据自动化处理能力，推动公共资产管理及实时AI监测系统的创新应用。

authors_text: Tao Jiang,Peng Lu,Li Zhang,Ningsheng Ma,Rui Han,Chengqi Lyu,Yining Li,Kai Chen
title: RTMPose: Real-Time Multi-Person Pose Estimation based on MMPose
title_zh: RTMPose：基于MMPose的实时多人姿态估计
abstract: Recent studies on 2D pose estimation have achieved excellent performance on public benchmarks, yet its application in the industrial community still suffers from heavy model parameters and high latency. In order to bridge this gap, we empirically explore key factors in pose estimation including paradigm, model architecture, training strategy, and deployment, and present a high-performance real-time multi-person pose estimation framework, RTMPose, based on MMPose. Our RTMPose-m achieves 75.8% AP on COCO with 90+ FPS on an Intel i7-11700 CPU and 430+ FPS on an NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti GPU, and RTMPose-l achieves 67.0% AP on COCO-WholeBody with 130+ FPS. To further evaluate RTMPose's capability in critical real-time applications, we also report the performance after deploying on the mobile device. Our RTMPose-s achieves 72.2% AP on COCO with 70+ FPS on a Snapdragon 865 chip, outperforming existing open-source libraries. Code and models are released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmpose/tree/1.x/projects/rtmpose.
summary: Recent studies on 2D pose estimation have achieved excellent performance on public benchmarks, yet its application in the industrial community still suffers from heavy model parameters and high latency. In order to bridge this gap, we empirically explore key factors in pose estimation including paradigm, model architecture, training strategy, and deployment, and present a high-performance real-time multi-person pose estimation framework, RTMPose, based on MMPose. Our RTMPose-m achieves 75.8% AP on COCO with 90+ FPS on an Intel i7-11700 CPU and 430+ FPS on an NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti GPU, and RTMPose-l achieves 67.0% AP on COCO-WholeBody with 130+ FPS. To further evaluate RTMPose's capability in critical real-time applications, we also report the performance after deploying on the mobile device. Our RTMPose-s achieves 72.2% AP on COCO with 70+ FPS on a Snapdragon 865 chip, outperforming existing open-source libraries. Code and models are released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmpose/tree/1.x/projects/rtmpose.
abstract_zh: 最近关于二维姿态估计的研究在公共基准上取得了优异的性能，但其在工业界的应用仍然受到模型参数繁重和高延迟的困扰。为了弥补这一差距，我们实证探索了姿态估计的关键因素，包括范式、模型架构、训练策略和部署，并提出了一种基于 MMPose 的高性能实时多人姿态估计框架 RTMPose。我们的 RTMPose-m 在 COCO 上实现了 75.8% AP，在 Intel i7-11700 CPU 上实现了 90+ FPS，在 NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti GPU 上实现了 430+ FPS，RTMPose-l 在 COCO-WholeBody 上实现了 67.0% AP，在 130+ FPS 上。为了进一步评估 RTMPose 在关键实时应用中的能力，我们还报告了在移动设备上部署后的性能。我们的 RTMPose-s 在 COCO 上实现了 72.2% 的 AP，在 Snapdragon 865 芯片上实现了 70+ FPS，优于现有的开源库。代码和模型发布于 https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmpose/tree/1.x/projects/rtmpose。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MMPose的实时多人姿态估计框架RTMPose。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D姿态估计在公共基准测试中表现出色，但在工业界的应用仍受到模型参数量大和延迟高的限制。
AI.method: 通过探索姿态估计中的关键因素，包括范式、模型架构、训练策略和部署，提出了高性能的实时多人姿态估计框架RTMPose。
AI.result: RTMPose-m在COCO数据集上达到75.8%的AP，在Intel i7-11700 CPU上实现90+ FPS，在NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti GPU上实现430+ FPS；RTMPose-s在Snapdragon 865芯片上实现72.2%的AP和70+ FPS。
AI.conclusion: RTMPose在实时应用中表现出色，优于现有的开源库。
