search_text: RTMPose: Real-Time Multi-Person Pose Estimation based on MMPose RTMPose：基于MMPose的实时多人姿态估计 Recent studies on 2D pose estimation have achieved excellent performance on public benchmarks, yet its application in the industrial community still suffers from heavy model parameters and high latency. In order to bridge this gap, we empirically explore key factors in pose estimation including paradigm, model architecture, training strategy, and deployment, and present a high-performance real-time multi-person pose estimation framework, RTMPose, based on MMPose. Our RTMPose-m achieves 75.8% AP on COCO with 90+ FPS on an Intel i7-11700 CPU and 430+ FPS on an NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti GPU, and RTMPose-l achieves 67.0% AP on COCO-WholeBody with 130+ FPS. To further evaluate RTMPose's capability in critical real-time applications, we also report the performance after deploying on the mobile device. Our RTMPose-s achieves 72.2% AP on COCO with 70+ FPS on a Snapdragon 865 chip, outperforming existing open-source libraries. Code and models are released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmpose/tree/1.x/projects/rtmpose. 最近关于二维姿态估计的研究在公共基准上取得了优异的性能，但其在工业界的应用仍然受到模型参数繁重和高延迟的困扰。为了弥补这一差距，我们实证探索了姿态估计的关键因素，包括范式、模型架构、训练策略和部署，并提出了一种基于 MMPose 的高性能实时多人姿态估计框架 RTMPose。我们的 RTMPose-m 在 COCO 上实现了 75.8% AP，在 Intel i7-11700 CPU 上实现了 90+ FPS，在 NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti GPU 上实现了 430+ FPS，RTMPose-l 在 COCO-WholeBody 上实现了 67.0% AP，在 130+ FPS 上。为了进一步评估 RTMPose 在关键实时应用中的能力，我们还报告了在移动设备上部署后的性能。我们的 RTMPose-s 在 COCO 上实现了 72.2% 的 AP，在 Snapdragon 865 芯片上实现了 70+ FPS，优于现有的开源库。代码和模型发布于 https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmpose/tree/1.x/projects/rtmpose。 本文提出了一种基于MMPose的实时多人姿态估计框架RTMPose。 Tao Jiang,Peng Lu,Li Zhang,Ningsheng Ma,Rui Han,Chengqi Lyu,Yining Li,Kai Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Miguel Lazaro-Gredilla,Ishan Deshpande,Sivaramakrishnan Swaminathan,Meet Dave,Dileep George
title: Fast exploration and learning of latent graphs with aliased observations
title_zh: 通过别名观察快速探索和学习潜在图
abstract: We consider the problem of recovering a latent graph where the observations at each node are \emph{aliased}, and transitions are stochastic. Observations are gathered by an agent traversing the graph. Aliasing means that multiple nodes emit the same observation, so the agent can not know in which node it is located. The agent needs to uncover the hidden topology as accurately as possible and in as few steps as possible. This is equivalent to efficient recovery of the transition probabilities of a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) in which the observation probabilities are known. An algorithm for efficiently exploring (and ultimately recovering) the latent graph is provided. Our approach is exponentially faster than naive exploration in a variety of challenging topologies with aliased observations while remaining competitive with existing baselines in the unaliased regime.
summary: We consider the problem of recovering a latent graph where the observations at each node are \emph{aliased}, and transitions are stochastic. Observations are gathered by an agent traversing the graph. Aliasing means that multiple nodes emit the same observation, so the agent can not know in which node it is located. The agent needs to uncover the hidden topology as accurately as possible and in as few steps as possible. This is equivalent to efficient recovery of the transition probabilities of a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) in which the observation probabilities are known. An algorithm for efficiently exploring (and ultimately recovering) the latent graph is provided. Our approach is exponentially faster than naive exploration in a variety of challenging topologies with aliased observations while remaining competitive with existing baselines in the unaliased regime.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑恢复潜在图的问题，其中每个节点的观察结果都是\emph{别名}，并且转换是随机的。观察结果由遍历图表的代理收集。别名意味着多个节点发出相同的观察结果，因此代理无法知道它位于哪个节点。代理需要尽可能准确地并以尽可能少的步骤揭示隐藏的拓扑。这相当于有效恢复部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的转移概率，其中观察概率已知。提供了一种有效探索（并最终恢复）潜在图的算法。我们的方法比在具有混叠观察的各种具有挑战性的拓扑中的天真探索要快得多，同时与非混叠机制中的现有基线保持竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在别名观察的情况下，如何高效探索并学习潜在图的拓扑结构，提出了一种比传统方法更快的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统探索方法在别名观察（多个节点产生相同观测）场景下效率低下，需要设计更高效的算法以快速恢复潜在图结构。
AI.method: 提出一种基于部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的高效探索算法，通过优化转移概率恢复过程实现快速拓扑学习。
AI.result: 该算法在多种复杂拓扑中比传统方法快指数级，且在无别名观测场景下表现与现有基线相当。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了别名观测下的潜在图学习问题，在效率和通用性上均取得显著进展。

authors_text: Haichuan Li,Liguo Zhou,Zhenshan Bing,Marzana Khatun,Rolf Jung,Alois Knoll
title: Sequential Spatial Network for Collision Avoidance in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶中防撞的顺序空间网络
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.06714
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.06714
abstract: Several autonomous driving strategies have been applied to autonomous vehicles, especially in the collision avoidance area. The purpose of collision avoidance is achieved by adjusting the trajectory of autonomous vehicles (AV) to avoid intersection or overlap with the trajectory of surrounding vehicles. A large number of sophisticated vision algorithms have been designed for target inspection, classification, and other tasks, such as ResNet, YOLO, etc., which have achieved excellent performance in vision tasks because of their ability to accurately and quickly capture regional features. However, due to the variability of different tasks, the above models achieve good performance in capturing small regions but are still insufficient in correlating the regional features of the input image with each other. In this paper, we aim to solve this problem and develop an algorithm that takes into account the advantages of CNN in capturing regional features while establishing feature correlation between regions using variants of attention. Finally, our model achieves better performance in the test set of L5Kit compared to the other vision models. The average number of collisions is 19.4 per 10000 frames of driving distance, which greatly improves the success rate of collision avoidance.
summary: Several autonomous driving strategies have been applied to autonomous vehicles, especially in the collision avoidance area. The purpose of collision avoidance is achieved by adjusting the trajectory of autonomous vehicles (AV) to avoid intersection or overlap with the trajectory of surrounding vehicles. A large number of sophisticated vision algorithms have been designed for target inspection, classification, and other tasks, such as ResNet, YOLO, etc., which have achieved excellent performance in vision tasks because of their ability to accurately and quickly capture regional features. However, due to the variability of different tasks, the above models achieve good performance in capturing small regions but are still insufficient in correlating the regional features of the input image with each other. In this paper, we aim to solve this problem and develop an algorithm that takes into account the advantages of CNN in capturing regional features while establishing feature correlation between regions using variants of attention. Finally, our model achieves better performance in the test set of L5Kit compared to the other vision models. The average number of collisions is 19.4 per 10000 frames of driving distance, which greatly improves the success rate of collision avoidance.
abstract_zh: 多种自动驾驶策略已应用于自动驾驶车辆，特别是在防撞领域。避免碰撞的目的是通过调整自动驾驶车辆（AV）的轨迹以避免与周围车辆的轨迹相交或重叠。针对目标检测、分类等任务设计了大量复杂的视觉算法，如ResNet、YOLO等，由于能够准确、快速地捕捉区域​​特征，在视觉任务中取得了优异的性能。然而，由于不同任务的可变性，上述模型在捕获小区域方面取得了良好的性能，但在将输入图像的区域特征相互关联方面仍然不足。在本文中，我们旨在解决这个问题并开发一种算法，该算法考虑到 CNN 在捕获区域特征方面的优势，同时使用注意力的变体建立区域之间的特征相关性。最后，与其他视觉模型相比，我们的模型在 L5Kit 的测试集中取得了更好的性能。每10000帧行驶距离平均碰撞次数为19.4次，大大提高了避碰的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与注意力机制的序列空间网络，用于改进自动驾驶中的碰撞规避性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型（如ResNet、YOLO）虽能高效提取局部特征，但缺乏对图像区域特征间关联性的建模，导致碰撞规避效果受限。
AI.method: 设计融合CNN区域特征提取能力与注意力机制的序列空间网络，通过变体注意力模块建立区域特征关联性。
AI.result: 在L5Kit测试集上，模型平均碰撞次数为19.4次/10000帧，显著优于其他视觉模型，碰撞规避成功率大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效结合CNN与注意力机制，解决了区域特征关联性不足的问题，验证了模型在自动驾驶碰撞规避任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Dingfeng Shi,Yujie Zhong,Qiong Cao,Lin Ma,Jia Li,Dacheng Tao
title: TriDet: Temporal Action Detection with Relative Boundary Modeling
title_zh: TriDet：使用相对边界建模进行时间动作检测
comment: CVPR2023; Temporal Action Detection; Temporal Action Localization
comments: CVPR2023; Temporal Action Detection; Temporal Action Localization
abstract: In this paper, we present a one-stage framework TriDet for temporal action detection. Existing methods often suffer from imprecise boundary predictions due to the ambiguous action boundaries in videos. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel Trident-head to model the action boundary via an estimated relative probability distribution around the boundary. In the feature pyramid of TriDet, we propose an efficient Scalable-Granularity Perception (SGP) layer to mitigate the rank loss problem of self-attention that takes place in the video features and aggregate information across different temporal granularities. Benefiting from the Trident-head and the SGP-based feature pyramid, TriDet achieves state-of-the-art performance on three challenging benchmarks: THUMOS14, HACS and EPIC-KITCHEN 100, with lower computational costs, compared to previous methods. For example, TriDet hits an average mAP of $69.3\%$ on THUMOS14, outperforming the previous best by $2.5\%$, but with only $74.6\%$ of its latency. The code is released to https://github.com/sssste/TriDet.
summary: In this paper, we present a one-stage framework TriDet for temporal action detection. Existing methods often suffer from imprecise boundary predictions due to the ambiguous action boundaries in videos. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel Trident-head to model the action boundary via an estimated relative probability distribution around the boundary. In the feature pyramid of TriDet, we propose an efficient Scalable-Granularity Perception (SGP) layer to mitigate the rank loss problem of self-attention that takes place in the video features and aggregate information across different temporal granularities. Benefiting from the Trident-head and the SGP-based feature pyramid, TriDet achieves state-of-the-art performance on three challenging benchmarks: THUMOS14, HACS and EPIC-KITCHEN 100, with lower computational costs, compared to previous methods. For example, TriDet hits an average mAP of $69.3\%$ on THUMOS14, outperforming the previous best by $2.5\%$, but with only $74.6\%$ of its latency. The code is released to https://github.com/sssste/TriDet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于时间动作检测的单阶段框架 TriDet。由于视频中的动作边界不明确，现有方法经常会遇到边界预测不精确的问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的三叉戟头，通过估计边界周围的相对概率分布来对动作边界进行建模。在 TriDet 的特征金字塔中，我们提出了一个高效的可扩展粒度感知（SGP）层，以减轻视频特征中发生的自注意力的排名损失问题，并聚合不同时间粒度的信息。受益于 Trident-head 和基于 SGP 的特征金字塔，TriDet 在三个具有挑战性的基准测试上实现了最先进的性能：THUMOS14、HACS 和 EPIC-KITCHEN 100，与以前的方法相比，计算成本更低。例如，TriDet 在 THUMOS14 上的平均 mAP 为 $69.3\%$，比之前的最佳成绩高出 $2.5\%$，但其延迟仅为 $74.6\%$。代码发布到https://github.com/sssste/TriDet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TriDet的一阶段框架，用于解决视频中动作边界模糊导致的时序动作检测边界预测不精确问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因视频中动作边界模糊导致边界预测不精确，需通过建模相对边界概率分布来提升检测精度。
AI.method: 设计Trident-head模块建模动作边界相对概率分布，并引入可扩展粒度感知（SGP）层优化特征金字塔中的多粒度信息聚合。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14、HACS和EPIC-KITCHEN 100三个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，例如THUMOS14平均mAP达69.3%，较之前方法提升2.5%且计算成本降低25.4%。
AI.conclusion: TriDet通过边界概率建模与多粒度特征优化，在保持低计算成本的同时显著提升了时序动作检测的准确性。

authors_text: Rohit Gandikota,Joanna Materzynska,Jaden Fiotto-Kaufman,David Bau
title: Erasing Concepts from Diffusion Models
title_zh: 从扩散模型中删除概念
abstract: Motivated by recent advancements in text-to-image diffusion, we study erasure of specific concepts from the model's weights. While Stable Diffusion has shown promise in producing explicit or realistic artwork, it has raised concerns regarding its potential for misuse. We propose a fine-tuning method that can erase a visual concept from a pre-trained diffusion model, given only the name of the style and using negative guidance as a teacher. We benchmark our method against previous approaches that remove sexually explicit content and demonstrate its effectiveness, performing on par with Safe Latent Diffusion and censored training. To evaluate artistic style removal, we conduct experiments erasing five modern artists from the network and conduct a user study to assess the human perception of the removed styles. Unlike previous methods, our approach can remove concepts from a diffusion model permanently rather than modifying the output at the inference time, so it cannot be circumvented even if a user has access to model weights. Our code, data, and results are available at https://erasing.baulab.info/
summary: Motivated by recent advancements in text-to-image diffusion, we study erasure of specific concepts from the model's weights. While Stable Diffusion has shown promise in producing explicit or realistic artwork, it has raised concerns regarding its potential for misuse. We propose a fine-tuning method that can erase a visual concept from a pre-trained diffusion model, given only the name of the style and using negative guidance as a teacher. We benchmark our method against previous approaches that remove sexually explicit content and demonstrate its effectiveness, performing on par with Safe Latent Diffusion and censored training. To evaluate artistic style removal, we conduct experiments erasing five modern artists from the network and conduct a user study to assess the human perception of the removed styles. Unlike previous methods, our approach can remove concepts from a diffusion model permanently rather than modifying the output at the inference time, so it cannot be circumvented even if a user has access to model weights. Our code, data, and results are available at https://erasing.baulab.info/
abstract_zh: 受文本到图像扩散最新进展的推动，我们研究从模型权重中删除特定概念。虽然稳定扩散在制作明确或现实的艺术作品方面表现出了希望，但它引起了人们对其潜在滥用的担忧。我们提出了一种微调方法，可以从预先训练的扩散模型中删除视觉概念，仅给出风格名称并使用负面指导作为老师。我们将我们的方法与以前删除露骨色情内容的方法进行基准测试，并证明其有效性，其表现与安全潜在扩散和审查训练相当。为了评估艺术风格的删除，我们进行了从网络中删除五位现代艺术家的实验，并进行了用户研究来评估人类对删除的风格的看法。与以前的方法不同，我们的方法可以从扩散模型中永久删除概念，而不是在推理时修改输出，因此即使用户有权访问模型权重，也无法规避它。我们的代码、数据和结果可在 https://erasing.baulab.info/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从预训练的扩散模型中删除特定视觉概念，提出一种通过微调永久移除概念的方法。
AI.motivation: 受文本到图像扩散模型的进展启发，针对Stable Diffusion等模型可能被滥用的问题，提出一种从模型权重中删除特定概念的方法以增强安全性。
AI.method: 基于负向引导作为教师信号，仅通过风格名称进行微调，提出一种无需修改推理时输出的永久性概念删除方法，并通过用户研究验证效果。
AI.result: 在移除色情内容和五位现代艺术家风格的实验中，效果与Safe Latent Diffusion和审查训练方法相当，且用户感知测试显示删除后风格不可辨识。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过直接修改模型权重实现概念永久删除，相比推理时过滤的方法更安全，为扩散模型的内容控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jeremy A. Collins,Cody Houff,Patrick Grady,Charles C. Kemp
title: Visual Contact Pressure Estimation for Grippers in the Wild
title_zh: 野外夹具的视觉接触压力估计
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: Sensing contact pressure applied by a gripper can benefit autonomous and teleoperated robotic manipulation, but adding tactile sensors to a gripper's surface can be difficult or impractical. If a gripper visibly deforms, contact pressure can be visually estimated using images from an external camera that observes the gripper. While researchers have demonstrated this capability in controlled laboratory settings, prior work has not addressed challenges associated with visual pressure estimation in the wild, where lighting, surfaces, and other factors vary widely. We present a model and associated methods that enable visual pressure estimation under widely varying conditions. Our model, Visual Pressure Estimation for Robots (ViPER), takes an image from an eye-in-hand camera as input and outputs an image representing the pressure applied by a soft gripper. Our key insight is that force/torque sensing can be used as a weak label to efficiently collect training data in settings where pressure measurements would be difficult to obtain. When trained on this weakly labeled data combined with fully labeled data that includes pressure measurements, ViPER outperforms prior methods, enables precision manipulation in cluttered settings, and provides accurate estimates for unseen conditions relevant to in-home use.
summary: Sensing contact pressure applied by a gripper can benefit autonomous and teleoperated robotic manipulation, but adding tactile sensors to a gripper's surface can be difficult or impractical. If a gripper visibly deforms, contact pressure can be visually estimated using images from an external camera that observes the gripper. While researchers have demonstrated this capability in controlled laboratory settings, prior work has not addressed challenges associated with visual pressure estimation in the wild, where lighting, surfaces, and other factors vary widely. We present a model and associated methods that enable visual pressure estimation under widely varying conditions. Our model, Visual Pressure Estimation for Robots (ViPER), takes an image from an eye-in-hand camera as input and outputs an image representing the pressure applied by a soft gripper. Our key insight is that force/torque sensing can be used as a weak label to efficiently collect training data in settings where pressure measurements would be difficult to obtain. When trained on this weakly labeled data combined with fully labeled data that includes pressure measurements, ViPER outperforms prior methods, enables precision manipulation in cluttered settings, and provides accurate estimates for unseen conditions relevant to in-home use.
abstract_zh: 感测夹具施加的接触压力可以有利于自主和远程操作的机器人操作，但在夹具表面添加触觉传感器可能很困难或不切实际。如果夹具明显变形，可以使用观察夹具的外部摄像头的图像来直观地估计接触压力。虽然研究人员已经在受控实验室环境中证明了这种能力，但之前的工作尚未解决与野外视觉压力估计相关的挑战，因为在野外，光照、表面和其他因素差异很大。我们提出了一个模型和相关方法，可以在广泛变化的条件下进行视觉压力估计。我们的模型“机器人视觉压力估计”(ViPER) 将手眼相机的图像作为输入，并输出代表软夹具施加的压力的图像。我们的主要见解是，力/扭矩传感可以用作弱标签，以在难以获得压力测量的环境中有效地收集训练数据。当对这种弱标记数据与包括压力测量在内的完全标记数据相结合进行训练时，ViPER 优于之前的方法，能够在杂乱的环境中进行精确操作，并为与家庭使用相关的看不见的条件提供准确的估计。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的抓取器接触压力估计方法，用于在复杂环境中实现精确的抓取操作。
AI.motivation: 在实际环境中，由于光照、表面材质等因素的变化，传统的触觉传感器难以准确估计抓取器的接触压力，因此需要一种无需直接安装传感器的视觉方法。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种名为ViPER的模型，该模型利用手眼相机拍摄的图像作为输入，输出抓取器施加的压力图像。该方法通过力/扭矩传感作为弱标签，结合完全标注的数据进行训练。
AI.result: ViPER在不同条件下表现出色，优于先前的方法，并在杂乱环境中实现了精确的抓取操作，同时提供了适用于家庭环境的准确压力估计。
AI.conclusion: ViPER方法为在真实世界中实现高精度抓取操作提供了一种可行的视觉压力估计解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的抓取器接触压力估计方法，用于在复杂环境中实现精确的抓取操作。

search_text: Visual Contact Pressure Estimation for Grippers in the Wild 野外夹具的视觉接触压力估计 Sensing contact pressure applied by a gripper can benefit autonomous and teleoperated robotic manipulation, but adding tactile sensors to a gripper's surface can be difficult or impractical. If a gripper visibly deforms, contact pressure can be visually estimated using images from an external camera that observes the gripper. While researchers have demonstrated this capability in controlled laboratory settings, prior work has not addressed challenges associated with visual pressure estimation in the wild, where lighting, surfaces, and other factors vary widely. We present a model and associated methods that enable visual pressure estimation under widely varying conditions. Our model, Visual Pressure Estimation for Robots (ViPER), takes an image from an eye-in-hand camera as input and outputs an image representing the pressure applied by a soft gripper. Our key insight is that force/torque sensing can be used as a weak label to efficiently collect training data in settings where pressure measurements would be difficult to obtain. When trained on this weakly labeled data combined with fully labeled data that includes pressure measurements, ViPER outperforms prior methods, enables precision manipulation in cluttered settings, and provides accurate estimates for unseen conditions relevant to in-home use. 感测夹具施加的接触压力可以有利于自主和远程操作的机器人操作，但在夹具表面添加触觉传感器可能很困难或不切实际。如果夹具明显变形，可以使用观察夹具的外部摄像头的图像来直观地估计接触压力。虽然研究人员已经在受控实验室环境中证明了这种能力，但之前的工作尚未解决与野外视觉压力估计相关的挑战，因为在野外，光照、表面和其他因素差异很大。我们提出了一个模型和相关方法，可以在广泛变化的条件下进行视觉压力估计。我们的模型“机器人视觉压力估计”(ViPER) 将手眼相机的图像作为输入，并输出代表软夹具施加的压力的图像。我们的主要见解是，力/扭矩传感可以用作弱标签，以在难以获得压力测量的环境中有效地收集训练数据。当对这种弱标记数据与包括压力测量在内的完全标记数据相结合进行训练时，ViPER 优于之前的方法，能够在杂乱的环境中进行精确操作，并为与家庭使用相关的看不见的条件提供准确的估计。 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的抓取器接触压力估计方法，用于在复杂环境中实现精确的抓取操作。 Jeremy A. Collins,Cody Houff,Patrick Grady,Charles C. Kemp cs.RO

authors_text: Da-Wei Zhou,Zi-Wen Cai,Han-Jia Ye,De-Chuan Zhan,Ziwei Liu
title: Revisiting Class-Incremental Learning with Pre-Trained Models: Generalizability and Adaptivity are All You Need
title_zh: 使用预训练模型重新审视课堂增量学习：通用性和适应性就是您所需要的
comment: Accepted to IJCV. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhoudw-zdw/RevisitingCIL
comments: Accepted to IJCV. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhoudw-zdw/RevisitingCIL
abstract: Class-incremental learning (CIL) aims to adapt to emerging new classes without forgetting old ones. Traditional CIL models are trained from scratch to continually acquire knowledge as data evolves. Recently, pre-training has achieved substantial progress, making vast pre-trained models (PTMs) accessible for CIL. Contrary to traditional methods, PTMs possess generalizable embeddings, which can be easily transferred for CIL. In this work, we revisit CIL with PTMs and argue that the core factors in CIL are adaptivity for model updating and generalizability for knowledge transferring. 1) We first reveal that frozen PTM can already provide generalizable embeddings for CIL. Surprisingly, a simple baseline (SimpleCIL) which continually sets the classifiers of PTM to prototype features can beat state-of-the-art even without training on the downstream task. 2) Due to the distribution gap between pre-trained and downstream datasets, PTM can be further cultivated with adaptivity via model adaptation. We propose AdaPt and mERge (APER), which aggregates the embeddings of PTM and adapted models for classifier construction. APER is a general framework that can be orthogonally combined with any parameter-efficient tuning method, which holds the advantages of PTM's generalizability and adapted model's adaptivity. 3) Additionally, considering previous ImageNet-based benchmarks are unsuitable in the era of PTM due to data overlapping, we propose four new benchmarks for assessment, namely ImageNet-A, ObjectNet, OmniBenchmark, and VTAB. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of APER with a unified and concise framework. Code is available at https://github.com/zhoudw-zdw/RevisitingCIL
summary: Class-incremental learning (CIL) aims to adapt to emerging new classes without forgetting old ones. Traditional CIL models are trained from scratch to continually acquire knowledge as data evolves. Recently, pre-training has achieved substantial progress, making vast pre-trained models (PTMs) accessible for CIL. Contrary to traditional methods, PTMs possess generalizable embeddings, which can be easily transferred for CIL. In this work, we revisit CIL with PTMs and argue that the core factors in CIL are adaptivity for model updating and generalizability for knowledge transferring. 1) We first reveal that frozen PTM can already provide generalizable embeddings for CIL. Surprisingly, a simple baseline (SimpleCIL) which continually sets the classifiers of PTM to prototype features can beat state-of-the-art even without training on the downstream task. 2) Due to the distribution gap between pre-trained and downstream datasets, PTM can be further cultivated with adaptivity via model adaptation. We propose AdaPt and mERge (APER), which aggregates the embeddings of PTM and adapted models for classifier construction. APER is a general framework that can be orthogonally combined with any parameter-efficient tuning method, which holds the advantages of PTM's generalizability and adapted model's adaptivity. 3) Additionally, considering previous ImageNet-based benchmarks are unsuitable in the era of PTM due to data overlapping, we propose four new benchmarks for assessment, namely ImageNet-A, ObjectNet, OmniBenchmark, and VTAB. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of APER with a unified and concise framework. Code is available at https://github.com/zhoudw-zdw/RevisitingCIL
abstract_zh: 班级增量学习（CIL）旨在适应不断出现的新班级，同时又不忘记旧班级。传统的 CIL 模型从头开始训练，随着数据的发展不断获取知识。最近，预训练取得了实质性进展，使得大量的预训练模型 (PTM) 可用于 CIL。与传统方法相反，PTM 具有可泛化的嵌入，可以轻松转移到 CIL。在这项工作中，我们用 PTM 重新审视 CIL，并认为 CIL 的核心因素是模型更新的适应性和知识转移的泛化性。 1）我们首先揭示冻结的 PTM 已经可以为 CIL 提供可泛化的嵌入。令人惊讶的是，一个简单的基线（SimpleCIL）不断地将 PTM 分类器设置为原型特征，即使没有对下游任务进行训练，也可以击败最先进的技术。 2）由于预训练数据集和下游数据集之间的分布差距，可以通过模型自适应进一步培养 PTM 的适应性。我们提出了 AdaPt 和 MERge (APER)，它聚合了 PTM 的嵌入和用于分类器构建的适应模型。 APER是一个通用框架，可以与任何参数有效的调整方法正交结合，它具有PTM的通用性和适应模型的适应性的优点。 3）此外，考虑到之前基于ImageNet的基准因数据重叠而不适用于PTM时代，我们提出了四个新的评估基准，即ImageNet-A、ObjectNet、OmniBenchmark和VTAB。大量实验通过统一、简洁的框架验证了 AP​​ER 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/zhoudw-zdw/RevisitingCIL 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何利用预训练模型（PTMs）进行类增量学习（CIL），强调通用性和适应性是关键因素。
AI.motivation: 传统CIL方法需从头训练模型，效率低下；而预训练模型虽具通用性，但需解决分布差异问题，需进一步适应下游任务。
AI.method: 提出SimpleCIL（冻结PTM原型分类器）和APER框架（结合PTM嵌入与适配模型），并设计四个新基准（ImageNet-A等）进行评估。
AI.result: SimpleCIL在无需微调时超越SOTA，APER框架通过通用性与适应性结合显著提升性能，新基准更符合PTM时代需求。
AI.conclusion: 通用性与适应性是CIL的核心，APER框架有效结合二者，为PTM时代的CIL提供统一解决方案。

authors_text: Qihao Liu,Adam Kortylewski,Alan Yuille
title: PoseExaminer: Automated Testing of Out-of-Distribution Robustness in Human Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: PoseExaminer：人体姿势和形状估计中分布外鲁棒性的自动测试
abstract: Human pose and shape (HPS) estimation methods achieve remarkable results. However, current HPS benchmarks are mostly designed to test models in scenarios that are similar to the training data. This can lead to critical situations in real-world applications when the observed data differs significantly from the training data and hence is out-of-distribution (OOD). It is therefore important to test and improve the OOD robustness of HPS methods. To address this fundamental problem, we develop a simulator that can be controlled in a fine-grained manner using interpretable parameters to explore the manifold of images of human pose, e.g. by varying poses, shapes, and clothes. We introduce a learning-based testing method, termed PoseExaminer, that automatically diagnoses HPS algorithms by searching over the parameter space of human pose images to find the failure modes. Our strategy for exploring this high-dimensional parameter space is a multi-agent reinforcement learning system, in which the agents collaborate to explore different parts of the parameter space. We show that our PoseExaminer discovers a variety of limitations in current state-of-the-art models that are relevant in real-world scenarios but are missed by current benchmarks. For example, it finds large regions of realistic human poses that are not predicted correctly, as well as reduced performance for humans with skinny and corpulent body shapes. In addition, we show that fine-tuning HPS methods by exploiting the failure modes found by PoseExaminer improve their robustness and even their performance on standard benchmarks by a significant margin. The code are available for research purposes.
summary: Human pose and shape (HPS) estimation methods achieve remarkable results. However, current HPS benchmarks are mostly designed to test models in scenarios that are similar to the training data. This can lead to critical situations in real-world applications when the observed data differs significantly from the training data and hence is out-of-distribution (OOD). It is therefore important to test and improve the OOD robustness of HPS methods. To address this fundamental problem, we develop a simulator that can be controlled in a fine-grained manner using interpretable parameters to explore the manifold of images of human pose, e.g. by varying poses, shapes, and clothes. We introduce a learning-based testing method, termed PoseExaminer, that automatically diagnoses HPS algorithms by searching over the parameter space of human pose images to find the failure modes. Our strategy for exploring this high-dimensional parameter space is a multi-agent reinforcement learning system, in which the agents collaborate to explore different parts of the parameter space. We show that our PoseExaminer discovers a variety of limitations in current state-of-the-art models that are relevant in real-world scenarios but are missed by current benchmarks. For example, it finds large regions of realistic human poses that are not predicted correctly, as well as reduced performance for humans with skinny and corpulent body shapes. In addition, we show that fine-tuning HPS methods by exploiting the failure modes found by PoseExaminer improve their robustness and even their performance on standard benchmarks by a significant margin. The code are available for research purposes.
abstract_zh: 人体姿态和形状（HPS）估计方法取得了显着的成果。然而，当前的 HPS 基准主要是为了在与训练数据类似的场景中测试模型而设计的。当观察到的数据与训练数据显着不同并因此出现分布外（OOD）时，这可能会导致实际应用中出现严重情况。因此，测试和提高 HPS 方法的 OOD 稳健性非常重要。为了解决这个基本问题，我们开发了一个模拟器，可以使用可解释的参数以细粒度的方式进行控制，以探索人体姿势的多种图像，例如通过不同的姿势、形状和衣服。我们引入了一种基于学习的测试方法，称为 PoseExaminer，该方法通过搜索人体姿势图像的参数空间来查找故障模式，从而自动诊断 HPS 算法。我们探索这个高维参数空间的策略是一个多智能体强化学习系统，其中智能体协作探索参数空间的不同部分。我们表明，我们的 PoseExaminer 发现了当前最先进模型中的各种局限性，这些局限性与现实场景相关，但当前的基准测试却忽略了这些局限性。例如，它发现了未正确预测的大片区域的真实人体姿势，以及瘦身和肥胖体型的人的表现下降。此外，我们还表明，通过利用 PoseExaminer 发现的故障模式来微调 HPS 方法，可以显着提高其稳健性，甚至在标准基准上的性能。该代码可用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoseExaminer，一种通过可控模拟器和强化学习探索人类姿态与形状估计模型在分布外数据中的鲁棒性问题的自动化测试方法。
AI.motivation: 现有姿态与形状估计基准测试主要针对训练数据相似的场景，难以发现模型在真实世界中面对分布外数据时的失效模式，存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 开发可解释参数控制的模拟器生成多样化姿态图像，结合多智能体强化学习系统探索高维参数空间，自动定位模型失效区域。
AI.result: 发现当前先进模型在瘦削/肥胖体型、特定姿态等真实场景中存在显著预测失败区域，基于失效模式微调后模型鲁棒性及基准性能均显著提升。
AI.conclusion: PoseExaminer有效揭示了分布外鲁棒性问题，为改进模型可靠性提供新方法，同时凸显现有基准测试的不足。

search_text: PoseExaminer: Automated Testing of Out-of-Distribution Robustness in Human Pose and Shape Estimation PoseExaminer：人体姿势和形状估计中分布外鲁棒性的自动测试 Human pose and shape (HPS) estimation methods achieve remarkable results. However, current HPS benchmarks are mostly designed to test models in scenarios that are similar to the training data. This can lead to critical situations in real-world applications when the observed data differs significantly from the training data and hence is out-of-distribution (OOD). It is therefore important to test and improve the OOD robustness of HPS methods. To address this fundamental problem, we develop a simulator that can be controlled in a fine-grained manner using interpretable parameters to explore the manifold of images of human pose, e.g. by varying poses, shapes, and clothes. We introduce a learning-based testing method, termed PoseExaminer, that automatically diagnoses HPS algorithms by searching over the parameter space of human pose images to find the failure modes. Our strategy for exploring this high-dimensional parameter space is a multi-agent reinforcement learning system, in which the agents collaborate to explore different parts of the parameter space. We show that our PoseExaminer discovers a variety of limitations in current state-of-the-art models that are relevant in real-world scenarios but are missed by current benchmarks. For example, it finds large regions of realistic human poses that are not predicted correctly, as well as reduced performance for humans with skinny and corpulent body shapes. In addition, we show that fine-tuning HPS methods by exploiting the failure modes found by PoseExaminer improve their robustness and even their performance on standard benchmarks by a significant margin. The code are available for research purposes. 人体姿态和形状（HPS）估计方法取得了显着的成果。然而，当前的 HPS 基准主要是为了在与训练数据类似的场景中测试模型而设计的。当观察到的数据与训练数据显着不同并因此出现分布外（OOD）时，这可能会导致实际应用中出现严重情况。因此，测试和提高 HPS 方法的 OOD 稳健性非常重要。为了解决这个基本问题，我们开发了一个模拟器，可以使用可解释的参数以细粒度的方式进行控制，以探索人体姿势的多种图像，例如通过不同的姿势、形状和衣服。我们引入了一种基于学习的测试方法，称为 PoseExaminer，该方法通过搜索人体姿势图像的参数空间来查找故障模式，从而自动诊断 HPS 算法。我们探索这个高维参数空间的策略是一个多智能体强化学习系统，其中智能体协作探索参数空间的不同部分。我们表明，我们的 PoseExaminer 发现了当前最先进模型中的各种局限性，这些局限性与现实场景相关，但当前的基准测试却忽略了这些局限性。例如，它发现了未正确预测的大片区域的真实人体姿势，以及瘦身和肥胖体型的人的表现下降。此外，我们还表明，通过利用 PoseExaminer 发现的故障模式来微调 HPS 方法，可以显着提高其稳健性，甚至在标准基准上的性能。该代码可用于研究目的。 本文提出PoseExaminer，一种通过可控模拟器和强化学习探索人类姿态与形状估计模型在分布外数据中的鲁棒性问题的自动化测试方法。 Qihao Liu,Adam Kortylewski,Alan Yuille cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Feng Li,Huaizhe Xu,Shijia Huang,Shilong Liu,Lionel M. Ni,Lei Zhang
title: MP-Former: Mask-Piloted Transformer for Image Segmentation
title_zh: MP-Former：用于图像分割的掩模引导变压器
abstract: We present a mask-piloted Transformer which improves masked-attention in Mask2Former for image segmentation. The improvement is based on our observation that Mask2Former suffers from inconsistent mask predictions between consecutive decoder layers, which leads to inconsistent optimization goals and low utilization of decoder queries. To address this problem, we propose a mask-piloted training approach, which additionally feeds noised ground-truth masks in masked-attention and trains the model to reconstruct the original ones. Compared with the predicted masks used in mask-attention, the ground-truth masks serve as a pilot and effectively alleviate the negative impact of inaccurate mask predictions in Mask2Former. Based on this technique, our \M achieves a remarkable performance improvement on all three image segmentation tasks (instance, panoptic, and semantic), yielding $+2.3$AP and $+1.6$mIoU on the Cityscapes instance and semantic segmentation tasks with a ResNet-50 backbone. Our method also significantly speeds up the training, outperforming Mask2Former with half of the number of training epochs on ADE20K with both a ResNet-50 and a Swin-L backbones. Moreover, our method only introduces little computation during training and no extra computation during inference. Our code will be released at \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/MP-Former}.
summary: We present a mask-piloted Transformer which improves masked-attention in Mask2Former for image segmentation. The improvement is based on our observation that Mask2Former suffers from inconsistent mask predictions between consecutive decoder layers, which leads to inconsistent optimization goals and low utilization of decoder queries. To address this problem, we propose a mask-piloted training approach, which additionally feeds noised ground-truth masks in masked-attention and trains the model to reconstruct the original ones. Compared with the predicted masks used in mask-attention, the ground-truth masks serve as a pilot and effectively alleviate the negative impact of inaccurate mask predictions in Mask2Former. Based on this technique, our \M achieves a remarkable performance improvement on all three image segmentation tasks (instance, panoptic, and semantic), yielding $+2.3$AP and $+1.6$mIoU on the Cityscapes instance and semantic segmentation tasks with a ResNet-50 backbone. Our method also significantly speeds up the training, outperforming Mask2Former with half of the number of training epochs on ADE20K with both a ResNet-50 and a Swin-L backbones. Moreover, our method only introduces little computation during training and no extra computation during inference. Our code will be released at \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/MP-Former}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个掩模引导的 Transformer，它改进了 Mask2Former 中用于图像分割的掩模注意力。这一改进基于我们的观察，即 Mask2Former 遭受连续解码器层之间掩模预测不一致的问题，这导致优化目标不一致和解码器查询利用率低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种掩模引导的训练方法，该方法另外在掩模注意中提供噪声地面实况掩模，并训练模型以重建原始掩模。与 mask-attention 中使用的预测掩模相比，ground-truth 掩模起到了试点作用，有效减轻了 Mask2Former 中掩模预测不准确的负面影响。基于这项技术，我们的 \M 在所有三个图像分割任务（实例、全景和语义）上实现了显着的性能改进，在 Cityscapes 实例和具有 ResNet-50 主干的语义分​​割任务上产生了 $+2.3$AP 和 $+1.6$mIoU。我们的方法还显着加快了训练速度，在使用 ResNet-50 和 Swin-L 主干的 ADE20K 上，训练次数仅为 Mask2Former 的一半。此外，我们的方法在训练期间只引入很少的计算，并且在推理期间没有额外的计算。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/MP-Former} 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MP-Former的图像分割模型，旨在改进Mask2Former中的掩码注意力机制。
AI.motivation: Mask2Former在连续解码器层之间存在掩码预测不一致的问题，导致优化目标不一致和解码器查询利用率低。
AI.method: 提出了一种掩码引导的训练方法，在掩码注意力中引入噪声地面真实掩码，并训练模型重建原始掩码。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes实例和语义分割任务中，使用ResNet-50主干时，分别实现了+2.3AP和+1.6mIoU的显著性能提升，并且训练速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在训练期间仅引入了少量计算，且在推理时没有额外计算，效果显著。

search_text: MP-Former: Mask-Piloted Transformer for Image Segmentation MP-Former：用于图像分割的掩模引导变压器 We present a mask-piloted Transformer which improves masked-attention in Mask2Former for image segmentation. The improvement is based on our observation that Mask2Former suffers from inconsistent mask predictions between consecutive decoder layers, which leads to inconsistent optimization goals and low utilization of decoder queries. To address this problem, we propose a mask-piloted training approach, which additionally feeds noised ground-truth masks in masked-attention and trains the model to reconstruct the original ones. Compared with the predicted masks used in mask-attention, the ground-truth masks serve as a pilot and effectively alleviate the negative impact of inaccurate mask predictions in Mask2Former. Based on this technique, our \M achieves a remarkable performance improvement on all three image segmentation tasks (instance, panoptic, and semantic), yielding $+2.3$AP and $+1.6$mIoU on the Cityscapes instance and semantic segmentation tasks with a ResNet-50 backbone. Our method also significantly speeds up the training, outperforming Mask2Former with half of the number of training epochs on ADE20K with both a ResNet-50 and a Swin-L backbones. Moreover, our method only introduces little computation during training and no extra computation during inference. Our code will be released at \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/MP-Former}. 我们提出了一个掩模引导的 Transformer，它改进了 Mask2Former 中用于图像分割的掩模注意力。这一改进基于我们的观察，即 Mask2Former 遭受连续解码器层之间掩模预测不一致的问题，这导致优化目标不一致和解码器查询利用率低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种掩模引导的训练方法，该方法另外在掩模注意中提供噪声地面实况掩模，并训练模型以重建原始掩模。与 mask-attention 中使用的预测掩模相比，ground-truth 掩模起到了试点作用，有效减轻了 Mask2Former 中掩模预测不准确的负面影响。基于这项技术，我们的 \M 在所有三个图像分割任务（实例、全景和语义）上实现了显着的性能改进，在 Cityscapes 实例和具有 ResNet-50 主干的语义分​​割任务上产生了 $+2.3$AP 和 $+1.6$mIoU。我们的方法还显着加快了训练速度，在使用 ResNet-50 和 Swin-L 主干的 ADE20K 上，训练次数仅为 Mask2Former 的一半。此外，我们的方法在训练期间只引入很少的计算，并且在推理期间没有额外的计算。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/MP-Former} 发布。 本文提出了一种名为MP-Former的图像分割模型，旨在改进Mask2Former中的掩码注意力机制。 Hao Zhang,Feng Li,Huaizhe Xu,Shijia Huang,Shilong Liu,Lionel M. Ni,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Feng Li,Ailing Zeng,Shilong Liu,Hao Zhang,Hongyang Li,Lei Zhang,Lionel M. Ni
title: Lite DETR : An Interleaved Multi-Scale Encoder for Efficient DETR
title_zh: Lite DETR：用于高效 DETR 的交错多尺度编码器
abstract: Recent DEtection TRansformer-based (DETR) models have obtained remarkable performance. Its success cannot be achieved without the re-introduction of multi-scale feature fusion in the encoder. However, the excessively increased tokens in multi-scale features, especially for about 75\% of low-level features, are quite computationally inefficient, which hinders real applications of DETR models. In this paper, we present Lite DETR, a simple yet efficient end-to-end object detection framework that can effectively reduce the GFLOPs of the detection head by 60\% while keeping 99\% of the original performance. Specifically, we design an efficient encoder block to update high-level features (corresponding to small-resolution feature maps) and low-level features (corresponding to large-resolution feature maps) in an interleaved way. In addition, to better fuse cross-scale features, we develop a key-aware deformable attention to predict more reliable attention weights. Comprehensive experiments validate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed Lite DETR, and the efficient encoder strategy can generalize well across existing DETR-based models. The code will be available in \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/Lite-DETR}.
summary: Recent DEtection TRansformer-based (DETR) models have obtained remarkable performance. Its success cannot be achieved without the re-introduction of multi-scale feature fusion in the encoder. However, the excessively increased tokens in multi-scale features, especially for about 75\% of low-level features, are quite computationally inefficient, which hinders real applications of DETR models. In this paper, we present Lite DETR, a simple yet efficient end-to-end object detection framework that can effectively reduce the GFLOPs of the detection head by 60\% while keeping 99\% of the original performance. Specifically, we design an efficient encoder block to update high-level features (corresponding to small-resolution feature maps) and low-level features (corresponding to large-resolution feature maps) in an interleaved way. In addition, to better fuse cross-scale features, we develop a key-aware deformable attention to predict more reliable attention weights. Comprehensive experiments validate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed Lite DETR, and the efficient encoder strategy can generalize well across existing DETR-based models. The code will be available in \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/Lite-DETR}.
abstract_zh: 最近基于检测变换器（DETR）的模型已经取得了显着的性能。如果没有在编码器中重新引入多尺度特征融合，它的成功就不可能实现。然而，多尺度特征中过度增加的标记，尤其是约 75% 的低级特征，计算效率相当低，这阻碍了 DETR 模型的实际应用。在本文中，我们提出了 Lite DETR，这是一种简单而高效的端到端目标检测框架，可以有效地将检测头的 GFLOPs 降低 60%，同时保持原始性能的 99%。具体来说，我们设计了一个高效的编码器块，以交错的方式更新高级特征（对应于小分辨率特征图）和低级特征（对应于大分辨率特征图）。此外，为了更好地融合跨尺度特征，我们开发了一种关键感知的可变形注意力来预测更可靠的注意力权重。综合实验验证了所提出的 Lite DETR 的有效性和效率，并且高效的编码器策略可以很好地泛化到现有的基于 DETR 的模型。该代码将在 \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/Lite-DETR} 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Lite DETR的高效目标检测框架，旨在解决DETR模型在多尺度特征融合中的计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于DETR的模型在目标检测任务中取得了显著成果，但多尺度特征融合过程中低级特征的计算开销过大，导致计算效率低下，限制了其在实际应用中的使用。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种高效的编码器块，以交错方式更新高级和低级特征，并开发了一种关键感知的可变形注意力机制，以更好地融合跨尺度特征。
AI.result: Lite DETR在保持原始性能99%的同时，将检测头的GFLOPs减少了60%。实验验证了该方法的有效性和效率，并且高效编码策略可以很好地推广到现有的DETR模型中。
AI.conclusion: Lite DETR通过高效的编码策略和注意力机制，显著提高了DETR模型的计算效率，为实际应用提供了更优的解决方案。

search_text: Lite DETR : An Interleaved Multi-Scale Encoder for Efficient DETR Lite DETR：用于高效 DETR 的交错多尺度编码器 Recent DEtection TRansformer-based (DETR) models have obtained remarkable performance. Its success cannot be achieved without the re-introduction of multi-scale feature fusion in the encoder. However, the excessively increased tokens in multi-scale features, especially for about 75\% of low-level features, are quite computationally inefficient, which hinders real applications of DETR models. In this paper, we present Lite DETR, a simple yet efficient end-to-end object detection framework that can effectively reduce the GFLOPs of the detection head by 60\% while keeping 99\% of the original performance. Specifically, we design an efficient encoder block to update high-level features (corresponding to small-resolution feature maps) and low-level features (corresponding to large-resolution feature maps) in an interleaved way. In addition, to better fuse cross-scale features, we develop a key-aware deformable attention to predict more reliable attention weights. Comprehensive experiments validate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed Lite DETR, and the efficient encoder strategy can generalize well across existing DETR-based models. The code will be available in \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/Lite-DETR}. 最近基于检测变换器（DETR）的模型已经取得了显着的性能。如果没有在编码器中重新引入多尺度特征融合，它的成功就不可能实现。然而，多尺度特征中过度增加的标记，尤其是约 75% 的低级特征，计算效率相当低，这阻碍了 DETR 模型的实际应用。在本文中，我们提出了 Lite DETR，这是一种简单而高效的端到端目标检测框架，可以有效地将检测头的 GFLOPs 降低 60%，同时保持原始性能的 99%。具体来说，我们设计了一个高效的编码器块，以交错的方式更新高级特征（对应于小分辨率特征图）和低级特征（对应于大分辨率特征图）。此外，为了更好地融合跨尺度特征，我们开发了一种关键感知的可变形注意力来预测更可靠的注意力权重。综合实验验证了所提出的 Lite DETR 的有效性和效率，并且高效的编码器策略可以很好地泛化到现有的基于 DETR 的模型。该代码将在 \url{https://github.com/IDEA-Research/Lite-DETR} 中提供。 本文提出了一种名为Lite DETR的高效目标检测框架，旨在解决DETR模型在多尺度特征融合中的计算效率问题。 Feng Li,Ailing Zeng,Shilong Liu,Hao Zhang,Hongyang Li,Lei Zhang,Lionel M. Ni cs.CV

authors_text: Cong Cao,Huanjing Yue,Xin Liu,Jingyu Yang
title: Unsupervised HDR Image and Video Tone Mapping via Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习进行无监督 HDR 图像和视频色调映射
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
abstract: Capturing high dynamic range (HDR) images (videos) is attractive because it can reveal the details in both dark and bright regions. Since the mainstream screens only support low dynamic range (LDR) content, tone mapping algorithm is required to compress the dynamic range of HDR images (videos). Although image tone mapping has been widely explored, video tone mapping is lagging behind, especially for the deep-learning-based methods, due to the lack of HDR-LDR video pairs. In this work, we propose a unified framework (IVTMNet) for unsupervised image and video tone mapping. To improve unsupervised training, we propose domain and instance based contrastive learning loss. Instead of using a universal feature extractor, such as VGG to extract the features for similarity measurement, we propose a novel latent code, which is an aggregation of the brightness and contrast of extracted features, to measure the similarity of different pairs. We totally construct two negative pairs and three positive pairs to constrain the latent codes of tone mapped results. For the network structure, we propose a spatial-feature-enhanced (SFE) module to enable information exchange and transformation of nonlocal regions. For video tone mapping, we propose a temporal-feature-replaced (TFR) module to efficiently utilize the temporal correlation and improve the temporal consistency of video tone-mapped results. We construct a large-scale unpaired HDR-LDR video dataset to facilitate the unsupervised training process for video tone mapping. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art image and video tone mapping methods. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/cao-cong/UnCLTMO.
summary: Capturing high dynamic range (HDR) images (videos) is attractive because it can reveal the details in both dark and bright regions. Since the mainstream screens only support low dynamic range (LDR) content, tone mapping algorithm is required to compress the dynamic range of HDR images (videos). Although image tone mapping has been widely explored, video tone mapping is lagging behind, especially for the deep-learning-based methods, due to the lack of HDR-LDR video pairs. In this work, we propose a unified framework (IVTMNet) for unsupervised image and video tone mapping. To improve unsupervised training, we propose domain and instance based contrastive learning loss. Instead of using a universal feature extractor, such as VGG to extract the features for similarity measurement, we propose a novel latent code, which is an aggregation of the brightness and contrast of extracted features, to measure the similarity of different pairs. We totally construct two negative pairs and three positive pairs to constrain the latent codes of tone mapped results. For the network structure, we propose a spatial-feature-enhanced (SFE) module to enable information exchange and transformation of nonlocal regions. For video tone mapping, we propose a temporal-feature-replaced (TFR) module to efficiently utilize the temporal correlation and improve the temporal consistency of video tone-mapped results. We construct a large-scale unpaired HDR-LDR video dataset to facilitate the unsupervised training process for video tone mapping. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art image and video tone mapping methods. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/cao-cong/UnCLTMO.
abstract_zh: 捕捉高动态范围 (HDR) 图像（视频）很有吸引力，因为它可以揭示黑暗和明亮区域的细节。由于主流屏幕仅支持低动态范围（LDR）内容，因此需要色调映射算法来压缩HDR图像（视频）的动态范围。尽管图像色调映射已被广泛探索，但由于缺乏 HDR-LDR 视频对，视频色调映射仍然落后，尤其是基于深度学习的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于无监督图像和视频色调映射的统一框架（IVTMNet）。为了改进无监督训练，我们提出了基于领域和实例的对比学习损失。我们没有使用通用特征提取器（例如 VGG）来提取特征以进行相似性测量，而是提出了一种新颖的潜在代码，它是提取特征的亮度和对比度的聚合，以测量不同对的相似性。我们总共构建了两个负对和三个正对来约束色调映射结果的潜在代码。对于网络结构，我们提出了一个空间特征增强（SFE）模块来实现非局部区域的信息交换和转换。对于视频色调映射，我们提出了一种时间特征替换（TFR）模块，以有效利用时间相关性并提高视频色调映射结果的时间一致性。我们构建了一个大规模的不配对 HDR-LDR 视频数据集，以促进视频色调映射的无监督训练过程。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的图像和视频色调映射方法。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/cao-cong/UnCLTMO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的无监督HDR图像和视频色调映射框架IVTMNet，解决视频色调映射中缺乏配对数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像色调映射技术成熟，但视频领域因缺乏HDR-LDR视频配对数据，导致深度学习方法进展缓慢。
AI.method: 设计域和实例对比学习损失，引入亮度-对比度聚合的潜在码度量相似性，构建SFE模块增强空间特征和TFR模块利用时间相关性，并建立大规模无配对数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像和视频色调映射任务上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比学习和新型网络模块，IVTMNet有效解决了无监督HDR视频色调映射的挑战，为该领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ali Reza Pedram,Takashi Tanaka
title: A Smoothing Algorithm for Minimum Sensing Path Plans in Gaussian Belief Space
title_zh: 高斯置信空间最小感知路径规划的平滑算法
abstract: This paper explores minimum sensing navigation of robots in environments cluttered with obstacles. The general objective is to find a path plan to a goal region that requires minimal sensing effort. In [1], the information-geometric RRT* (IG-RRT*) algorithm was proposed to efficiently find such a path. However, like any stochastic sampling-based planner, the computational complexity of IG-RRT* grows quickly, impeding its use with a large number of nodes. To remedy this limitation, we suggest running IG-RRT* with a moderate number of nodes, and then using a smoothing algorithm to adjust the path obtained. To develop a smoothing algorithm, we explicitly formulate the minimum sensing path planning problem as an optimization problem. For this formulation, we introduce a new safety constraint to impose a bound on the probability of collision with obstacles in continuous-time, in contrast to the common discrete-time approach. The problem is amenable to solution via the convex-concave procedure (CCP). We develop a CCP algorithm for the formulated optimization and use this algorithm for path smoothing. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach through numerical simulations.
summary: This paper explores minimum sensing navigation of robots in environments cluttered with obstacles. The general objective is to find a path plan to a goal region that requires minimal sensing effort. In [1], the information-geometric RRT* (IG-RRT*) algorithm was proposed to efficiently find such a path. However, like any stochastic sampling-based planner, the computational complexity of IG-RRT* grows quickly, impeding its use with a large number of nodes. To remedy this limitation, we suggest running IG-RRT* with a moderate number of nodes, and then using a smoothing algorithm to adjust the path obtained. To develop a smoothing algorithm, we explicitly formulate the minimum sensing path planning problem as an optimization problem. For this formulation, we introduce a new safety constraint to impose a bound on the probability of collision with obstacles in continuous-time, in contrast to the common discrete-time approach. The problem is amenable to solution via the convex-concave procedure (CCP). We develop a CCP algorithm for the formulated optimization and use this algorithm for path smoothing. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach through numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了机器人在障碍物杂乱的环境中的最小传感导航。总体目标是找到一条需要最少传感工作的到达目标区域的路径规划。在[1]中，提出了信息几何RRT*（IG-RRT*）算法来有效地找到这样的路径。然而，与任何基于随机采样的规划器一样，IG-RRT* 的计算复杂性快速增长，阻碍了其在大量节点上的使用。为了弥补这一限制，我们建议使用适度数量的节点运行 IG-RRT*，然后使用平滑算法来调整获得的路径。为了开发平滑算法，我们明确地将最小传感路径规划问题表述为优化问题。对于这个公式，我们引入了一个新的安全约束，以限制连续时间内与障碍物碰撞的概率，这与常见的离散时间方法不同。该问题可以通过凸凹过程（CCP）来解决。我们开发了一种用于公式化优化的 CCP 算法，并使用该算法进行路径平滑。我们通过数值模拟证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高斯信念空间中最小感知路径规划的平滑算法，以解决现有方法计算复杂度过高的问题。
AI.motivation: 信息几何RRT*（IG-RRT*）算法在节点数量多时计算复杂度急剧增加，限制了其应用。需开发更高效的路径平滑方法以降低计算负担。
AI.method: 将最小感知路径规划问题建模为优化问题，引入连续时间碰撞概率约束，并采用凸凹过程（CCP）算法进行路径平滑。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真验证了所提方法在减少计算复杂度的同时有效提升了路径规划性能。
AI.conclusion: 该平滑算法通过优化连续时间安全约束，显著降低了IG-RRT*的计算开销，为复杂环境下的路径规划提供了更高效的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高斯信念空间中最小感知路径规划的平滑算法，以解决现有方法计算复杂度过高的问题。
motivation: 信息几何RRT*（IG-RRT*）算法在节点数量多时计算复杂度急剧增加，限制了其应用。需开发更高效的路径平滑方法以降低计算负担。
method: 将最小感知路径规划问题建模为优化问题，引入连续时间碰撞概率约束，并采用凸凹过程（CCP）算法进行路径平滑。
result: 通过数值仿真验证了所提方法在减少计算复杂度的同时有效提升了路径规划性能。
conclusion: 该平滑算法通过优化连续时间安全约束，显著降低了IG-RRT*的计算开销，为复杂环境下的路径规划提供了更高效的解决方案。
search_text: A Smoothing Algorithm for Minimum Sensing Path Plans in Gaussian Belief Space 高斯置信空间最小感知路径规划的平滑算法 This paper explores minimum sensing navigation of robots in environments cluttered with obstacles. The general objective is to find a path plan to a goal region that requires minimal sensing effort. In [1], the information-geometric RRT* (IG-RRT*) algorithm was proposed to efficiently find such a path. However, like any stochastic sampling-based planner, the computational complexity of IG-RRT* grows quickly, impeding its use with a large number of nodes. To remedy this limitation, we suggest running IG-RRT* with a moderate number of nodes, and then using a smoothing algorithm to adjust the path obtained. To develop a smoothing algorithm, we explicitly formulate the minimum sensing path planning problem as an optimization problem. For this formulation, we introduce a new safety constraint to impose a bound on the probability of collision with obstacles in continuous-time, in contrast to the common discrete-time approach. The problem is amenable to solution via the convex-concave procedure (CCP). We develop a CCP algorithm for the formulated optimization and use this algorithm for path smoothing. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach through numerical simulations. 本文探讨了机器人在障碍物杂乱的环境中的最小传感导航。总体目标是找到一条需要最少传感工作的到达目标区域的路径规划。在[1]中，提出了信息几何RRT*（IG-RRT*）算法来有效地找到这样的路径。然而，与任何基于随机采样的规划器一样，IG-RRT* 的计算复杂性快速增长，阻碍了其在大量节点上的使用。为了弥补这一限制，我们建议使用适度数量的节点运行 IG-RRT*，然后使用平滑算法来调整获得的路径。为了开发平滑算法，我们明确地将最小传感路径规划问题表述为优化问题。对于这个公式，我们引入了一个新的安全约束，以限制连续时间内与障碍物碰撞的概率，这与常见的离散时间方法不同。该问题可以通过凸凹过程（CCP）来解决。我们开发了一种用于公式化优化的 CCP 算法，并使用该算法进行路径平滑。我们通过数值模拟证明了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种用于高斯信念空间中最小感知路径规划的平滑算法，以解决现有方法计算复杂度过高的问题。 Ali Reza Pedram,Takashi Tanaka cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Zhongwen Zhang,Yuri Boykov
title: Collision Cross-entropy for Soft Class Labels and Deep Clustering
title_zh: 软类标签和深度聚类的碰撞交叉熵
abstract: We propose "collision cross-entropy" as a robust alternative to Shannon's cross-entropy (CE) loss when class labels are represented by soft categorical distributions y. In general, soft labels can naturally represent ambiguous targets in classification. They are particularly relevant for self-labeled clustering methods, where latent pseudo-labels are jointly estimated with the model parameters and uncertainty is prevalent. In case of soft labels, Shannon's CE teaches the model predictions to reproduce the uncertainty in each training example, which inhibits the model's ability to learn and generalize from these examples. As an alternative loss, we propose the negative log of "collision probability" that maximizes the chance of equality between two random variables, predicted class and unknown true class. We show that it has the properties of a generalized CE. The proposed collision CE agrees with Shannon's CE for one-hot labels, but the training from soft labels differs. For example, unlike Shannon's CE, data points where y is a uniform distribution have zero contribution to the training. Collision CE significantly improves classification supervised by soft uncertain targets. Unlike Shannon's, collision CE is symmetric for y and network predictions, which is particularly relevant when both distributions are estimated in the context of self-labeled clustering. Focusing on discriminative deep clustering where self-labeling and entropy-based losses are dominant, we show that the use of collision CE improves the state-of-the-art. We also derive an efficient EM algorithm that significantly speeds up the pseudo-label estimation with collision CE.
summary: We propose "collision cross-entropy" as a robust alternative to Shannon's cross-entropy (CE) loss when class labels are represented by soft categorical distributions y. In general, soft labels can naturally represent ambiguous targets in classification. They are particularly relevant for self-labeled clustering methods, where latent pseudo-labels are jointly estimated with the model parameters and uncertainty is prevalent. In case of soft labels, Shannon's CE teaches the model predictions to reproduce the uncertainty in each training example, which inhibits the model's ability to learn and generalize from these examples. As an alternative loss, we propose the negative log of "collision probability" that maximizes the chance of equality between two random variables, predicted class and unknown true class. We show that it has the properties of a generalized CE. The proposed collision CE agrees with Shannon's CE for one-hot labels, but the training from soft labels differs. For example, unlike Shannon's CE, data points where y is a uniform distribution have zero contribution to the training. Collision CE significantly improves classification supervised by soft uncertain targets. Unlike Shannon's, collision CE is symmetric for y and network predictions, which is particularly relevant when both distributions are estimated in the context of self-labeled clustering. Focusing on discriminative deep clustering where self-labeling and entropy-based losses are dominant, we show that the use of collision CE improves the state-of-the-art. We also derive an efficient EM algorithm that significantly speeds up the pseudo-label estimation with collision CE.
abstract_zh: 当类标签由软分类分布 y 表示时，我们提出“碰撞交叉熵”作为香农交叉熵（CE）损失的稳健替代方案。一般来说，软标签可以自然地表示分类中模糊的目标。它们与自标记聚类方法特别相关，其中潜在伪标签与模型参数联合估计，并且不确定性普遍存在。在软标签的情况下，香农的CE教导模型预测重现每个训练示例中的不确定性，这抑制了模型从这些示例中学习和概括的能力。作为替代损失，我们提出“碰撞概率”的负对数，它最大化两个随机变量（预测类和未知真实类）之间相等的机会。我们证明它具有广义 CE 的属性。所提出的碰撞 CE 与 Shannon 针对 one-hot 标签的 CE 一致，但软标签的训练不同。例如，与 Shannon's CE 不同，y 为均匀分布的数据点对训练的贡献为零。 Collision CE 显着改善了由软不确定目标监督的分类。与香农的不同，碰撞 CE 对于 y 和网络预测是对称的，当在自标记聚类的背景下估计两个分布时，这一点尤其相关。重点关注自标记和基于熵的损失占主导地位的判别式深度聚类，我们表明碰撞 CE 的使用提高了最先进的技术。我们还推导了一种有效的 EM 算法，可以显着加快碰撞 CE 的伪标签估计速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出碰撞交叉熵作为软类别标签分类和深度聚类的鲁棒损失函数替代方案。
AI.motivation: 香农交叉熵在软标签场景下会抑制模型学习能力，尤其在自标记聚类中伪标签存在显著不确定性时需更合适的损失函数。
AI.method: 提出碰撞交叉熵（负碰撞概率对数），最大化预测类与真实类的相等概率，设计对称处理软标签与预测的广义CE，并开发加速伪标签估计的EM算法。
AI.result: 碰撞CE在软标签监督分类和深度聚类任务中显著优于香农CE，尤其在自标记聚类场景下提升最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 碰撞交叉熵有效解决了软标签场景下的分类与聚类问题，为自标记方法提供了更优的损失函数框架。

authors_text: David Fan,Deyu Yang,Xinyu Li,Vimal Bhat,Rohith MV
title: Nearest-Neighbor Inter-Intra Contrastive Learning from Unlabeled Videos
title_zh: 来自未标记视频的最近邻帧内对比学习
comment: Accepted to the ICLR 2023 Workshop on Mathematical and Empirical Understanding of Foundation Models
comments: Accepted to the ICLR 2023 Workshop on Mathematical and Empirical Understanding of Foundation Models
abstract: Contrastive learning has recently narrowed the gap between self-supervised and supervised methods in image and video domain. State-of-the-art video contrastive learning methods such as CVRL and $ρ$-MoCo spatiotemporally augment two clips from the same video as positives. By only sampling positive clips locally from a single video, these methods neglect other semantically related videos that can also be useful. To address this limitation, we leverage nearest-neighbor videos from the global space as additional positive pairs, thus improving positive key diversity and introducing a more relaxed notion of similarity that extends beyond video and even class boundaries. Our method, Inter-Intra Video Contrastive Learning (IIVCL), improves performance on a range of video tasks.
summary: Contrastive learning has recently narrowed the gap between self-supervised and supervised methods in image and video domain. State-of-the-art video contrastive learning methods such as CVRL and $ρ$-MoCo spatiotemporally augment two clips from the same video as positives. By only sampling positive clips locally from a single video, these methods neglect other semantically related videos that can also be useful. To address this limitation, we leverage nearest-neighbor videos from the global space as additional positive pairs, thus improving positive key diversity and introducing a more relaxed notion of similarity that extends beyond video and even class boundaries. Our method, Inter-Intra Video Contrastive Learning (IIVCL), improves performance on a range of video tasks.
abstract_zh: 对比学习最近缩小了图像和视频领域自监督和监督方法之间的差距。最先进的视频对比学习方法（例如 CVRL 和 $ρ$-MoCo）在时空上将同一视频中的两个剪辑增强为正值。通过仅从单个视频本地采样正面剪辑，这些方法忽略了其他也可能有用的语义相关视频。为了解决这个限制，我们利用全局空间中的最近邻视频作为额外的正对，从而提高正键多样性并引入更宽松的相似性概念，超越视频甚至类边界。我们的方法，帧内视频对比学习（IIVCL），提高了一系列视频任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于未标记视频的跨-内对比学习方法，通过引入最近邻视频作为正样本提升视频任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频对比学习方法仅从单视频局部采样正样本，忽略了其他语义相关视频的潜在信息，限制了模型表现。
AI.method: 提出Inter-Intra Video Contrastive Learning (IIVCL)方法，利用全局空间最近邻视频作为额外正样本，结合跨视频与视频内部对比学习。
AI.result: 该方法在多个视频任务中取得性能提升，验证了引入全局正样本的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展正样本多样性及相似性定义，IIVCL有效提升了视频表示学习的效果。

authors_text: Deema Alnuhait,Qingyang Wu,Zhou Yu
title: FaceChat: An Emotion-Aware Face-to-face Dialogue Framework
title_zh: FaceChat：一种情感感知的面对面对话框架
abstract: While current dialogue systems like ChatGPT have made significant advancements in text-based interactions, they often overlook the potential of other modalities in enhancing the overall user experience. We present FaceChat, a web-based dialogue framework that enables emotionally-sensitive and face-to-face conversations. By seamlessly integrating cutting-edge technologies in natural language processing, computer vision, and speech processing, FaceChat delivers a highly immersive and engaging user experience. FaceChat framework has a wide range of potential applications, including counseling, emotional support, and personalized customer service. The system is designed to be simple and flexible as a platform for future researchers to advance the field of multimodal dialogue systems. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/qywu/FaceChat.
summary: While current dialogue systems like ChatGPT have made significant advancements in text-based interactions, they often overlook the potential of other modalities in enhancing the overall user experience. We present FaceChat, a web-based dialogue framework that enables emotionally-sensitive and face-to-face conversations. By seamlessly integrating cutting-edge technologies in natural language processing, computer vision, and speech processing, FaceChat delivers a highly immersive and engaging user experience. FaceChat framework has a wide range of potential applications, including counseling, emotional support, and personalized customer service. The system is designed to be simple and flexible as a platform for future researchers to advance the field of multimodal dialogue systems. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/qywu/FaceChat.
abstract_zh: 虽然当前的对话系统（例如 ChatGPT）在基于文本的交互方面取得了显着的进步，但它们经常忽视其他方式在增强整体用户体验方面的潜力。我们推出 FaceChat，这是一个基于网络的对话框架，可以实现情感敏感的面对面对话。通过无缝集成自然语言处理、计算机视觉和语音处理领域的尖端技术，FaceChat 提供高度身临其境且引人入胜的用户体验。 FaceChat 框架具有广泛的潜在应用，包括咨询、情感支持和个性化客户服务。该系统设计简单灵活，作为未来研究人员推进多模态对话系统领域的平台。该代码可在 https://github.com/qywu/FaceChat 上公开获取。

AI.motivation: 现有对话系统如ChatGPT主要依赖文本交互，忽视了语音、视觉等多模态信息对情感表达和交互体验的重要性。
AI.method: 整合自然语言处理、计算机视觉与语音处理技术，构建支持多模态输入输出的对话框架，实现情感感知与实时交互。
AI.result: 开发了开源框架FaceChat，支持心理咨询、情感陪伴等场景，为多模态对话系统研究提供可扩展平台。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态技术融合，FaceChat显著提升了对话的情感交互能力，为未来人机对话研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Omar Salem,Emanuele Giacomini,Leonardo Brizi,Luca Di Giammarino,Giorgio Grisetti
title: Enhancing LiDAR performance: Robust De-skewing Exclusively Relying on Range Measurements
title_zh: 增强 LiDAR 性能：完全依赖距离测量的稳健去偏斜
abstract: Most commercially available Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR)s measure the distances along a 2D section of the environment by sequentially sampling the free range along directions centered at the sensor's origin. When the sensor moves during the acquisition, the measured ranges are affected by a phenomenon known as "skewing", which appears as a distortion in the acquired scan. Skewing potentially affects all systems that rely on LiDAR data, however, it could be compensated if the position of the sensor were known each time a single range is measured. Most methods to de-skew a LiDAR are based on external sensors such as IMU or wheel odometry, to estimate these intermediate LiDAR positions. In this paper, we present a method that relies exclusively on range measurements to effectively estimate the robot velocities which are then used for de-skewing. Our approach is suitable for low-frequency LiDAR where the skewing is more evident. It can be seamlessly integrated into existing pipelines, enhancing their performance at a negligible computational cost.
summary: Most commercially available Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR)s measure the distances along a 2D section of the environment by sequentially sampling the free range along directions centered at the sensor's origin. When the sensor moves during the acquisition, the measured ranges are affected by a phenomenon known as "skewing", which appears as a distortion in the acquired scan. Skewing potentially affects all systems that rely on LiDAR data, however, it could be compensated if the position of the sensor were known each time a single range is measured. Most methods to de-skew a LiDAR are based on external sensors such as IMU or wheel odometry, to estimate these intermediate LiDAR positions. In this paper, we present a method that relies exclusively on range measurements to effectively estimate the robot velocities which are then used for de-skewing. Our approach is suitable for low-frequency LiDAR where the skewing is more evident. It can be seamlessly integrated into existing pipelines, enhancing their performance at a negligible computational cost.
abstract_zh: 大多数商用光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 通过沿以传感器原点为中心的方向对自由范围进行顺序采样来测量沿环境 2D 部分的距离。当传感器在采集过程中移动时，测量范围会受到称为“倾斜”的现象的影响，这种现象在采集的扫描中表现为失真。倾斜可能会影响所有依赖 LiDAR 数据的系统，但是，如果每次测量单个范围时都知道传感器的位置，则可以对其进行补偿。大多数消除激光雷达偏斜的方法都是基于外部传感器（例如 IMU 或车轮里程计）来估计这些中间激光雷达位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种完全依赖于距离测量来有效估计机器人速度的方法，然后将其用于去偏。我们的方法适用于偏斜更明显的低频激光雷达。它可以无缝集成到现有管道中，以可忽略的计算成本提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅依赖距离测量的LiDAR去偏转方法，无需外部传感器即可校正传感器运动引起的扫描失真。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR去偏转方法依赖IMU或轮式里程计等外部传感器，增加了系统复杂性和成本，而本文旨在通过纯距离测量实现鲁棒的去偏转。
AI.method: 通过分析LiDAR距离测量序列中的动态模式，直接估计机器人运动速度，利用速度信息对扫描数据进行去偏转补偿。
AI.result: 方法在低频LiDAR数据上有效消除偏转失真，计算开销极低且可无缝集成到现有处理流程中。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需外部传感器的LiDAR去偏转提供了新思路，特别适用于资源受限的低频LiDAR系统。

authors_text: Jiahui Fu,Yilun Du,Kurran Singh,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,John J. Leonard
title: NeuSE: Neural SE(3)-Equivariant Embedding for Consistent Spatial Understanding with Objects
title_zh: NeuSE：神经 SE(3) 等变嵌入，用于对对象进行一致的空间理解
comment: 15 Pages and 12 figures. Accepted to RSS 2023. Project webpage: https://neuse-slam.github.io/neuse/
comments: 15 Pages and 12 figures. Accepted to RSS 2023. Project webpage: https://neuse-slam.github.io/neuse/
abstract: We present NeuSE, a novel Neural SE(3)-Equivariant Embedding for objects, and illustrate how it supports object SLAM for consistent spatial understanding with long-term scene changes. NeuSE is a set of latent object embeddings created from partial object observations. It serves as a compact point cloud surrogate for complete object models, encoding full shape information while transforming SE(3)-equivariantly in tandem with the object in the physical world. With NeuSE, relative frame transforms can be directly derived from inferred latent codes. Our proposed SLAM paradigm, using NeuSE for object shape and pose characterization, can operate independently or in conjunction with typical SLAM systems. It directly infers SE(3) camera pose constraints that are compatible with general SLAM pose graph optimization, while also maintaining a lightweight object-centric map that adapts to real-world changes. Our approach is evaluated on synthetic and real-world sequences featuring changed objects and shows improved localization accuracy and change-aware mapping capability, when working either standalone or jointly with a common SLAM pipeline.
summary: We present NeuSE, a novel Neural SE(3)-Equivariant Embedding for objects, and illustrate how it supports object SLAM for consistent spatial understanding with long-term scene changes. NeuSE is a set of latent object embeddings created from partial object observations. It serves as a compact point cloud surrogate for complete object models, encoding full shape information while transforming SE(3)-equivariantly in tandem with the object in the physical world. With NeuSE, relative frame transforms can be directly derived from inferred latent codes. Our proposed SLAM paradigm, using NeuSE for object shape and pose characterization, can operate independently or in conjunction with typical SLAM systems. It directly infers SE(3) camera pose constraints that are compatible with general SLAM pose graph optimization, while also maintaining a lightweight object-centric map that adapts to real-world changes. Our approach is evaluated on synthetic and real-world sequences featuring changed objects and shows improved localization accuracy and change-aware mapping capability, when working either standalone or jointly with a common SLAM pipeline.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 NeuSE，一种新颖的对象神经 SE(3) 等变嵌入，并说明了它如何支持对象 SLAM，以实现与长期场景变化一致的空间理解。 NeuSE 是一组根据部分对象观察创建的潜在对象嵌入。它作为完整对象模型的紧凑点云替代品，编码完整的形状信息，同时与物理世界中的对象等价地变换 SE(3)。使用 NeuSE，可以直接从推断的潜在代码中导出相对帧变换。我们提出的 SLAM 范例，使用 NeuSE 进行物体形状和姿态表征，可以独立运行或与典型 SLAM 系统结合运行。它直接推断与一般 SLAM 位姿图优化兼容的 SE(3) 相机位姿约束，同时还维护一个轻量级的以对象为中心的地图，以适应现实世界的变化。我们的方法在具有变化对象的合成和现实世界序列上进行评估，并在独立工作或与通用 SLAM 管道联合工作时显示出改进的定位精度和变化感知映射能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuSE方法，通过神经SE(3)-等变嵌入实现物体SLAM，在长期场景变化下提升空间理解的一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM系统难以处理长期场景变化中的物体动态，需在变化环境中保持空间理解一致性。
AI.method: 构建SE(3)-等变物体嵌入，从部分观测生成潜在编码作为点云替代，直接推导相对坐标变换并兼容SLAM优化。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证，NeuSE在定位精度和变化感知映射能力上优于传统方法，支持独立或联合SLAM系统使用。
AI.conclusion: NeuSE通过物体中心化映射有效适应场景变化，为动态环境下的SLAM提供了轻量且鲁棒的解决方案。

It serves as a compact point cloud surrogate for complete object models, encoding full shape information while transforming SE(3)-equivariantly in tandem with the object in the physical world. With NeuSE, relative frame transforms can be directly derived from inferred latent codes. Our proposed SLAM paradigm, using NeuSE for object shape and pose characterization, can operate independently or in conjunction with typical SLAM systems. It directly infers SE(3) camera pose constraints that are compatible with general SLAM pose graph optimization, while also maintaining a lightweight object-centric map that adapts to real-world changes. Our approach is evaluated on synthetic and real-world sequences featuring changed objects and shows improved localization accuracy and change-aware mapping capability, when working either standalone or jointly with a common SLAM pipeline. 我们提出了 NeuSE，一种新颖的对象神经 SE(3) 等变嵌入，并说明了它如何支持对象 SLAM，以实现与长期场景变化一致的空间理解。 NeuSE 是一组根据部分对象观察创建的潜在对象嵌入。它作为完整对象模型的紧凑点云替代品，编码完整的形状信息，同时与物理世界中的对象等价地变换 SE(3)。使用 NeuSE，可以直接从推断的潜在代码中导出相对帧变换。我们提出的 SLAM 范例，使用 NeuSE 进行物体形状和姿态表征，可以独立运行或与典型 SLAM 系统结合运行。它直接推断与一般 SLAM 位姿图优化兼容的 SE(3) 相机位姿约束，同时还维护一个轻量级的以对象为中心的地图，以适应现实世界的变化。我们的方法在具有变化对象的合成和现实世界序列上进行评估，并在独立工作或与通用 SLAM 管道联合工作时显示出改进的定位精度和变化感知映射能力。 本文提出NeuSE方法，通过神经SE(3)-等变嵌入实现物体SLAM，在长期场景变化下提升空间理解的一致性。 Jiahui Fu,Yilun Du,Kurran Singh,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,John J. Leonard cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Brandon Silva,Miguel Contreras,Tezcan Ozrazgat Baslanti,Yuanfang Ren,Guan Ziyuan,Kia Khezeli,Azra Bihorac,Parisa Rashidi
title: Transformer Models for Acute Brain Dysfunction Prediction
title_zh: 用于急性脑功能障碍预测的 Transformer 模型
abstract: Acute brain dysfunctions (ABD), which include coma and delirium, are prevalent in the ICU, especially among older patients. The current approach in manual assessment of ABD by care providers may be sporadic and subjective. Hence, there exists a need for a data-driven robust system automating the assessment and prediction of ABD. In this work, we develop a machine learning system for real-time prediction of ADB using Electronic Health Record (HER) data. Our data processing pipeline enables integration of static and temporal data, and extraction of features relevant to ABD. We train several state-of-the-art transformer models and baseline machine learning models including CatBoost and XGB on the data that was collected from patients admitted to the ICU at UF Shands Hospital. We demonstrate the efficacy of our system for tasks related to acute brain dysfunction including binary classification of brain acuity and multi-class classification (i.e., coma, delirium, death, or normal), achieving a mean AUROC of 0.953 on our Long-former implementation. Our system can then be deployed for real-time prediction of ADB in ICUs to reduce the number of incidents caused by ABD. Moreover, the real-time system has the potential to reduce costs, duration of patients stays in the ICU, and mortality among those afflicted.

Our data processing pipeline enables integration of static and temporal data, and extraction of features relevant to ABD. We train several state-of-the-art transformer models and baseline machine learning models including CatBoost and XGB on the data that was collected from patients admitted to the ICU at UF Shands Hospital. We demonstrate the efficacy of our system for tasks related to acute brain dysfunction including binary classification of brain acuity and multi-class classification (i.e., coma, delirium, death, or normal), achieving a mean AUROC of 0.953 on our Long-former implementation. Our system can then be deployed for real-time prediction of ADB in ICUs to reduce the number of incidents caused by ABD. Moreover, the real-time system has the potential to reduce costs, duration of patients stays in the ICU, and mortality among those afflicted.
abstract_zh: 急性脑功能障碍（ABD），包括昏迷和谵妄，在 ICU 中很常见，尤其是老年患者。目前护理人员对 ABD 进行手动评估的方法可能是零星的和主观的。因此，需要一个数据驱动的稳健系统来自动评估和预测 ABD。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个机器学习系统，使用电子健康记录（HER）数据实时预测 ADB。我们的数据处理管道能够集成静态和时态数据，并提取与 ABD 相关的特征。我们根据从 UF Shands 医院 ICU 收治的患者收集的数据，训练了几种最先进的 Transformer 模型和基线机器学习模型，包括 CatBoost 和 XGB。我们证明了我们的系统对于与急性脑功能障碍相关的任务的有效性，包括脑敏锐度的二元分类和多类分类（即昏迷、谵妄、死亡或正常），在我们的 Long-former 实现中实现了 0.953 的平均 AUROC。然后可以部署我们的系统来实时预测 ICU 中的 ADB，以减少 ABD 引起的事件数量。此外，实时系统有可能降低成本、缩短患者在 ICU 的停留时间以及患者的死亡率。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种基于Transformer模型的机器学习系统，用于实时预测重症监护病房中的急性脑功能障碍（ABD）。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗人员对ABD的评估存在主观性和不规律性，亟需一种数据驱动的自动化系统来提高预测准确性并减少相关风险。
AI.method: 通过整合电子健康记录（EHR）中的静态和动态数据，提取与ABD相关的特征，并训练包括Transformer、CatBoost和XGB在内的多种模型。
AI.result: 在Long-former模型实现中，二分类和多分类任务的平均AUROC达到0.953，显著提升了ABD预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可部署于ICU实现实时预测，有望降低ABD引发的事件数量、住院时长、医疗成本及死亡率。

authors_text: Mark de Berg,Andrés López Martínez,Frits Spieksma
title: Finding Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts
title_zh: 寻找不同的最小 s-t 切割
comment: An earlier version of this work appeared at the 34th International Symposium on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC 2023). Corrected typos in Section 3 and revised arguments in Section 4. Results unchanged. Added new complexity results in Section 5. Readded missing acknowledgments section
comments: An earlier version of this work appeared at the 34th International Symposium on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC 2023). Corrected typos in Section 3 and revised arguments in Section 4. Results unchanged. Added new complexity results in Section 5. Readded missing acknowledgments section
abstract: Recently, many studies have been devoted to finding diverse solutions in classical combinatorial problems, such as Vertex Cover (Baste et al., IJCAI'20), Matching (Fomin et al., ISAAC'20) and Spanning Tree (Hanaka et al., AAAI'21). We initiate the algorithmic study of $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts which, given a directed graph $G = (V, E)$, two specified vertices $s,t \in V$, and an integer $k > 0$, asks for a collection of $k$ minimum $s$-$t$ cuts in $G$ that has maximum diversity. We investigate the complexity of the problem for maximizing three diversity measures that can be applied to a collection of cuts: (i) the sum of all pairwise Hamming distances, (ii) the cardinality of the union of cuts in the collection, and (iii) the minimum pairwise Hamming distance. We prove that $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts can be solved in strongly polynomial time for diversity measures (i) and (ii) via submodular function minimization. We obtain this result by establishing a connection between ordered collections of minimum $s$-$t$ cuts and the theory of distributive lattices. When restricted to finding only collections of mutually disjoint solutions, we provide a more practical algorithm that finds a maximum set of pairwise disjoint minimum $s$-$t$ cuts. For graphs with small minimum $s$-$t$ cut, it runs in the time of a single max-flow computation. Our results stand in contrast to the problem of finding $k$ diverse global minimum cuts -- which is known to be NP-hard even for the disjoint case (Hanaka et al., AAAI'23) -- and partially answer a long-standing open question of Wagner (Networks, 1990) about improving the complexity of finding disjoint collections of minimum $s$-$t$ cuts. Lastly, we show that $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts subject to diversity measure (iii) is NP-hard already for $k=3$.
summary: Recently, many studies have been devoted to finding diverse solutions in classical combinatorial problems, such as Vertex Cover (Baste et al., IJCAI'20), Matching (Fomin et al., ISAAC'20) and Spanning Tree (Hanaka et al., AAAI'21). We initiate the algorithmic study of $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts which, given a directed graph $G = (V, E)$, two specified vertices $s,t \in V$, and an integer $k > 0$, asks for a collection of $k$ minimum $s$-$t$ cuts in $G$ that has maximum diversity. We investigate the complexity of the problem for maximizing three diversity measures that can be applied to a collection of cuts: (i) the sum of all pairwise Hamming distances, (ii) the cardinality of the union of cuts in the collection, and (iii) the minimum pairwise Hamming distance. We prove that $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts can be solved in strongly polynomial time for diversity measures (i) and (ii) via submodular function minimization. We obtain this result by establishing a connection between ordered collections of minimum $s$-$t$ cuts and the theory of distributive lattices. When restricted to finding only collections of mutually disjoint solutions, we provide a more practical algorithm that finds a maximum set of pairwise disjoint minimum $s$-$t$ cuts. For graphs with small minimum $s$-$t$ cut, it runs in the time of a single max-flow computation. Our results stand in contrast to the problem of finding $k$ diverse global minimum cuts -- which is known to be NP-hard even for the disjoint case (Hanaka et al., AAAI'23) -- and partially answer a long-standing open question of Wagner (Networks, 1990) about improving the complexity of finding disjoint collections of minimum $s$-$t$ cuts. Lastly, we show that $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts subject to diversity measure (iii) is NP-hard already for $k=3$.
abstract_zh: 最近，许多研究致力于寻找经典组合问题的多种解决方案，例如顶点覆盖（Baste 等人，IJCAI'20）、匹配（Fomin 等人，ISAAC'20）和生成树（Hanaka 等人，AAAI'21）。我们启动$k$-多样化最小 s-t 割的算法研究，给定一个有向图 $G = (V, E)$、两个指定顶点 $s,t \in V$ 和一个整数 $k > 0$，要求在 $G$ 中找到具有最大多样性的 $k$ 最小 $s$-$t$ 割的集合。我们研究了最大化可应用于切割集合的三个多样性度量的问题的复杂性：（i）所有成对汉明距离的总和，（ii）集合中切割并集的基数，以及（iii）最小成对汉明距离。我们证明$k$-多样化最小 s-t 割可以通过子模函数最小化在强多项式时间内求解多样性度量 (i) 和 (ii)。我们通过在最小 $s$-$t$ 割的有序集合和分配格理论之间建立联系来获得这个结果。当仅限于查找相互不相交解的集合时，我们提供了一种更实用的算法，可以找到成对不相交最小 $s$-$t$ 切割的最大集合。对于最小 $s$-$t$ 割较小的图，它在单个最大流计算时运行。我们的结果与寻找 $k$ 不同的全局最小切割的问题形成鲜明对比——即使对于不相交的情况，这也是 NP 困难的（Hanaka 等人，AAAI'23）——并且部分回答了 Wagner 的一个长期悬而未决的问题（Networks，1990），即提高寻找最小 $s$-$t$ 切割的不相交集合的复杂性。最后，我们表明，对于 $k=3$，受多样性度量 (iii) 影响的 $k$-Diverse Minim s-t Cuts 已经是 NP 困难的。

AI.tldr: 研究如何高效求解具有最大多样性的k个最小s-t割问题。
AI.motivation: 在经典组合优化问题中，多样化解决方案的需求推动了对最小s-t割多样性的算法研究。
AI.method: 通过亚模函数最小化和分配格理论联系，设计多项式时间算法，并针对不相交解提供更实用的算法。
AI.result: 成功设计出多项式时间算法处理前两种多样性度量，第三种度量NP难；并提出高效算法处理不相交解，部分解决长期开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多样化割问题提供了新方法，并揭示了不同多样性度量下的复杂性差异。
