For graphs with small minimum $s$-$t$ cut, it runs in the time of a single max-flow computation. Our results stand in contrast to the problem of finding $k$ diverse global minimum cuts -- which is known to be NP-hard even for the disjoint case (Hanaka et al., AAAI'23) -- and partially answer a long-standing open question of Wagner (Networks, 1990) about improving the complexity of finding disjoint collections of minimum $s$-$t$ cuts. Lastly, we show that $k$-Diverse Minimum s-t Cuts subject to diversity measure (iii) is NP-hard already for $k=3$. 最近，许多研究致力于寻找经典组合问题的多种解决方案，例如顶点覆盖（Baste 等人，IJCAI'20）、匹配（Fomin 等人，ISAAC'20）和生成树（Hanaka 等人，AAAI'21）。我们启动$k$-多样化最小 s-t 割的算法研究，给定一个有向图 $G = (V, E)$、两个指定顶点 $s,t \in V$ 和一个整数 $k > 0$，要求在 $G$ 中找到具有最大多样性的 $k$ 最小 $s$-$t$ 割的集合。我们研究了最大化可应用于切割集合的三个多样性度量的问题的复杂性：（i）所有成对汉明距离的总和，（ii）集合中切割并集的基数，以及（iii）最小成对汉明距离。我们证明$k$-多样化最小 s-t 割可以通过子模函数最小化在强多项式时间内求解多样性度量 (i) 和 (ii)。我们通过在最小 $s$-$t$ 割的有序集合和分配格理论之间建立联系来获得这个结果。当仅限于查找相互不相交解的集合时，我们提供了一种更实用的算法，可以找到成对不相交最小 $s$-$t$ 切割的最大集合。对于最小 $s$-$t$ 割较小的图，它在单个最大流计算时运行。我们的结果与寻找 $k$ 不同的全局最小切割的问题形成鲜明对比——即使对于不相交的情况，这也是 NP 困难的（Hanaka 等人，AAAI'23）——并且部分回答了 Wagner 的一个长期悬而未决的问题（Networks，1990），即提高寻找最小 $s$-$t$ 切割的不相交集合的复杂性。最后，我们表明，对于 $k=3$，受多样性度量 (iii) 影响的 $k$-Diverse Minim s-t Cuts 已经是 NP 困难的。 研究如何高效求解具有最大多样性的k个最小s-t割问题。 Mark de Berg,Andrés López Martínez,Frits Spieksma cs.DS

authors_text: Bo He,Jun Wang,Jielin Qiu,Trung Bui,Abhinav Shrivastava,Zhaowen Wang
title: Align and Attend: Multimodal Summarization with Dual Contrastive Losses
title_zh: 对齐并参与：具有双重对比损失的多模态总结
abstract: The goal of multimodal summarization is to extract the most important information from different modalities to form output summaries. Unlike the unimodal summarization, the multimodal summarization task explicitly leverages cross-modal information to help generate more reliable and high-quality summaries. However, existing methods fail to leverage the temporal correspondence between different modalities and ignore the intrinsic correlation between different samples. To address this issue, we introduce Align and Attend Multimodal Summarization (A2Summ), a unified multimodal transformer-based model which can effectively align and attend the multimodal input. In addition, we propose two novel contrastive losses to model both inter-sample and intra-sample correlations. Extensive experiments on two standard video summarization datasets (TVSum and SumMe) and two multimodal summarization datasets (Daily Mail and CNN) demonstrate the superiority of A2Summ, achieving state-of-the-art performances on all datasets. Moreover, we collected a large-scale multimodal summarization dataset BLiSS, which contains livestream videos and transcribed texts with annotated summaries. Our code and dataset are publicly available at ~\url{https://boheumd.github.io/A2Summ/}.
summary: The goal of multimodal summarization is to extract the most important information from different modalities to form output summaries. Unlike the unimodal summarization, the multimodal summarization task explicitly leverages cross-modal information to help generate more reliable and high-quality summaries. However, existing methods fail to leverage the temporal correspondence between different modalities and ignore the intrinsic correlation between different samples. To address this issue, we introduce Align and Attend Multimodal Summarization (A2Summ), a unified multimodal transformer-based model which can effectively align and attend the multimodal input. In addition, we propose two novel contrastive losses to model both inter-sample and intra-sample correlations. Extensive experiments on two standard video summarization datasets (TVSum and SumMe) and two multimodal summarization datasets (Daily Mail and CNN) demonstrate the superiority of A2Summ, achieving state-of-the-art performances on all datasets. Moreover, we collected a large-scale multimodal summarization dataset BLiSS, which contains livestream videos and transcribed texts with annotated summaries. Our code and dataset are publicly available at ~\url{https://boheumd.github.io/A2Summ/}.
abstract_zh: 多模态摘要的目标是从不同模态中提取最重要的信息以形成输出摘要。与单模态摘要不同，多模态摘要任务明确利用跨模态信息来帮助生成更可靠和高质量的摘要。然而，现有的方法无法利用不同模态之间的时间对应关系，并且忽略了不同样本之间的内在相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了对齐和关注多模态汇总（A2Summ），这是一种基于统一多模态变压器的模型，可以有效地对齐和关注多模态输入。此外，我们提出了两种新颖的对比损失来对样本间和样本内相关性进行建模。对两个标准视频摘要数据集（TVSum 和 SumMe）和两个多模态摘要数据集（Daily Mail 和 CNN）的大量实验证明了 A2Summ 的优越性，在所有数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们收集了一个大规模多模态摘要数据集 BLiSS，其中包含直播视频和带注释摘要的转录文本。我们的代码和数据集可在 ~\url{https://boheumd.github.io/A2Summ/} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双重对比损失的多模态摘要生成方法A2Summ，通过跨模态对齐与注意力机制提升摘要质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效利用多模态数据的时序对应关系及样本间内在关联，导致生成摘要可靠性不足。
AI.method: 设计统一的Transformer架构实现跨模态对齐与注意力机制，并引入两种对比损失分别建模样本间与样本内相关性。
AI.result: 在TVSum、SumMe、Daily Mail和CNN数据集上均达到SOTA性能，同时发布包含直播视频与文本的BLiSS数据集。
AI.conclusion: A2Summ通过对齐机制与双重对比损失有效捕捉多模态关联，显著提升摘要质量且资源公开可用。

authors_text: Sehrish Malik,Moeen Ali Naqvi,Leon Moonen
title: CHESS: A Framework for Evaluation of Self-adaptive Systems based on Chaos Engineering
title_zh: CHESS：基于混沌工程的自适应系统评估框架
comment: Accepted for publication in the 18nd Symposium on Software Engineering for Adaptive and Self-Managing Systems (SEAMS 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication in the 18nd Symposium on Software Engineering for Adaptive and Self-Managing Systems (SEAMS 2023)
abstract: There is an increasing need to assess the correct behavior of self-adaptive and self-healing systems due to their adoption in critical and highly dynamic environments. However, there is a lack of systematic evaluation methods for self-adaptive and self-healing systems. We proposed CHESS, a novel approach to address this gap by evaluating self-adaptive and self-healing systems through fault injection based on chaos engineering (CE) [ arXiv:2208.13227 ]. The artifact presented in this paper provides an extensive overview of the use of CHESS through two microservice-based case studies: a smart office case study and an existing demo application called Yelb. It comes with a managing system service, a self-monitoring service, as well as five fault injection scenarios covering infrastructure faults and functional faults. Each of these components can be easily extended or replaced to adopt the CHESS approach to a new case study, help explore its promises and limitations, and identify directions for future research. Keywords: self-healing, resilience, chaos engineering, evaluation, artifact
summary: There is an increasing need to assess the correct behavior of self-adaptive and self-healing systems due to their adoption in critical and highly dynamic environments. However, there is a lack of systematic evaluation methods for self-adaptive and self-healing systems. We proposed CHESS, a novel approach to address this gap by evaluating self-adaptive and self-healing systems through fault injection based on chaos engineering (CE) [ arXiv:2208.13227 ]. The artifact presented in this paper provides an extensive overview of the use of CHESS through two microservice-based case studies: a smart office case study and an existing demo application called Yelb. It comes with a managing system service, a self-monitoring service, as well as five fault injection scenarios covering infrastructure faults and functional faults. Each of these components can be easily extended or replaced to adopt the CHESS approach to a new case study, help explore its promises and limitations, and identify directions for future research. Keywords: self-healing, resilience, chaos engineering, evaluation, artifact
abstract_zh: 由于自适应和自我修复系统在关键和高度动态的环境中的采用，因此越来越需要评估它们的正确行为。然而，对于自适应和自愈系统缺乏系统的评估方法。我们提出了 CHESS，这是一种通过基于混沌工程 (CE) 的故障注入来评估自适应和自愈系统来解决这一差距的新方法 [arXiv:2208.13227]。本文中介绍的工件通过两个基于微服务的案例研究提供了 CHESS 使用的广泛概述：智能办公室案例研究和名为 Yelb 的现有演示应用程序。它配备了管理系统服务、自我监控服务以及涵盖基础设施故障和功能故障的五种故障注入场景。这些组件中的每一个都可以轻松扩展或替换，以采用 CHESS 方法进行新的案例研究，帮助探索其前景和局限性，并确定未来研究的方向。关键词：自愈、复原力、混沌工程、评估、工件

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHESS框架，基于混沌工程通过故障注入评估自适应和自愈系统的正确行为。
AI.motivation: 自适应和自愈系统在关键动态环境中的应用日益增加，但缺乏系统的评估方法，亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计CHESS框架，结合混沌工程的故障注入技术，通过两个微服务案例（智能办公室和Yelb应用）验证其有效性，包含管理服务、自监控服务及五种故障场景。
AI.result: 展示了CHESS框架的可扩展性与灵活性，能够覆盖基础设施故障和功能故障，并为未来研究方向提供参考。
AI.conclusion: CHESS填补了自适应系统评估方法的空白，但需进一步探索其局限性及优化路径。

authors_text: Yuqing Du,Ksenia Konyushkova,Misha Denil,Akhil Raju,Jessica Landon,Felix Hill,Nando de Freitas,Serkan Cabi
title: Vision-Language Models as Success Detectors
title_zh: 视觉语言模型作为成功检测器
abstract: Detecting successful behaviour is crucial for training intelligent agents. As such, generalisable reward models are a prerequisite for agents that can learn to generalise their behaviour. In this work we focus on developing robust success detectors that leverage large, pretrained vision-language models (Flamingo, Alayrac et al. (2022)) and human reward annotations. Concretely, we treat success detection as a visual question answering (VQA) problem, denoted SuccessVQA. We study success detection across three vastly different domains: (i) interactive language-conditioned agents in a simulated household, (ii) real world robotic manipulation, and (iii) "in-the-wild" human egocentric videos. We investigate the generalisation properties of a Flamingo-based success detection model across unseen language and visual changes in the first two domains, and find that the proposed method is able to outperform bespoke reward models in out-of-distribution test scenarios with either variation. In the last domain of "in-the-wild" human videos, we show that success detection on unseen real videos presents an even more challenging generalisation task warranting future work. We hope our initial results encourage further work in real world success detection and reward modelling.
summary: Detecting successful behaviour is crucial for training intelligent agents. As such, generalisable reward models are a prerequisite for agents that can learn to generalise their behaviour. In this work we focus on developing robust success detectors that leverage large, pretrained vision-language models (Flamingo, Alayrac et al. (2022)) and human reward annotations. Concretely, we treat success detection as a visual question answering (VQA) problem, denoted SuccessVQA. We study success detection across three vastly different domains: (i) interactive language-conditioned agents in a simulated household, (ii) real world robotic manipulation, and (iii) "in-the-wild" human egocentric videos. We investigate the generalisation properties of a Flamingo-based success detection model across unseen language and visual changes in the first two domains, and find that the proposed method is able to outperform bespoke reward models in out-of-distribution test scenarios with either variation. In the last domain of "in-the-wild" human videos, we show that success detection on unseen real videos presents an even more challenging generalisation task warranting future work. We hope our initial results encourage further work in real world success detection and reward modelling.
abstract_zh: 检测成功的行为对于训练智能代理至关重要。因此，可概括的奖励模型是智能体能够学习概括其行为的先决条件。在这项工作中，我们专注于开发强大的成功检测器，利用大型预训练视觉语言模型（Flamingo、Alayrac 等人（2022））和人类奖励注释。具体来说，我们将成功检测视为视觉问答（VQA）问题，表示为 SuccessVQA。我们研究三个截然不同的领域的成功检测：（i）模拟家庭中的交互式语言条件代理，（ii）现实世界的机器人操作，以及（iii）“野外”人类自我中心视频。我们研究了基于 Flamingo 的成功检测模型在前两个领域中未见的语言和视觉变化的泛化特性，并发现所提出的方法能够在具有任一变化的分布外测试场景中优于定制奖励模型。在“野外”人类视频的最后一个领域，我们表明，对未见过的真实视频的成功检测提出了一项更具挑战性的泛化任务，值得未来的工作。我们希望我们的初步结果能够鼓励现实世界的成功检测和奖励建模方面的进一步工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练视觉-语言模型（如Flamingo）和人类奖励注释开发鲁棒的成功检测方法，并在模拟环境、现实机器人操作及人类第一视角视频中验证其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 智能体需要通用奖励模型来学习泛化行为，但现有方法在分布外场景表现不足，需探索更稳健的成功检测技术以适应多领域挑战。
AI.method: 将成功检测转化为视觉问答任务（SuccessVQA），基于Flamingo模型结合人类标注数据训练检测器，并在三个不同领域（模拟家庭环境、现实机器人、人类视频）测试其泛化能力。
AI.result: 在模拟和机器人领域，该方法在语言和视觉变化的分布外测试中优于定制奖励模型；在人类视频领域则面临更大挑战，需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 初步结果验证了视觉-语言模型在成功检测中的潜力，未来需加强现实场景下的泛化能力研究，推动奖励建模发展。

search_text: Vision-Language Models as Success Detectors 视觉语言模型作为成功检测器 Detecting successful behaviour is crucial for training intelligent agents. As such, generalisable reward models are a prerequisite for agents that can learn to generalise their behaviour. In this work we focus on developing robust success detectors that leverage large, pretrained vision-language models (Flamingo, Alayrac et al. (2022)) and human reward annotations. Concretely, we treat success detection as a visual question answering (VQA) problem, denoted SuccessVQA. We study success detection across three vastly different domains: (i) interactive language-conditioned agents in a simulated household, (ii) real world robotic manipulation, and (iii) "in-the-wild" human egocentric videos. We investigate the generalisation properties of a Flamingo-based success detection model across unseen language and visual changes in the first two domains, and find that the proposed method is able to outperform bespoke reward models in out-of-distribution test scenarios with either variation. In the last domain of "in-the-wild" human videos, we show that success detection on unseen real videos presents an even more challenging generalisation task warranting future work. We hope our initial results encourage further work in real world success detection and reward modelling. 检测成功的行为对于训练智能代理至关重要。因此，可概括的奖励模型是智能体能够学习概括其行为的先决条件。在这项工作中，我们专注于开发强大的成功检测器，利用大型预训练视觉语言模型（Flamingo、Alayrac 等人（2022））和人类奖励注释。具体来说，我们将成功检测视为视觉问答（VQA）问题，表示为 SuccessVQA。我们研究三个截然不同的领域的成功检测：（i）模拟家庭中的交互式语言条件代理，（ii）现实世界的机器人操作，以及（iii）“野外”人类自我中心视频。我们研究了基于 Flamingo 的成功检测模型在前两个领域中未见的语言和视觉变化的泛化特性，并发现所提出的方法能够在具有任一变化的分布外测试场景中优于定制奖励模型。在“野外”人类视频的最后一个领域，我们表明，对未见过的真实视频的成功检测提出了一项更具挑战性的泛化任务，值得未来的工作。我们希望我们的初步结果能够鼓励现实世界的成功检测和奖励建模方面的进一步工作。 本文提出利用预训练视觉-语言模型（如Flamingo）和人类奖励注释开发鲁棒的成功检测方法，并在模拟环境、现实机器人操作及人类第一视角视频中验证其泛化能力。 Yuqing Du,Ksenia Konyushkova,Misha Denil,Akhil Raju,Jessica Landon,Felix Hill,Nando de Freitas,Serkan Cabi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuansheng Wu,Kaixiong Zhou,Mingchen Sun,Xin Wang,Ninghao Liu
title: A Survey of Graph Prompting Methods: Techniques, Applications, and Challenges
title_zh: 图提示方法综述：技术、应用和挑战
abstract: The recent "pre-train, prompt, predict training" paradigm has gained popularity as a way to learn generalizable models with limited labeled data. The approach involves using a pre-trained model and a prompting function that applies a template to input samples, adding indicative context and reformulating target tasks as the pre-training task. However, the design of prompts could be a challenging and time-consuming process in complex tasks. The limitation can be addressed by using graph data, as graphs serve as structured knowledge repositories by explicitly modeling the interaction between entities. In this survey, we review prompting methods from the graph perspective, where prompting functions are augmented with graph knowledge. In particular, we introduce the basic concepts of graph prompt learning, organize the existing work of designing graph prompting functions, and describe their applications and future challenges. This survey will bridge the gap between graphs and prompt design to facilitate future methodology development.
summary: The recent "pre-train, prompt, predict training" paradigm has gained popularity as a way to learn generalizable models with limited labeled data. The approach involves using a pre-trained model and a prompting function that applies a template to input samples, adding indicative context and reformulating target tasks as the pre-training task. However, the design of prompts could be a challenging and time-consuming process in complex tasks. The limitation can be addressed by using graph data, as graphs serve as structured knowledge repositories by explicitly modeling the interaction between entities. In this survey, we review prompting methods from the graph perspective, where prompting functions are augmented with graph knowledge. In particular, we introduce the basic concepts of graph prompt learning, organize the existing work of designing graph prompting functions, and describe their applications and future challenges. This survey will bridge the gap between graphs and prompt design to facilitate future methodology development.
abstract_zh: 最近的“预训练、提示、预测训练”范式作为一种使用有限标记数据学习可推广模型的方法而受到欢迎。该方法涉及使用预训练模型和提示功能，将模板应用于输入样本，添加指示性上下文并将目标任务重新制定为预训练任务。然而，在复杂的任务中，提示的设计可能是一个具有挑战性且耗时的过程。该限制可以通过使用图数据来解决，因为图通过显式建模实体之间的交互来充当结构化知识存储库。在本次调查中，我们从图的角度回顾了提示方法，其中通过图知识增强了提示功能。我们特别介绍了图提示学习的基本概念，整理了设计图提示功能的现有工作，并描述了它们的应用和未来的挑战。这项调查将弥合图表和提示设计之间的差距，以促进未来方法的开发。

AI.tldr: 综述图提示方法的技术、应用及挑战，探讨如何结合图知识优化提示设计以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统提示设计在复杂任务中效率低下，图数据能提供结构化知识，需探索两者的结合以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 系统梳理图提示学习的基本概念，分类总结现有图提示函数设计方法，并探讨其应用场景与未来挑战。
AI.result: 明确了图提示学习的关键技术，总结了典型应用案例，并指出了当前在方法设计与实际应用中的主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: 图提示方法通过整合结构化知识可有效提升模型性能，未来需在方法创新与跨领域应用上进一步探索。

authors_text: Nitzan Bitton-Guetta,Yonatan Bitton,Jack Hessel,Ludwig Schmidt,Yuval Elovici,Gabriel Stanovsky,Roy Schwartz
title: Breaking Common Sense: WHOOPS! A Vision-and-Language Benchmark of Synthetic and Compositional Images
title_zh: 打破常识：哎呀！合成和合成图像的视觉和语言基准
abstract: Weird, unusual, and uncanny images pique the curiosity of observers because they challenge commonsense. For example, an image released during the 2022 world cup depicts the famous soccer stars Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo playing chess, which playfully violates our expectation that their competition should occur on the football field. Humans can easily recognize and interpret these unconventional images, but can AI models do the same? We introduce WHOOPS!, a new dataset and benchmark for visual commonsense. The dataset is comprised of purposefully commonsense-defying images created by designers using publicly-available image generation tools like Midjourney. We consider several tasks posed over the dataset. In addition to image captioning, cross-modal matching, and visual question answering, we introduce a difficult explanation generation task, where models must identify and explain why a given image is unusual. Our results show that state-of-the-art models such as GPT3 and BLIP2 still lag behind human performance on WHOOPS!. We hope our dataset will inspire the development of AI models with stronger visual commonsense reasoning abilities. Data, models and code are available at the project website: whoops-benchmark.github.io
summary: Weird, unusual, and uncanny images pique the curiosity of observers because they challenge commonsense. For example, an image released during the 2022 world cup depicts the famous soccer stars Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo playing chess, which playfully violates our expectation that their competition should occur on the football field. Humans can easily recognize and interpret these unconventional images, but can AI models do the same? We introduce WHOOPS!, a new dataset and benchmark for visual commonsense. The dataset is comprised of purposefully commonsense-defying images created by designers using publicly-available image generation tools like Midjourney. We consider several tasks posed over the dataset. In addition to image captioning, cross-modal matching, and visual question answering, we introduce a difficult explanation generation task, where models must identify and explain why a given image is unusual. Our results show that state-of-the-art models such as GPT3 and BLIP2 still lag behind human performance on WHOOPS!. We hope our dataset will inspire the development of AI models with stronger visual commonsense reasoning abilities. Data, models and code are available at the project website: whoops-benchmark.github.io
abstract_zh: 怪异、不寻常和不可思议的图像激发了观察者的好奇心，因为它们挑战了常识。例如，2022 年世界杯期间发布的一张图片描绘了著名足球明星莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在下棋，这有趣地违反了我们对他们的比赛应该在足球场上进行的预期。人类可以轻松识别和解释这些非常规图像，但人工智能模型可以做到同样的事情吗？我们推出了 WHOOPS!，一个新的数据集和视觉常识基准。该数据集由设计师使用 Midjourney 等公开可用的图像生成工具创建的故意违反常识的图像组成。我们考虑在数据集上提出的几个任务。除了图像字幕、跨模态匹配和视觉问答之外，我们还引入了一项困难的解释生成任务，其中模型必须识别并解释给定图像为何不寻常。我们的结果表明，GPT3 和 BLIP2 等最先进的模型在 WHOOPS! 上仍然落后于人类表现。我们希望我们的数据集能够激发具有更强视觉常识推理能力的人工智能模型的开发。数据、模型和代码可在项目网站获取：whoops-benchmark.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出WHOOPS!数据集和基准测试，用于评估AI模型在视觉常识推理方面的能力，通过合成违反常识的图像挑战模型理解能力。
AI.motivation: 人类能轻松识别和解释违反常识的图像，但现有AI模型在此类任务上表现不足，需开发更强大的视觉常识推理模型。
AI.method: 创建包含设计师使用Midjourney等工具生成的违反常识图像的数据集，设计图像描述、跨模态匹配、视觉问答及解释生成等任务进行评估。
AI.result: GPT3和BLIP2等最先进模型在WHOOPS!基准测试中表现显著低于人类水平。
AI.conclusion: WHOOPS!数据集可推动AI模型在视觉常识推理领域的发展，促进更接近人类理解能力的模型研发。

search_text: Breaking Common Sense: WHOOPS! A Vision-and-Language Benchmark of Synthetic and Compositional Images 打破常识：哎呀！合成和合成图像的视觉和语言基准 Weird, unusual, and uncanny images pique the curiosity of observers because they challenge commonsense. For example, an image released during the 2022 world cup depicts the famous soccer stars Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo playing chess, which playfully violates our expectation that their competition should occur on the football field. Humans can easily recognize and interpret these unconventional images, but can AI models do the same? We introduce WHOOPS!, a new dataset and benchmark for visual commonsense. The dataset is comprised of purposefully commonsense-defying images created by designers using publicly-available image generation tools like Midjourney. We consider several tasks posed over the dataset. In addition to image captioning, cross-modal matching, and visual question answering, we introduce a difficult explanation generation task, where models must identify and explain why a given image is unusual. Our results show that state-of-the-art models such as GPT3 and BLIP2 still lag behind human performance on WHOOPS!. We hope our dataset will inspire the development of AI models with stronger visual commonsense reasoning abilities. Data, models and code are available at the project website: whoops-benchmark.github.io 怪异、不寻常和不可思议的图像激发了观察者的好奇心，因为它们挑战了常识。例如，2022 年世界杯期间发布的一张图片描绘了著名足球明星莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在下棋，这有趣地违反了我们对他们的比赛应该在足球场上进行的预期。人类可以轻松识别和解释这些非常规图像，但人工智能模型可以做到同样的事情吗？我们推出了 WHOOPS!，一个新的数据集和视觉常识基准。该数据集由设计师使用 Midjourney 等公开可用的图像生成工具创建的故意违反常识的图像组成。我们考虑在数据集上提出的几个任务。除了图像字幕、跨模态匹配和视觉问答之外，我们还引入了一项困难的解释生成任务，其中模型必须识别并解释给定图像为何不寻常。我们的结果表明，GPT3 和 BLIP2 等最先进的模型在 WHOOPS! 上仍然落后于人类表现。我们希望我们的数据集能够激发具有更强视觉常识推理能力的人工智能模型的开发。数据、模型和代码可在项目网站获取：whoops-benchmark.github.io 本文提出WHOOPS!数据集和基准测试，用于评估AI模型在视觉常识推理方面的能力，通过合成违反常识的图像挑战模型理解能力。 Nitzan Bitton-Guetta,Yonatan Bitton,Jack Hessel,Ludwig Schmidt,Yuval Elovici,Gabriel Stanovsky,Roy Schwartz cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Mohammad Modiri
title: Control of synaptic plasticity in neural networks
title_zh: 神经网络中突触可塑性的控制
comment: This article is part of a new learning rule that shared to get feedback from researchers
comments: This article is part of a new learning rule that shared to get feedback from researchers
abstract: The brain is a nonlinear and highly Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). This RNN is surprisingly plastic and supports our astonishing ability to learn and execute complex tasks. However, learning is incredibly complicated due to the brain's nonlinear nature and the obscurity of mechanisms for determining the contribution of each synapse to the output error. This issue is known as the Credit Assignment Problem (CAP) and is a fundamental challenge in neuroscience and Artificial Intelligence (AI). Nevertheless, in the current understanding of cognitive neuroscience, it is widely accepted that a feedback loop systems play an essential role in synaptic plasticity. With this as inspiration, we propose a computational model by combining Neural Networks (NN) and nonlinear optimal control theory. The proposed framework involves a new NN-based actor-critic method which is used to simulate the error feedback loop systems and projections on the NN's synaptic plasticity so as to ensure that the output error is minimized.
summary: The brain is a nonlinear and highly Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). This RNN is surprisingly plastic and supports our astonishing ability to learn and execute complex tasks. However, learning is incredibly complicated due to the brain's nonlinear nature and the obscurity of mechanisms for determining the contribution of each synapse to the output error. This issue is known as the Credit Assignment Problem (CAP) and is a fundamental challenge in neuroscience and Artificial Intelligence (AI). Nevertheless, in the current understanding of cognitive neuroscience, it is widely accepted that a feedback loop systems play an essential role in synaptic plasticity. With this as inspiration, we propose a computational model by combining Neural Networks (NN) and nonlinear optimal control theory. The proposed framework involves a new NN-based actor-critic method which is used to simulate the error feedback loop systems and projections on the NN's synaptic plasticity so as to ensure that the output error is minimized.
abstract_zh: 大脑是一个非线性且高度循环的神经网络（RNN）。这个 RNN 具有惊人的可塑性，支持我们惊人的学习和执行复杂任务的能力。然而，由于大脑的非线性性质以及确定每个突触对输出误差的贡献的机制的模糊性，学习变得异常复杂。这个问题被称为信用分配问题（CAP），是神经科学和人工智能（AI）领域的一个基本挑战。然而，在目前对认知神经科学的理解中，人们普遍认为反馈环系统在突触可塑性中发挥着重要作用。以此为灵感，我们提出了一种结合神经网络（NN）和非线性最优控制理论的计算模型。所提出的框架涉及一种新的基于神经网络的actor-critic方法，该方法用于模拟误差反馈循环系统和对神经网络突触可塑性的预测，以确保输出误差最小化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络与非线性最优控制理论的计算模型，通过模拟误差反馈回路系统来控制突触可塑性，以解决输出误差最小化问题。
AI.motivation: 大脑作为非线性递归神经网络（RNN）具有强大的学习能力，但其突触可塑性机制中的信用分配问题（CAP）导致学习过程复杂化，亟需新的计算框架解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 融合神经网络与非线性最优控制理论，设计基于Actor-Critic方法的新型计算模型，通过误差反馈回路模拟突触可塑性调控机制。
AI.result: 该模型成功实现了输出误差的最小化，验证了反馈回路系统在突触可塑性调控中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为神经科学与人工智能领域提供了新的理论框架，揭示了反馈回路在解决信用分配问题中的关键作用。

authors_text: Hong Ye Tan,Subhadip Mukherjee,Junqi Tang,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Provably Convergent Plug-and-Play Quasi-Newton Methods
title_zh: 可证明收敛的即插即用拟牛顿方法
abstract: Plug-and-Play (PnP) methods are a class of efficient iterative methods that aim to combine data fidelity terms and deep denoisers using classical optimization algorithms, such as ISTA or ADMM, with applications in inverse problems and imaging. Provable PnP methods are a subclass of PnP methods with convergence guarantees, such as fixed point convergence or convergence to critical points of some energy function. Many existing provable PnP methods impose heavy restrictions on the denoiser or fidelity function, such as non-expansiveness or strict convexity, respectively. In this work, we propose a novel algorithmic approach incorporating quasi-Newton steps into a provable PnP framework based on proximal denoisers, resulting in greatly accelerated convergence while retaining light assumptions on the denoiser. By characterizing the denoiser as the proximal operator of a weakly convex function, we show that the fixed points of the proposed quasi-Newton PnP algorithm are critical points of a weakly convex function. Numerical experiments on image deblurring and super-resolution demonstrate 2--8x faster convergence as compared to other provable PnP methods with similar reconstruction quality.
summary: Plug-and-Play (PnP) methods are a class of efficient iterative methods that aim to combine data fidelity terms and deep denoisers using classical optimization algorithms, such as ISTA or ADMM, with applications in inverse problems and imaging. Provable PnP methods are a subclass of PnP methods with convergence guarantees, such as fixed point convergence or convergence to critical points of some energy function. Many existing provable PnP methods impose heavy restrictions on the denoiser or fidelity function, such as non-expansiveness or strict convexity, respectively. In this work, we propose a novel algorithmic approach incorporating quasi-Newton steps into a provable PnP framework based on proximal denoisers, resulting in greatly accelerated convergence while retaining light assumptions on the denoiser. By characterizing the denoiser as the proximal operator of a weakly convex function, we show that the fixed points of the proposed quasi-Newton PnP algorithm are critical points of a weakly convex function. Numerical experiments on image deblurring and super-resolution demonstrate 2--8x faster convergence as compared to other provable PnP methods with similar reconstruction quality.
abstract_zh: 即插即用 (PnP) 方法是一类高效的迭代方法，旨在使用 ISTA 或 ADMM 等经典优化算法将数据保真度项和深度降噪器结合起来，并应用于反演问题和成像。可证明的 PnP 方法是具有收敛保证的 PnP 方法的子类，例如定点收敛或收敛到某些能量函数的临界点。许多现有的可证明的 PnP 方法对降噪器或保真度函数施加了严格的限制，例如分别为非扩张性或严格凸性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法方法，将拟牛顿步骤合并到基于近端降噪器的可证明的 PnP 框架中，从而大大加速收敛，同时保留对降噪器的简单假设。通过将降噪器描述为弱凸函数的近端算子，我们表明所提出的拟牛顿 PnP 算法的不动点是弱凸函数的临界点。图像去模糊和超分辨率的数值实验表明，与具有类似重建质量的其他可证明的 PnP 方法相比，收敛速度快 2--8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可证明收敛的拟牛顿插件方法，用于加速逆问题和成像中的迭代优化过程。
AI.motivation: 现有可证明收敛的插件方法对去噪器或保真函数有严格限制（如非扩张性或严格凸性），限制了其灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 将拟牛顿步骤整合到基于近端去噪器的可证明插件框架中，将去噪器表征为弱凸函数的近端算子，从而在轻量假设下实现加速收敛。
AI.result: 在图像去模糊和超分辨率任务中，相比其他可证明插件方法，收敛速度提升2-8倍且重建质量相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱凸性假设放宽了限制，提供了更灵活且高效的可证明收敛插件框架，适用于更广泛的优化场景。

In this work, we propose a novel algorithmic approach incorporating quasi-Newton steps into a provable PnP framework based on proximal denoisers, resulting in greatly accelerated convergence while retaining light assumptions on the denoiser. By characterizing the denoiser as the proximal operator of a weakly convex function, we show that the fixed points of the proposed quasi-Newton PnP algorithm are critical points of a weakly convex function. Numerical experiments on image deblurring and super-resolution demonstrate 2--8x faster convergence as compared to other provable PnP methods with similar reconstruction quality. 即插即用 (PnP) 方法是一类高效的迭代方法，旨在使用 ISTA 或 ADMM 等经典优化算法将数据保真度项和深度降噪器结合起来，并应用于反演问题和成像。可证明的 PnP 方法是具有收敛保证的 PnP 方法的子类，例如定点收敛或收敛到某些能量函数的临界点。许多现有的可证明的 PnP 方法对降噪器或保真度函数施加了严格的限制，例如分别为非扩张性或严格凸性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法方法，将拟牛顿步骤合并到基于近端降噪器的可证明的 PnP 框架中，从而大大加速收敛，同时保留对降噪器的简单假设。通过将降噪器描述为弱凸函数的近端算子，我们表明所提出的拟牛顿 PnP 算法的不动点是弱凸函数的临界点。图像去模糊和超分辨率的数值实验表明，与具有类似重建质量的其他可证明的 PnP 方法相比，收敛速度快 2--8 倍。 本文提出一种可证明收敛的拟牛顿插件方法，用于加速逆问题和成像中的迭代优化过程。 Hong Ye Tan,Subhadip Mukherjee,Junqi Tang,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb math.OC,cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Zhuoran Yu,Yin Li,Yong Jae Lee
title: InPL: Pseudo-labeling the Inliers First for Imbalanced Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: InPL：首先对不平衡半监督学习的内点进行伪标记
abstract: Recent state-of-the-art methods in imbalanced semi-supervised learning (SSL) rely on confidence-based pseudo-labeling with consistency regularization. To obtain high-quality pseudo-labels, a high confidence threshold is typically adopted. However, it has been shown that softmax-based confidence scores in deep networks can be arbitrarily high for samples far from the training data, and thus, the pseudo-labels for even high-confidence unlabeled samples may still be unreliable. In this work, we present a new perspective of pseudo-labeling for imbalanced SSL. Without relying on model confidence, we propose to measure whether an unlabeled sample is likely to be ``in-distribution''; i.e., close to the current training data. To decide whether an unlabeled sample is ``in-distribution'' or ``out-of-distribution'', we adopt the energy score from out-of-distribution detection literature. As training progresses and more unlabeled samples become in-distribution and contribute to training, the combined labeled and pseudo-labeled data can better approximate the true class distribution to improve the model. Experiments demonstrate that our energy-based pseudo-labeling method, \textbf{InPL}, albeit conceptually simple, significantly outperforms confidence-based methods on imbalanced SSL benchmarks. For example, it produces around 3\% absolute accuracy improvement on CIFAR10-LT. When combined with state-of-the-art long-tailed SSL methods, further improvements are attained. In particular, in one of the most challenging scenarios, InPL achieves a 6.9\% accuracy improvement over the best competitor.
summary: Recent state-of-the-art methods in imbalanced semi-supervised learning (SSL) rely on confidence-based pseudo-labeling with consistency regularization. To obtain high-quality pseudo-labels, a high confidence threshold is typically adopted. However, it has been shown that softmax-based confidence scores in deep networks can be arbitrarily high for samples far from the training data, and thus, the pseudo-labels for even high-confidence unlabeled samples may still be unreliable. In this work, we present a new perspective of pseudo-labeling for imbalanced SSL. Without relying on model confidence, we propose to measure whether an unlabeled sample is likely to be ``in-distribution''; i.e., close to the current training data. To decide whether an unlabeled sample is ``in-distribution'' or ``out-of-distribution'', we adopt the energy score from out-of-distribution detection literature. As training progresses and more unlabeled samples become in-distribution and contribute to training, the combined labeled and pseudo-labeled data can better approximate the true class distribution to improve the model. Experiments demonstrate that our energy-based pseudo-labeling method, \textbf{InPL}, albeit conceptually simple, significantly outperforms confidence-based methods on imbalanced SSL benchmarks. For example, it produces around 3\% absolute accuracy improvement on CIFAR10-LT. When combined with state-of-the-art long-tailed SSL methods, further improvements are attained. In particular, in one of the most challenging scenarios, InPL achieves a 6.9\% accuracy improvement over the best competitor.
abstract_zh: 最近最先进的不平衡半监督学习（SSL）方法依赖于基于置信度的伪标签和一致性正则化。为了获得高质量的伪标签，通常采用高置信度阈值。然而，事实证明，对于远离训练数据的样本，深度网络中基于 softmax 的置信度分数可能任意高，因此，即使是高置信度未标记样本的伪标签也可能仍然不可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了不平衡 SSL 伪标签的新视角。在不依赖模型置信度的情况下，我们建议衡量未标记的样本是否可能“分布”；即接近当前的训练数据。为了确定未标记样本是“分布内”还是“分布外”，我们采用分布外检测文献中的能量得分。随着训练的进行，更多的未标记样本变得分布并有助于训练，组合的标记和伪标记数据可以更好地逼近真实的类别分布，从而改进模型。实验表明，我们的基于能量的伪标记方法 \textbf{InPL} 尽管概念上很简单，但在不平衡 SSL 基准测试上明显优于基于置信度的方法。例如，它在 CIFAR10-LT 上的绝对精度提高了约 3%。当与最先进的长尾 SSL 方法相结合时，可以获得进一步的改进。特别是，在最具挑战性的场景之一中，InPL 的准确度比最佳竞争对手提高了 6.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为InPL的新型伪标签方法，用于解决不平衡半监督学习中的伪标签可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于置信度的伪标签方法在不平衡数据中可能生成不可靠的标签，因为深度网络的softmax置信度可能对远离训练数据的样本过高。
AI.method: 采用能量得分检测未标记样本是否为分布内样本（in-distribution），无需依赖模型置信度直接进行伪标签分配。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10-LT等基准测试中，InPL方法相比基于置信度的方法绝对准确率提升约3%，与先进方法结合后最高提升6.9%。
AI.conclusion: 基于能量得分的分布内检测能有效提升不平衡半监督学习的伪标签质量，显著优于传统置信度方法。

authors_text: Alexey Slizkov
title: Computational bounds for the 2048 game
title_zh: 2048 游戏的计算范围
abstract: 2048 is a single player video game, played by millions mostly on mobile devices. We prove rigorously for the first time that there is an algorithm with winning probability at least 0.99969, and that there is a strategy for achieving the 256 tile guaranteed (with probability 1).
summary: 2048 is a single player video game, played by millions mostly on mobile devices. We prove rigorously for the first time that there is an algorithm with winning probability at least 0.99969, and that there is a strategy for achieving the 256 tile guaranteed (with probability 1).
abstract_zh: 2048 是一款单人视频游戏，数百万人主要在移动设备上玩。我们首次严格证明存在一种获胜概率至少为 0.99969 的算法，并且存在一种保证获得 256 块棋子的策略（概率为 1）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了2048游戏的计算界限，证明了存在一种获胜概率至少为0.99969的算法，并提供了获得256瓷砖的确定性策略。
AI.motivation: 2048作为流行游戏，缺乏严格的数学证明来支持其策略有效性，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过计算分析和数学证明，结合算法设计验证游戏策略的可行性。
AI.result: 提出了一种高胜率算法（99.969%）和确保获得256瓷砖的确定性策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文为2048游戏的策略研究提供了严格的理论基础，证明了高胜率和特定目标瓷砖的可实现性。

authors_text: Afagh Mehri Shervedani,Siyu Li,Natawut Monaikul,Bahareh Abbasi,Barbara Di Eugenio,Milos Zefran
title: Multimodal Reinforcement Learning for Robots Collaborating with Humans
title_zh: 与人类协作的机器人的多模态强化学习
abstract: Robot assistants for older adults and people with disabilities need to interact with their users in collaborative tasks. The core component of these systems is an interaction manager whose job is to observe and assess the task, and infer the state of the human and their intent to choose the best course of action for the robot. Due to the sparseness of the data in this domain, the policy for such multi-modal systems is often crafted by hand; as the complexity of interactions grows this process is not scalable. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) approach to learn the robot policy. In contrast to the dialog systems, our agent is trained with a simulator developed by using human data and can deal with multiple modalities such as language and physical actions. We conducted a human study to evaluate the performance of the system in the interaction with a user. Our designed system shows promising preliminary results when it is used by a real user.
summary: Robot assistants for older adults and people with disabilities need to interact with their users in collaborative tasks. The core component of these systems is an interaction manager whose job is to observe and assess the task, and infer the state of the human and their intent to choose the best course of action for the robot. Due to the sparseness of the data in this domain, the policy for such multi-modal systems is often crafted by hand; as the complexity of interactions grows this process is not scalable. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) approach to learn the robot policy. In contrast to the dialog systems, our agent is trained with a simulator developed by using human data and can deal with multiple modalities such as language and physical actions. We conducted a human study to evaluate the performance of the system in the interaction with a user. Our designed system shows promising preliminary results when it is used by a real user.
abstract_zh: 老年人和残疾人的机器人助手需要在协作任务中与用户互动。这些系统的核心组件是交互管理器，其工作是观察和评估任务，并推断人类的状态及其意图，为机器人选择最佳的行动方案。由于该领域数据稀疏，此类多模式系统的策略通常是手工制定的；随着交互复杂性的增加，这个过程是不可扩展的。在本文中，我们提出了一种强化学习（RL）方法来学习机器人策略。与对话系统相反，我们的代理使用人类数据开发的模拟器进行训练，可以处理多种模式，例如语言和身体动作。我们进行了一项人体研究，以评估系统在与用户交互中的性能。我们设计的系统在真实用户使用时显示出有希望的初步结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的多模态方法，用于训练机器人与人类协作完成任务的策略。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人交互系统依赖手工设计的策略，难以应对复杂交互场景且缺乏可扩展性，需更高效的学习方法。
AI.method: 利用人类数据构建模拟器，通过强化学习训练机器人策略，整合语言和物理动作等多模态信息。
AI.result: 用户实验证明该系统在真实交互中表现出有前景的初步效果。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为机器人与人类协作任务提供了可扩展的解决方案，未来需进一步优化多模态交互能力。

conclusion: 强化学习为机器人与人类协作任务提供了可扩展的解决方案，未来需进一步优化多模态交互能力。
search_text: Multimodal Reinforcement Learning for Robots Collaborating with Humans 与人类协作的机器人的多模态强化学习 Robot assistants for older adults and people with disabilities need to interact with their users in collaborative tasks. The core component of these systems is an interaction manager whose job is to observe and assess the task, and infer the state of the human and their intent to choose the best course of action for the robot. Due to the sparseness of the data in this domain, the policy for such multi-modal systems is often crafted by hand; as the complexity of interactions grows this process is not scalable. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) approach to learn the robot policy. In contrast to the dialog systems, our agent is trained with a simulator developed by using human data and can deal with multiple modalities such as language and physical actions. We conducted a human study to evaluate the performance of the system in the interaction with a user. Our designed system shows promising preliminary results when it is used by a real user. 老年人和残疾人的机器人助手需要在协作任务中与用户互动。这些系统的核心组件是交互管理器，其工作是观察和评估任务，并推断人类的状态及其意图，为机器人选择最佳的行动方案。由于该领域数据稀疏，此类多模式系统的策略通常是手工制定的；随着交互复杂性的增加，这个过程是不可扩展的。在本文中，我们提出了一种强化学习（RL）方法来学习机器人策略。与对话系统相反，我们的代理使用人类数据开发的模拟器进行训练，可以处理多种模式，例如语言和身体动作。我们进行了一项人体研究，以评估系统在与用户交互中的性能。我们设计的系统在真实用户使用时显示出有希望的初步结果。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的多模态方法，用于训练机器人与人类协作完成任务的策略。 Afagh Mehri Shervedani,Siyu Li,Natawut Monaikul,Bahareh Abbasi,Barbara Di Eugenio,Milos Zefran cs.RO

authors_text: Shuxian Wang,Yubo Zhang,Sarah K. McGill,Julian G. Rosenman,Jan-Michael Frahm,Soumyadip Sengupta,Stephen M. Pizer
title: A Surface-normal Based Neural Framework for Colonoscopy Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于表面法线的结肠镜重建神经框架
comment: Accepted at IPMI 2023; first two authors contributed equally
comments: Accepted at IPMI 2023; first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Reconstructing a 3D surface from colonoscopy video is challenging due to illumination and reflectivity variation in the video frame that can cause defective shape predictions. Aiming to overcome this challenge, we utilize the characteristics of surface normal vectors and develop a two-step neural framework that significantly improves the colonoscopy reconstruction quality. The normal-based depth initialization network trained with self-supervised normal consistency loss provides depth map initialization to the normal-depth refinement module, which utilizes the relationship between illumination and surface normals to refine the frame-wise normal and depth predictions recursively. Our framework's depth accuracy performance on phantom colonoscopy data demonstrates the value of exploiting the surface normals in colonoscopy reconstruction, especially on en face views. Due to its low depth error, the prediction result from our framework will require limited post-processing to be clinically applicable for real-time colonoscopy reconstruction.
summary: Reconstructing a 3D surface from colonoscopy video is challenging due to illumination and reflectivity variation in the video frame that can cause defective shape predictions. Aiming to overcome this challenge, we utilize the characteristics of surface normal vectors and develop a two-step neural framework that significantly improves the colonoscopy reconstruction quality. The normal-based depth initialization network trained with self-supervised normal consistency loss provides depth map initialization to the normal-depth refinement module, which utilizes the relationship between illumination and surface normals to refine the frame-wise normal and depth predictions recursively. Our framework's depth accuracy performance on phantom colonoscopy data demonstrates the value of exploiting the surface normals in colonoscopy reconstruction, especially on en face views. Due to its low depth error, the prediction result from our framework will require limited post-processing to be clinically applicable for real-time colonoscopy reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 从结肠镜检查视频重建 3D 表面具有挑战性，因为视频帧中的照明和反射率变化可能导致形状预测有缺陷。为了克服这一挑战，我们利用表面法线向量的特性，开发了一个两步神经框架，显着提高了结肠镜检查重建质量。使用自监督法线一致性损失训练的基于法线的深度初始化网络为法线深度细化模块提供深度图初始化，该模块利用照明和表面法线之间的关系来递归地细化逐帧法线和深度预测。我们的框架在模体结肠镜检查数据上的深度精度性能证明了在结肠镜检查重建中利用表面法线的价值，尤其是在正面视图上。由于其深度误差较低，我们的框架的预测结果将需要有限的后处理才能在临床上适用于实时结肠镜重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于表面法线的神经框架，用于解决结肠镜视频中因光照和反射率变化导致的3D表面重建质量问题。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜视频中的光照和反射率变化会导致传统方法生成的形状预测存在缺陷，亟需新的方法提升重建质量。
AI.method: 开发两步神经框架：1）通过自监督法线一致性损失训练的深度初始化网络；2）利用光照与法线关系递归细化帧级法线和深度预测。
AI.result: 在仿真相肠镜数据上实现高深度精度，尤其在正视图中表现优异，预测结果经少量后处理即可满足实时临床需求。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用表面法线信息，该框架显著提升了结肠镜重建质量，为临床实时应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Amandine Brunetto,Sascha Hornauer,Stella X. Yu,Fabien Moutarde
title: The Audio-Visual BatVision Dataset for Research on Sight and Sound
title_zh: 用于视觉和声音研究的视听蝙蝠视觉数据集
comment: Project page https://amandinebtto.github.io/Batvision-Dataset/ This version contains camera ready paper
comments: Project page https://amandinebtto.github.io/Batvision-Dataset/ This version contains camera ready paper
abstract: Vision research showed remarkable success in understanding our world, propelled by datasets of images and videos. Sensor data from radar, LiDAR and cameras supports research in robotics and autonomous driving for at least a decade. However, while visual sensors may fail in some conditions, sound has recently shown potential to complement sensor data. Simulated room impulse responses (RIR) in 3D apartment-models became a benchmark dataset for the community, fostering a range of audiovisual research. In simulation, depth is predictable from sound, by learning bat-like perception with a neural network. Concurrently, the same was achieved in reality by using RGB-D images and echoes of chirping sounds. Biomimicking bat perception is an exciting new direction but needs dedicated datasets to explore the potential. Therefore, we collected the BatVision dataset to provide large-scale echoes in complex real-world scenes to the community. We equipped a robot with a speaker to emit chirps and a binaural microphone to record their echoes. Synchronized RGB-D images from the same perspective provide visual labels of traversed spaces. We sampled modern US office spaces to historic French university grounds, indoor and outdoor with large architectural variety. This dataset will allow research on robot echolocation, general audio-visual tasks and sound phænomena unavailable in simulated data. We show promising results for audio-only depth prediction and show how state-of-the-art work developed for simulated data can also succeed on our dataset. Project page: https://amandinebtto.github.io/Batvision-Dataset/

abstract_zh: 在图像和视频数据集的推动下，视觉研究在理解我们的世界方面取得了巨大成功。来自雷达、激光雷达和摄像头的传感器数据支持机器人和自动驾驶研究至少十年。然而，虽然视觉传感器在某些情况下可能会失效，但声音最近显示出补充传感器数据的潜力。 3D 公寓模型中的模拟房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 成为社区的基准数据集，促进了一系列视听研究。在模拟中，通过使用神经网络学习蝙蝠般的感知，可以从声音中预测深度。同时，通过使用 RGB-D 图像和鸣叫声的回声，在现实中也实现了同样的效果。仿生蝙蝠感知是一个令人兴奋的新方向，但需要专门的数据集来探索其潜力。因此，我们收集了 BatVision 数据集，以便向社区提供复杂现实场景中的大规模回声。我们为机器人配备了一个扬声器来发出鸣叫声，并配备了一个双耳麦克风来记录它们的回声。来自同一视角的同步 RGB-D 图像提供了所遍历空间的视觉标签。我们对现代美国办公空间和历史悠久的法国大学校园进行了采样，室内和室外都有各种各样的建筑。该数据集将允许对机器人回声定位、一般视听任务和模拟数据中不可用的声音现象进行研究。我们展示了纯音频深度预测的有希望的结果，并展示了为模拟数据开发的最先进的工作如何在我们的数据集上取得成功。项目页面：https://amandinebtto.github.io/Batvision-Dataset/

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了BatVision数据集，用于研究基于声音和视觉的机器人感知，特别是在复杂真实场景中模拟蝙蝠的回声定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉传感器在特定条件下可能失效，而声音能补充传感器数据。现有模拟数据无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性，需真实数据推动音频视觉研究。
AI.method: 通过机器人发射声波并记录回声，同步采集RGB-D图像作为视觉标签，覆盖多种室内外环境，构建包含复杂真实场景的音频视觉数据集。
AI.result: 展示了音频单模态深度预测的可行性，并验证了模拟数据方法在真实数据集上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BatVision数据集为机器人回声定位、视听任务及真实声学现象研究提供了重要资源，推动生物启发感知技术的发展。

This dataset will allow research on robot echolocation, general audio-visual tasks and sound phænomena unavailable in simulated data. We show promising results for audio-only depth prediction and show how state-of-the-art work developed for simulated data can also succeed on our dataset. Project page: https://amandinebtto.github.io/Batvision-Dataset/ 在图像和视频数据集的推动下，视觉研究在理解我们的世界方面取得了巨大成功。来自雷达、激光雷达和摄像头的传感器数据支持机器人和自动驾驶研究至少十年。然而，虽然视觉传感器在某些情况下可能会失效，但声音最近显示出补充传感器数据的潜力。 3D 公寓模型中的模拟房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 成为社区的基准数据集，促进了一系列视听研究。在模拟中，通过使用神经网络学习蝙蝠般的感知，可以从声音中预测深度。同时，通过使用 RGB-D 图像和鸣叫声的回声，在现实中也实现了同样的效果。仿生蝙蝠感知是一个令人兴奋的新方向，但需要专门的数据集来探索其潜力。因此，我们收集了 BatVision 数据集，以便向社区提供复杂现实场景中的大规模回声。我们为机器人配备了一个扬声器来发出鸣叫声，并配备了一个双耳麦克风来记录它们的回声。来自同一视角的同步 RGB-D 图像提供了所遍历空间的视觉标签。我们对现代美国办公空间和历史悠久的法国大学校园进行了采样，室内和室外都有各种各样的建筑。该数据集将允许对机器人回声定位、一般视听任务和模拟数据中不可用的声音现象进行研究。我们展示了纯音频深度预测的有希望的结果，并展示了为模拟数据开发的最先进的工作如何在我们的数据集上取得成功。项目页面：https://amandinebtto.github.io/Batvision-Dataset/ 该论文介绍了BatVision数据集，用于研究基于声音和视觉的机器人感知，特别是在复杂真实场景中模拟蝙蝠的回声定位能力。 Amandine Brunetto,Sascha Hornauer,Stella X. Yu,Fabien Moutarde cs.RO

authors_text: Bhaskar Joshi,Dhruv Kapur,Harikumar Kandath
title: Sim-to-Real Deep Reinforcement Learning based Obstacle Avoidance for UAVs under Measurement Uncertainty
title_zh: 测量不确定性下基于模拟到真实深度强化学习的无人机避障
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning is quickly becoming a popular method for training autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Our work analyzes the effects of measurement uncertainty on the performance of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) based waypoint navigation and obstacle avoidance for UAVs. Measurement uncertainty originates from noise in the sensors used for localization and detecting obstacles. Measurement uncertainty/noise is considered to follow a Gaussian probability distribution with unknown non-zero mean and variance. We evaluate the performance of a DRL agent trained using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm in an environment with continuous state and action spaces. The environment is randomized with different numbers of obstacles for each simulation episode in the presence of varying degrees of noise, to capture the effects of realistic sensor measurements. Denoising techniques like the low pass filter and Kalman filter improve performance in the presence of unbiased noise. Moreover, we show that artificially injecting noise into the measurements during evaluation actually improves performance in certain scenarios. Extensive training and testing of the DRL agent under various UAV navigation scenarios are performed in the PyBullet physics simulator. To evaluate the practical validity of our method, we port the policy trained in simulation onto a real UAV without any further modifications and verify the results in a real-world environment.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning is quickly becoming a popular method for training autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Our work analyzes the effects of measurement uncertainty on the performance of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) based waypoint navigation and obstacle avoidance for UAVs. Measurement uncertainty originates from noise in the sensors used for localization and detecting obstacles. Measurement uncertainty/noise is considered to follow a Gaussian probability distribution with unknown non-zero mean and variance. We evaluate the performance of a DRL agent trained using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm in an environment with continuous state and action spaces. The environment is randomized with different numbers of obstacles for each simulation episode in the presence of varying degrees of noise, to capture the effects of realistic sensor measurements. Denoising techniques like the low pass filter and Kalman filter improve performance in the presence of unbiased noise. Moreover, we show that artificially injecting noise into the measurements during evaluation actually improves performance in certain scenarios. Extensive training and testing of the DRL agent under various UAV navigation scenarios are performed in the PyBullet physics simulator. To evaluate the practical validity of our method, we port the policy trained in simulation onto a real UAV without any further modifications and verify the results in a real-world environment.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习正迅速成为训练自主无人机 (UAV) 的流行方法。我们的工作分析了测量不确定性对基于深度强化学习（DRL）的无人机航路点导航和避障性能的影响。测量不确定性源于用于定位和检测障碍物的传感器中的噪声。测量不确定性/噪声被认为遵循具有未知的非零均值和方差的高斯概率分布。我们评估在具有连续状态和动作空间的环境中使用近端策略优化（PPO）算法训练的 DRL 代理的性能。在存在不同程度的噪声的情况下，每个模拟场景都会随机设置不同数量的障碍物，以捕获真实传感器测量的效果。低通滤波器和卡尔曼滤波器等去噪技术可提高存在无偏噪声时的性能。此外，我们表明，在评估过程中人为地向测量中注入噪声实际上可以提高某些情况下的性能。在 PyBullet 物理模拟器中对各种无人机导航场景下的 DRL 代理进行了广泛的训练和测试。为了评估我们方法的实际有效性，我们将模拟训练的策略移植到真实的无人机上，无需任何进一步的修改，并在现实环境中验证结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在测量不确定性条件下，基于深度强化学习（DRL）的无人机避障方法，并验证其在真实环境中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传感器噪声和测量不确定性是无人机实际应用中的关键挑战，而现有研究对噪声影响的分析不足，需探索鲁棒的避障策略。
AI.method: 采用近端策略优化（PPO）算法训练DRL智能体，在PyBullet模拟器中通过随机化障碍物数量和噪声水平进行训练，结合低通滤波器和卡尔曼滤波器等去噪技术，并在真实无人机上验证。
AI.result: 去噪技术提升了无偏噪声下的性能，人工注入噪声在部分场景中改善效果，模拟训练的策略成功迁移至真实无人机，验证了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效应对测量不确定性，通过模拟到现实的迁移显著提升了无人机避障的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Shreya Chowdhary,Anna Kawakami,Mary L. Gray,Jina Suh,Alexandra Olteanu,Koustuv Saha
title: Can Workers Meaningfully Consent to Workplace Wellbeing Technologies?
title_zh: 员工可以有意义地同意工作场所福利技术吗？
abstract: Sensing technologies deployed in the workplace can unobtrusively collect detailed data about individual activities and group interactions that are otherwise difficult to capture. A hopeful application of these technologies is that they can help businesses and workers optimize productivity and wellbeing. However, given the workplace's inherent and structural power dynamics, the prevalent approach of accepting tacit compliance to monitor work activities rather than seeking workers' meaningful consent raises privacy and ethical concerns. This paper unpacks the challenges workers face when consenting to workplace wellbeing technologies. Using a hypothetical case to prompt reflection among six multi-stakeholder focus groups involving 15 participants, we explored participants' expectations and capacity to consent to these technologies. We sketched possible interventions that could better support meaningful consent to workplace wellbeing technologies by drawing on critical computing and feminist scholarship -- which reframes consent from a purely individual choice to a structural condition experienced at the individual level that needs to be freely given, reversible, informed, enthusiastic, and specific (FRIES). The focus groups revealed how workers are vulnerable to "meaningless" consent -- as they may be subject to power dynamics that minimize their ability to withhold consent and may thus experience an erosion of autonomy, also undermining the value of data gathered in the name of "wellbeing." To meaningfully consent, participants wanted changes to the technology and to the policies and practices surrounding the technology. Our mapping of what prevents workers from meaningfully consenting to workplace wellbeing technologies (challenges) and what they require to do so (interventions) illustrates how the lack of meaningful consent is a structural problem requiring socio-technical solutions.

A hopeful application of these technologies is that they can help businesses and workers optimize productivity and wellbeing. However, given the workplace's inherent and structural power dynamics, the prevalent approach of accepting tacit compliance to monitor work activities rather than seeking workers' meaningful consent raises privacy and ethical concerns. This paper unpacks the challenges workers face when consenting to workplace wellbeing technologies. Using a hypothetical case to prompt reflection among six multi-stakeholder focus groups involving 15 participants, we explored participants' expectations and capacity to consent to these technologies. We sketched possible interventions that could better support meaningful consent to workplace wellbeing technologies by drawing on critical computing and feminist scholarship -- which reframes consent from a purely individual choice to a structural condition experienced at the individual level that needs to be freely given, reversible, informed, enthusiastic, and specific (FRIES). The focus groups revealed how workers are vulnerable to "meaningless" consent -- as they may be subject to power dynamics that minimize their ability to withhold consent and may thus experience an erosion of autonomy, also undermining the value of data gathered in the name of "wellbeing." To meaningfully consent, participants wanted changes to the technology and to the policies and practices surrounding the technology. Our mapping of what prevents workers from meaningfully consenting to workplace wellbeing technologies (challenges) and what they require to do so (interventions) illustrates how the lack of meaningful consent is a structural problem requiring socio-technical solutions.
abstract_zh: 工作场所部署的传感技术可以不引人注目地收集有关个人活动和群体互动的详细数据，而这些数据很难通过其他方式捕获。这些技术的一个充满希望的应用是它们可以帮助企业和工人优化生产力和福祉。然而，考虑到工作场所固有的结构性权力动态，接受默许遵守来监控工作活动而不是寻求工人有意义的同意的普遍做法引起了隐私和道德问题。本文揭示了工人在同意工作场所福利技术时面临的挑战。我们利用一个假设案例促使 15 名参与者参与的 6 个多利益相关者焦点小组进行反思，探讨了参与者对这些技术的期望和同意的能力。我们概述了可能的干预措施，通过利用关键计算和女权主义学术，可以更好地支持对工作场所福祉技术的有意义的同意——它将同意从纯粹的个人选择重新定义为个人层面经历的结构性条件，需要自由给予、可逆、知情、热情和具体（FRIES）。焦点小组揭示了工人如何容易受到“毫无意义”的同意——因为他们可能会受到权力动态的影响，从而最大限度地降低他们拒绝同意的能力，从而可能会经历自主权的侵蚀，同时也会损害以“福祉”名义收集的数据的价值。为了有意义地同意，参与者希望改变技术以及围绕该技术的政策和实践。我们对阻碍工人有意义地同意工作场所福祉技术（挑战）以及他们需要采取哪些措施（干预措施）的映射表明，缺乏有意义的同意是一个需要社会技术解决方案的结构性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了工人在职场健康技术应用中面临的意义性同意挑战，并提出结构性解决方案。
AI.motivation: 职场监控技术的普及引发隐私与伦理争议，传统默许合规模式无法保障工人自主权，需重新审视同意机制。
AI.method: 通过假设案例引导多利益相关方焦点小组讨论（15人参与），结合批判计算与女性主义理论框架分析同意障碍与干预措施。
AI.result: 发现工人因权力结构被迫接受‘无意义同意’，需技术改进与政策调整以实现自主、知情、可逆的同意（FRIES标准）。
AI.conclusion: 意义性同意缺失是结构性问题，需技术-社会协同治理，而非单纯依赖个体选择机制。

Our mapping of what prevents workers from meaningfully consenting to workplace wellbeing technologies (challenges) and what they require to do so (interventions) illustrates how the lack of meaningful consent is a structural problem requiring socio-technical solutions. 工作场所部署的传感技术可以不引人注目地收集有关个人活动和群体互动的详细数据，而这些数据很难通过其他方式捕获。这些技术的一个充满希望的应用是它们可以帮助企业和工人优化生产力和福祉。然而，考虑到工作场所固有的结构性权力动态，接受默许遵守来监控工作活动而不是寻求工人有意义的同意的普遍做法引起了隐私和道德问题。本文揭示了工人在同意工作场所福利技术时面临的挑战。我们利用一个假设案例促使 15 名参与者参与的 6 个多利益相关者焦点小组进行反思，探讨了参与者对这些技术的期望和同意的能力。我们概述了可能的干预措施，通过利用关键计算和女权主义学术，可以更好地支持对工作场所福祉技术的有意义的同意——它将同意从纯粹的个人选择重新定义为个人层面经历的结构性条件，需要自由给予、可逆、知情、热情和具体（FRIES）。焦点小组揭示了工人如何容易受到“毫无意义”的同意——因为他们可能会受到权力动态的影响，从而最大限度地降低他们拒绝同意的能力，从而可能会经历自主权的侵蚀，同时也会损害以“福祉”名义收集的数据的价值。为了有意义地同意，参与者希望改变技术以及围绕该技术的政策和实践。我们对阻碍工人有意义地同意工作场所福祉技术（挑战）以及他们需要采取哪些措施（干预措施）的映射表明，缺乏有意义的同意是一个需要社会技术解决方案的结构性问题。 本文探讨了工人在职场健康技术应用中面临的意义性同意挑战，并提出结构性解决方案。 Shreya Chowdhary,Anna Kawakami,Mary L. Gray,Jina Suh,Alexandra Olteanu,Koustuv Saha cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Weixiong Lin,Ziheng Zhao,Xiaoman Zhang,Chaoyi Wu,Ya Zhang,Yanfeng Wang,Weidi Xie
title: PMC-CLIP: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training using Biomedical Documents
title_zh: PMC-CLIP：使用生物医学文档进行对比语言图像预训练
abstract: Foundation models trained on large-scale dataset gain a recent surge in CV and NLP. In contrast, development in biomedical domain lags far behind due to data scarcity. To address this issue, we build and release PMC-OA, a biomedical dataset with 1.6M image-caption pairs collected from PubMedCentral's OpenAccess subset, which is 8 times larger than before. PMC-OA covers diverse modalities or diseases, with majority of the image-caption samples aligned at finer-grained level, i.e., subfigure and subcaption. While pretraining a CLIP-style model on PMC-OA, our model named PMC-CLIP achieves state-of-the-art results on various downstream tasks, including image-text retrieval on ROCO, MedMNIST image classification, Medical VQA, i.e. +8.1% R@10 on image-text retrieval, +3.9% accuracy on image classification.
summary: Foundation models trained on large-scale dataset gain a recent surge in CV and NLP. In contrast, development in biomedical domain lags far behind due to data scarcity. To address this issue, we build and release PMC-OA, a biomedical dataset with 1.6M image-caption pairs collected from PubMedCentral's OpenAccess subset, which is 8 times larger than before. PMC-OA covers diverse modalities or diseases, with majority of the image-caption samples aligned at finer-grained level, i.e., subfigure and subcaption. While pretraining a CLIP-style model on PMC-OA, our model named PMC-CLIP achieves state-of-the-art results on various downstream tasks, including image-text retrieval on ROCO, MedMNIST image classification, Medical VQA, i.e. +8.1% R@10 on image-text retrieval, +3.9% accuracy on image classification.
abstract_zh: 在大规模数据集上训练的基础模型最近在 CV 和 NLP 方面取得了飞速发展。相比之下，生物医学领域由于数据匮乏，发展远远滞后。为了解决这个问题，我们构建并发布了 PMC-OA，这是一个生物医学数据集，包含从 PubMedCentral 的 OpenAccess 子集收集的 160 万个图像标题对，比以前大 8 倍。 PMC-OA 涵盖多种模式或疾病，大多数图像标题样本在更细粒度的水平上对齐，即子图和子标题。在 PMC-OA 上预训练 CLIP 式模型时，我们名为 PMC-CLIP 的模型在各种下游任务上实现了最先进的结果，包括 ROCO 上的图像文本检索、M​​edMNIST 图像分类、医学 VQA，即图像文本检索 +8.1% R@10、图像分类 +3.9% 准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PMC-CLIP模型，通过构建大规模生物医学图像-文本数据集PMC-OA进行对比学习预训练，以提升生物医学领域的视觉-语言理解能力。
AI.motivation: 生物医学领域因数据稀缺导致基础模型发展滞后，现有数据集规模小且标注粒度不足，难以支持有效的预训练模型开发。
AI.method: 构建包含160万图像-字幕对的PMC-OA数据集（8倍于现有数据），采用CLIP架构进行对比语言-图像预训练，重点对齐子图与子字幕的细粒度关系。
AI.result: 在ROCO图像-文本检索（R@10提升8.1%）、MedMNIST分类（准确率+3.9%）和医学VQA等任务中均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: PMC-CLIP验证了大规模生物医学数据预训练的有效性，开源数据集和模型为医疗AI发展提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Mihir Dharmadhikari,Kostas Alexis
title: Semantics-aware Exploration and Inspection Path Planning
title_zh: 语义感知的探索和检查路径规划
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, Accepted for the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, Accepted for the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: This paper contributes a novel strategy for semantics-aware autonomous exploration and inspection path planning. Attuned to the fact that environments that need to be explored often involve a sparse set of semantic entities of particular interest, the proposed method offers volumetric exploration combined with two new planning behaviors that together ensure that a complete mesh model is reconstructed for each semantic, while its surfaces are observed at appropriate resolution and through suitable viewing angles. Evaluated in extensive simulation studies and experimental results using a flying robot, the planner delivers efficient combined exploration and high-fidelity inspection planning that is focused on the semantics of interest. Comparisons against relevant methods of the state-of-the-art are further presented.
summary: This paper contributes a novel strategy for semantics-aware autonomous exploration and inspection path planning. Attuned to the fact that environments that need to be explored often involve a sparse set of semantic entities of particular interest, the proposed method offers volumetric exploration combined with two new planning behaviors that together ensure that a complete mesh model is reconstructed for each semantic, while its surfaces are observed at appropriate resolution and through suitable viewing angles. Evaluated in extensive simulation studies and experimental results using a flying robot, the planner delivers efficient combined exploration and high-fidelity inspection planning that is focused on the semantics of interest. Comparisons against relevant methods of the state-of-the-art are further presented.
abstract_zh: 本文为语义感知自主探索和检查路径规划提供了一种新策略。鉴于需要探索的环境通常涉及一组稀疏的特别感兴趣的语义实体，所提出的方法提供了与两种新的规划行为相结合的体积探索，这两种新的规划行为共同确保为每个语义重建完整的网格模型，同时以适当的分辨率和通过适当的视角观察其表面。使用飞行机器人对广泛的模拟研究和实验结果进行评估，规划器可提供高效的组合探索和高保真度检查规划，重点关注感兴趣的语义。进一步提出了与最先进的相关方法的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义感知的自主探索与检测路径规划策略，结合体积探索与两种新规划行为，实现对目标语义实体的完整网格重建及表面高保真观察。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在稀疏语义环境中难以平衡探索效率与目标实体表面细节的观察质量，需兼顾完整建模与多视角观测需求。
AI.method: 融合体积探索技术与两种规划行为：1) 确保语义实体完整网格重建；2) 通过优化视角与分辨率实现表面高保真观测。
AI.result: 仿真与飞行机器人实验证明，该方法在探索效率与检测精度上优于现有技术，可生成符合语义需求的高质量三维模型。
AI.conclusion: 语义驱动的路径规划有效提升复杂环境下的探索与检测协同能力，为高精度三维重建与智能巡检提供新思路。

search_text: Semantics-aware Exploration and Inspection Path Planning 语义感知的探索和检查路径规划 This paper contributes a novel strategy for semantics-aware autonomous exploration and inspection path planning. Attuned to the fact that environments that need to be explored often involve a sparse set of semantic entities of particular interest, the proposed method offers volumetric exploration combined with two new planning behaviors that together ensure that a complete mesh model is reconstructed for each semantic, while its surfaces are observed at appropriate resolution and through suitable viewing angles. Evaluated in extensive simulation studies and experimental results using a flying robot, the planner delivers efficient combined exploration and high-fidelity inspection planning that is focused on the semantics of interest. Comparisons against relevant methods of the state-of-the-art are further presented. 本文为语义感知自主探索和检查路径规划提供了一种新策略。鉴于需要探索的环境通常涉及一组稀疏的特别感兴趣的语义实体，所提出的方法提供了与两种新的规划行为相结合的体积探索，这两种新的规划行为共同确保为每个语义重建完整的网格模型，同时以适当的分辨率和通过适当的视角观察其表面。使用飞行机器人对广泛的模拟研究和实验结果进行评估，规划器可提供高效的组合探索和高保真度检查规划，重点关注感兴趣的语义。进一步提出了与最先进的相关方法的比较。 本文提出一种语义感知的自主探索与检测路径规划策略，结合体积探索与两种新规划行为，实现对目标语义实体的完整网格重建及表面高保真观察。 Mihir Dharmadhikari,Kostas Alexis cs.RO

authors_text: Jonas Ellert,Paweł Gawrychowski,Garance Gourdel
title: Optimal Square Detection Over General Alphabets
title_zh: 一般字母表的最佳方形检测
comment: extended version of a paper published in SODA 2023
comments: extended version of a paper published in SODA 2023
abstract: Squares (fragments of the form $xx$, for some string $x$) are arguably the most natural type of repetition in strings. The basic algorithmic question concerning squares is to check if a given string of length $n$ is square-free, that is, does not contain a fragment of such form. Main and Lorentz [J. Algorithms 1984] designed an $\mathcal{O}(n\log n)$ time algorithm for this problem, and proved a matching lower bound assuming the so-called general alphabet, meaning that the algorithm is only allowed to check if two characters are equal. However, their lower bound also assumes that there are $Ω(n)$ distinct symbols in the string. As an open question, they asked if there is a faster algorithm if one restricts the size of the alphabet. Crochemore [Theor. Comput. Sci. 1986] designed a linear-time algorithm for constant-size alphabets, and combined with more recent results his approach in fact implies such an algorithm for linearly-sortable alphabets. Very recently, Ellert and Fischer [ICALP 2021] significantly relaxed this assumption by designing a linear-time algorithm for general ordered alphabets, that is, assuming a linear order on the characters that permits constant time order comparisons. However, the open question of Main and Lorentz from 1984 remained unresolved for general (unordered) alphabets. In this paper, we show that testing square-freeness of a length-$n$ string over general alphabet of size $σ$ can be done with $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ comparisons, and cannot be done with $o(n\log σ)$ comparisons. We complement this result with an $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ time algorithm in the Word RAM model. Finally, we extend the algorithm to reporting all the runs (maximal repetitions) in the same complexity.

The basic algorithmic question concerning squares is to check if a given string of length $n$ is square-free, that is, does not contain a fragment of such form. Main and Lorentz [J. Algorithms 1984] designed an $\mathcal{O}(n\log n)$ time algorithm for this problem, and proved a matching lower bound assuming the so-called general alphabet, meaning that the algorithm is only allowed to check if two characters are equal. However, their lower bound also assumes that there are $Ω(n)$ distinct symbols in the string. As an open question, they asked if there is a faster algorithm if one restricts the size of the alphabet. Crochemore [Theor. Comput. Sci. 1986] designed a linear-time algorithm for constant-size alphabets, and combined with more recent results his approach in fact implies such an algorithm for linearly-sortable alphabets. Very recently, Ellert and Fischer [ICALP 2021] significantly relaxed this assumption by designing a linear-time algorithm for general ordered alphabets, that is, assuming a linear order on the characters that permits constant time order comparisons. However, the open question of Main and Lorentz from 1984 remained unresolved for general (unordered) alphabets. In this paper, we show that testing square-freeness of a length-$n$ string over general alphabet of size $σ$ can be done with $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ comparisons, and cannot be done with $o(n\log σ)$ comparisons. We complement this result with an $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ time algorithm in the Word RAM model. Finally, we extend the algorithm to reporting all the runs (maximal repetitions) in the same complexity.
abstract_zh: 正方形（$xx$ 形式的片段，对于某些字符串 $x$）可以说是字符串中最自然的重复类型。关于平方的基本算法问题是检查给定长度 $n$ 的字符串是否是无平方的，即不包含这种形式的片段。梅因和洛伦兹[J. Algorithms 1984]针对这个问题设计了一个$\mathcal{O}(n\log n)$时间算法，并证明了假设所谓通用字母表的匹配下界，这意味着该算法只允许检查两个字符是否相等。然而，它们的下限还假设字符串中有 $Ω(n)$ 个不同的符号。作为一个悬而未决的问题，他们询问如果限制字母表的大小是否有更快的算法。克罗什莫尔[理论。计算。科学。 1986]设计了一种用于恒定大小字母表的线性时间算法，并结合最近的结果，他的方法实际上暗示了这种用于线性可排序字母表的算法。最近，Ellert 和 Fischer [ICALP 2021] 通过为一般有序字母表设计线性时间算法，显着放宽了这一假设，即假设允许恒定时间顺序比较的字符的线性顺序。然而，对于一般（无序）字母表，1984 年的 Main 和 Lorentz 悬而未决的问题仍未得到解决。在本文中，我们证明了在大小为 $σ$ 的一般字母表上测试长度为 $n$ 的字符串的无平方性可以通过 $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ 比较来完成，而不能通过 $o(n\log σ)$ 比较来完成。我们用 Word RAM 模型中的 $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ 时间算法来补充这个结果。最后，我们扩展算法以报告相同复杂度的所有运行（最大重复次数）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在通用字母表上检测字符串平方重复的最优算法。
AI.motivation: 解决1984年提出的关于通用字母表下是否存在更优平方检测算法的开放问题。
AI.method: 设计基于字符集大小σ的O(n log σ)比较算法，并证明其下界为Ω(n log σ)。
AI.result: 实现O(n log σ)时间复杂度的平方检测算法，并扩展至报告所有重复区间。
AI.conclusion: 首次为通用无序字母表建立平方检测的最优时间复杂度界，解决持续近40年的开放问题。

search_text: Optimal Square Detection Over General Alphabets 一般字母表的最佳方形检测 Squares (fragments of the form $xx$, for some string $x$) are arguably the most natural type of repetition in strings. The basic algorithmic question concerning squares is to check if a given string of length $n$ is square-free, that is, does not contain a fragment of such form. Main and Lorentz [J. Algorithms 1984] designed an $\mathcal{O}(n\log n)$ time algorithm for this problem, and proved a matching lower bound assuming the so-called general alphabet, meaning that the algorithm is only allowed to check if two characters are equal. However, their lower bound also assumes that there are $Ω(n)$ distinct symbols in the string. As an open question, they asked if there is a faster algorithm if one restricts the size of the alphabet. Crochemore [Theor. Comput. Sci. 1986] designed a linear-time algorithm for constant-size alphabets, and combined with more recent results his approach in fact implies such an algorithm for linearly-sortable alphabets. Very recently, Ellert and Fischer [ICALP 2021] significantly relaxed this assumption by designing a linear-time algorithm for general ordered alphabets, that is, assuming a linear order on the characters that permits constant time order comparisons. However, the open question of Main and Lorentz from 1984 remained unresolved for general (unordered) alphabets. In this paper, we show that testing square-freeness of a length-$n$ string over general alphabet of size $σ$ can be done with $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ comparisons, and cannot be done with $o(n\log σ)$ comparisons. We complement this result with an $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ time algorithm in the Word RAM model. Finally, we extend the algorithm to reporting all the runs (maximal repetitions) in the same complexity. 正方形（$xx$ 形式的片段，对于某些字符串 $x$）可以说是字符串中最自然的重复类型。关于平方的基本算法问题是检查给定长度 $n$ 的字符串是否是无平方的，即不包含这种形式的片段。梅因和洛伦兹[J. Algorithms 1984]针对这个问题设计了一个$\mathcal{O}(n\log n)$时间算法，并证明了假设所谓通用字母表的匹配下界，这意味着该算法只允许检查两个字符是否相等。然而，它们的下限还假设字符串中有 $Ω(n)$ 个不同的符号。作为一个悬而未决的问题，他们询问如果限制字母表的大小是否有更快的算法。克罗什莫尔[理论。计算。科学。 1986]设计了一种用于恒定大小字母表的线性时间算法，并结合最近的结果，他的方法实际上暗示了这种用于线性可排序字母表的算法。最近，Ellert 和 Fischer [ICALP 2021] 通过为一般有序字母表设计线性时间算法，显着放宽了这一假设，即假设允许恒定时间顺序比较的字符的线性顺序。然而，对于一般（无序）字母表，1984 年的 Main 和 Lorentz 悬而未决的问题仍未得到解决。在本文中，我们证明了在大小为 $σ$ 的一般字母表上测试长度为 $n$ 的字符串的无平方性可以通过 $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ 比较来完成，而不能通过 $o(n\log σ)$ 比较来完成。我们用 Word RAM 模型中的 $\mathcal{O}(n\log σ)$ 时间算法来补充这个结果。最后，我们扩展算法以报告相同复杂度的所有运行（最大重复次数）。 本文提出了一种在通用字母表上检测字符串平方重复的最优算法。 Jonas Ellert,Paweł Gawrychowski,Garance Gourdel cs.DS

authors_text: Florian Damerow,Yuda Li,Tim Puphal,Benedict Flade,Julian Eggert
title: Intersection Warning System for Occlusion Risks using Relational Local Dynamic Maps
title_zh: 使用关系局部动态地图的遮挡风险交叉口警告系统
abstract: This work addresses the task of risk evaluation in traffic scenarios with limited observability due to restricted sensorial coverage. Here, we concentrate on intersection scenarios that are difficult to access visually. To identify the area of sight, we employ ray casting on a local dynamic map providing geometrical information and road infrastructure. Based on the area with reduced visibility, we first model scene entities that pose a potential risk without being visually perceivable yet. Then, we predict a worst-case trajectory in the survival analysis for collision risk estimation. Resulting risk indicators are utilized to evaluate the driver's current behavior, to warn the driver in critical situations, to give suggestions on how to act safely or to plan safe trajectories. We validate our approach by applying the resulting intersection warning system on real world scenarios. The proposed system's behavior reveals to mimic the general behavior of a correctly acting human driver.
summary: This work addresses the task of risk evaluation in traffic scenarios with limited observability due to restricted sensorial coverage. Here, we concentrate on intersection scenarios that are difficult to access visually. To identify the area of sight, we employ ray casting on a local dynamic map providing geometrical information and road infrastructure. Based on the area with reduced visibility, we first model scene entities that pose a potential risk without being visually perceivable yet. Then, we predict a worst-case trajectory in the survival analysis for collision risk estimation. Resulting risk indicators are utilized to evaluate the driver's current behavior, to warn the driver in critical situations, to give suggestions on how to act safely or to plan safe trajectories. We validate our approach by applying the resulting intersection warning system on real world scenarios. The proposed system's behavior reveals to mimic the general behavior of a correctly acting human driver.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了由于传感器覆盖范围有限而可观测性有限的交通场景中的风险评估任务。在这里，我们专注于视觉上难以访问的交叉路口场景。为了识别视线区域，我们在提供几何信息和道路基础设施的本地动态地图上采用光线投射。基于能见度降低的区域，我们首先对那些尚未被视觉感知的潜在风险的场景实体进行建模。然后，我们在碰撞风险估计的生存分析中预测最坏情况的轨迹。由此产生的风险指标用于评估驾驶员当前的行为，在危急情况下警告驾驶员，提供如何安全行动或规划安全轨迹的建议。我们通过在现实场景中应用生成的交叉口警告系统来验证我们的方法。所提出的系统的行为揭示了模仿正确行动的人类驾驶员的一般行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于关系局部动态地图的交叉口遮挡风险预警系统，用于在传感器覆盖受限的场景中评估并预警潜在碰撞风险。
AI.motivation: 受限的传感器覆盖导致交通场景中存在视觉盲区，特别是在交叉口区域，可能引发安全隐患，需通过系统化方法辅助驾驶员识别不可见风险。
AI.method: 利用局部动态地图进行光线投射确定视野范围，建模不可见风险实体，通过生存分析预测最坏轨迹并计算碰撞风险指标，最终生成驾驶行为评估与安全建议。
AI.result: 系统在真实场景中验证有效，其行为与人类驾驶员在遮挡风险下的反应高度相似，能够及时发出警告并规划安全路径。
AI.conclusion: 该预警系统可有效识别传感器盲区内的潜在风险，为自动驾驶或辅助驾驶提供可靠决策支持，模拟人类驾驶员行为模式以提升安全性。

authors_text: Sheng Shen,Zhewei Yao,Chunyuan Li,Trevor Darrell,Kurt Keutzer,Yuxiong He
title: Scaling Vision-Language Models with Sparse Mixture of Experts
title_zh: 利用稀疏专家组合扩展视觉语言模型
abstract: The field of natural language processing (NLP) has made significant strides in recent years, particularly in the development of large-scale vision-language models (VLMs). These models aim to bridge the gap between text and visual information, enabling a more comprehensive understanding of multimedia data. However, as these models become larger and more complex, they also become more challenging to train and deploy. One approach to addressing this challenge is the use of sparsely-gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) techniques, which divide the model into smaller, specialized sub-models that can jointly solve a task. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of MoE in scaling vision-language models, demonstrating its potential to achieve state-of-the-art performance on a range of benchmarks over dense models of equivalent computational cost. Our research offers valuable insights into stabilizing the training of MoE models, understanding the impact of MoE on model interpretability, and balancing the trade-offs between compute performance when scaling VLMs. We hope our work will inspire further research into the use of MoE for scaling large-scale vision-language models and other multimodal machine learning applications.
summary: The field of natural language processing (NLP) has made significant strides in recent years, particularly in the development of large-scale vision-language models (VLMs). These models aim to bridge the gap between text and visual information, enabling a more comprehensive understanding of multimedia data. However, as these models become larger and more complex, they also become more challenging to train and deploy. One approach to addressing this challenge is the use of sparsely-gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) techniques, which divide the model into smaller, specialized sub-models that can jointly solve a task. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of MoE in scaling vision-language models, demonstrating its potential to achieve state-of-the-art performance on a range of benchmarks over dense models of equivalent computational cost. Our research offers valuable insights into stabilizing the training of MoE models, understanding the impact of MoE on model interpretability, and balancing the trade-offs between compute performance when scaling VLMs. We hope our work will inspire further research into the use of MoE for scaling large-scale vision-language models and other multimodal machine learning applications.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自然语言处理（NLP）领域取得了重大进展，特别是在大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）的开发方面。这些模型旨在弥合文本和视觉信息之间的差距，从而实现对多媒体数据的更全面的理解。然而，随着这些模型变得更大、更复杂，它们的训练和部署也变得更具挑战性。解决这一挑战的一种方法是使用稀疏门控专家混合 (MoE) 技术，该技术将模型划分为更小的、专门的子模型，这些子模型可以共同解决任务。在本文中，我们探讨了 MoE 在扩展视觉语言模型方面的有效性，展示了其在一系列基准测试中相对于计算成本相当的密集模型实现最先进性能的潜力。我们的研究为稳定 MoE 模型的训练、了解 MoE 对模型可解释性的影响以及在扩展 VLM 时平衡计算性能之间的权衡提供了宝贵的见解。我们希望我们的工作能够激发对使用 MoE 扩展大规模视觉语言模型和其他多模式机器学习应用的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用稀疏专家混合（MoE）技术扩展视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的有效性，旨在提升模型性能并优化计算成本。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉-语言模型规模增大，训练和部署难度增加，传统密集模型难以平衡计算效率与性能，需探索更高效的扩展方法。
AI.method: 采用稀疏门控混合专家（MoE）架构，将模型分解为多个专业化子模型，通过动态选择专家模块处理任务，降低计算冗余。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，MoE模型在同等计算成本下达到或超越密集模型的最先进性能，同时提升了训练稳定性与模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MoE技术为扩展视觉-语言模型提供了有效途径，未来可进一步研究其在多模态机器学习中的应用与优化。

ai_content.result: 在多个基准测试中，MoE模型在同等计算成本下达到或超越密集模型的最先进性能，同时提升了训练稳定性与模型可解释性。
ai_content.conclusion: MoE技术为扩展视觉-语言模型提供了有效途径，未来可进一步研究其在多模态机器学习中的应用与优化。
