search_text: Scaling Vision-Language Models with Sparse Mixture of Experts 利用稀疏专家组合扩展视觉语言模型 The field of natural language processing (NLP) has made significant strides in recent years, particularly in the development of large-scale vision-language models (VLMs). These models aim to bridge the gap between text and visual information, enabling a more comprehensive understanding of multimedia data. However, as these models become larger and more complex, they also become more challenging to train and deploy. One approach to addressing this challenge is the use of sparsely-gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) techniques, which divide the model into smaller, specialized sub-models that can jointly solve a task. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of MoE in scaling vision-language models, demonstrating its potential to achieve state-of-the-art performance on a range of benchmarks over dense models of equivalent computational cost. Our research offers valuable insights into stabilizing the training of MoE models, understanding the impact of MoE on model interpretability, and balancing the trade-offs between compute performance when scaling VLMs. We hope our work will inspire further research into the use of MoE for scaling large-scale vision-language models and other multimodal machine learning applications. 近年来，自然语言处理（NLP）领域取得了重大进展，特别是在大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）的开发方面。这些模型旨在弥合文本和视觉信息之间的差距，从而实现对多媒体数据的更全面的理解。然而，随着这些模型变得更大、更复杂，它们的训练和部署也变得更具挑战性。解决这一挑战的一种方法是使用稀疏门控专家混合 (MoE) 技术，该技术将模型划分为更小的、专门的子模型，这些子模型可以共同解决任务。在本文中，我们探讨了 MoE 在扩展视觉语言模型方面的有效性，展示了其在一系列基准测试中相对于计算成本相当的密集模型实现最先进性能的潜力。我们的研究为稳定 MoE 模型的训练、了解 MoE 对模型可解释性的影响以及在扩展 VLM 时平衡计算性能之间的权衡提供了宝贵的见解。我们希望我们的工作能够激发对使用 MoE 扩展大规模视觉语言模型和其他多模式机器学习应用的进一步研究。 本文探讨了使用稀疏专家混合（MoE）技术扩展视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的有效性，旨在提升模型性能并优化计算成本。 Sheng Shen,Zhewei Yao,Chunyuan Li,Trevor Darrell,Kurt Keutzer,Yuxiong He cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Yubin Hu,Yuze He,Yanghao Li,Jisheng Li,Yuxing Han,Jiangtao Wen,Yong-Jin Liu
title: Efficient Semantic Segmentation by Altering Resolutions for Compressed Videos
title_zh: 通过改变压缩视频的分辨率进行有效的语义分割
abstract: Video semantic segmentation (VSS) is a computationally expensive task due to the per-frame prediction for videos of high frame rates. In recent work, compact models or adaptive network strategies have been proposed for efficient VSS. However, they did not consider a crucial factor that affects the computational cost from the input side: the input resolution. In this paper, we propose an altering resolution framework called AR-Seg for compressed videos to achieve efficient VSS. AR-Seg aims to reduce the computational cost by using low resolution for non-keyframes. To prevent the performance degradation caused by downsampling, we design a Cross Resolution Feature Fusion (CReFF) module, and supervise it with a novel Feature Similarity Training (FST) strategy. Specifically, CReFF first makes use of motion vectors stored in a compressed video to warp features from high-resolution keyframes to low-resolution non-keyframes for better spatial alignment, and then selectively aggregates the warped features with local attention mechanism. Furthermore, the proposed FST supervises the aggregated features with high-resolution features through an explicit similarity loss and an implicit constraint from the shared decoding layer. Extensive experiments on CamVid and Cityscapes show that AR-Seg achieves state-of-the-art performance and is compatible with different segmentation backbones. On CamVid, AR-Seg saves 67% computational cost (measured in GFLOPs) with the PSPNet18 backbone while maintaining high segmentation accuracy. Code: https://github.com/THU-LYJ-Lab/AR-Seg.
summary: Video semantic segmentation (VSS) is a computationally expensive task due to the per-frame prediction for videos of high frame rates. In recent work, compact models or adaptive network strategies have been proposed for efficient VSS. However, they did not consider a crucial factor that affects the computational cost from the input side: the input resolution. In this paper, we propose an altering resolution framework called AR-Seg for compressed videos to achieve efficient VSS. AR-Seg aims to reduce the computational cost by using low resolution for non-keyframes. To prevent the performance degradation caused by downsampling, we design a Cross Resolution Feature Fusion (CReFF) module, and supervise it with a novel Feature Similarity Training (FST) strategy. Specifically, CReFF first makes use of motion vectors stored in a compressed video to warp features from high-resolution keyframes to low-resolution non-keyframes for better spatial alignment, and then selectively aggregates the warped features with local attention mechanism. Furthermore, the proposed FST supervises the aggregated features with high-resolution features through an explicit similarity loss and an implicit constraint from the shared decoding layer. Extensive experiments on CamVid and Cityscapes show that AR-Seg achieves state-of-the-art performance and is compatible with different segmentation backbones. On CamVid, AR-Seg saves 67% computational cost (measured in GFLOPs) with the PSPNet18 backbone while maintaining high segmentation accuracy. Code: https://github.com/THU-LYJ-Lab/AR-Seg.
abstract_zh: 由于对高帧速率视频进行每帧预测，视频语义分割 (VSS) 是一项计算成本高昂的任务。在最近的工作中，已经提出了紧凑模型或自适应网络策略来实现高效的 VSS。然而，他们没有考虑到从输入端影响计算成本的一个关键因素：输入分辨率。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 AR-Seg 的改变分辨率框架，用于压缩视频以实现高效的 VSS。 AR-Seg 旨在通过对非关键帧使用低分辨率来降低计算成本。为了防止下采样引起的性能下降，我们设计了一个跨分辨率特征融合（CReFF）模块，并用一种​​新颖的特征相似性训练（FST）策略对其进行监督。具体来说，CReFF 首先利用压缩视频中存储的运动向量将特征从高分辨率关键帧扭曲到低分辨率非关键帧，以实现更好的空间对齐，然后通过局部注意机制选择性地聚合扭曲特征。此外，所提出的 FST 通过显式相似性损失和共享解码层的隐式约束来监督具有高分辨率特征的聚合特征。在 CamVid 和 Cityscapes 上进行的大量实验表明，AR-Seg 实现了最先进的性能，并且与不同的分割主干兼容。在 CamVid 上，AR-Seg 通过 PSPNet18 主干网络节省了 67% 的计算成本（以 GFLOP 为单位），同时保持高分割精度。代码：https://github.com/THU-LYJ-Lab/AR-Seg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过调整分辨率实现压缩视频高效语义分割的方法AR-Seg。
AI.motivation: 现有视频语义分割方法未充分考虑输入分辨率对计算成本的影响，导致计算效率不足。
AI.method: 设计AR-Seg框架，利用低分辨率处理非关键帧，并通过运动向量对齐特征的CReFF模块与特征相似性训练策略FST保持性能。
AI.result: 在CamVid数据集上，使用PSPNet18主干网络时计算成本降低67%且保持高分割精度。
AI.conclusion: AR-Seg通过分辨率自适应策略有效平衡了计算效率与分割精度，适用于不同分割模型。

search_text: Efficient Semantic Segmentation by Altering Resolutions for Compressed Videos 通过改变压缩视频的分辨率进行有效的语义分割 Video semantic segmentation (VSS) is a computationally expensive task due to the per-frame prediction for videos of high frame rates. In recent work, compact models or adaptive network strategies have been proposed for efficient VSS. However, they did not consider a crucial factor that affects the computational cost from the input side: the input resolution. In this paper, we propose an altering resolution framework called AR-Seg for compressed videos to achieve efficient VSS. AR-Seg aims to reduce the computational cost by using low resolution for non-keyframes. To prevent the performance degradation caused by downsampling, we design a Cross Resolution Feature Fusion (CReFF) module, and supervise it with a novel Feature Similarity Training (FST) strategy. Specifically, CReFF first makes use of motion vectors stored in a compressed video to warp features from high-resolution keyframes to low-resolution non-keyframes for better spatial alignment, and then selectively aggregates the warped features with local attention mechanism. Furthermore, the proposed FST supervises the aggregated features with high-resolution features through an explicit similarity loss and an implicit constraint from the shared decoding layer. Extensive experiments on CamVid and Cityscapes show that AR-Seg achieves state-of-the-art performance and is compatible with different segmentation backbones. On CamVid, AR-Seg saves 67% computational cost (measured in GFLOPs) with the PSPNet18 backbone while maintaining high segmentation accuracy. authors_text: Haoran Chen,Zuxuan Wu,Xintong Han,Menglin Jia,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: PromptFusion: Decoupling Stability and Plasticity for Continual Learning
title_zh: PromptFusion：将稳定性和可塑性解耦以实现持续学习
abstract: Current research on continual learning mainly focuses on relieving catastrophic forgetting, and most of their success is at the cost of limiting the performance of newly incoming tasks. Such a trade-off is referred to as the stability-plasticity dilemma and is a more general and challenging problem for continual learning. However, the inherent conflict between these two concepts makes it seemingly impossible to devise a satisfactory solution to both of them simultaneously. Therefore, we ask, "is it possible to divide them into two separate problems to conquer them independently?". To this end, we propose a prompt-tuning-based method termed PromptFusion to enable the decoupling of stability and plasticity. Specifically, PromptFusion consists of a carefully designed \stab module that deals with catastrophic forgetting and a \boo module to learn new knowledge concurrently. Furthermore, to address the computational overhead brought by the additional architecture, we propose PromptFusion-Lite which improves PromptFusion by dynamically determining whether to activate both modules for each input image. Extensive experiments show that both PromptFusion and PromptFusion-Lite achieve promising results on popular continual learning datasets for class-incremental and domain-incremental settings. Especially on Split-Imagenet-R, one of the most challenging datasets for class-incremental learning, our method can exceed state-of-the-art prompt-based methods by more than 5\% in accuracy, with PromptFusion-Lite using 14.8\% less computational resources than PromptFusion.
summary: Current research on continual learning mainly focuses on relieving catastrophic forgetting, and most of their success is at the cost of limiting the performance of newly incoming tasks. Such a trade-off is referred to as the stability-plasticity dilemma and is a more general and challenging problem for continual learning. However, the inherent conflict between these two concepts makes it seemingly impossible to devise a satisfactory solution to both of them simultaneously. Therefore, we ask, "is it possible to divide them into two separate problems to conquer them independently?". To this end, we propose a prompt-tuning-based method termed PromptFusion to enable the decoupling of stability and plasticity. Specifically, PromptFusion consists of a carefully designed \stab module that deals with catastrophic forgetting and a \boo module to learn new knowledge concurrently. Furthermore, to address the computational overhead brought by the additional architecture, we propose PromptFusion-Lite which improves PromptFusion by dynamically determining whether to activate both modules for each input image. Extensive experiments show that both PromptFusion and PromptFusion-Lite achieve promising results on popular continual learning datasets for class-incremental and domain-incremental settings. Especially on Split-Imagenet-R, one of the most challenging datasets for class-incremental learning, our method can exceed state-of-the-art prompt-based methods by more than 5\% in accuracy, with PromptFusion-Lite using 14.8\% less computational resources than PromptFusion.
abstract_zh: 目前持续学习的研究主要集中在缓解灾难性遗忘上，它们的成功大多是以限制新传入任务的性能为代价的。这种权衡被称为稳定性-可塑性困境，对于持续学习来说是一个更普遍且更具挑战性的问题。然而，这两个概念之间的内在冲突使得似乎不可能同时为这两个概念设计出令人满意的解决方案。因此，我们要问，“是否可以将它们分成两个独立的问题来独立解决？”。为此，我们提出了一种名为 PromptFusion 的基于提示调整的方法，以实现稳定性和可塑性的解耦。具体来说，PromptFusion 由一个精心设计的 \stab 模块（用于处理灾难性遗忘）和一个 \boo 模块（用于同时学习新知识）组成。此外，为了解决额外架构带来的计算开销，我们提出了 PromptFusion-Lite，它通过动态确定是否为每个输入图像激活两个模块来改进 PromptFusion。大量实验表明，PromptFusion 和 PromptFusion-Lite 在类增量和域增量设置的流行持续学习数据集上都取得了有希望的结果。特别是在 Split-Imagenet-R（类增量学习最具挑战性的数据集之一）上，我们的方法在准确度上可以超过最先进的基于提示的方法超过 5%，而 PromptFusion-Lite 使用的计算资源比 PromptFusion 少 14.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PromptFusion方法，通过解耦稳定性与可塑性解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘与新任务性能权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在缓解灾难性遗忘时会限制新任务性能，导致稳定性-可塑性困境难以同时解决。
AI.method: 设计PromptFusion框架，包含处理遗忘的stab模块和学习新知识的boo模块，并提出计算效率更高的PromptFusion-Lite动态激活模块。
AI.result: 在Split-Imagenet-R等数据集上准确率超过现有方法5%，PromptFusion-Lite减少14.8%计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 解耦稳定性与可塑性可有效提升持续学习性能，PromptFusion系列方法在精度与效率上均表现优异。

motivation: 现有持续学习方法在缓解灾难性遗忘时会限制新任务性能，导致稳定性-可塑性困境难以同时解决。
method: 设计PromptFusion框架，包含处理遗忘的stab模块和学习新知识的boo模块，并提出计算效率更高的PromptFusion-Lite动态激活模块。

search_text: PromptFusion: Decoupling Stability and Plasticity for Continual Learning PromptFusion：将稳定性和可塑性解耦以实现持续学习 Current research on continual learning mainly focuses on relieving catastrophic forgetting, and most of their success is at the cost of limiting the performance of newly incoming tasks. Such a trade-off is referred to as the stability-plasticity dilemma and is a more general and challenging problem for continual learning. However, the inherent conflict between these two concepts makes it seemingly impossible to devise a satisfactory solution to both of them simultaneously. Therefore, we ask, "is it possible to divide them into two separate problems to conquer them independently?". To this end, we propose a prompt-tuning-based method termed PromptFusion to enable the decoupling of stability and plasticity. Specifically, PromptFusion consists of a carefully designed \stab module that deals with catastrophic forgetting and a \boo module to learn new knowledge concurrently. Furthermore, to address the computational overhead brought by the additional architecture, we propose PromptFusion-Lite which improves PromptFusion by dynamically determining whether to activate both modules for each input image. Extensive experiments show that both PromptFusion and PromptFusion-Lite achieve promising results on popular continual learning datasets for class-incremental and domain-incremental settings. Especially on Split-Imagenet-R, one of the most challenging datasets for class-incremental learning, our method can exceed state-of-the-art prompt-based methods by more than 5\% in accuracy, with PromptFusion-Lite using 14.8\% less computational resources than PromptFusion. 目前持续学习的研究主要集中在缓解灾难性遗忘上，它们的成功大多是以限制新传入任务的性能为代价的。这种权衡被称为稳定性-可塑性困境，对于持续学习来说是一个更普遍且更具挑战性的问题。然而，这两个概念之间的内在冲突使得似乎不可能同时为这两个概念设计出令人满意的解决方案。因此，我们要问，“是否可以将它们分成两个独立的问题来独立解决？”。为此，我们提出了一种名为 PromptFusion 的基于提示调整的方法，以实现稳定性和可塑性的解耦。具体来说，PromptFusion 由一个精心设计的 \stab 模块（用于处理灾难性遗忘）和一个 \boo 模块（用于同时学习新知识）组成。此外，为了解决额外架构带来的计算开销，我们提出了 PromptFusion-Lite，它通过动态确定是否为每个输入图像激活两个模块来改进 PromptFusion。大量实验表明，PromptFusion 和 PromptFusion-Lite 在类增量和域增量设置的流行持续学习数据集上都取得了有希望的结果。特别是在 Split-Imagenet-R（类增量学习最具挑战性的数据集之一）上，我们的方法在准确度上可以超过最先进的基于提示的方法超过 5%，而 PromptFusion-Lite 使用的计算资源比 PromptFusion 少 14.8%。 本文提出PromptFusion方法，通过解耦稳定性与可塑性解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘与新任务性能权衡问题。 Haoran Chen,Zuxuan Wu,Xintong Han,Menglin Jia,Yu-Gang Jiang cs.CV

authors_text: Zesen Cheng,Kehan Li,Peng Jin,Xiangyang Ji,Li Yuan,Chang Liu,Jie Chen
title: Parallel Vertex Diffusion for Unified Visual Grounding
title_zh: 用于统一视觉基础的并行顶点扩散
abstract: Unified visual grounding pursues a simple and generic technical route to leverage multi-task data with less task-specific design. The most advanced methods typically present boxes and masks as vertex sequences to model referring detection and segmentation as an autoregressive sequential vertex generation paradigm. However, generating high-dimensional vertex sequences sequentially is error-prone because the upstream of the sequence remains static and cannot be refined based on downstream vertex information, even if there is a significant location gap. Besides, with limited vertexes, the inferior fitting of objects with complex contours restricts the performance upper bound. To deal with this dilemma, we propose a parallel vertex generation paradigm for superior high-dimension scalability with a diffusion model by simply modifying the noise dimension. An intuitive materialization of our paradigm is Parallel Vertex Diffusion (PVD) to directly set vertex coordinates as the generation target and use a diffusion model to train and infer. We claim that it has two flaws: (1) unnormalized coordinate caused a high variance of loss value; (2) the original training objective of PVD only considers point consistency but ignores geometry consistency. To solve the first flaw, Center Anchor Mechanism (CAM) is designed to convert coordinates as normalized offset values to stabilize the training loss value. For the second flaw, Angle summation loss (ASL) is designed to constrain the geometry difference of prediction and ground truth vertexes for geometry-level consistency. Empirical results show that our PVD achieves state-of-the-art in both referring detection and segmentation, and our paradigm is more scalable and efficient than sequential vertex generation with high-dimension data.
summary: Unified visual grounding pursues a simple and generic technical route to leverage multi-task data with less task-specific design. The most advanced methods typically present boxes and masks as vertex sequences to model referring detection and segmentation as an autoregressive sequential vertex generation paradigm. However, generating high-dimensional vertex sequences sequentially is error-prone because the upstream of the sequence remains static and cannot be refined based on downstream vertex information, even if there is a significant location gap. Besides, with limited vertexes, the inferior fitting of objects with complex contours restricts the performance upper bound. To deal with this dilemma, we propose a parallel vertex generation paradigm for superior high-dimension scalability with a diffusion model by simply modifying the noise dimension. An intuitive materialization of our paradigm is Parallel Vertex Diffusion (PVD) to directly set vertex coordinates as the generation target and use a diffusion model to train and infer. We claim that it has two flaws: (1) unnormalized coordinate caused a high variance of loss value; (2) the original training objective of PVD only considers point consistency but ignores geometry consistency. To solve the first flaw, Center Anchor Mechanism (CAM) is designed to convert coordinates as normalized offset values to stabilize the training loss value. For the second flaw, Angle summation loss (ASL) is designed to constrain the geometry difference of prediction and ground truth vertexes for geometry-level consistency. Empirical results show that our PVD achieves state-of-the-art in both referring detection and segmentation, and our paradigm is more scalable and efficient than sequential vertex generation with high-dimension data.
abstract_zh: 统一视觉基础追求简单通用的技术路线，以较少特定于任务的设计来利用多任务数据。最先进的方法通常将框和掩模呈现为顶点序列，以将检测和分割建模为自回归顺序顶点生成范例。然而，顺序生成高维顶点序列很容易出错，因为序列的上游保持静态，并且无法基于下游顶点信息进行细化，即使存在显着的位置间隙。此外，由于顶点有限，复杂轮廓物体的拟合效果较差，限制了性能上限。为了解决这个困境，我们提出了一种并行顶点生成范例，通过简单地修改噪声维度，通过扩散模型来实现卓越的高维可扩展性。我们的范例的直观体现是并行顶点扩散（PVD），直接将顶点坐标设置为生成目标，并使用扩散模型进行训练和推断。我们认为它有两个缺陷：（1）非归一化坐标导致损失值方差较大； (2)PVD最初的训练目标只考虑了点一致性而忽略了几何一致性。为了解决第一个缺陷，中心锚定机制（CAM）被设计为将坐标转换为归一化偏移值，以稳定训练损失值。对于第二个缺陷，角度总和损失（ASL）旨在限制预测和地面真实顶点的几何差异，以实现几何级一致性。实证结果表明，我们的 PVD ​​在引用检测和分割方面都达到了最先进的水平，并且我们的范例比使用高维数据的顺序顶点生成更具可扩展性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种并行顶点扩散方法（PVD），用于统一视觉定位任务，通过改进扩散模型解决现有方法在高维顶点序列生成中的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于序列生成的视觉定位方法存在生成误差大、复杂轮廓拟合差的问题，且难以高效处理高维数据。
AI.method: 设计并行顶点扩散框架（PVD），通过修改噪声维度实现高维扩展；引入中心锚点机制（CAM）归一化坐标以稳定训练，以及角度求和损失（ASL）约束几何一致性。
AI.result: PVD在指代检测和分割任务中达到最先进水平，相比序列生成方法更具可扩展性和效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 并行顶点扩散范式有效解决了高维视觉定位中的关键问题，为多任务统一建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Marco Dalai,Stefano Della Fiore,Adele A. Rescigno,Ugo Vaccaro
title: Bounds and Algorithms for Frameproof Codes and Related Combinatorial Structures
title_zh: 框架代码和相关组合结构的界限和算法
comment: 5 pages plus extra one reference page, accepted to the IEEE Information Theory Workshop (ITW 2023)
comments: 5 pages plus extra one reference page, accepted to the IEEE Information Theory Workshop (ITW 2023)
abstract: In this paper, we study upper bounds on the minimum length of frameproof codes introduced by Boneh and Shaw to protect copyrighted materials. A $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof code of length $t$ is a $t \times n$ matrix having entries in $\{0,1,\ldots, q-1\}$ and with the property that for any column $\mathbf{c}$ and any other $k$ columns, there exists a row where the symbols of the $k$ columns are all different from the corresponding symbol (in the same row) of the column $\mathbf{c}$. In this paper, we show the existence of $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof codes of length $t = O(\frac{k^2}{q} \log n)$ for $q \leq k$, using the Lovász Local Lemma, and of length $t = O(\frac{k}{\log(q/k)}\log(n/k))$ for $q > k$ using the expurgation method. Remarkably, for the practical case of $q \leq k$ our findings give codes whose length almost matches the lower bound $Ω(\frac{k^2}{q\log k} \log n)$ on the length of any $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof code and, more importantly, allow us to derive an algorithm of complexity $O(t n^2)$ for the construction of such codes.
summary: In this paper, we study upper bounds on the minimum length of frameproof codes introduced by Boneh and Shaw to protect copyrighted materials. A $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof code of length $t$ is a $t \times n$ matrix having entries in $\{0,1,\ldots, q-1\}$ and with the property that for any column $\mathbf{c}$ and any other $k$ columns, there exists a row where the symbols of the $k$ columns are all different from the corresponding symbol (in the same row) of the column $\mathbf{c}$. In this paper, we show the existence of $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof codes of length $t = O(\frac{k^2}{q} \log n)$ for $q \leq k$, using the Lovász Local Lemma, and of length $t = O(\frac{k}{\log(q/k)}\log(n/k))$ for $q > k$ using the expurgation method. Remarkably, for the practical case of $q \leq k$ our findings give codes whose length almost matches the lower bound $Ω(\frac{k^2}{q\log k} \log n)$ on the length of any $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof code and, more importantly, allow us to derive an algorithm of complexity $O(t n^2)$ for the construction of such codes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 Boneh 和 Shaw 为保护受版权保护的材料而引入的框架代码最小长度的上限。长度为 $t$ 的 $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof 代码是一个 $t \times n$ 矩阵，其条目为 $\{0,1,\ldots, q-1\}$，并且具有以下属性：对于任何列 $\mathbf{c}$ 和任何其他 $k$ 列，存在一行，其中 $k$ 列的符号均不同于该列的相应符号（同一行中） $\mathbf{c}$。在本文中，我们使用 Lovász 局部引理证明了对于 $q \leq k$ 存在长度 $t = O(\frac{k^2}{q} \log n)$ 的 $q$-ary $(k,n)$ 框架证明码，对于 $q > k$ 使用清除方法存在长度 $t = O(\frac{k}{\log(q/k)}\log(n/k))$ 的框架证明码。值得注意的是，对于 $q \leq k$ 的实际情况，我们的发现给出的代码长度几乎与任何 $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof 代码长度的下限 $Ω(\frac{k^2}{q\log k} \log n)$ 匹配，更重要的是，允许我们导出复杂度为 $O(t n^2)$ 的算法来构造此类代码。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于保护版权材料的Frameproof码的最小长度上界，并提出了相关算法。
AI.motivation: Frameproof码能防止合谋攻击，保护数字内容版权，但其长度的理论界和高效构造方法尚需进一步研究。
AI.method: 采用Lovász局部引理处理q≤k情形，利用剔除法（expurgation method）处理q>k情形，结合组合分析推导码长上界。
AI.result: 证明了q-ary (k,n)-Frameproof码长度t的上界：当q≤k时t=O(k²/q logn)，当q>k时t=O(k/(log(q/k)) log(n/k))，并给出O(tn²)复杂度的构造算法。
AI.conclusion: 对于实际应用中常见的q≤k场景，所提码长接近理论下界，且算法复杂度可接受，为版权保护提供了有效方案。

search_text: Bounds and Algorithms for Frameproof Codes and Related Combinatorial Structures 框架代码和相关组合结构的界限和算法 In this paper, we study upper bounds on the minimum length of frameproof codes introduced by Boneh and Shaw to protect copyrighted materials. A $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof code of length $t$ is a $t \times n$ matrix having entries in $\{0,1,\ldots, q-1\}$ and with the property that for any column $\mathbf{c}$ and any other $k$ columns, there exists a row where the symbols of the $k$ columns are all different from the corresponding symbol (in the same row) of the column $\mathbf{c}$. In this paper, we show the existence of $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof codes of length $t = O(\frac{k^2}{q} \log n)$ for $q \leq k$, using the Lovász Local Lemma, and of length $t = O(\frac{k}{\log(q/k)}\log(n/k))$ for $q > k$ using the expurgation method. Remarkably, for the practical case of $q \leq k$ our findings give codes whose length almost matches the lower bound $Ω(\frac{k^2}{q\log k} \log n)$ on the length of any $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof code and, more importantly, allow us to derive an algorithm of complexity $O(t n^2)$ for the construction of such codes. 在本文中，我们研究了 Boneh 和 Shaw 为保护受版权保护的材料而引入的框架代码最小长度的上限。长度为 $t$ 的 $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof 代码是一个 $t \times n$ 矩阵，其条目为 $\{0,1,\ldots, q-1\}$，并且具有以下属性：对于任何列 $\mathbf{c}$ 和任何其他 $k$ 列，存在一行，其中 $k$ 列的符号均不同于该列的相应符号（同一行中） $\mathbf{c}$。在本文中，我们使用 Lovász 局部引理证明了对于 $q \leq k$ 存在长度 $t = O(\frac{k^2}{q} \log n)$ 的 $q$-ary $(k,n)$ 框架证明码，对于 $q > k$ 使用清除方法存在长度 $t = O(\frac{k}{\log(q/k)}\log(n/k))$ 的框架证明码。值得注意的是，对于 $q \leq k$ 的实际情况，我们的发现给出的代码长度几乎与任何 $q$-ary $(k,n)$-frameproof 代码长度的下限 $Ω(\frac{k^2}{q\log k} \log n)$ 匹配，更重要的是，允许我们导出复杂度为 $O(t n^2)$ 的算法来构造此类代码。 本文研究了用于保护版权材料的Frameproof码的最小长度上界，并提出了相关算法。 Marco Dalai,Stefano Della Fiore,Adele A. Rescigno,Ugo Vaccaro cs.IT,cs.DS

authors_text: Bettina Berendt,Özgür Karadeniz,Sercan Kıyak,Stefan Mertens,Leen d'Haenens
title: Bias, diversity, and challenges to fairness in classification and automated text analysis. From libraries to AI and back
title_zh: 分类和自动文本分析中的偏见、多样性和公平性挑战。从图书馆到人工智能并返回
abstract: Libraries are increasingly relying on computational methods, including methods from Artificial Intelligence (AI). This increasing usage raises concerns about the risks of AI that are currently broadly discussed in scientific literature, the media and law-making. In this article we investigate the risks surrounding bias and unfairness in AI usage in classification and automated text analysis within the context of library applications. We describe examples that show how the library community has been aware of such risks for a long time, and how it has developed and deployed countermeasures. We take a closer look at the notion of '(un)fairness' in relation to the notion of 'diversity', and we investigate a formalisation of diversity that models both inclusion and distribution. We argue that many of the unfairness problems of automated content analysis can also be regarded through the lens of diversity and the countermeasures taken to enhance diversity.
summary: Libraries are increasingly relying on computational methods, including methods from Artificial Intelligence (AI). This increasing usage raises concerns about the risks of AI that are currently broadly discussed in scientific literature, the media and law-making. In this article we investigate the risks surrounding bias and unfairness in AI usage in classification and automated text analysis within the context of library applications. We describe examples that show how the library community has been aware of such risks for a long time, and how it has developed and deployed countermeasures. We take a closer look at the notion of '(un)fairness' in relation to the notion of 'diversity', and we investigate a formalisation of diversity that models both inclusion and distribution. We argue that many of the unfairness problems of automated content analysis can also be regarded through the lens of diversity and the countermeasures taken to enhance diversity.
abstract_zh: 图书馆越来越依赖计算方法，包括人工智能 (AI) 方法。这种日益增加的使用引发了人们对人工智能风险的担忧，目前科学文献、媒体和立法中广泛讨论了人工智能的风险。在本文中，我们研究了图书馆应用程序中人工智能在分类和自动文本分析中的使用带来的偏见和不公平风险。我们描述的例子表明图书馆界如何长期以来意识到此类风险，以及如何制定和部署对策。我们仔细研究了与“多样性”概念相关的“（不）公平”概念，并研究了对包容性和分配进行建模的多样性的形式化。我们认为，自动化内容分析的许多不公平问题也可以通过多样性的视角以及为增强多样性而采取的对策来看待。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能在图书馆分类和文本分析中的偏差与公平性挑战，分析多样性与公平性的关系，并提出通过多样性提升公平性的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着图书馆广泛采用AI技术，其潜在的偏差和不公平风险引发关注。图书馆界长期面临类似问题并积累应对经验，需结合多样性视角重新审视公平性挑战。
AI.method: 通过案例分析、文献综述及形式化模型，研究图书馆领域已有的偏差应对措施，并构建包含包容性与分布性的多样性量化框架。
AI.result: 发现图书馆界通过多样性策略缓解偏差的实践，证明多样性与公平性存在理论关联，形式化模型可有效解析自动化内容分析中的不公平现象。
AI.conclusion: 多样性是解决AI公平性问题的核心路径，图书馆领域的经验为AI伦理研究提供跨学科视角，需在技术设计中系统融入多样性原则。

authors_text: Ruixiang Tang,Yu-Neng Chuang,Xia Hu
title: The Science of Detecting LLM-Generated Texts
title_zh: 检测 LLM 生成的文本的科学
abstract: The emergence of large language models (LLMs) has resulted in the production of LLM-generated texts that is highly sophisticated and almost indistinguishable from texts written by humans. However, this has also sparked concerns about the potential misuse of such texts, such as spreading misinformation and causing disruptions in the education system. Although many detection approaches have been proposed, a comprehensive understanding of the achievements and challenges is still lacking. This survey aims to provide an overview of existing LLM-generated text detection techniques and enhance the control and regulation of language generation models. Furthermore, we emphasize crucial considerations for future research, including the development of comprehensive evaluation metrics and the threat posed by open-source LLMs, to drive progress in the area of LLM-generated text detection.
summary: The emergence of large language models (LLMs) has resulted in the production of LLM-generated texts that is highly sophisticated and almost indistinguishable from texts written by humans. However, this has also sparked concerns about the potential misuse of such texts, such as spreading misinformation and causing disruptions in the education system. Although many detection approaches have been proposed, a comprehensive understanding of the achievements and challenges is still lacking. This survey aims to provide an overview of existing LLM-generated text detection techniques and enhance the control and regulation of language generation models. Furthermore, we emphasize crucial considerations for future research, including the development of comprehensive evaluation metrics and the threat posed by open-source LLMs, to drive progress in the area of LLM-generated text detection.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的出现导致了 LLM 生成的文本的产生，这些文本非常复杂，几乎与人类编写的文本没有区别。然而，这也引发了人们对此类文本可能被滥用的担忧，例如传播错误信息并导致教育系统中断。尽管已经提出了许多检测方法，但仍然缺乏对成就和挑战的全面了解。本次调查旨在概述现有的法学硕士生成文本检测技术，并增强对语言生成模型的控制和调节。此外，我们强调未来研究的关键考虑因素，包括综合评估指标的开发和开源法学硕士构成的威胁，以推动法学硕士生成的文本检测领域的进展。

AI.tldr: 综述现有LLM生成文本检测技术并探讨未来研究方向
AI.motivation: LLM生成文本的高相似性引发误用担忧，现有检测方法缺乏系统性总结，需加强控制与监管
AI.method: 系统综述现有检测技术，分析挑战与未来研究方向
AI.result: 总结了检测技术现状，识别出评估指标不足及开源LLM威胁等关键挑战
AI.conclusion: 需开发全面评估指标并关注开源LLM风险，以推动检测技术发展

authors_text: Caroline Leboeuf,Margarida Carvalho,Yan Kestens,Benoît Thierry
title: Optimization of the location and design of urban green spaces
title_zh: 城市绿地选址与设计优化
abstract: The recent promotion of sustainable urban planning combined with a growing need for public interventions to improve well-being and health have led to an increased collective interest for green spaces in and around cities. In particular, parks have proven a wide range of benefits in urban areas. This also means inequities in park accessibility may contribute to health inequities. In this work, we showcase the application of classic tools from Operations Research to assist decision-makers to improve parks' accessibility, distribution and design. Given the context of public decision-making, we are particularly concerned with equity and environmental justice, and are focused on an advanced assessment of users' behavior through a spatial interaction model. We present a two-stage fair facility location and design model, which serves as a template model to assist public decision-makers at the city-level for the planning of urban green spaces. The first-stage of the optimization model is about the optimal city-budget allocation to neighborhoods based on a data exposing inequality attributes. The second-stage seeks the optimal location and design of parks for each neighborhood, and the objective consists of maximizing the total expected probability of individuals visiting parks. We show how to reformulate the latter as a mixed-integer linear program. We further introduce a clustering method to reduce the size of the problem and determine a close to optimal solution within reasonable time. The model is tested using the case study of the city of Montreal and comparative results are discussed in detail to justify the performance of the model.
summary: The recent promotion of sustainable urban planning combined with a growing need for public interventions to improve well-being and health have led to an increased collective interest for green spaces in and around cities. In particular, parks have proven a wide range of benefits in urban areas. This also means inequities in park accessibility may contribute to health inequities. In this work, we showcase the application of classic tools from Operations Research to assist decision-makers to improve parks' accessibility, distribution and design. Given the context of public decision-making, we are particularly concerned with equity and environmental justice, and are focused on an advanced assessment of users' behavior through a spatial interaction model. We present a two-stage fair facility location and design model, which serves as a template model to assist public decision-makers at the city-level for the planning of urban green spaces. The first-stage of the optimization model is about the optimal city-budget allocation to neighborhoods based on a data exposing inequality attributes. The second-stage seeks the optimal location and design of parks for each neighborhood, and the objective consists of maximizing the total expected probability of individuals visiting parks. We show how to reformulate the latter as a mixed-integer linear program. We further introduce a clustering method to reduce the size of the problem and determine a close to optimal solution within reasonable time. The model is tested using the case study of the city of Montreal and comparative results are discussed in detail to justify the performance of the model.
abstract_zh: 最近对可持续城市规划的推广，加上对改善福祉和健康的公共干预措施的日益增长的需求，导致人们对城市内外绿色空间的集体兴趣不断增加。特别是，公园已被证明在城市地区具有广泛的好处。这也意味着公园可达性的不平等可能会导致健康不平等。在这项工作中，我们展示了运筹学经典工具的应用，以帮助决策者改善公园的可达性、分布和设计。考虑到公共决策的背景，我们特别关注公平和环境正义，并专注于通过空间交互模型对用户行为进行高级评估。我们提出了一个两阶段的公平设施选址和设计模型，作为模板模型来协助城市层面的公共决策者进行城市绿地规划。优化模型的第一阶段是基于揭示不平等属性的数据对社区进行最优的城市预算分配。第二阶段寻求每个社区公园的最佳位置和设计，目标是最大化个人参观公园的总预期概率。我们展示了如何将后者重新表述为混合整数线性程序。我们进一步引入聚类方法来减小问题的规模并在合理的时间内确定接近最优的解决方案。该模型通过蒙特利尔市的案例研究进行了测试，并详细讨论了比较结果以证明该模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段公平设施选址与设计模型，用于优化城市绿地的布局与设计，以提高可达性并促进环境公平。
AI.motivation: 随着可持续城市规划的推进，公园可达性不平等可能加剧健康差异，需通过公共决策工具实现绿地规划的公平性与环境正义。
AI.method: 采用运筹学工具构建两阶段模型：第一阶段基于不平等数据分配城市预算，第二阶段通过空间交互模型优化公园选址与设计，并转化为混合整数线性规划问题，结合聚类方法降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 以蒙特利尔为案例验证模型，结果表明该方法在提升公园访问概率和公平性方面优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为城市级绿地规划提供了兼顾效率与公平的实践框架，可有效减少健康不平等并支持可持续发展决策。

search_text: Optimization of the location and design of urban green spaces 城市绿地选址与设计优化 The recent promotion of sustainable urban planning combined with a growing need for public interventions to improve well-being and health have led to an increased collective interest for green spaces in and around cities. In particular, parks have proven a wide range of benefits in urban areas. This also means inequities in park accessibility may contribute to health inequities. In this work, we showcase the application of classic tools from Operations Research to assist decision-makers to improve parks' accessibility, distribution and design. Given the context of public decision-making, we are particularly concerned with equity and environmental justice, and are focused on an advanced assessment of users' behavior through a spatial interaction model. We present a two-stage fair facility location and design model, which serves as a template model to assist public decision-makers at the city-level for the planning of urban green spaces. The first-stage of the optimization model is about the optimal city-budget allocation to neighborhoods based on a data exposing inequality attributes. The second-stage seeks the optimal location and design of parks for each neighborhood, and the objective consists of maximizing the total expected probability of individuals visiting parks. We show how to reformulate the latter as a mixed-integer linear program. We further introduce a clustering method to reduce the size of the problem and determine a close to optimal solution within reasonable time. The model is tested using the case study of the city of Montreal and comparative results are discussed in detail to justify the performance of the model. 最近对可持续城市规划的推广，加上对改善福祉和健康的公共干预措施的日益增长的需求，导致人们对城市内外绿色空间的集体兴趣不断增加。特别是，公园已被证明在城市地区具有广泛的好处。这也意味着公园可达性的不平等可能会导致健康不平等。在这项工作中，我们展示了运筹学经典工具的应用，以帮助决策者改善公园的可达性、分布和设计。考虑到公共决策的背景，我们特别关注公平和环境正义，并专注于通过空间交互模型对用户行为进行高级评估。我们提出了一个两阶段的公平设施选址和设计模型，作为模板模型来协助城市层面的公共决策者进行城市绿地规划。优化模型的第一阶段是基于揭示不平等属性的数据对社区进行最优的城市预算分配。第二阶段寻求每个社区公园的最佳位置和设计，目标是最大化个人参观公园的总预期概率。我们展示了如何将后者重新表述为混合整数线性程序。我们进一步引入聚类方法来减小问题的规模并在合理的时间内确定接近最优的解决方案。该模型通过蒙特利尔市的案例研究进行了测试，并详细讨论了比较结果以证明该模型的性能。 本文提出一种两阶段公平设施选址与设计模型，用于优化城市绿地的布局与设计，以提高可达性并促进环境公平。 Caroline Leboeuf,Margarida Carvalho,Yan Kestens,Benoît Thierry cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Akshat Shukla,Chaarvi Bansal,Sushrut Badhe,Mukul Ranjan,Rohitash Chandra
title: An evaluation of Google Translate for Sanskrit to English translation via sentiment and semantic analysis
title_zh: 通过情感和语义分析对谷歌翻译梵语到英语的翻译进行评估
abstract: Google Translate has been prominent for language translation; however, limited work has been done in evaluating the quality of translation when compared to human experts. Sanskrit one of the oldest written languages in the world. In 2022, the Sanskrit language was added to the Google Translate engine. Sanskrit is known as the mother of languages such as Hindi and an ancient source of the Indo-European group of languages. Sanskrit is the original language for sacred Hindu texts such as the Bhagavad Gita. In this study, we present a framework that evaluates the Google Translate for Sanskrit using the Bhagavad Gita. We first publish a translation of the Bhagavad Gita in Sanskrit using Google Translate. Our framework then compares Google Translate version of Bhagavad Gita with expert translations using sentiment and semantic analysis via BERT-based language models. Our results indicate that in terms of sentiment and semantic analysis, there is low level of similarity in selected verses of Google Translate when compared to expert translations. In the qualitative evaluation, we find that Google translate is unsuitable for translation of certain Sanskrit words and phrases due to its poetic nature, contextual significance, metaphor and imagery. The mistranslations are not surprising since the Bhagavad Gita is known as a difficult text not only to translate, but also to interpret since it relies on contextual, philosophical and historical information. Our framework lays the foundation for automatic evaluation of other languages by Google Translate

abstract_zh: 谷歌翻译在语言翻译方面表现突出；然而，与人类专家相比，在评估翻译质量方面所做的工作有限。梵语是世界上最古老的书面语言之一。 2022 年，谷歌翻译引擎中添加了梵文语言。梵语被称为印地语等语言之母，也是印欧语系的古老源头。梵语是神圣印度教文本（例如《薄伽梵歌》）的原始语言。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个使用《薄伽梵歌》评估谷歌梵语翻译的框架。我们首先使用谷歌翻译发布梵文《薄伽梵歌》的翻译。然后，我们的框架通过基于 BERT 的语言模型使用情感和语义分析，将《薄伽梵歌》的谷歌翻译版本与专家翻译进行比较。我们的结果表明，在情感和语义分析方面，与专家翻译相比，谷歌翻译的选定经文的相似度较低。在定性评价中，我们发现谷歌翻译由于其诗意性、语境意义、隐喻和意象等原因，不适合翻译某些梵文单词和短语。误译并不奇怪，因为《薄伽梵歌》不仅被认为是一部难以翻译的文本，而且由于它依赖于上下文、哲学和历史信息，因此也难以解释。我们的框架为谷歌翻译自动评估其他语言奠定了基础

AI.tldr: 该论文通过情感和语义分析评估Google Translate在梵文到英语翻译中的质量，以《薄伽梵歌》为测试文本。
AI.motivation: 尽管Google Translate已支持梵文，但缺乏对其翻译质量与专家译本对比的系统性研究，而梵文作为哲学与宗教重要文本，其翻译准确性具有特殊意义。
AI.method: 构建评估框架，使用Google Translate翻译《薄伽梵歌》并对比专家译本，通过BERT模型进行情感和语义相似度分析，结合定性评估分析误译原因。
AI.result: Google Translate在情感和语义层面与专家译本相似度较低，尤其在诗歌隐喻、文化背景依赖的词汇上存在显著误译。
AI.conclusion: Google Translate的梵文翻译框架需改进以处理复杂语义，本研究为多语言机器翻译评估提供了可复用的方法论基础。

authors_text: Zahra Atashgahi,Xuhao Zhang,Neil Kichler,Shiwei Liu,Lu Yin,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Raymond Veldhuis,Decebal Constantin Mocanu
title: Supervised Feature Selection with Neuron Evolution in Sparse Neural Networks
title_zh: 稀疏神经网络中神经元进化的监督特征选择
abstract: Feature selection that selects an informative subset of variables from data not only enhances the model interpretability and performance but also alleviates the resource demands. Recently, there has been growing attention on feature selection using neural networks. However, existing methods usually suffer from high computational costs when applied to high-dimensional datasets. In this paper, inspired by evolution processes, we propose a novel resource-efficient supervised feature selection method using sparse neural networks, named \enquote{NeuroFS}. By gradually pruning the uninformative features from the input layer of a sparse neural network trained from scratch, NeuroFS derives an informative subset of features efficiently. By performing several experiments on $11$ low and high-dimensional real-world benchmarks of different types, we demonstrate that NeuroFS achieves the highest ranking-based score among the considered state-of-the-art supervised feature selection models. The code is available on GitHub.
summary: Feature selection that selects an informative subset of variables from data not only enhances the model interpretability and performance but also alleviates the resource demands. Recently, there has been growing attention on feature selection using neural networks. However, existing methods usually suffer from high computational costs when applied to high-dimensional datasets. In this paper, inspired by evolution processes, we propose a novel resource-efficient supervised feature selection method using sparse neural networks, named \enquote{NeuroFS}. By gradually pruning the uninformative features from the input layer of a sparse neural network trained from scratch, NeuroFS derives an informative subset of features efficiently. By performing several experiments on $11$ low and high-dimensional real-world benchmarks of different types, we demonstrate that NeuroFS achieves the highest ranking-based score among the considered state-of-the-art supervised feature selection models. The code is available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 从数据中选择信息丰富的变量子集的特征选择不仅可以增强模型的可解释性和性能，还可以减轻资源需求。最近，使用神经网络进行特征选择越来越受到关注。然而，现有方法在应用于高维数据集时通常会面临较高的计算成本。在本文中，受进化过程的启发，我们提出了一种使用稀疏神经网络的新型资源高效型监督特征选择方法，名为 \enquote{NeuroFS}。通过从头开始训练的稀疏神经网络的输入层逐渐修剪无信息的特征，NeuroFS 有效地导出了信息丰富的特征子集。通过对不同类型的 11 美元低维和高维现实世界基准进行多次实验，我们证明 NeuroFS 在所考虑的最先进的监督特征选择模型中实现了基于排名的最高分数。该代码可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏神经网络和神经元进化的高效监督特征选择方法NeuroFS，用于从高维数据中选择信息特征子集。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络特征选择方法在处理高维数据时计算成本过高，需开发更高效的资源友好型解决方案。
AI.method: 通过从头训练稀疏神经网络并逐步修剪输入层无信息特征，结合进化过程原理实现特征选择。
AI.result: 在11个低/高维现实数据集实验中，NeuroFS在排名指标上优于现有先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NeuroFS通过神经元进化机制有效平衡特征选择精度与计算效率，为高维数据场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Supervised Feature Selection with Neuron Evolution in Sparse Neural Networks 稀疏神经网络中神经元进化的监督特征选择 Feature selection that selects an informative subset of variables from data not only enhances the model interpretability and performance but also alleviates the resource demands. Recently, there has been growing attention on feature selection using neural networks. However, existing methods usually suffer from high computational costs when applied to high-dimensional datasets. In this paper, inspired by evolution processes, we propose a novel resource-efficient supervised feature selection method using sparse neural networks, named \enquote{NeuroFS}. By gradually pruning the uninformative features from the input layer of a sparse neural network trained from scratch, NeuroFS derives an informative subset of features efficiently. By performing several experiments on $11$ low and high-dimensional real-world benchmarks of different types, we demonstrate that NeuroFS achieves the highest ranking-based score among the considered state-of-the-art supervised feature selection models. The code is available on GitHub. 从数据中选择信息丰富的变量子集的特征选择不仅可以增强模型的可解释性和性能，还可以减轻资源需求。最近，使用神经网络进行特征选择越来越受到关注。然而，现有方法在应用于高维数据集时通常会面临较高的计算成本。在本文中，受进化过程的启发，我们提出了一种使用稀疏神经网络的新型资源高效型监督特征选择方法，名为 \enquote{NeuroFS}。通过从头开始训练的稀疏神经网络的输入层逐渐修剪无信息的特征，NeuroFS 有效地导出了信息丰富的特征子集。通过对不同类型的 11 美元低维和高维现实世界基准进行多次实验，我们证明 NeuroFS 在所考虑的最先进的监督特征选择模型中实现了基于排名的最高分数。该代码可在 GitHub 上获取。 本文提出一种基于稀疏神经网络和神经元进化的高效监督特征选择方法NeuroFS，用于从高维数据中选择信息特征子集。 Zahra Atashgahi,Xuhao Zhang,Neil Kichler,Shiwei Liu,Lu Yin,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Raymond Veldhuis,Decebal Constantin Mocanu cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Obaidullah Zaland,Muhammad Abulaish,Mohd. Fazil
title: A Comprehensive Empirical Evaluation of Existing Word Embedding Approaches
title_zh: 对现有词嵌入方法的综合实证评估
abstract: Vector-based word representations help countless Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks capture the language's semantic and syntactic regularities. In this paper, we present the characteristics of existing word embedding approaches and analyze them with regard to many classification tasks. We categorize the methods into two main groups - Traditional approaches mostly use matrix factorization to produce word representations, and they are not able to capture the semantic and syntactic regularities of the language very well. On the other hand, Neural-network-based approaches can capture sophisticated regularities of the language and preserve the word relationships in the generated word representations. We report experimental results on multiple classification tasks and highlight the scenarios where one approach performs better than the rest.
summary: Vector-based word representations help countless Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks capture the language's semantic and syntactic regularities. In this paper, we present the characteristics of existing word embedding approaches and analyze them with regard to many classification tasks. We categorize the methods into two main groups - Traditional approaches mostly use matrix factorization to produce word representations, and they are not able to capture the semantic and syntactic regularities of the language very well. On the other hand, Neural-network-based approaches can capture sophisticated regularities of the language and preserve the word relationships in the generated word representations. We report experimental results on multiple classification tasks and highlight the scenarios where one approach performs better than the rest.
abstract_zh: 基于向量的单词表示帮助无数自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务捕获语言的语义和句法规律。在本文中，我们介绍了现有词嵌入方法的特征，并针对许多分类任务对其进行了分析。我们将这些方法分为两大类：传统方法主要使用矩阵分解来生成单词表示，它们不能很好地捕获语言的语义和句法规律。另一方面，基于神经网络的方法可以捕获语言的复杂规律并保留生成的单词表示中的单词关系。我们报告了多个分类任务的实验结果，并强调了一种方法比其他方法表现更好的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文对现有词嵌入方法进行全面实证评估，比较其在不同分类任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统词嵌入方法难以有效捕捉语言的语义和句法规律，而神经网络方法可能更优，需通过实验验证不同场景下的效果差异。
AI.method: 将词嵌入方法分为传统矩阵分解方法和神经网络方法，通过多个分类任务的实验对比分析其性能差异。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，神经网络方法在捕捉语言复杂规律和保持词关系方面优于传统方法，且在特定任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络基于的词嵌入方法在多数分类任务中表现更佳，而传统方法在特定简单场景可能仍有应用价值。

authors_text: Franco Alberto Cardillo,Franca Debole,Umberto Straccia
title: PN-OWL: A Two Stage Algorithm to Learn Fuzzy Concept Inclusions from OWL Ontologies
title_zh: PN-OWL：从 OWL 本体中学习模糊概念包含的两阶段算法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.05297
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.05297
abstract: OWL ontologies are a quite popular way to describe structured knowledge in terms of classes, relations among classes and class instances. In this paper, given a target class T of an OWL ontology, with a focus on ontologies with real- and boolean-valued data properties, we address the problem of learning graded fuzzy concept inclusion axioms with the aim of describing enough conditions for being an individual classified as instance of the class T. To do so, we present PN-OWL that is a two-stage learning algorithm made of a P-stage and an N-stage. Roughly, in the P-stage the algorithm tries to cover as many positive examples as possible (increase recall), without compromising too much precision, while in the N-stage, the algorithm tries to rule out as many false positives, covered by the P-stage, as possible. PN-OWL then aggregates the fuzzy inclusion axioms learnt at the P-stage and the N-stage by combining them via aggregation functions to allow for a final decision whether an individual is instance of T or not. We also illustrate its effectiveness by means of an experimentation. An interesting feature is that fuzzy datatypes are built automatically, the learnt fuzzy concept inclusions can be represented directly into Fuzzy OWL 2 and, thus, any Fuzzy OWL 2 reasoner can then be used to automatically determine/classify (and to which degree) whether an individual belongs to the target class T or not.
summary: OWL ontologies are a quite popular way to describe structured knowledge in terms of classes, relations among classes and class instances. In this paper, given a target class T of an OWL ontology, with a focus on ontologies with real- and boolean-valued data properties, we address the problem of learning graded fuzzy concept inclusion axioms with the aim of describing enough conditions for being an individual classified as instance of the class T. To do so, we present PN-OWL that is a two-stage learning algorithm made of a P-stage and an N-stage. Roughly, in the P-stage the algorithm tries to cover as many positive examples as possible (increase recall), without compromising too much precision, while in the N-stage, the algorithm tries to rule out as many false positives, covered by the P-stage, as possible. PN-OWL then aggregates the fuzzy inclusion axioms learnt at the P-stage and the N-stage by combining them via aggregation functions to allow for a final decision whether an individual is instance of T or not. We also illustrate its effectiveness by means of an experimentation. An interesting feature is that fuzzy datatypes are built automatically, the learnt fuzzy concept inclusions can be represented directly into Fuzzy OWL 2 and, thus, any Fuzzy OWL 2 reasoner can then be used to automatically determine/classify (and to which degree) whether an individual belongs to the target class T or not.
abstract_zh: OWL 本体是一种非常流行的用类、类之间的关系和类实例来描述结构化知识的方法。在本文中，给定 OWL 本体的目标类 T，重点关注具有实值和布尔值数据属性的本体，我们解决了学习分级模糊概念包含公理的问题，目的是描述被分类为类 T 实例的个体的足够条件。为此，我们提出了 PN-OWL，这是一种由 P 阶段和 N 阶段组成的两阶段学习算法。粗略地说，在 P 阶段，算法尝试覆盖尽可能多的正例（增加召回率），同时不影响太多精度，而在 N 阶段，算法尝试尽可能排除 P 阶段覆盖的误报。然后，PN-OWL 将在 P 阶段和 N 阶段学到的模糊包含公理通过聚合函数组合起来进行聚合，以最终决定个体是否是 T 的实例。我们还通过实验来说明其有效性。一个有趣的功能是，模糊数据类型是自动构建的，学习到的模糊概念包含可以直接表示到 Fuzzy OWL 2 中，因此，任何 Fuzzy OWL 2 推理器都可以用于自动确定/分类（以及程度）一个个体是否属于目标类 T。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PN-OWL算法，通过两阶段学习从OWL本体中获取模糊概念包含公理，以描述个体属于目标类别的条件。
AI.motivation: OWL本体在知识表示中广泛应用，但现有方法难以有效处理实值和布尔值数据属性，且需平衡召回率与精确率。
AI.method: PN-OWL分为P阶段（最大化召回率）和N阶段（消除假阳性），通过聚合函数整合两阶段结果，并自动生成模糊数据类型以兼容Fuzzy OWL 2。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法有效性，自动生成的模糊概念包含公理可直接用于Fuzzy OWL 2推理器进行分类判定。
AI.conclusion: PN-OWL通过两阶段策略有效平衡了召回率与精确率，为模糊本体学习提供了自动化且兼容现有工具的解决方案。

search_text: PN-OWL: A Two Stage Algorithm to Learn Fuzzy Concept Inclusions from OWL Ontologies PN-OWL：从 OWL 本体中学习模糊概念包含的两阶段算法 OWL ontologies are a quite popular way to describe structured knowledge in terms of classes, relations among classes and class instances. In this paper, given a target class T of an OWL ontology, with a focus on ontologies with real- and boolean-valued data properties, we address the problem of learning graded fuzzy concept inclusion axioms with the aim of describing enough conditions for being an individual classified as instance of the class T. To do so, we present PN-OWL that is a two-stage learning algorithm made of a P-stage and an N-stage. Roughly, in the P-stage the algorithm tries to cover as many positive examples as possible (increase recall), without compromising too much precision, while in the N-stage, the algorithm tries to rule out as many false positives, covered by the P-stage, as possible. PN-OWL then aggregates the fuzzy inclusion axioms learnt at the P-stage and the N-stage by combining them via aggregation functions to allow for a final decision whether an individual is instance of T or not. We also illustrate its effectiveness by means of an experimentation. An interesting feature is that fuzzy datatypes are built automatically, the learnt fuzzy concept inclusions can be represented directly into Fuzzy OWL 2 and, thus, any Fuzzy OWL 2 reasoner can then be used to automatically determine/classify (and to which degree) whether an individual belongs to the target class T or not. authors_text: Tina Dorosti,Manuel Schultheiss,Felix Hofmann,Johannes Thalhammer,Luisa Kirchner,Theresa Urban,Franz Pfeiffer,Florian Schaff,Tobias Lasser,Daniela Pfeiffer
title: Optimizing Convolutional Neural Networks for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease Detection in Clinical Computed Tomography Imaging
title_zh: 优化卷积神经网络用于临床计算机断层扫描成像中的慢性阻塞性肺疾病检测
abstract: We aim to optimize the binary detection of Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) based on emphysema presence in the lung with convolutional neural networks (CNN) by exploring manually adjusted versus automated window-setting optimization (WSO) on computed tomography (CT) images. 7,194 CT images (3,597 with COPD; 3,597 healthy controls) from 78 subjects were selected retrospectively (10.2018-12.2021) and preprocessed. For each image, intensity values were manually clipped to the emphysema window setting and a baseline 'full-range' window setting. Class-balanced train, validation, and test sets contained 3,392, 1,114, and 2,688 images. The network backbone was optimized by comparing various CNN architectures. Furthermore, automated WSO was implemented by adding a customized layer to the model. The image-level area under the Receiver Operating Characteristics curve (AUC) [lower, upper limit 95% confidence] was utilized to compare model variations. Repeated inference (n=7) on the test set showed that the DenseNet was the most efficient backbone and achieved a mean AUC of 0.80 [0.76, 0.85] without WSO. Comparably, with input images manually adjusted to the emphysema window, the DenseNet model predicted COPD with a mean AUC of 0.86 [0.82, 0.89]. By adding a customized WSO layer to the DenseNet, an optimal window in the proximity of the emphysema window setting was learned automatically, and a mean AUC of 0.82 [0.78, 0.86] was achieved. Detection of COPD with DenseNet models was improved by WSO of CT data to the emphysema window setting range.

For each image, intensity values were manually clipped to the emphysema window setting and a baseline 'full-range' window setting. Class-balanced train, validation, and test sets contained 3,392, 1,114, and 2,688 images. The network backbone was optimized by comparing various CNN architectures. Furthermore, automated WSO was implemented by adding a customized layer to the model. Repeated inference (n=7) on the test set showed that the DenseNet was the most efficient backbone and achieved a mean AUC of 0.80 [0.76, 0.85] without WSO. Comparably, with input images manually adjusted to the emphysema window, the DenseNet model predicted COPD with a mean AUC of 0.86 [0.82, 0.89]. abstract_zh: 我们的目标是通过探索计算机断层扫描（CT）图像上的手动调整与自动窗口设置优化（WSO），利用卷积神经网络（CNN）优化基于肺部肺气肿的慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）的二元检测。回顾性地选择了来自 78 名受试者的 7,194 张 CT 图像（3,597 张患有慢性阻塞性肺病；3,597 张健康对照）（2018 年 10 月至 2021 年 12 月）并进行了预处理。对于每个图像，强度值被手动剪辑为肺气肿窗口设置和基线“全范围”窗口设置。类别平衡的训练集、验证集和测试集包含 3,392、1,114 和 2,688 张图像。通过比较各种 CNN 架构来优化网络主干。此外，通过向模型添加自定义层来实现自动化 WSO。使用接受者操作特征曲线 (AUC) [下限、上限 95% 置信度] 下的图像级面积来比较模型变化。对测试集的重复推理 (n=7) 表明，DenseNet 是最有效的主干网，在没有 WSO 的情况下实现了 0.80 [0.76, 0.85] 的平均 AUC。相比之下，通过手动调整肺气肿窗口的输入图像，DenseNet 模型预测 COPD 的平均 AUC 为 0.86 [0.82, 0.89]。通过向 DenseNet 添加定制的 WSO 层，自动学习肺气肿窗口设置附近的最佳窗口，并实现了 0.82 [0.78, 0.86] 的平均 AUC。通过 CT 数据的 WSO 将 DenseNet 模型对 COPD 的检测改进到肺气肿窗口设置范围。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过优化卷积神经网络（CNN）的窗口设置，提高基于CT影像的慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）检测准确性。
AI.motivation: COPD的早期检测对临床诊断至关重要，而CT影像中肺部气肿区域的准确识别是关键。传统手动窗口设置可能不够高效，需探索自动化优化方法以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 使用7,194张CT影像（含COPD与健康对照组），对比手动调整与自动化窗口设置优化（WSO）效果。通过构建不同CNN架构（如DenseNet），并添加自定义WSO层实现自动优化，以AUC指标评估模型性能。
AI.result: DenseNet在无WSO时AUC为0.80，手动调整至气肿窗口后AUC提升至0.86；自动化WSO层实现AUC 0.82，表明手动优化效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 将CT数据调整至气肿窗口范围可显著提升COPD检测性能，但当前自动化WSO尚未超越手动优化效果，需进一步改进算法。

authors_text: Paul Streli,Rayan Armani,Yi Fei Cheng,Christian Holz
title: HOOV: Hand Out-Of-View Tracking for Proprioceptive Interaction using Inertial Sensing
title_zh: HOOV：使用惯性传感进行本体感觉交互的手视野外跟踪
comment: Accepted at 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: Accepted at 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Current Virtual Reality systems are designed for interaction under visual control. Using built-in cameras, headsets track the user's hands or hand-held controllers while they are inside the field of view. Current systems thus ignore the user's interaction with off-screen content -- virtual objects that the user could quickly access through proprioception without requiring laborious head motions to bring them into focus. In this paper, we present HOOV, a wrist-worn sensing method that allows VR users to interact with objects outside their field of view. Based on the signals of a single wrist-worn inertial sensor, HOOV continuously estimates the user's hand position in 3-space to complement the headset's tracking as the hands leave the tracking range. Our novel data-driven method predicts hand positions and trajectories from just the continuous estimation of hand orientation, which by itself is stable based solely on inertial observations. Our inertial sensing simultaneously detects finger pinching to register off-screen selection events, confirms them using a haptic actuator inside our wrist device, and thus allows users to select, grab, and drop virtual content. We compared HOOV's performance with a camera-based optical motion capture system in two folds. In the first evaluation, participants interacted based on tracking information from the motion capture system to assess the accuracy of their proprioceptive input, whereas in the second, they interacted based on HOOV's real-time estimations. We found that HOOV's target-agnostic estimations had a mean tracking error of 7.7 cm, which allowed participants to reliably access virtual objects around their body without first bringing them into focus. We demonstrate several applications that leverage the larger input space HOOV opens up for quick proprioceptive interaction, and conclude by discussing the potential of our technique.

Our inertial sensing simultaneously detects finger pinching to register off-screen selection events, confirms them using a haptic actuator inside our wrist device, and thus allows users to select, grab, and drop virtual content. We compared HOOV's performance with a camera-based optical motion capture system in two folds. In the first evaluation, participants interacted based on tracking information from the motion capture system to assess the accuracy of their proprioceptive input, whereas in the second, they interacted based on HOOV's real-time estimations. abstract_zh: 当前的虚拟现实系统是为视觉控制下的交互而设计的。使用内置摄像头，耳机可以在用户的​​手或手持控制器位于视野范围内时对其进行跟踪。因此，当前的系统忽略了用户与屏幕外内容的交互——用户可以通过本体感觉快速访问虚拟对象，而不需要费力的头部运动来使它们成为焦点。在本文中，我们提出了 HOOV，一种腕戴式传感方法，允许 VR 用户与视野之外的物体进行交互。基于单个腕戴式惯性传感器的信号，HOOV 持续估计用户手在 3 空间中的位置，以在手离开跟踪范围时补充耳机的跟踪。我们新颖的数据驱动方法仅根据手部方向的连续估计来预测手部位置和轨迹，其本身仅基于惯性观察是稳定的。我们的惯性传感同时检测手指捏合以记录屏幕外选择事件，并使用手腕设备内的触觉执行器确认这些事件，从而允许用户选择、抓取和放下虚拟内容。我们将 HOOV 的性能与基于相机的光学动作捕捉系统进行了两方面的比较。在第一次评估中，参与者根据来自动作捕捉系统的跟踪信息进行交互，以评估其本体感受输入的准确性，而在第二次评估中，他们根据 HOOV 的实时估计进行交互。我们发现 HOOV 的目标不可知估计的平均跟踪误差为 7.7 厘米，这使得参与者能够可靠地访问他们身体周围的虚拟对象，而无需首先将它们置于焦点中。我们演示了几个利用 HOOV 为快速本体感受交互打开的更大输入空间的应用程序，并通过讨论我们的技术的潜力来结束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HOOV方法，通过腕部惯性传感器实现虚拟现实环境中用户手部在视野外的追踪与交互。
AI.motivation: 现有VR系统依赖视觉追踪，无法有效捕捉用户手部在视野外的交互行为，限制了用户通过本体感觉快速访问虚拟物体的效率。
AI.method: 基于单个腕部惯性传感器，通过数据驱动方法持续估计手部三维位置与轨迹，并结合触觉反馈检测手指捏合动作以实现视野外虚拟物体的抓取与释放。
AI.result: HOOV的平均追踪误差为7.7厘米，用户无需将物体移入视野即可可靠访问周围虚拟物体，且在实时交互测试中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: HOOV拓展了VR交互的输入空间，为快速本体感觉交互提供了新方法，具有广泛的应用潜力。

We demonstrate several applications that leverage the larger input space HOOV opens up for quick proprioceptive interaction, and conclude by discussing the potential of our technique. 当前的虚拟现实系统是为视觉控制下的交互而设计的。使用内置摄像头，耳机可以在用户的​​手或手持控制器位于视野范围内时对其进行跟踪。因此，当前的系统忽略了用户与屏幕外内容的交互——用户可以通过本体感觉快速访问虚拟对象，而不需要费力的头部运动来使它们成为焦点。在本文中，我们提出了 HOOV，一种腕戴式传感方法，允许 VR 用户与视野之外的物体进行交互。基于单个腕戴式惯性传感器的信号，HOOV 持续估计用户手在 3 空间中的位置，以在手离开跟踪范围时补充耳机的跟踪。我们新颖的数据驱动方法仅根据手部方向的连续估计来预测手部位置和轨迹，其本身仅基于惯性观察是稳定的。我们的惯性传感同时检测手指捏合以记录屏幕外选择事件，并使用手腕设备内的触觉执行器确认这些事件，从而允许用户选择、抓取和放下虚拟内容。我们将 HOOV 的性能与基于相机的光学动作捕捉系统进行了两方面的比较。在第一次评估中，参与者根据来自动作捕捉系统的跟踪信息进行交互，以评估其本体感受输入的准确性，而在第二次评估中，他们根据 HOOV 的实时估计进行交互。我们发现 HOOV 的目标不可知估计的平均跟踪误差为 7.7 厘米，这使得参与者能够可靠地访问他们身体周围的虚拟对象，而无需首先将它们置于焦点中。我们演示了几个利用 HOOV 为快速本体感受交互打开的更大输入空间的应用程序，并通过讨论我们的技术的潜力来结束。 本文提出HOOV方法，通过腕部惯性传感器实现虚拟现实环境中用户手部在视野外的追踪与交互。 Paul Streli,Rayan Armani,Yi Fei Cheng,Christian Holz cs.HC,cs.CV

authors_text: Wuyang Luo,Su Yang,Weishan Zhang
title: Reference-Guided Large-Scale Face Inpainting with Identity and Texture Control
title_zh: 具有身份和纹理控制的参考引导大规模面部修复
comment: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
comments: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: Face inpainting aims at plausibly predicting missing pixels of face images within a corrupted region. Most existing methods rely on generative models learning a face image distribution from a big dataset, which produces uncontrollable results, especially with large-scale missing regions. To introduce strong control for face inpainting, we propose a novel reference-guided face inpainting method that fills the large-scale missing region with identity and texture control guided by a reference face image. However, generating high-quality results under imposing two control signals is challenging. To tackle such difficulty, we propose a dual control one-stage framework that decouples the reference image into two levels for flexible control: High-level identity information and low-level texture information, where the identity information figures out the shape of the face and the texture information depicts the component-aware texture. To synthesize high-quality results, we design two novel modules referred to as Half-AdaIN and Component-Wise Style Injector (CWSI) to inject the two kinds of control information into the inpainting processing. Our method produces realistic results with identity and texture control faithful to reference images. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work to concurrently apply identity and component-level controls in face inpainting to promise more precise and controllable results. Code is available at https://github.com/WuyangLuo/RefFaceInpainting
summary: Face inpainting aims at plausibly predicting missing pixels of face images within a corrupted region. Most existing methods rely on generative models learning a face image distribution from a big dataset, which produces uncontrollable results, especially with large-scale missing regions. To introduce strong control for face inpainting, we propose a novel reference-guided face inpainting method that fills the large-scale missing region with identity and texture control guided by a reference face image. However, generating high-quality results under imposing two control signals is challenging. To tackle such difficulty, we propose a dual control one-stage framework that decouples the reference image into two levels for flexible control: High-level identity information and low-level texture information, where the identity information figures out the shape of the face and the texture information depicts the component-aware texture. To synthesize high-quality results, we design two novel modules referred to as Half-AdaIN and Component-Wise Style Injector (CWSI) to inject the two kinds of control information into the inpainting processing. Our method produces realistic results with identity and texture control faithful to reference images. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work to concurrently apply identity and component-level controls in face inpainting to promise more precise and controllable results. Code is available at https://github.com/WuyangLuo/RefFaceInpainting
abstract_zh: 面部修复的目的是合理地预测损坏区域内面部图像的丢失像素。大多数现有方法依赖于生成模型从大数据集中学习人脸图像分布，这会产生不可控的结果，特别是在大规模缺失区域的情况下。为了引入对面部修复的强大控制，我们提出了一种新颖的参考引导面部修复方法，该方法通过参考面部图像引导的身份和纹理控制来填充大规模缺失区域。然而，在施加两个控制信号的情况下生成高质量的结果具有挑战性。为了解决这个困难，我们提出了一种双控制单阶段框架，将参考图像解耦为两个级别以进行灵活控制：高级身份信息和低级纹理信息，其中身份信息计算出面部的形状，纹理信息描述组件感知的纹理。为了合成高质量的结果，我们设计了两个新颖的模块，称为 Half-AdaIN 和 Component-Wise Style Injector (CWSI)，将两种控制信息注入修复处理中。我们的方法产生真实的结果，其身份和纹理控制忠实于参考图像。据我们所知，这是第一个在面部修复中同时应用身份和组件级控制以保证更精确和可控结果的工作。代码可在 https://github.com/WuyangLuo/RefFaceInpainting 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于参考图像引导的大型人脸修复方法，通过身份和纹理控制实现更精确的修复结果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模缺失区域时缺乏可控性，难以同时保持身份和纹理细节，因此需要引入参考图像进行双重控制。
AI.method: 设计双控制单阶段框架，将参考图像解耦为高层身份信息（控制人脸形状）和低层纹理信息（控制组件级纹理），并开发Half-AdaIN和CWSI模块注入控制信号。
AI.result: 生成结果在身份和纹理上均忠实于参考图像，首次实现人脸修复中身份与组件级控制的同步应用，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效结合参考图像的身份与纹理控制，显著提升了大规模人脸修复的精度与可控性。

authors_text: Hongxiang Huang,Daihui Yang,Gang Dai,Zhen Han,Yuyi Wang,Kin-Man Lam,Fan Yang,Shuangping Huang,Yongge Liu,Mengchao He
title: AGTGAN: Unpaired Image Translation for Photographic Ancient Character Generation
title_zh: AGTGAN：用于摄影古代字符生成的不成对图像翻译
abstract: The study of ancient writings has great value for archaeology and philology. Essential forms of material are photographic characters, but manual photographic character recognition is extremely time-consuming and expertise-dependent. Automatic classification is therefore greatly desired. However, the current performance is limited due to the lack of annotated data. Data generation is an inexpensive but useful solution for data scarcity. Nevertheless, the diverse glyph shapes and complex background textures of photographic ancient characters make the generation task difficult, leading to the unsatisfactory results of existing methods. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised generative adversarial network called AGTGAN. By the explicit global and local glyph shape style modeling followed by the stroke-aware texture transfer, as well as an associate adversarial learning mechanism, our method can generate characters with diverse glyphs and realistic textures. We evaluate our approach on the photographic ancient character datasets, e.g., OBC306 and CSDD. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in various metrics and performs much better in terms of the diversity and authenticity of generated samples. With our generated images, experiments on the largest photographic oracle bone character dataset show that our method can achieve a significant increase in classification accuracy, up to 16.34%.
summary: The study of ancient writings has great value for archaeology and philology. Essential forms of material are photographic characters, but manual photographic character recognition is extremely time-consuming and expertise-dependent. Automatic classification is therefore greatly desired. However, the current performance is limited due to the lack of annotated data. Data generation is an inexpensive but useful solution for data scarcity. Nevertheless, the diverse glyph shapes and complex background textures of photographic ancient characters make the generation task difficult, leading to the unsatisfactory results of existing methods. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised generative adversarial network called AGTGAN. By the explicit global and local glyph shape style modeling followed by the stroke-aware texture transfer, as well as an associate adversarial learning mechanism, our method can generate characters with diverse glyphs and realistic textures. We evaluate our approach on the photographic ancient character datasets, e.g., OBC306 and CSDD. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in various metrics and performs much better in terms of the diversity and authenticity of generated samples. With our generated images, experiments on the largest photographic oracle bone character dataset show that our method can achieve a significant increase in classification accuracy, up to 16.34%.
abstract_zh: 古代文字的研究对于考古学和语言学具有重要价值。材料的基本形式是摄影字符，但手动摄影字符识别非常耗时且依赖于专业知识。因此非常需要自动分类。然而，由于缺乏注释数据，目前的性能受到限制。数据生成是解决数据稀缺问题的一种廉价但有用的解决方案。然而，照相古文字的多样的字形形状和复杂的背景纹理使得生成任务变得困难，导致现有方法的结果不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 AGTGAN 的无监督生成对抗网络。通过明确的全局和局部字形形状风格建模，然后进行笔画感知纹理传输，以及相关的对抗性学习机制，我们的方法可以生成具有不同字形和逼真纹理的字符。我们评估了我们在摄影古代字符数据集（例如 OBC306 和 CSDD）上的方法。我们的方法在各种指标上都优于最先进的方法，并且在生成样本的多样性和真实性方面表现得更好。利用我们生成的图像，在最大的照相甲骨文字数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以实现分类准确率的显着提高，高达 16.34%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGTGAN模型，通过无监督生成对抗网络解决古代字符图像生成中的数据稀缺问题，提升自动分类效果。
AI.motivation: 古代字符识别依赖专家手动标注且效率低下，现有生成方法因缺乏标注数据和复杂背景纹理导致生成效果不佳，亟需高效的数据生成方案。
AI.method: 设计AGTGAN模型，结合显式全局/局部笔画风格建模、笔画感知纹理迁移及关联对抗学习机制，实现无监督图像翻译。
AI.result: 在OBC306和CSDD数据集上，生成样本多样性与真实性优于现有方法，基于生成图像的分类准确率提升达16.34%。
AI.conclusion: AGTGAN有效解决了古代字符生成中的关键难题，为考古学和文字学研究提供了高质量数据支持与新方法范式。

authors_text: Chuan Tang,Xi Yang
title: OSIS: Efficient One-stage Network for 3D Instance Segmentation
title_zh: OSIS：用于 3D 实例分割的高效一级网络
abstract: Current 3D instance segmentation models generally use multi-stage methods to extract instance objects, including clustering, feature extraction, and post-processing processes. However, these multi-stage approaches rely on hyperparameter settings and hand-crafted processes, which restrict the inference speed of the model. In this paper, we propose a new 3D point cloud instance segmentation network, named OSIS. OSIS is a one-stage network, which directly segments instances from 3D point cloud data using neural network. To segment instances directly from the network, we propose an instance decoder, which decodes instance features from the network into instance segments. Our proposed OSIS realizes the end-to-end training by bipartite matching, therefore, our network does not require computationally expensive post-processing steps such as non maximum suppression (NMS) and clustering during inference. The results show that our network finally achieves excellent performance in the commonly used indoor scene instance segmentation dataset, and the inference speed of our network is only an average of 138ms per scene, which substantially exceeds the previous fastest method.
summary: Current 3D instance segmentation models generally use multi-stage methods to extract instance objects, including clustering, feature extraction, and post-processing processes. However, these multi-stage approaches rely on hyperparameter settings and hand-crafted processes, which restrict the inference speed of the model. In this paper, we propose a new 3D point cloud instance segmentation network, named OSIS. OSIS is a one-stage network, which directly segments instances from 3D point cloud data using neural network. To segment instances directly from the network, we propose an instance decoder, which decodes instance features from the network into instance segments. Our proposed OSIS realizes the end-to-end training by bipartite matching, therefore, our network does not require computationally expensive post-processing steps such as non maximum suppression (NMS) and clustering during inference. The results show that our network finally achieves excellent performance in the commonly used indoor scene instance segmentation dataset, and the inference speed of our network is only an average of 138ms per scene, which substantially exceeds the previous fastest method.
abstract_zh: 当前的3D实例分割模型通常使用多阶段方法来提取实例对象，包括聚类、特征提取和后处理过程。然而，这些多阶段方法依赖于超参数设置和手工制作的过程，这限制了模型的推理速度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 3D 点云实例分割网络，名为 OSIS。 OSIS 是一种单级网络，它使用神经网络直接从 3D 点云数据中分割实例。为了直接从网络中分割实例，我们提出了一个实例解码器，它将网络中的实例特征解码为实例片段。我们提出的 OSIS 通过二分匹配实现端到端训练，因此，我们的网络在推理过程中不需要计算昂贵的后处理步骤，例如非极大值抑制（NMS）和聚类。结果表明，我们的网络最终在常用的室内场景实例分割数据集中取得了优异的性能，并且我们的网络的推理速度平均每个场景仅为 138ms，大大超过了之前最快的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的3D点云实例分割单阶段网络OSIS，直接通过神经网络进行实例分割，无需多阶段处理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D实例分割模型依赖多阶段方法，需超参数设置和手工流程，导致推理速度受限。
AI.method: 设计实例解码器直接生成实例分割结果，并通过二分图匹配实现端到端训练，省去NMS和聚类等后处理步骤。
AI.result: 在常用室内场景数据集上取得优异性能，单场景推理速度仅需138ms，显著优于现有最快方法。
AI.conclusion: OSIS通过单阶段架构和实例解码器实现了高效准确的3D实例分割，无需复杂后处理，适用于实时场景。

authors_text: Ritam Majumdar,Vishal Jadhav,Anirudh Deodhar,Shirish Karande,Lovekesh Vig,Venkataramana Runkana
title: Symbolic Regression for PDEs using Pruned Differentiable Programs
title_zh: 使用剪枝可微分程序的偏微分方程的符号回归
comment: Publication accepted at International Conference for Learning Representations 2023: Physics for Machine Learning
comments: Publication accepted at International Conference for Learning Representations 2023: Physics for Machine Learning
abstract: Physics-informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have been widely used to obtain accurate neural surrogates for a system of Partial Differential Equations (PDE). One of the major limitations of PINNs is that the neural solutions are challenging to interpret, and are often treated as black-box solvers. While Symbolic Regression (SR) has been studied extensively, very few works exist which generate analytical expressions to directly perform SR for a system of PDEs. In this work, we introduce an end-to-end framework for obtaining mathematical expressions for solutions of PDEs. We use a trained PINN to generate a dataset, upon which we perform SR. We use a Differentiable Program Architecture (DPA) defined using context-free grammar to describe the space of symbolic expressions. We improve the interpretability by pruning the DPA in a depth-first manner using the magnitude of weights as our heuristic. On average, we observe a 95.3% reduction in parameters of DPA while maintaining accuracy at par with PINNs. Furthermore, on an average, pruning improves the accuracy of DPA by 7.81% . We demonstrate our framework outperforms the existing state-of-the-art SR solvers on systems of complex PDEs like Navier-Stokes: Kovasznay flow and Taylor-Green Vortex flow. Furthermore, we produce analytical expressions for a complex industrial use-case of an Air-Preheater, without suffering from performance loss viz-a-viz PINNs.
summary: Physics-informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have been widely used to obtain accurate neural surrogates for a system of Partial Differential Equations (PDE). One of the major limitations of PINNs is that the neural solutions are challenging to interpret, and are often treated as black-box solvers. While Symbolic Regression (SR) has been studied extensively, very few works exist which generate analytical expressions to directly perform SR for a system of PDEs. In this work, we introduce an end-to-end framework for obtaining mathematical expressions for solutions of PDEs. We use a trained PINN to generate a dataset, upon which we perform SR. We use a Differentiable Program Architecture (DPA) defined using context-free grammar to describe the space of symbolic expressions. We improve the interpretability by pruning the DPA in a depth-first manner using the magnitude of weights as our heuristic. On average, we observe a 95.3% reduction in parameters of DPA while maintaining accuracy at par with PINNs. Furthermore, on an average, pruning improves the accuracy of DPA by 7.81% . We demonstrate our framework outperforms the existing state-of-the-art SR solvers on systems of complex PDEs like Navier-Stokes: Kovasznay flow and Taylor-Green Vortex flow. Furthermore, we produce analytical expressions for a complex industrial use-case of an Air-Preheater, without suffering from performance loss viz-a-viz PINNs.
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 已被广泛用于获取偏微分方程 (PDE) 系统的准确神经代理。 PINN 的主要局限性之一是神经解决方案难以解释，并且通常被视为黑盒求解器。虽然符号回归 (SR) 已被广泛研究，但生成解析表达式以直接对偏微分方程系统执行 SR 的工作却很少。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个端到端框架，用于获取偏微分方程解的数学表达式。我们使用经过训练的 PINN 来生成数据集，并在该数据集上执行 SR。我们使用上下文无关语法定义的可微程序架构（DPA）来描述符号表达式的空间。我们通过使用权重大小作为启发式，以深度优先的方式修剪 DPA，从而提高可解释性。平均而言，我们观察到 DPA 的参数减少了 95.3%，同时保持与 PINN 相同的准确度。此外，平均而言，剪枝将 DPA 的准确率提高了 7.81%。我们证明我们的框架在复杂偏微分方程系统（如纳维-斯托克斯：Kovasznay 流和泰勒-格林涡流）上的性能优于现有最先进的 SR 求解器。此外，我们为空气预热器的复杂工业用例生成分析表达式，而不会遭受 PINN 性能损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端框架，通过结合物理信息神经网络（PINN）和符号回归（SR），为偏微分方程（PDE）生成可解释的数学表达式。
AI.motivation: PINN虽能求解PDE，但其黑箱特性导致可解释性差；现有符号回归方法难以直接处理PDE系统，缺乏对复杂工业场景的有效解析表达式生成。
AI.method: 利用训练好的PINN生成数据集，基于上下文无关文法定义可微程序架构（DPA），通过深度优先剪枝（依据权重幅度）提升DPA可解释性并优化精度。
AI.result: DPA参数量平均减少95.3%且精度与PINN持平，剪枝使DPA精度提升7.81%，在Navier-Stokes方程等复杂PDE及工业案例（如空气预热器）中优于现有SR求解器。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合PINN与符号回归，有效解决了PDE求解的可解释性问题，在保持精度的同时生成解析表达式，适用于复杂工业场景。

authors_text: Sándor P. Fekete,Phillip Keldenich,Dominik Krupke,Stefan Schirra
title: Minimum Coverage by Convex Polygons: The CG:SHOP Challenge 2023
title_zh: 凸多边形的最小覆盖范围：2023 年 CG:SHOP 挑战赛
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.07444
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.07444
abstract: We give an overview of the 2023 Computational Geometry Challenge targeting the problem Minimum Coverage by Convex Polygons, which consists of covering a given polygonal region (possibly with holes) by a minimum number of convex subsets, a problem with a long-standing tradition in Computational Geometry.
summary: We give an overview of the 2023 Computational Geometry Challenge targeting the problem Minimum Coverage by Convex Polygons, which consists of covering a given polygonal region (possibly with holes) by a minimum number of convex subsets, a problem with a long-standing tradition in Computational Geometry.
abstract_zh: 我们概述了 2023 年计算几何挑战赛，其目标是凸多边形的最小覆盖问题，该挑战包括用最少数量的凸子集覆盖给定的多边形区域（可能有孔），这是计算几何中长期存在的传统问题。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了2023年计算几何挑战赛，旨在通过最少数量的凸多边形覆盖给定的多边形区域（可能包含孔洞）。
AI.motivation: 该问题在计算几何领域具有长期研究价值，挑战赛旨在推动相关算法的发展并探索最优覆盖方案。
AI.method: 通过总结挑战赛中的各类算法方法，分析不同策略在覆盖效率与计算复杂度上的表现。
AI.result: 提供了多种覆盖方案的比较分析，并揭示了当前研究在处理复杂多边形区域时的局限性与改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛促进了学术界对凸多边形覆盖问题的深入研究，为未来算法优化提供了基准与参考。
