authors_text: Zhaoyang Xia,Youquan Liu,Xin Li,Xinge Zhu,Yuexin Ma,Yikang Li,Yuenan Hou,Yu Qiao
title: SCPNet: Semantic Scene Completion on Point Cloud
title_zh: SCPNet：点云上的语义场景完成
abstract: Training deep models for semantic scene completion (SSC) is challenging due to the sparse and incomplete input, a large quantity of objects of diverse scales as well as the inherent label noise for moving objects. To address the above-mentioned problems, we propose the following three solutions: 1) Redesigning the completion sub-network. We design a novel completion sub-network, which consists of several Multi-Path Blocks (MPBs) to aggregate multi-scale features and is free from the lossy downsampling operations. 2) Distilling rich knowledge from the multi-frame model. We design a novel knowledge distillation objective, dubbed Dense-to-Sparse Knowledge Distillation (DSKD). It transfers the dense, relation-based semantic knowledge from the multi-frame teacher to the single-frame student, significantly improving the representation learning of the single-frame model. 3) Completion label rectification. We propose a simple yet effective label rectification strategy, which uses off-the-shelf panoptic segmentation labels to remove the traces of dynamic objects in completion labels, greatly improving the performance of deep models especially for those moving objects. Extensive experiments are conducted in two public SSC benchmarks, i.e., SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS. Our SCPNet ranks 1st on SemanticKITTI semantic scene completion challenge and surpasses the competitive S3CNet by 7.2 mIoU. SCPNet also outperforms previous completion algorithms on the SemanticPOSS dataset. Besides, our method also achieves competitive results on SemanticKITTI semantic segmentation tasks, showing that knowledge learned in the scene completion is beneficial to the segmentation task.
summary: Training deep models for semantic scene completion (SSC) is challenging due to the sparse and incomplete input, a large quantity of objects of diverse scales as well as the inherent label noise for moving objects. To address the above-mentioned problems, we propose the following three solutions: 1) Redesigning the completion sub-network. We design a novel completion sub-network, which consists of several Multi-Path Blocks (MPBs) to aggregate multi-scale features and is free from the lossy downsampling operations. 2) Distilling rich knowledge from the multi-frame model. We design a novel knowledge distillation objective, dubbed Dense-to-Sparse Knowledge Distillation (DSKD). It transfers the dense, relation-based semantic knowledge from the multi-frame teacher to the single-frame student, significantly improving the representation learning of the single-frame model. 3) Completion label rectification. We propose a simple yet effective label rectification strategy, which uses off-the-shelf panoptic segmentation labels to remove the traces of dynamic objects in completion labels, greatly improving the performance of deep models especially for those moving objects. Extensive experiments are conducted in two public SSC benchmarks, i.e., SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS. Our SCPNet ranks 1st on SemanticKITTI semantic scene completion challenge and surpasses the competitive S3CNet by 7.2 mIoU. SCPNet also outperforms previous completion algorithms on the SemanticPOSS dataset. Besides, our method also achieves competitive results on SemanticKITTI semantic segmentation tasks, showing that knowledge learned in the scene completion is beneficial to the segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 由于输入稀疏且不完整、大量不同尺度的对象以及移动对象固有的标签噪声，训练语义场景完成（SSC）深度模型具有挑战性。针对上述问题，我们提出以下三种解决方案： 1）重新设计完成子网。我们设计了一种新颖的完成子网络，它由多个多路径块（MPB）组成，用于聚合多尺度特征，并且不受有损下采样操作的影响。 2）从多框架模型中提取丰富的知识。我们设计了一种新颖的知识蒸馏目标，称为“密集到稀疏知识蒸馏”（DSKD）。它将密集的、基于关系的语义知识从多框架教师转移到单框架学生，显着提高了单框架模型的表示学习。 3）完成标签整改。我们提出了一种简单而有效的标签校正策略，该策略使用现成的全景分割标签来去除完成标签中动态对象的痕迹，极大地提高了深度模型的性能，特别是对于那些移动对象。在两个公共 SSC 基准测试（即 SemanticKITTI 和 SemanticPOSS）中进行了广泛的实验。我们的 SCPNet 在 SemanticKITTI 语义场景完成挑战中排名第一，超过竞争对手 S3CNet 7.2 mIoU。 SCPNet 在 SemanticPOSS 数据集上的性能也优于之前的补全算法。此外，我们的方法还在 SemanticKITTI 语义分割任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，表明在场景完成中学到的知识有利于分割任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCPNet，用于解决点云语义场景补全任务中的稀疏输入、多尺度物体及动态物体标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语义场景补全方法面临输入点云稀疏不完整、物体尺度多样以及动态物体标签噪声等挑战，需提升模型鲁棒性与补全精度。
AI.method: 设计多路径块（MPB）网络结构避免下采样损失；提出密集到稀疏知识蒸馏（DSKD）方法迁移多帧模型知识；利用全景分割标签修正动态物体痕迹以优化标签质量。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和SemanticPOSS基准测试中，SCPNet分别以7.2 mIoU优势超越S3CNet并取得最佳成绩，同时在语义分割任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SCPNet通过多尺度特征聚合、知识蒸馏与标签修正策略，有效解决了语义场景补全的核心问题，验证了场景补全与分割任务的协同优化潜力。

search_text: SCPNet: Semantic Scene Completion on Point Cloud SCPNet：点云上的语义场景完成 Training deep models for semantic scene completion (SSC) is challenging due to the sparse and incomplete input, a large quantity of objects of diverse scales as well as the inherent label noise for moving objects. To address the above-mentioned problems, we propose the following three solutions: 1) Redesigning the completion sub-network. We design a novel completion sub-network, which consists of several Multi-Path Blocks (MPBs) to aggregate multi-scale features and is free from the lossy downsampling operations. 2) Distilling rich knowledge from the multi-frame model. We design a novel knowledge distillation objective, dubbed Dense-to-Sparse Knowledge Distillation (DSKD). It transfers the dense, relation-based semantic knowledge from the multi-frame teacher to the single-frame student, significantly improving the representation learning of the single-frame model. 3) Completion label rectification. We propose a simple yet effective label rectification strategy, which uses off-the-shelf panoptic segmentation labels to remove the traces of dynamic objects in completion labels, greatly improving the performance of deep models especially for those moving objects. Extensive experiments are conducted in two public SSC benchmarks, i.e., SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS. Our SCPNet ranks 1st on SemanticKITTI semantic scene completion challenge and surpasses the competitive S3CNet by 7.2 mIoU. SCPNet also outperforms previous completion algorithms on the SemanticPOSS dataset. Besides, our method also achieves competitive results on SemanticKITTI semantic segmentation tasks, showing that knowledge learned in the scene completion is beneficial to the segmentation task. 由于输入稀疏且不完整、大量不同尺度的对象以及移动对象固有的标签噪声，训练语义场景完成（SSC）深度模型具有挑战性。针对上述问题，我们提出以下三种解决方案： 1）重新设计完成子网。我们设计了一种新颖的完成子网络，它由多个多路径块（MPB）组成，用于聚合多尺度特征，并且不受有损下采样操作的影响。 2）从多框架模型中提取丰富的知识。我们设计了一种新颖的知识蒸馏目标，称为“密集到稀疏知识蒸馏”（DSKD）。它将密集的、基于关系的语义知识从多框架教师转移到单框架学生，显着提高了单框架模型的表示学习。 3）完成标签整改。我们提出了一种简单而有效的标签校正策略，该策略使用现成的全景分割标签来去除完成标签中动态对象的痕迹，极大地提高了深度模型的性能，特别是对于那些移动对象。在两个公共 SSC 基准测试（即 SemanticKITTI 和 SemanticPOSS）中进行了广泛的实验。我们的 SCPNet 在 SemanticKITTI 语义场景完成挑战中排名第一，超过竞争对手 S3CNet 7.2 mIoU。 SCPNet 在 SemanticPOSS 数据集上的性能也优于之前的补全算法。此外，我们的方法还在 SemanticKITTI 语义分割任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，表明在场景完成中学到的知识有利于分割任务。 本文提出SCPNet，用于解决点云语义场景补全任务中的稀疏输入、多尺度物体及动态物体标签噪声问题。 Zhaoyang Xia,Youquan Liu,Xin Li,Xinge Zhu,Yuexin Ma,Yikang Li,Yuenan Hou,Yu Qiao cs.CV

authors_text: Chencan Fu,Lin Li,Jianbiao Mei,Yukai Ma,Linpeng Peng,Xiangrui Zhao,Yong Liu
title: A Coarse-to-Fine Place Recognition Approach using Attention-guided Descriptors and Overlap Estimation
title_zh: 使用注意力引导描述符和重叠估计的从粗到细的地点识别方法
abstract: Place recognition is a challenging but crucial task in robotics. Current description-based methods may be limited by representation capabilities, while pairwise similarity-based methods require exhaustive searches, which is time-consuming. In this paper, we present a novel coarse-to-fine approach to address these problems, which combines BEV (Bird's Eye View) feature extraction, coarse-grained matching and fine-grained verification. In the coarse stage, our approach utilizes an attention-guided network to generate attention-guided descriptors. We then employ a fast affinity-based candidate selection process to identify the Top-K most similar candidates. In the fine stage, we estimate pairwise overlap among the narrowed-down place candidates to determine the final match. Experimental results on the KITTI and KITTI-360 datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The code will be released publicly soon.
summary: Place recognition is a challenging but crucial task in robotics. Current description-based methods may be limited by representation capabilities, while pairwise similarity-based methods require exhaustive searches, which is time-consuming. In this paper, we present a novel coarse-to-fine approach to address these problems, which combines BEV (Bird's Eye View) feature extraction, coarse-grained matching and fine-grained verification. In the coarse stage, our approach utilizes an attention-guided network to generate attention-guided descriptors. We then employ a fast affinity-based candidate selection process to identify the Top-K most similar candidates. In the fine stage, we estimate pairwise overlap among the narrowed-down place candidates to determine the final match. Experimental results on the KITTI and KITTI-360 datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The code will be released publicly soon.
abstract_zh: 地点识别是机器人技术中一项具有挑战性但至关重要的任务。当前基于描述的方法可能受到表示能力的限制，而基于成对相似性的方法需要详尽的搜索，这非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的方法来解决这些问题，该方法结合了 BEV（鸟瞰）特征提取、粗粒度匹配和细粒度验证。在粗略阶段，我们的方法利用注意力引导网络来生成注意力引导描述符。然后，我们采用基于亲和力的快速候选选择过程来识别 Top-K 最相似的候选。在精细阶段，我们估计缩小范围的候选人之间的成对重叠，以确定最终的比赛。 KITTI 和 KITTI-360 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法。该代码将很快公开发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力引导描述符和重叠估计的粗到细场所识别方法
AI.motivation: 现有基于描述符的方法受限于表示能力，基于相似度的方法需要耗时的穷举搜索，亟需更高效准确的解决方案
AI.method: 融合BEV特征提取、粗粒度匹配与细粒度验证：使用注意力网络生成描述符，通过亲和力选择Top-K候选，最后基于重叠估计确定最终匹配
AI.result: 在KITTI和KITTI-360数据集上优于现有最先进方法，代码即将开源
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了场所识别中的效率与精度矛盾，为机器人定位提供新思路

authors_text: Bo Zhang,Jiakang Yuan,Botian Shi,Tao Chen,Yikang Li,Yu Qiao
title: Uni3D: A Unified Baseline for Multi-dataset 3D Object Detection
title_zh: Uni3D：多数据集 3D 对象检测的统一基线
comment: Accepted by CVPR-2023, and our code is available at https://github.com/PJLab-ADG/3DTrans
comments: Accepted by CVPR-2023, and our code is available at https://github.com/PJLab-ADG/3DTrans
abstract: Current 3D object detection models follow a single dataset-specific training and testing paradigm, which often faces a serious detection accuracy drop when they are directly deployed in another dataset. In this paper, we study the task of training a unified 3D detector from multiple datasets. We observe that this appears to be a challenging task, which is mainly due to that these datasets present substantial data-level differences and taxonomy-level variations caused by different LiDAR types and data acquisition standards. Inspired by such observation, we present a Uni3D which leverages a simple data-level correction operation and a designed semantic-level coupling-and-recoupling module to alleviate the unavoidable data-level and taxonomy-level differences, respectively. Our method is simple and easily combined with many 3D object detection baselines such as PV-RCNN and Voxel-RCNN, enabling them to effectively learn from multiple off-the-shelf 3D datasets to obtain more discriminative and generalizable representations. Experiments are conducted on many dataset consolidation settings including Waymo-nuScenes, nuScenes-KITTI, Waymo-KITTI, and Waymo-nuScenes-KITTI consolidations. Their results demonstrate that Uni3D exceeds a series of individual detectors trained on a single dataset, with a 1.04x parameter increase over a selected baseline detector. We expect this work will inspire the research of 3D generalization since it will push the limits of perceptual performance.
summary: Current 3D object detection models follow a single dataset-specific training and testing paradigm, which often faces a serious detection accuracy drop when they are directly deployed in another dataset. In this paper, we study the task of training a unified 3D detector from multiple datasets. We observe that this appears to be a challenging task, which is mainly due to that these datasets present substantial data-level differences and taxonomy-level variations caused by different LiDAR types and data acquisition standards. Inspired by such observation, we present a Uni3D which leverages a simple data-level correction operation and a designed semantic-level coupling-and-recoupling module to alleviate the unavoidable data-level and taxonomy-level differences, respectively. Our method is simple and easily combined with many 3D object detection baselines such as PV-RCNN and Voxel-RCNN, enabling them to effectively learn from multiple off-the-shelf 3D datasets to obtain more discriminative and generalizable representations. Experiments are conducted on many dataset consolidation settings including Waymo-nuScenes, nuScenes-KITTI, Waymo-KITTI, and Waymo-nuScenes-KITTI consolidations. Their results demonstrate that Uni3D exceeds a series of individual detectors trained on a single dataset, with a 1.04x parameter increase over a selected baseline detector. We expect this work will inspire the research of 3D generalization since it will push the limits of perceptual performance.
abstract_zh: 当前的 3D 对象检测模型遵循单一数据集特定的训练和测试范例，当直接部署在另一个数据集中时，通常会面临严重的检测精度下降。在本文中，我们研究了从多个数据集训练统一 3D 检测器的任务。我们观察到这似乎是一项具有挑战性的任务，这主要是因为这些数据集呈现出由不同激光雷达类型和数据采集标准引起的巨大数据级别差异和分类级别变化。受这种观察的启发，我们提出了一种 Uni3D，它利用简单的数据级校正操作和设计的语义级耦合和重新耦合模块来分别减轻不可避免的数据级和分类级差异。我们的方法简单且易于与许多 3D 对象检测基线（例如 PV-RCNN 和 Voxel-RCNN）相结合，使它们能够有效地从多个现成的 3D 数据集中学习，以获得更具区分性和通用性的表示。在许多数据集整合设置上进行了实验，包括 Waymo-nuScenes、nuScenes-KITTI、Waymo-KITTI 和 Waymo-nuScenes-KITTI 整合。他们的结果表明，Uni3D 超越了在单个数据集上训练的一系列单独检测器，其参数比选定的基线检测器增加了 1.04 倍。我们预计这项工作将激发 3D 泛化的研究，因为它将突破感知性能的极限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Uni3D，旨在通过多数据集训练实现更通用的3D目标检测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测模型依赖单一数据集训练，跨数据集部署时精度显著下降，需解决数据层面和分类层级的差异问题。
AI.method: 结合数据级校正操作与语义级耦合-解耦模块，兼容多种3D检测基线模型（如PV-RCNN）。
AI.result: 在Waymo-nuScenes等多数据集整合场景中，Uni3D优于单数据集训练模型，参数量仅增加1.04倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法推动了3D检测的跨数据集泛化能力，为感知性能极限研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Uni3D，旨在通过多数据集训练实现更通用的3D目标检测模型。
ai_content.motivation: 现有3D检测模型依赖单一数据集训练，跨数据集部署时精度显著下降，需解决数据层面和分类层级的差异问题。
ai_content.method: 结合数据级校正操作与语义级耦合-解耦模块，兼容多种3D检测基线模型（如PV-RCNN）。
ai_content.result: 在Waymo-nuScenes等多数据集整合场景中，Uni3D优于单数据集训练模型，参数量仅增加1.04倍。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法推动了3D检测的跨数据集泛化能力，为感知性能极限研究提供新方向。

search_text: Uni3D: A Unified Baseline for Multi-dataset 3D Object Detection Uni3D：多数据集 3D 对象检测的统一基线 Current 3D object detection models follow a single dataset-specific training and testing paradigm, which often faces a serious detection accuracy drop when they are directly deployed in another dataset. In this paper, we study the task of training a unified 3D detector from multiple datasets. We observe that this appears to be a challenging task, which is mainly due to that these datasets present substantial data-level differences and taxonomy-level variations caused by different LiDAR types and data acquisition standards. Inspired by such observation, we present a Uni3D which leverages a simple data-level correction operation and a designed semantic-level coupling-and-recoupling module to alleviate the unavoidable data-level and taxonomy-level differences, respectively. Our method is simple and easily combined with many 3D object detection baselines such as PV-RCNN and Voxel-RCNN, enabling them to effectively learn from multiple off-the-shelf 3D datasets to obtain more discriminative and generalizable representations. Experiments are conducted on many dataset consolidation settings including Waymo-nuScenes, nuScenes-KITTI, Waymo-KITTI, and Waymo-nuScenes-KITTI consolidations. Their results demonstrate that Uni3D exceeds a series of individual detectors trained on a single dataset, with a 1.04x parameter increase over a selected baseline detector. We expect this work will inspire the research of 3D generalization since it will push the limits of perceptual performance. 当前的 3D 对象检测模型遵循单一数据集特定的训练和测试范例，当直接部署在另一个数据集中时，通常会面临严重的检测精度下降。在本文中，我们研究了从多个数据集训练统一 3D 检测器的任务。我们观察到这似乎是一项具有挑战性的任务，这主要是因为这些数据集呈现出由不同激光雷达类型和数据采集标准引起的巨大数据级别差异和分类级别变化。受这种观察的启发，我们提出了一种 Uni3D，它利用简单的数据级校正操作和设计的语义级耦合和重新耦合模块来分别减轻不可避免的数据级和分类级差异。我们的方法简单且易于与许多 3D 对象检测基线（例如 PV-RCNN 和 Voxel-RCNN）相结合，使它们能够有效地从多个现成的 3D 数据集中学习，以获得更具区分性和通用性的表示。在许多数据集整合设置上进行了实验，包括 Waymo-nuScenes、nuScenes-KITTI、Waymo-KITTI 和 Waymo-nuScenes-KITTI 整合。他们的结果表明，Uni3D 超越了在单个数据集上训练的一系列单独检测器，其参数比选定的基线检测器增加了 1.04 倍。我们预计这项工作将激发 3D 泛化的研究，因为它将突破感知性能的极限。 本文提出Uni3D，旨在通过多数据集训练实现更通用的3D目标检测模型。 Bo Zhang,Jiakang Yuan,Botian Shi,Tao Chen,Yikang Li,Yu Qiao cs.CV

authors_text: Liang Liu,Ling Tian,Zhao Kang,Tianqi Wan
title: Spacecraft Anomaly Detection with Attention Temporal Convolution Network
title_zh: 使用注意力时间卷积网络进行航天器异常检测
abstract: Spacecraft faces various situations when carrying out exploration missions in complex space, thus monitoring the anomaly status of spacecraft is crucial to the development of \textcolor{blue}{the} aerospace industry. The time series telemetry data generated by on-orbit spacecraft \textcolor{blue}{contains} important information about the status of spacecraft. However, traditional domain knowledge-based spacecraft anomaly detection methods are not effective due to high dimensionality and complex correlation among variables. In this work, we propose an anomaly detection framework for spacecraft multivariate time-series data based on temporal convolution networks (TCNs). First, we employ dynamic graph attention to model the complex correlation among variables and time series. Second, temporal convolution networks with parallel processing ability are used to extract multidimensional \textcolor{blue}{features} for \textcolor{blue}{the} downstream prediction task. Finally, many potential anomalies are detected by the best threshold. Experiments on real NASA SMAP/MSL spacecraft datasets show the superiority of our proposed model with respect to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Spacecraft faces various situations when carrying out exploration missions in complex space, thus monitoring the anomaly status of spacecraft is crucial to the development of \textcolor{blue}{the} aerospace industry. The time series telemetry data generated by on-orbit spacecraft \textcolor{blue}{contains} important information about the status of spacecraft. However, traditional domain knowledge-based spacecraft anomaly detection methods are not effective due to high dimensionality and complex correlation among variables. In this work, we propose an anomaly detection framework for spacecraft multivariate time-series data based on temporal convolution networks (TCNs). First, we employ dynamic graph attention to model the complex correlation among variables and time series. Second, temporal convolution networks with parallel processing ability are used to extract multidimensional \textcolor{blue}{features} for \textcolor{blue}{the} downstream prediction task. Finally, many potential anomalies are detected by the best threshold. Experiments on real NASA SMAP/MSL spacecraft datasets show the superiority of our proposed model with respect to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 航天器在复杂空间执行探测任务时会面临各种情况，监测航天器的异常状态对于航天事业的发展至关重要。在轨航天器产生的时间序列遥测数据\textcolor{blue}{包含}有关航天器状态的重要信息。然而，传统的基于领域知识的航天器异常检测方法由于维度高且变量之间复杂的相关性而效果不佳。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于时间卷积网络（TCN）的航天器多元时间序列数据异常检测框架。首先，我们采用动态图注意力来建模变量和时间序列之间的复杂相关性。其次，具有并行处理能力的时间卷积网络用于为下游预测任务提取多维\textcolor{blue}{features}。最后，通过最佳阈值检测到许多潜在的异常。对真实 NASA SMAP/MSL 航天器数据集的实验表明，我们提出的模型相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制和时序卷积网络（TCN）的航天器异常检测框架，用于处理多变量时间序列遥测数据。
AI.motivation: 传统基于领域知识的航天器异常检测方法因变量高维性和复杂相关性难以有效工作，需更高效的模型处理复杂空间任务中的异常监测需求。
AI.method: 采用动态图注意力建模变量间复杂关联，结合并行处理的时序卷积网络提取多维特征，通过最优阈值检测潜在异常。
AI.result: 在NASA SMAP/MSL真实航天器数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的注意力时序卷积网络框架能有效处理航天器多变量时间序列数据，提升异常检测性能。

authors_text: Binbin Du,Rui Deng,Yingxin Zhang
title: The System Description of dun_oscar team for The ICPR MSR Challenge
title_zh: dun_oscar团队ICPR MSR挑战赛的系统描述
abstract: This paper introduces the system submitted by dun_oscar team for the ICPR MSR Challenge. Three subsystems for task1-task3 are descripted respectively. In task1, we develop a visual system which includes a OCR model, a text tracker, and a NLP classifier for distinguishing subtitles and non-subtitles. In task2, we employ an ASR system which includes an AM with 18 layers and a 4-gram LM. Semi-supervised learning on unlabeled data is also vital. In task3, we employ the ASR system to improve the visual system, some false subtitles can be corrected by a fusion module.
summary: This paper introduces the system submitted by dun_oscar team for the ICPR MSR Challenge. Three subsystems for task1-task3 are descripted respectively. In task1, we develop a visual system which includes a OCR model, a text tracker, and a NLP classifier for distinguishing subtitles and non-subtitles. In task2, we employ an ASR system which includes an AM with 18 layers and a 4-gram LM. Semi-supervised learning on unlabeled data is also vital. In task3, we employ the ASR system to improve the visual system, some false subtitles can be corrected by a fusion module.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了dun_oscar团队为ICPR MSR挑战赛提交的系统。分别描述task1-task3的三个子系统。在任务 1 中，我们开发了一个视觉系统，其中包括 OCR 模型、文本跟踪器和用于区分字幕和非字幕的 NLP 分类器。在任务2中，我们采用了一个ASR系统，其中包括一个18层的AM和一个4-gram的LM。对未标记数据的半监督学习也至关重要。在任务3中，我们采用ASR系统来改进视觉系统，一些错误的字幕可以通过融合模块来纠正。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了dun_oscar团队为ICPR MSR挑战赛设计的系统，包含针对三个任务的子系统方案。
AI.motivation: 为应对ICPR MSR挑战赛中多任务处理需求（字幕识别、语音识别及系统融合），设计高效协同的解决方案。
AI.method: 任务1采用OCR+文本跟踪+NLP分类区分字幕；任务2构建18层AM+4-gram LM的ASR系统并引入半监督学习；任务3通过融合模块结合ASR与视觉系统修正错误字幕。
AI.result: 系统在挑战赛中验证了各子任务的有效性，尤其在字幕-语音协同处理上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 多模态系统融合策略有效提升任务性能，为复杂场景下的多任务处理提供参考方案。

authors_text: Tianyun Yang,Danding Wang,Fan Tang,Xinying Zhao,Juan Cao,Sheng Tang
title: Progressive Open Space Expansion for Open-Set Model Attribution
title_zh: 开放集模型归因的渐进式开放空间扩展
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress in generative technology, the Janus-faced issues of intellectual property protection and malicious content supervision have arisen. Efforts have been paid to manage synthetic images by attributing them to a set of potential source models. However, the closed-set classification setting limits the application in real-world scenarios for handling contents generated by arbitrary models. In this study, we focus on a challenging task, namely Open-Set Model Attribution (OSMA), to simultaneously attribute images to known models and identify those from unknown ones. Compared to existing open-set recognition (OSR) tasks focusing on semantic novelty, OSMA is more challenging as the distinction between images from known and unknown models may only lie in visually imperceptible traces. To this end, we propose a Progressive Open Space Expansion (POSE) solution, which simulates open-set samples that maintain the same semantics as closed-set samples but embedded with different imperceptible traces. Guided by a diversity constraint, the open space is simulated progressively by a set of lightweight augmentation models. We consider three real-world scenarios and construct an OSMA benchmark dataset, including unknown models trained with different random seeds, architectures, and datasets from known ones. Extensive experiments on the dataset demonstrate POSE is superior to both existing model attribution methods and off-the-shelf OSR methods.
summary: Despite the remarkable progress in generative technology, the Janus-faced issues of intellectual property protection and malicious content supervision have arisen. Efforts have been paid to manage synthetic images by attributing them to a set of potential source models. However, the closed-set classification setting limits the application in real-world scenarios for handling contents generated by arbitrary models. In this study, we focus on a challenging task, namely Open-Set Model Attribution (OSMA), to simultaneously attribute images to known models and identify those from unknown ones. Compared to existing open-set recognition (OSR) tasks focusing on semantic novelty, OSMA is more challenging as the distinction between images from known and unknown models may only lie in visually imperceptible traces. To this end, we propose a Progressive Open Space Expansion (POSE) solution, which simulates open-set samples that maintain the same semantics as closed-set samples but embedded with different imperceptible traces. Guided by a diversity constraint, the open space is simulated progressively by a set of lightweight augmentation models. We consider three real-world scenarios and construct an OSMA benchmark dataset, including unknown models trained with different random seeds, architectures, and datasets from known ones. Extensive experiments on the dataset demonstrate POSE is superior to both existing model attribution methods and off-the-shelf OSR methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管生成技术取得了显着进步，但Janus面临的知识产权保护和恶意内容监管问题也随之出现。人们已经付出了努力，通过将合成图像归因于一组潜在的源模型来管理合成图像。然而，闭集分类设置限制了在现实场景中处理任意模型生成的内容的应用。在这项研究中，我们专注于一项具有挑战性的任务，即开放集模型归因（OSMA），以同时将图像归因于已知模型并识别未知模型。与现有关注语义新颖性的开放集识别（OSR）任务相比，OSMA 更具挑战性，因为已知模型和未知模型的图像之间的区别可能仅在于视觉上难以察觉的痕迹。为此，我们提出了渐进式开放空间扩展（POSE）解决方案，它模拟开放集样本，保持与封闭集样本相同的语义，但嵌入不同的难以察觉的痕迹。在多样性约束的指导下，开放空间通过一组轻量级增强模型逐步进行模拟。我们考虑三个现实场景并构建一个 OSMA 基准数据集，包括使用与已知模型不同的随机种子、架构和数据集训练的未知模型。对数据集的大量实验表明，POSE 优于现有的模型归因方法和现成的 OSR 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式开放空间扩展（POSE）方法，解决开放集模型归属（OSMA）任务，同时识别图像来源的已知模型和未知模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型归属方法局限于封闭集分类，难以应对现实场景中任意模型生成的内容。开放集模型归属需区分已知与未知模型生成的图像，而两者差异可能仅为视觉不可感知的痕迹，现有方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 提出POSE方法，通过轻量级增强模型逐步模拟保持语义一致但嵌入不同不可感知痕迹的开放集样本，并利用多样性约束指导开放空间的渐进式扩展。
AI.result: 在包含不同随机种子、架构和数据集的未知模型构建的OSMA基准数据集上，POSE优于现有模型归属方法和开放集识别方法。
AI.conclusion: POSE有效解决了开放集模型归属的挑战，为生成内容的知识产权保护和恶意内容监管提供了新思路。

search_text: Progressive Open Space Expansion for Open-Set Model Attribution 开放集模型归因的渐进式开放空间扩展 Despite the remarkable progress in generative technology, the Janus-faced issues of intellectual property protection and malicious content supervision have arisen. Efforts have been paid to manage synthetic images by attributing them to a set of potential source models. However, the closed-set classification setting limits the application in real-world scenarios for handling contents generated by arbitrary models. In this study, we focus on a challenging task, namely Open-Set Model Attribution (OSMA), to simultaneously attribute images to known models and identify those from unknown ones. Compared to existing open-set recognition (OSR) tasks focusing on semantic novelty, OSMA is more challenging as the distinction between images from known and unknown models may only lie in visually imperceptible traces. To this end, we propose a Progressive Open Space Expansion (POSE) solution, which simulates open-set samples that maintain the same semantics as closed-set samples but embedded with different imperceptible traces. Guided by a diversity constraint, the open space is simulated progressively by a set of lightweight augmentation models. We consider three real-world scenarios and construct an OSMA benchmark dataset, including unknown models trained with different random seeds, architectures, and datasets from known ones. Extensive experiments on the dataset demonstrate POSE is superior to both existing model attribution methods and off-the-shelf OSR methods. 尽管生成技术取得了显着进步，但Janus面临的知识产权保护和恶意内容监管问题也随之出现。人们已经付出了努力，通过将合成图像归因于一组潜在的源模型来管理合成图像。然而，闭集分类设置限制了在现实场景中处理任意模型生成的内容的应用。在这项研究中，我们专注于一项具有挑战性的任务，即开放集模型归因（OSMA），以同时将图像归因于已知模型并识别未知模型。与现有关注语义新颖性的开放集识别（OSR）任务相比，OSMA 更具挑战性，因为已知模型和未知模型的图像之间的区别可能仅在于视觉上难以察觉的痕迹。为此，我们提出了渐进式开放空间扩展（POSE）解决方案，它模拟开放集样本，保持与封闭集样本相同的语义，但嵌入不同的难以察觉的痕迹。在多样性约束的指导下，开放空间通过一组轻量级增强模型逐步进行模拟。我们考虑三个现实场景并构建一个 OSMA 基准数据集，包括使用与已知模型不同的随机种子、架构和数据集训练的未知模型。对数据集的大量实验表明，POSE 优于现有的模型归因方法和现成的 OSR 方法。 本文提出一种渐进式开放空间扩展（POSE）方法，解决开放集模型归属（OSMA）任务，同时识别图像来源的已知模型和未知模型。 Tianyun Yang,Danding Wang,Fan Tang,Xinying Zhao,Juan Cao,Sheng Tang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Sourya Sengupta,Mark A. Anastasio
title: A Test Statistic Estimation-based Approach for Establishing Self-interpretable CNN-based Binary Classifiers
title_zh: 一种基于测试统计估计的方法，用于建立可自解释的基于 CNN 的二元分类器
abstract: Interpretability is highly desired for deep neural network-based classifiers, especially when addressing high-stake decisions in medical imaging. Commonly used post-hoc interpretability methods have the limitation that they can produce plausible but different interpretations of a given model, leading to ambiguity about which one to choose. To address this problem, a novel decision-theory-inspired approach is investigated to establish a self-interpretable model, given a pre-trained deep binary black-box medical image classifier. This approach involves utilizing a self-interpretable encoder-decoder model in conjunction with a single-layer fully connected network with unity weights. The model is trained to estimate the test statistic of the given trained black-box deep binary classifier to maintain a similar accuracy. The decoder output image, referred to as an equivalency map, is an image that represents a transformed version of the to-be-classified image that, when processed by the fixed fully connected layer, produces the same test statistic value as the original classifier. The equivalency map provides a visualization of the transformed image features that directly contribute to the test statistic value and, moreover, permits quantification of their relative contributions. Unlike the traditional post-hoc interpretability methods, the proposed method is self-interpretable, quantitative. Detailed quantitative and qualitative analyses have been performed with three different medical image binary classification tasks.
summary: Interpretability is highly desired for deep neural network-based classifiers, especially when addressing high-stake decisions in medical imaging. Commonly used post-hoc interpretability methods have the limitation that they can produce plausible but different interpretations of a given model, leading to ambiguity about which one to choose. To address this problem, a novel decision-theory-inspired approach is investigated to establish a self-interpretable model, given a pre-trained deep binary black-box medical image classifier. This approach involves utilizing a self-interpretable encoder-decoder model in conjunction with a single-layer fully connected network with unity weights. The model is trained to estimate the test statistic of the given trained black-box deep binary classifier to maintain a similar accuracy. The decoder output image, referred to as an equivalency map, is an image that represents a transformed version of the to-be-classified image that, when processed by the fixed fully connected layer, produces the same test statistic value as the original classifier. The equivalency map provides a visualization of the transformed image features that directly contribute to the test statistic value and, moreover, permits quantification of their relative contributions. Unlike the traditional post-hoc interpretability methods, the proposed method is self-interpretable, quantitative. Detailed quantitative and qualitative analyses have been performed with three different medical image binary classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的分类器非常需要可解释性，特别是在处理医学成像中的高风险决策时。常用的事后可解释性方法具有局限性，即它们可以对给定模型产生看似合理但不同的解释，从而导致选择哪一种模型的模糊性。为了解决这个问题，研究了一种新颖的决策理论启发方法，在给定预训练的深度二值黑盒医学图像分类器的情况下建立可自我解释的模型。这种方法涉及利用可自解释的编码器-解码器模型以及具有统一权重的单层全连接网络。该模型经过训练来估计给定训练的黑盒深度二元分类器的测试统计量，以保持类似的准确性。解码器输出图像，称为等价图，是表示待分类图像的变换版本的图像，当由固定的全连接层处理时，产生与原始分类器相同的测试统计值。等价图提供了直接影响测试统计值的变换图像特征的可视化，此外，还允许量化它们的相对贡献。与传统的事后可解释性方法不同，所提出的方法是可自我解释的、定量的。对三种不同的医学图像二元分类任务进行了详细的定量和定性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于测试统计量估计的自解释CNN二分类方法，用于医学图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有后验解释方法对深度模型的解释存在歧义性，难以确定最优解释方案，尤其在医疗影像等高风险决策场景中亟需可量化、自解释的模型。
AI.method: 结合编码器-解码器结构与单层全连接网络（权重为1），通过估计预训练黑盒分类器的测试统计量进行联合训练，生成等效性映射图（equivalency map）可视化特征贡献。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像二分类任务中验证了方法有效性，模型保持与原分类器相近准确率，且能定量量化特征贡献度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度模型提供了自解释、可量化的替代方案，相比传统后验解释方法更具确定性和实用性。

authors_text: Tiancheng Lin,Zhimiao Yu,Hongyu Hu,Yi Xu,Chang Wen Chen
title: Interventional Bag Multi-Instance Learning On Whole-Slide Pathological Images
title_zh: 全幻灯片病理图像的介入袋多实例学习
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023; Code at https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023; Code at https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL
abstract: Multi-instance learning (MIL) is an effective paradigm for whole-slide pathological images (WSIs) classification to handle the gigapixel resolution and slide-level label. Prevailing MIL methods primarily focus on improving the feature extractor and aggregator. However, one deficiency of these methods is that the bag contextual prior may trick the model into capturing spurious correlations between bags and labels. This deficiency is a confounder that limits the performance of existing MIL methods. In this paper, we propose a novel scheme, Interventional Bag Multi-Instance Learning (IBMIL), to achieve deconfounded bag-level prediction. Unlike traditional likelihood-based strategies, the proposed scheme is based on the backdoor adjustment to achieve the interventional training, thus is capable of suppressing the bias caused by the bag contextual prior. Note that the principle of IBMIL is orthogonal to existing bag MIL methods. Therefore, IBMIL is able to bring consistent performance boosting to existing schemes, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL.
summary: Multi-instance learning (MIL) is an effective paradigm for whole-slide pathological images (WSIs) classification to handle the gigapixel resolution and slide-level label. Prevailing MIL methods primarily focus on improving the feature extractor and aggregator. However, one deficiency of these methods is that the bag contextual prior may trick the model into capturing spurious correlations between bags and labels. This deficiency is a confounder that limits the performance of existing MIL methods. In this paper, we propose a novel scheme, Interventional Bag Multi-Instance Learning (IBMIL), to achieve deconfounded bag-level prediction. Unlike traditional likelihood-based strategies, the proposed scheme is based on the backdoor adjustment to achieve the interventional training, thus is capable of suppressing the bias caused by the bag contextual prior. Note that the principle of IBMIL is orthogonal to existing bag MIL methods. Therefore, IBMIL is able to bring consistent performance boosting to existing schemes, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 是全幻灯片病理图像 (WSI) 分类的有效范例，可处理十亿像素分辨率和幻灯片级标签。流行的 MIL 方法主要侧重于改进特征提取器和聚合器。然而，这些方法的一个缺陷是袋子上下文先验可能会欺骗模型捕获袋子和标签之间的虚假相关性。这一缺陷是限制现有 MIL 方法性能的混杂因素。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方案，即介入袋多实例学习（IBMIL），以实现解混杂的袋级预测。与传统的基于似然的策略不同，该方案基于后门调整来实现干预训练，因此能够抑制由包上下文先验引起的偏差。请注意，IBMIL 的原理与现有的 bag MIL 方法是正交的。因此，IBMIL 能够为现有方案带来一致的性能提升，实现新的最先进的性能。代码可从 https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种干预性多实例学习方法（IBMIL）用于全切片病理图像分类，以解决袋上下文先验导致的虚假相关性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法因袋上下文先验导致模型捕捉虚假相关性，影响分类性能，需改进。
AI.method: 基于后门调整的干预训练方法（IBMIL），通过消除袋上下文先验的偏差来提升分类性能，与现有方法正交。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到新的最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: IBMIL有效消除偏差，提升模型鲁棒性，可推广至其他MIL任务。

search_text: Interventional Bag Multi-Instance Learning On Whole-Slide Pathological Images 全幻灯片病理图像的介入袋多实例学习 Multi-instance learning (MIL) is an effective paradigm for whole-slide pathological images (WSIs) classification to handle the gigapixel resolution and slide-level label. Prevailing MIL methods primarily focus on improving the feature extractor and aggregator. However, one deficiency of these methods is that the bag contextual prior may trick the model into capturing spurious correlations between bags and labels. This deficiency is a confounder that limits the performance of existing MIL methods. In this paper, we propose a novel scheme, Interventional Bag Multi-Instance Learning (IBMIL), to achieve deconfounded bag-level prediction. Unlike traditional likelihood-based strategies, the proposed scheme is based on the backdoor adjustment to achieve the interventional training, thus is capable of suppressing the bias caused by the bag contextual prior. Note that the principle of IBMIL is orthogonal to existing bag MIL methods. Therefore, IBMIL is able to bring consistent performance boosting to existing schemes, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL. 多实例学习 (MIL) 是全幻灯片病理图像 (WSI) 分类的有效范例，可处理十亿像素分辨率和幻灯片级标签。流行的 MIL 方法主要侧重于改进特征提取器和聚合器。然而，这些方法的一个缺陷是袋子上下文先验可能会欺骗模型捕获袋子和标签之间的虚假相关性。这一缺陷是限制现有 MIL 方法性能的混杂因素。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方案，即介入袋多实例学习（IBMIL），以实现解混杂的袋级预测。与传统的基于似然的策略不同，该方案基于后门调整来实现干预训练，因此能够抑制由包上下文先验引起的偏差。请注意，IBMIL 的原理与现有的 bag MIL 方法是正交的。因此，IBMIL 能够为现有方案带来一致的性能提升，实现新的最先进的性能。代码可从 https://github.com/HHHedo/IBMIL 获取。 提出一种干预性多实例学习方法（IBMIL）用于全切片病理图像分类，以解决袋上下文先验导致的虚假相关性问题。 Tiancheng Lin,Zhimiao Yu,Hongyu Hu,Yi Xu,Chang Wen Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jieun Lee,Hakjun Lee,Jiyong Oh
title: FusionLoc: Camera-2D LiDAR Fusion Using Multi-Head Self-Attention for End-to-End Serving Robot Relocalization
title_zh: FusionLoc：使用多头自注意力进行端到端服务机器人重定位的相机 2D LiDAR 融合
abstract: As technology advances in autonomous mobile robots, mobile service robots have been actively used more and more for various purposes. Especially, serving robots have been not surprising products anymore since the COVID-19 pandemic. One of the practical problems in operating a serving robot is that it often fails to estimate its pose on a map that it moves around. Whenever the failure happens, servers should bring the serving robot to its initial location and reboot it manually. In this paper, we focus on end-to-end relocalization of serving robots to address the problem. It is to predict robot pose directly from only the onboard sensor data using neural networks. In particular, we propose a deep neural network architecture for the relocalization based on camera-2D LiDAR sensor fusion. We call the proposed method FusionLoc. In the proposed method, the multi-head self-attention complements different types of information captured by the two sensors to regress the robot pose. Our experiments on a dataset collected by a commercial serving robot demonstrate that FusionLoc can provide better performances than previous end-to-end relocalization methods taking only a single image or a 2D LiDAR point cloud as well as a straightforward fusion method concatenating their features.
summary: As technology advances in autonomous mobile robots, mobile service robots have been actively used more and more for various purposes. Especially, serving robots have been not surprising products anymore since the COVID-19 pandemic. One of the practical problems in operating a serving robot is that it often fails to estimate its pose on a map that it moves around. Whenever the failure happens, servers should bring the serving robot to its initial location and reboot it manually. In this paper, we focus on end-to-end relocalization of serving robots to address the problem. It is to predict robot pose directly from only the onboard sensor data using neural networks. In particular, we propose a deep neural network architecture for the relocalization based on camera-2D LiDAR sensor fusion. We call the proposed method FusionLoc. In the proposed method, the multi-head self-attention complements different types of information captured by the two sensors to regress the robot pose. Our experiments on a dataset collected by a commercial serving robot demonstrate that FusionLoc can provide better performances than previous end-to-end relocalization methods taking only a single image or a 2D LiDAR point cloud as well as a straightforward fusion method concatenating their features.
abstract_zh: 随着自主移动机器人技术的进步，移动服务机器人越来越多地被积极用于各种用途。特别是，自 COVID-19 大流行以来，服务机器人不再是令人惊讶的产品。操作服务机器人的实际问题之一是它经常无法估计其在其移动的地图上的位姿。每当发生故障时，服务器应将服务机器人带到其初始位置并手动重新启动它。在本文中，我们重点关注服务机器人的端到端重新定位来解决该问题。它使用神经网络仅根据机载传感器数据直接预测机器人姿态。特别是，我们提出了一种基于相机-2D LiDAR 传感器融合的重定位深度神经网络架构。我们将所提出的方法称为 FusionLoc。在所提出的方法中，多头自注意力补充了两个传感器捕获的不同类型的信息以回归机器人姿态。我们对商业服务机器人收集的数据集进行的实验表明，与之前仅采用单个图像或 2D LiDAR 点云的端到端重定位方法以及连接其特征的简单融合方法相比，FusionLoc 可以提供更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FusionLoc方法，通过融合摄像头与2D激光雷达数据，实现服务机器人的端到端重定位。
AI.motivation: 服务机器人常因无法准确估计自身位姿导致定位失败，需人工干预。现有单传感器或简单融合方法效果有限，亟需更高效的重定位方案。
AI.method: 设计基于多头自注意力机制的深度神经网络，融合摄像头图像与2D激光雷达点云信息，通过特征交互回归机器人位姿。
AI.result: 在商用服务机器人数据集上验证，FusionLoc优于仅使用单传感器或简单特征拼接的端到端重定位方法。
AI.conclusion: FusionLoc通过多模态传感器信息互补，有效提升服务机器人重定位精度，为实际应用提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Yun-Hao Cao,Peiqin Sun,Shuchang Zhou
title: Three Guidelines You Should Know for Universally Slimmable Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 您应该了解的通用可精简自我监督学习的三个指南
abstract: We propose universally slimmable self-supervised learning (dubbed as US3L) to achieve better accuracy-efficiency trade-offs for deploying self-supervised models across different devices. We observe that direct adaptation of self-supervised learning (SSL) to universally slimmable networks misbehaves as the training process frequently collapses. We then discover that temporal consistent guidance is the key to the success of SSL for universally slimmable networks, and we propose three guidelines for the loss design to ensure this temporal consistency from a unified gradient perspective. Moreover, we propose dynamic sampling and group regularization strategies to simultaneously improve training efficiency and accuracy. Our US3L method has been empirically validated on both convolutional neural networks and vision transformers. With only once training and one copy of weights, our method outperforms various state-of-the-art methods (individually trained or not) on benchmarks including recognition, object detection and instance segmentation. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/US3L-CVPR2023.
summary: We propose universally slimmable self-supervised learning (dubbed as US3L) to achieve better accuracy-efficiency trade-offs for deploying self-supervised models across different devices. We observe that direct adaptation of self-supervised learning (SSL) to universally slimmable networks misbehaves as the training process frequently collapses. We then discover that temporal consistent guidance is the key to the success of SSL for universally slimmable networks, and we propose three guidelines for the loss design to ensure this temporal consistency from a unified gradient perspective. Moreover, we propose dynamic sampling and group regularization strategies to simultaneously improve training efficiency and accuracy. Our US3L method has been empirically validated on both convolutional neural networks and vision transformers. With only once training and one copy of weights, our method outperforms various state-of-the-art methods (individually trained or not) on benchmarks including recognition, object detection and instance segmentation. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/US3L-CVPR2023.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了普遍可精简的自我监督学习（称为 US3L），以实现在不同设备上部署自我监督模型时更好的准确性与效率权衡。我们观察到，由于训练过程经常崩溃，自我监督学习（SSL）直接适应普遍可精简网络会出现错误。然后我们发现时间一致性指导是 SSL 在普遍可精简网络中成功的关键，并且我们提出了三个损失设计指南，以从统一梯度的角度确保这种时间一致性。此外，我们提出动态采样和组正则化策略，以同时提高训练效率和准确性。我们的 US3L 方法已经在卷积神经网络和视觉转换器上得到了经验验证。只需一次训练和一份权重副本，我们的方法在包括识别、对象检测和实例分割在内的基准测试中优于各种最先进的方法（单独训练或未训练）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/US3L-CVPR2023 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为US3L的通用可瘦身自监督学习方法，旨在通过优化训练过程实现模型在不同设备上的准确率与效率的平衡。
AI.motivation: 直接将自监督学习（SSL）应用于通用可瘦身网络时，训练过程容易崩溃，因此需要探索保证训练稳定性的关键因素。
AI.method: 提出三个基于时间一致性指导的损失设计准则，并结合动态采样与分组正则化策略，从统一梯度视角确保训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在卷积神经网络和视觉Transformer上验证了US3L方法，仅需一次训练即可在图像识别、目标检测和实例分割等任务中超越多种现有方法。
AI.conclusion: US3L通过时间一致性指导与高效训练策略，有效解决了通用可瘦身网络的训练崩溃问题，为跨设备部署提供了更优的准确率-效率权衡方案。

Our US3L method has been empirically validated on both convolutional neural networks and vision transformers. With only once training and one copy of weights, our method outperforms various state-of-the-art methods (individually trained or not) on benchmarks including recognition, object detection and instance segmentation. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/US3L-CVPR2023. 我们提出了普遍可精简的自我监督学习（称为 US3L），以实现在不同设备上部署自我监督模型时更好的准确性与效率权衡。我们观察到，由于训练过程经常崩溃，自我监督学习（SSL）直接适应普遍可精简网络会出现错误。然后我们发现时间一致性指导是 SSL 在普遍可精简网络中成功的关键，并且我们提出了三个损失设计指南，以从统一梯度的角度确保这种时间一致性。此外，我们提出动态采样和组正则化策略，以同时提高训练效率和准确性。我们的 US3L 方法已经在卷积神经网络和视觉转换器上得到了经验验证。只需一次训练和一份权重副本，我们的方法在包括识别、对象检测和实例分割在内的基准测试中优于各种最先进的方法（单独训练或未训练）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/US3L-CVPR2023 获取。 本文提出了一种名为US3L的通用可瘦身自监督学习方法，旨在通过优化训练过程实现模型在不同设备上的准确率与效率的平衡。 Yun-Hao Cao,Peiqin Sun,Shuchang Zhou cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Biao Qian,Yang Wang,Richang Hong,Meng Wang
title: Adaptive Data-Free Quantization
title_zh: 自适应无数据量化
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, Refined camera ready version for CVPR 2023
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, Refined camera ready version for CVPR 2023
abstract: Data-free quantization (DFQ) recovers the performance of quantized network (Q) without the original data, but generates the fake sample via a generator (G) by learning from full-precision network (P), which, however, is totally independent of Q, overlooking the adaptability of the knowledge from generated samples, i.e., informative or not to the learning process of Q, resulting into the overflow of generalization error. Building on this, several critical questions -- how to measure the sample adaptability to Q under varied bit-width scenarios? whether the largest adaptability is the best? how to generate the samples with adaptive adaptability to improve Q's generalization? To answer the above questions, in this paper, we propose an Adaptive Data-Free Quantization (AdaDFQ) method, which revisits DFQ from a zero-sum game perspective upon the sample adaptability between two players -- a generator and a quantized network. Following this viewpoint, we further define the disagreement and agreement samples to form two boundaries, where the margin is optimized to adaptively regulate the adaptability of generated samples to Q, so as to address the over-and-under fitting issues. Our AdaDFQ reveals: 1) the largest adaptability is NOT the best for sample generation to benefit Q's generalization; 2) the knowledge of the generated sample should not be informative to Q only, but also related to the category and distribution information of the training data for P. The theoretical and empirical analysis validate the advantages of AdaDFQ over the state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/hfutqian/AdaDFQ.
summary: Data-free quantization (DFQ) recovers the performance of quantized network (Q) without the original data, but generates the fake sample via a generator (G) by learning from full-precision network (P), which, however, is totally independent of Q, overlooking the adaptability of the knowledge from generated samples, i.e., informative or not to the learning process of Q, resulting into the overflow of generalization error. Building on this, several critical questions -- how to measure the sample adaptability to Q under varied bit-width scenarios? whether the largest adaptability is the best? how to generate the samples with adaptive adaptability to improve Q's generalization? To answer the above questions, in this paper, we propose an Adaptive Data-Free Quantization (AdaDFQ) method, which revisits DFQ from a zero-sum game perspective upon the sample adaptability between two players -- a generator and a quantized network. Following this viewpoint, we further define the disagreement and agreement samples to form two boundaries, where the margin is optimized to adaptively regulate the adaptability of generated samples to Q, so as to address the over-and-under fitting issues. Our AdaDFQ reveals: 1) the largest adaptability is NOT the best for sample generation to benefit Q's generalization; 2) the knowledge of the generated sample should not be informative to Q only, but also related to the category and distribution information of the training data for P. The theoretical and empirical analysis validate the advantages of AdaDFQ over the state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/hfutqian/AdaDFQ.
abstract_zh: 无数据量化（DFQ）在没有原始数据的情况下恢复了量化网络（Q）的性能，但通过生成器（G）通过全精度网络（P）学习来生成假样本，但完全独立于Q，忽略了生成样本知识的适应性，即是否对Q的学习过程提供信息，导致泛化误差溢出。在此基础上，几个关键问题——如何衡量样本在不同位宽场景下对 Q 的适应性？适应性最大是否就是最好的？如何生成具有自适应适应性的样本来提高Q的泛化能力？为了回答上述问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应无数据量化（AdaDFQ）方法，该方法从零和博弈的角度重新审视了 DFQ，考虑了两个参与者（生成器和量化网络）之间的样本适应性。遵循这一观点，我们进一步定义不一致样本和一致样本，形成两个边界，对边界进行优化，自适应调节生成样本对Q的适应性，从而解决过拟合和欠拟合问题。我们的 AdaDFQ 揭示了：1）最大的适应性并不是最好的样本生成，有利于 Q 的泛化； 2）生成样本的知识不应仅对Q提供信息，还应与P的训练数据的类别和分布信息相关。理论和实证分析验证了AdaDFQ相对于现有技术的优势。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hfutqian/AdaDFQ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应数据无关量化方法（AdaDFQ），通过优化生成样本的适应性边界，提升量化网络的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据无关量化方法忽视生成样本对量化网络的适应性，导致泛化误差溢出，无法有效平衡过拟合与欠拟合问题。
AI.method: 从零和博弈视角重新定义生成器与量化网络的样本适应性，通过划分分歧/一致样本边界并优化间隔，自适应调节生成样本的适应性。
AI.result: 理论与实验验证AdaDFQ在多项指标上优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 最大适应性并非最优，生成样本需同时关联量化网络与原始数据的类别分布信息以提升泛化性能。

authors_text: Fangyu Zuo,Peiguang Jing,Jinglin Sun,Jizhong,Duan,Yong Ji,Yu Liu
title: Deep Learning-based Eye-Tracking Analysis for Diagnosis of Alzheimer's Disease Using 3D Comprehensive Visual Stimuli
title_zh: 基于深度学习的眼动追踪分析，利用 3D 综合视觉刺激诊断阿尔茨海默病
abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) causes a continuous decline in memory, thinking, and judgment. Traditional diagnoses are usually based on clinical experience, which is limited by some realistic factors. In this paper, we focus on exploiting deep learning techniques to diagnose AD based on eye-tracking behaviors. Visual attention, as typical eye-tracking behavior, is of great clinical value to detect cognitive abnormalities in AD patients. To better analyze the differences in visual attention between AD patients and normals, we first conduct a 3D comprehensive visual task on a non-invasive eye-tracking system to collect visual attention heatmaps. We then propose a multi-layered comparison convolution neural network (MC-CNN) to distinguish the visual attention differences between AD patients and normals. In MC-CNN, the multi-layered representations of heatmaps are obtained by hierarchical convolution to better encode eye-movement behaviors, which are further integrated into a distance vector to benefit the comprehensive visual task. Extensive experimental results on the collected dataset demonstrate that MC-CNN achieves consistent validity in classifying AD patients and normals with eye-tracking data.
summary: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) causes a continuous decline in memory, thinking, and judgment. Traditional diagnoses are usually based on clinical experience, which is limited by some realistic factors. In this paper, we focus on exploiting deep learning techniques to diagnose AD based on eye-tracking behaviors. Visual attention, as typical eye-tracking behavior, is of great clinical value to detect cognitive abnormalities in AD patients. To better analyze the differences in visual attention between AD patients and normals, we first conduct a 3D comprehensive visual task on a non-invasive eye-tracking system to collect visual attention heatmaps. We then propose a multi-layered comparison convolution neural network (MC-CNN) to distinguish the visual attention differences between AD patients and normals. In MC-CNN, the multi-layered representations of heatmaps are obtained by hierarchical convolution to better encode eye-movement behaviors, which are further integrated into a distance vector to benefit the comprehensive visual task. Extensive experimental results on the collected dataset demonstrate that MC-CNN achieves consistent validity in classifying AD patients and normals with eye-tracking data.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 会导致记忆力、思维和判断力持续下降。传统的诊断通常基于临床经验，受到一些现实因素的限制。在本文中，我们专注于利用深度学习技术根据眼动追踪行为来诊断 AD。视觉注意作为典型的眼动追踪行为，对于检测AD患者的认知异常具有重要的临床价值。为了更好地分析 AD 患者与正常人之间视觉注意力的差异，我们首先在非侵入性眼动追踪系统上进行 3D 综合视觉任务，以收集视觉注意力热图。然后，我们提出了一种多层比较卷积神经网络（MC-CNN）来区分 AD 患者和正常人之间的视觉注意力差异。在MC-CNN中，通过分层卷积获得热图的多层表示，以更好地编码眼睛运动行为，并将其进一步集成到距离向量中，以有利于综合视觉任务。对收集的数据集进行的大量实验结果表明，MC-CNN 在利用眼动追踪数据对 AD 患者和正常人进行分类方面取得了一致的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的眼动追踪分析方法，利用3D视觉刺激和多层卷积神经网络（MC-CNN）实现阿尔茨海默病的诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统阿尔茨海默病诊断依赖临床经验，存在主观性和局限性，需探索客观、自动化的生物标志物检测方法。
AI.method: 通过非侵入式眼动系统采集3D视觉任务下的注意力热图，构建多层比较卷积神经网络（MC-CNN），利用分层卷积提取热图特征并整合为距离向量进行分类。
AI.result: 实验验证MC-CNN在眼动数据分类任务中表现出稳定的有效性，能准确区分阿尔茨海默病患者与健康对照组。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为阿尔茨海默病的早期筛查提供了新的客观指标和自动化分析框架，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Ying Sheng,Lianmin Zheng,Binhang Yuan,Zhuohan Li,Max Ryabinin,Daniel Y. Fu,Zhiqiang Xie,Beidi Chen,Clark Barrett,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Percy Liang,Christopher Ré,Ion Stoica,Ce Zhang
title: FlexGen: High-Throughput Generative Inference of Large Language Models with a Single GPU
title_zh: FlexGen：使用单个 GPU 进行大型语言模型的高吞吐量生成推理
abstract: The high computational and memory requirements of large language model (LLM) inference make it feasible only with multiple high-end accelerators. Motivated by the emerging demand for latency-insensitive tasks with batched processing, this paper initiates the study of high-throughput LLM inference using limited resources, such as a single commodity GPU. We present FlexGen, a high-throughput generation engine for running LLMs with limited GPU memory. FlexGen can be flexibly configured under various hardware resource constraints by aggregating memory and computation from the GPU, CPU, and disk. By solving a linear programming problem, it searches for efficient patterns to store and access tensors. FlexGen further compresses the weights and the attention cache to 4 bits with negligible accuracy loss. These techniques enable FlexGen to have a larger space of batch size choices and thus significantly increase maximum throughput. As a result, when running OPT-175B on a single 16GB GPU, FlexGen achieves significantly higher throughput compared to state-of-the-art offloading systems, reaching a generation throughput of 1 token/s for the first time with an effective batch size of 144. On the HELM benchmark, FlexGen can benchmark a 30B model with a 16GB GPU on 7 representative sub-scenarios in 21 hours. The code is available at https://github.com/FMInference/FlexGen
summary: The high computational and memory requirements of large language model (LLM) inference make it feasible only with multiple high-end accelerators. Motivated by the emerging demand for latency-insensitive tasks with batched processing, this paper initiates the study of high-throughput LLM inference using limited resources, such as a single commodity GPU. We present FlexGen, a high-throughput generation engine for running LLMs with limited GPU memory. FlexGen can be flexibly configured under various hardware resource constraints by aggregating memory and computation from the GPU, CPU, and disk. By solving a linear programming problem, it searches for efficient patterns to store and access tensors. FlexGen further compresses the weights and the attention cache to 4 bits with negligible accuracy loss. These techniques enable FlexGen to have a larger space of batch size choices and thus significantly increase maximum throughput. As a result, when running OPT-175B on a single 16GB GPU, FlexGen achieves significantly higher throughput compared to state-of-the-art offloading systems, reaching a generation throughput of 1 token/s for the first time with an effective batch size of 144. On the HELM benchmark, FlexGen can benchmark a 30B model with a 16GB GPU on 7 representative sub-scenarios in 21 hours. The code is available at https://github.com/FMInference/FlexGen
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理对计算和内存的高要求使其只能通过多个高端加速器才能实现。受批处理对延迟不敏感任务的新兴需求的推动，本文启动了使用有限资源（例如单个商用 GPU）进行高吞吐量 LLM 推理的研究。我们推出了 FlexGen，这是一种高吞吐量生成引擎，用于在 GPU 内存有限的情况下运行 LLM。 FlexGen 可以通过聚合 GPU、CPU 和磁盘的内存和计算，在各种硬件资源限制下进行灵活配置。通过解决线性规划问题，它搜索有效的模式来存储和访问张量。 FlexGen 进一步将权重和注意力缓存压缩至 4 位，精度损失可以忽略不计。这些技术使 FlexGen 拥有更大的批量大小选择空间，从而显着提高最大吞吐量。因此，当在单个 16GB GPU 上运行 OPT-175B 时，FlexGen 与最先进的卸载系统相比，实现了显着更高的吞吐量，首次达到 1 token/s 的生成吞吐量，有效批量大小为 144。在 HELM 基准测试中，FlexGen 可以在 21 小时内在 7 个代表性子场景上对具有 16GB GPU 的 30B 模型进行基准测试。代码可在 https://github.com/FMInference/FlexGen 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlexGen，一种在有限GPU内存下实现大语言模型高吞吐量生成的引擎。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型推理需要大量计算和内存资源，通常依赖多块高端加速器，但实际需求中存在对延迟不敏感且需要批量处理的任务，需在有限资源（如单块GPU）下实现高吞吐量推理。
AI.method: 通过聚合GPU、CPU和磁盘的内存与计算资源，解决线性规划问题以优化张量存储与访问模式，并采用4位压缩技术压缩权重和注意力缓存，扩展批量大小选择空间。
AI.result: 在单块16GB GPU上运行OPT-175B模型时，FlexGen的生成吞吐量达到1 token/s（有效批量大小144），且可在21小时内完成HELM基准测试中30B模型的7个子场景评估。
AI.conclusion: FlexGen通过资源聚合与压缩技术，在单GPU上实现了大语言模型的高效高吞吐量推理，为资源受限场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Tianyi Chen,Luming Liang,Tianyu Ding,Zhihui Zhu,Ilya Zharkov
title: OTOV2: Automatic, Generic, User-Friendly
title_zh: OTOV2：自动、通用、用户友好
comment: Published on ICLR 2023. Remark here that a few images of dependency graphs can not be included in arXiv due to exceeding size limit
comments: Published on ICLR 2023. Remark here that a few images of dependency graphs can not be included in arXiv due to exceeding size limit
abstract: The existing model compression methods via structured pruning typically require complicated multi-stage procedures. Each individual stage necessitates numerous engineering efforts and domain-knowledge from the end-users which prevent their wider applications onto broader scenarios. We propose the second generation of Only-Train-Once (OTOv2), which first automatically trains and compresses a general DNN only once from scratch to produce a more compact model with competitive performance without fine-tuning. OTOv2 is automatic and pluggable into various deep learning applications, and requires almost minimal engineering efforts from the users. Methodologically, OTOv2 proposes two major improvements: (i) Autonomy: automatically exploits the dependency of general DNNs, partitions the trainable variables into Zero-Invariant Groups (ZIGs), and constructs the compressed model; and (ii) Dual Half-Space Projected Gradient (DHSPG): a novel optimizer to more reliably solve structured-sparsity problems. Numerically, we demonstrate the generality and autonomy of OTOv2 on a variety of model architectures such as VGG, ResNet, CARN, ConvNeXt, DenseNet and StackedUnets, the majority of which cannot be handled by other methods without extensive handcrafting efforts. Together with benchmark datasets including CIFAR10/100, DIV2K, Fashion-MNIST, SVNH and ImageNet, its effectiveness is validated by performing competitively or even better than the state-of-the-arts. The source code is available at https://github.com/tianyic/only_train_once.
summary: The existing model compression methods via structured pruning typically require complicated multi-stage procedures. Each individual stage necessitates numerous engineering efforts and domain-knowledge from the end-users which prevent their wider applications onto broader scenarios. We propose the second generation of Only-Train-Once (OTOv2), which first automatically trains and compresses a general DNN only once from scratch to produce a more compact model with competitive performance without fine-tuning. OTOv2 is automatic and pluggable into various deep learning applications, and requires almost minimal engineering efforts from the users. Methodologically, OTOv2 proposes two major improvements: (i) Autonomy: automatically exploits the dependency of general DNNs, partitions the trainable variables into Zero-Invariant Groups (ZIGs), and constructs the compressed model; and (ii) Dual Half-Space Projected Gradient (DHSPG): a novel optimizer to more reliably solve structured-sparsity problems. Numerically, we demonstrate the generality and autonomy of OTOv2 on a variety of model architectures such as VGG, ResNet, CARN, ConvNeXt, DenseNet and StackedUnets, the majority of which cannot be handled by other methods without extensive handcrafting efforts. Together with benchmark datasets including CIFAR10/100, DIV2K, Fashion-MNIST, SVNH and ImageNet, its effectiveness is validated by performing competitively or even better than the state-of-the-arts. The source code is available at https://github.com/tianyic/only_train_once.
abstract_zh: 现有的通过结构化剪枝的模型压缩方法通常需要复杂的多阶段过程。每个阶段都需要最终用户的大量工程工作和领域知识，这阻碍了其更广泛的应用到更广泛的场景中。我们提出了第二代 Only-Train-Once (OTOv2)，它首先从头开始自动训练和压缩通用 DNN 一次，以生成具有竞争性能的更紧凑的模型，无需微调。 OTOv2 是自动的，可插入各种深度学习应用程序，并且几乎不需要用户进行最少的工程设计。在方法上，OTOv2提出了两个主要改进：（i）自治性：自动利用通用DNN的依赖性，将可训练变量划分为零不变组（ZIG），并构建压缩模型； (ii) 双半空间投影梯度 (DHSPG)：一种新颖的优化器，可以更可靠地解决结构化稀疏问题。在数值上，我们证明了 OTOv2 在各种模型架构（例如 VGG、ResNet、CARN、ConvNeXt、DenseNet 和 StackedUnets）上的通用性和自治性，其中大多数模型如果没有大量的手工工作就无法通过其他方法来处理。与包括 CIFAR10/100、DIV2K、Fashion-MNIST、SVNH 和 ImageNet 在内的基准数据集一起，其有效性通过具有竞争力甚至优于最先进的表现来得到验证。源代码可在 https://github.com/tianyic/only_train_once 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTOv2模型压缩方法，通过一次训练自动生成紧凑模型，无需调优且适用于多种深度学习场景。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化剪枝方法需复杂多阶段流程和领域知识，限制了其广泛应用。
AI.method: 提出自主性（自动划分零不变组）和双半空间投影梯度优化器（DHSPG）两大改进，实现自动压缩。
AI.result: 在VGG、ResNet等6种架构及CIFAR、ImageNet等5个数据集上验证有效性，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: OTOv2以低工程成本实现通用型模型压缩，为自动化深度学习应用提供新方案。

authors_text: Zeqi Shen,Shuo Zhang,Zhuhao Zhang,Qihua Chen,Xueyao Dong,Youfang Lin
title: View Adaptive Light Field Deblurring Networks with Depth Perception
title_zh: 查看具有深度感知的自适应光场去模糊网络
abstract: The Light Field (LF) deblurring task is a challenging problem as the blur images are caused by different reasons like the camera shake and the object motion. The single image deblurring method is a possible way to solve this problem. However, since it deals with each view independently and cannot effectively utilize and maintain the LF structure, the restoration effect is usually not ideal. Besides, the LF blur is more complex because the degree is affected by the views and depth. Therefore, we carefully designed a novel LF deblurring network based on the LF blur characteristics. On one hand, since the blur degree varies a lot in different views, we design a novel view adaptive spatial convolution to deblur blurred LFs, which calculates the exclusive convolution kernel for each view. On the other hand, because the blur degree also varies with the depth of the object, a depth perception view attention is designed to deblur different depth areas by selectively integrating information from different views. Besides, we introduce an angular position embedding to maintain the LF structure better, which ensures the model correctly restores the view information. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results on synthetic and real images show that the deblurring effect of our method is better than other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The Light Field (LF) deblurring task is a challenging problem as the blur images are caused by different reasons like the camera shake and the object motion. The single image deblurring method is a possible way to solve this problem. However, since it deals with each view independently and cannot effectively utilize and maintain the LF structure, the restoration effect is usually not ideal. Besides, the LF blur is more complex because the degree is affected by the views and depth. Therefore, we carefully designed a novel LF deblurring network based on the LF blur characteristics. On one hand, since the blur degree varies a lot in different views, we design a novel view adaptive spatial convolution to deblur blurred LFs, which calculates the exclusive convolution kernel for each view. On the other hand, because the blur degree also varies with the depth of the object, a depth perception view attention is designed to deblur different depth areas by selectively integrating information from different views. Besides, we introduce an angular position embedding to maintain the LF structure better, which ensures the model correctly restores the view information. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results on synthetic and real images show that the deblurring effect of our method is better than other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 光场（LF）去模糊任务是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为模糊图像是由相机抖动和物体运动等不同原因引起的。单图像去模糊方法是解决这个问题的一种可能的方法。然而，由于它独立地处理每个视图，并且不能有效地利用和维护LF结构，因此恢复效果通常不理想。此外，低频模糊更加复杂，因为其程度受视角和深度的影响。因此，我们根据低频模糊特性精心设计了一种新颖的低频去模糊网络。一方面，由于不同视图中的模糊程度差异很大，我们设计了一种新颖的视图自适应空间卷积来去模糊模糊的 LF，它计算每个视图的专有卷积核。另一方面，由于模糊程度也随着对象的深度而变化，因此深度感知视图注意力被设计为通过选择性地整合来自不同视图的信息来对不同深度区域进行去模糊。此外，我们引入了角度位置嵌入来更好地保持LF结构，从而确保模型正确地恢复视图信息。对合成图像和真实图像的定量和定性实验结果表明，我们的方法的去模糊效果优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合视角自适应和深度感知的光场去模糊网络，以解决因相机抖动和物体运动导致的复杂模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去模糊方法无法有效利用光场结构，且光场模糊程度受视角和深度影响，导致恢复效果不理想。
AI.method: 设计视角自适应空间卷积为每个视角计算专属卷积核，结合深度感知视角注意力选择性整合不同视角信息，并引入角度位置嵌入以保持光场结构。
AI.result: 在合成和真实图像上的定量与定性实验表明，该方法的去模糊效果优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结合视角自适应和深度感知机制，有效提升了光场图像的去模糊效果。

search_text: View Adaptive Light Field Deblurring Networks with Depth Perception 查看具有深度感知的自适应光场去模糊网络 The Light Field (LF) deblurring task is a challenging problem as the blur images are caused by different reasons like the camera shake and the object motion. The single image deblurring method is a possible way to solve this problem. However, since it deals with each view independently and cannot effectively utilize and maintain the LF structure, the restoration effect is usually not ideal. Besides, the LF blur is more complex because the degree is affected by the views and depth. Therefore, we carefully designed a novel LF deblurring network based on the LF blur characteristics. On one hand, since the blur degree varies a lot in different views, we design a novel view adaptive spatial convolution to deblur blurred LFs, which calculates the exclusive convolution kernel for each view. On the other hand, because the blur degree also varies with the depth of the object, a depth perception view attention is designed to deblur different depth areas by selectively integrating information from different views. Besides, we introduce an angular position embedding to maintain the LF structure better, which ensures the model correctly restores the view information. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results on synthetic and real images show that the deblurring effect of our method is better than other state-of-the-art methods. 光场（LF）去模糊任务是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为模糊图像是由相机抖动和物体运动等不同原因引起的。单图像去模糊方法是解决这个问题的一种可能的方法。然而，由于它独立地处理每个视图，并且不能有效地利用和维护LF结构，因此恢复效果通常不理想。此外，低频模糊更加复杂，因为其程度受视角和深度的影响。因此，我们根据低频模糊特性精心设计了一种新颖的低频去模糊网络。一方面，由于不同视图中的模糊程度差异很大，我们设计了一种新颖的视图自适应空间卷积来去模糊模糊的 LF，它计算每个视图的专有卷积核。另一方面，由于模糊程度也随着对象的深度而变化，因此深度感知视图注意力被设计为通过选择性地整合来自不同视图的信息来对不同深度区域进行去模糊。此外，我们引入了角度位置嵌入来更好地保持LF结构，从而确保模型正确地恢复视图信息。对合成图像和真实图像的定量和定性实验结果表明，我们的方法的去模糊效果优于其他最先进的方法。 提出一种结合视角自适应和深度感知的光场去模糊网络，以解决因相机抖动和物体运动导致的复杂模糊问题。 Zeqi Shen,Shuo Zhang,Zhuhao Zhang,Qihua Chen,Xueyao Dong,Youfang Lin cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Xin Li,Bingchen Li,Xin Jin,Cuiling Lan,Zhibo Chen
title: Learning Distortion Invariant Representation for Image Restoration from A Causality Perspective
title_zh: 从因果关系角度学习图像恢复的失真不变表示
abstract: In recent years, we have witnessed the great advancement of Deep neural networks (DNNs) in image restoration. However, a critical limitation is that they cannot generalize well to real-world degradations with different degrees or types. In this paper, we are the first to propose a novel training strategy for image restoration from the causality perspective, to improve the generalization ability of DNNs for unknown degradations. Our method, termed Distortion Invariant representation Learning (DIL), treats each distortion type and degree as one specific confounder, and learns the distortion-invariant representation by eliminating the harmful confounding effect of each degradation. We derive our DIL with the back-door criterion in causality by modeling the interventions of different distortions from the optimization perspective. Particularly, we introduce counterfactual distortion augmentation to simulate the virtual distortion types and degrees as the confounders. Then, we instantiate the intervention of each distortion with a virtual model updating based on corresponding distorted images, and eliminate them from the meta-learning perspective. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our DIL on the generalization capability for unseen distortion types and degrees. Our code will be available at https://github.com/lixinustc/Causal-IR-DIL.
summary: In recent years, we have witnessed the great advancement of Deep neural networks (DNNs) in image restoration. However, a critical limitation is that they cannot generalize well to real-world degradations with different degrees or types. In this paper, we are the first to propose a novel training strategy for image restoration from the causality perspective, to improve the generalization ability of DNNs for unknown degradations. Our method, termed Distortion Invariant representation Learning (DIL), treats each distortion type and degree as one specific confounder, and learns the distortion-invariant representation by eliminating the harmful confounding effect of each degradation. We derive our DIL with the back-door criterion in causality by modeling the interventions of different distortions from the optimization perspective. Particularly, we introduce counterfactual distortion augmentation to simulate the virtual distortion types and degrees as the confounders. Then, we instantiate the intervention of each distortion with a virtual model updating based on corresponding distorted images, and eliminate them from the meta-learning perspective. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our DIL on the generalization capability for unseen distortion types and degrees. Our code will be available at https://github.com/lixinustc/Causal-IR-DIL.
abstract_zh: 近年来，我们见证了深度神经网络（DNN）在图像恢复方面的巨大进步。然而，一个关键的限制是它们不能很好地推广到现实世界中不同程度或类型的退化。在本文中，我们首次从因果关系的角度提出了一种新颖的图像恢复训练策略，以提高 DNN 对未知退化的泛化能力。我们的方法称为失真不变表示学习（DIL），将每种失真类型和程度视为一个特定的混杂因素，并通过消除每种退化的有害混杂效应来学习失真不变表示。我们通过从优化角度对不同扭曲的干预进行建模，用因果关系中的后门标准导出 DIL。特别是，我们引入反事实失真增强来模拟虚拟失真类型和程度作为混杂因素。然后，我们通过基于相应失真图像的虚拟模型更新来实例化每个失真的干预，并从元学习的角度消除它们。大量实验证明了我们的 DIL 对未见失真类型和程度的泛化能力的有效性。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/lixinustc/Cau​​sal-IR-DIL 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果性视角的图像修复方法DIL，通过消除失真混淆因素提升模型对未知退化的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在图像修复任务中难以处理现实世界中不同种类和程度的退化问题，现有方法缺乏对未知退化的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于因果推理中的后门准则，将失真视为混淆变量，通过反事实失真增强和元学习框架消除退化影响，学习失真不变的特征表示。
AI.result: 实验验证DIL在未见过的失真类型和强度上具有显著的泛化优势，优于现有主流图像修复方法。
AI.conclusion: 从因果视角建模退化因素能有效提升图像修复模型的泛化性，为鲁棒图像恢复提供新思路，代码已开源。

authors_text: Charissa Poon,Muhammad Febrian Rachmadi,Michal Byra,Matthias Schlachter,Binbin Xu,Tomomi Shimogori,Henrik Skibbe
title: An automated pipeline to create an atlas of in situ hybridization gene expression data in the adult marmoset brain
title_zh: 用于创建成年狨猴大脑中原位杂交基因表达数据图谱的自动化管道
abstract: We present the first automated pipeline to create an atlas of in situ hybridization gene expression in the adult marmoset brain in the same stereotaxic space. The pipeline consists of segmentation of gene expression from microscopy images and registration of images to a standard space. Automation of this pipeline is necessary to analyze the large volume of data in the genome-wide whole-brain dataset, and to process images that have varying intensity profiles and expression patterns with minimal human bias. To reduce the number of labelled images required for training, we develop a semi-supervised segmentation model. We further develop an iterative algorithm to register images to a standard space, enabling comparative analysis between genes and concurrent visualization with other datasets, thereby facilitating a more holistic understanding of primate brain structure and function.
summary: We present the first automated pipeline to create an atlas of in situ hybridization gene expression in the adult marmoset brain in the same stereotaxic space. The pipeline consists of segmentation of gene expression from microscopy images and registration of images to a standard space. Automation of this pipeline is necessary to analyze the large volume of data in the genome-wide whole-brain dataset, and to process images that have varying intensity profiles and expression patterns with minimal human bias. To reduce the number of labelled images required for training, we develop a semi-supervised segmentation model. We further develop an iterative algorithm to register images to a standard space, enabling comparative analysis between genes and concurrent visualization with other datasets, thereby facilitating a more holistic understanding of primate brain structure and function.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个自动化管道，用于在同一立体定位空间中创建成年狨猴大脑中的原位杂交基因表达图谱。该流程包括从显微镜图像中分割基因表达以及将图像配准到标准空间。为了分析全基因组全脑数据集中的大量数据，并以最小的人为偏差处理具有不同强度分布和表达模式的图像，必须实现该流程的自动化。为了减少训练所需的标记图像数量，我们开发了半监督分割模型。我们进一步开发了一种迭代算法，将图像配准到标准空间，从而实现基因之间的比较分析以及与其他数据集的并发可视化，从而促进对灵长类动物大脑结构和功能的更全面的理解。

AI.tldr: 开发自动化流程以生成成年狨猴大脑的原位杂交基因表达图谱
AI.motivation: 处理全基因组范围大脑数据集、减少人工偏见并实现基因间比较分析的需求
AI.method: 构建半监督分割模型与迭代图像注册算法，实现基因表达分割与标准空间对齐
AI.result: 建立可处理多强度图像的自动化流程，显著降低标注数据需求
AI.conclusion: 该流程促进灵长类大脑结构功能的整体性研究

Automation of this pipeline is necessary to analyze the large volume of data in the genome-wide whole-brain dataset, and to process images that have varying intensity profiles and expression patterns with minimal human bias. To reduce the number of labelled images required for training, we develop a semi-supervised segmentation model. We further develop an iterative algorithm to register images to a standard space, enabling comparative analysis between genes and concurrent visualization with other datasets, thereby facilitating a more holistic understanding of primate brain structure and function. 我们提出了第一个自动化管道，用于在同一立体定位空间中创建成年狨猴大脑中的原位杂交基因表达图谱。该流程包括从显微镜图像中分割基因表达以及将图像配准到标准空间。为了分析全基因组全脑数据集中的大量数据，并以最小的人为偏差处理具有不同强度分布和表达模式的图像，必须实现该流程的自动化。为了减少训练所需的标记图像数量，我们开发了半监督分割模型。我们进一步开发了一种迭代算法，将图像配准到标准空间，从而实现基因之间的比较分析以及与其他数据集的并发可视化，从而促进对灵长类动物大脑结构和功能的更全面的理解。 开发自动化流程以生成成年狨猴大脑的原位杂交基因表达图谱 Charissa Poon,Muhammad Febrian Rachmadi,Michal Byra,Matthias Schlachter,Binbin Xu,Tomomi Shimogori,Henrik Skibbe cs.CV

authors_text: Wonhyeok Choi,Sunghoon Im
title: Dynamic Neural Network for Multi-Task Learning Searching across Diverse Network Topologies
title_zh: 用于跨不同网络拓扑进行多任务学习搜索的动态神经网络
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2023, 13 pages, 10 encapsulated postscript figures
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2023, 13 pages, 10 encapsulated postscript figures
abstract: In this paper, we present a new MTL framework that searches for structures optimized for multiple tasks with diverse graph topologies and shares features among tasks. We design a restricted DAG-based central network with read-in/read-out layers to build topologically diverse task-adaptive structures while limiting search space and time. We search for a single optimized network that serves as multiple task adaptive sub-networks using our three-stage training process. To make the network compact and discretized, we propose a flow-based reduction algorithm and a squeeze loss used in the training process. We evaluate our optimized network on various public MTL datasets and show ours achieves state-of-the-art performance. An extensive ablation study experimentally validates the effectiveness of the sub-module and schemes in our framework.
summary: In this paper, we present a new MTL framework that searches for structures optimized for multiple tasks with diverse graph topologies and shares features among tasks. We design a restricted DAG-based central network with read-in/read-out layers to build topologically diverse task-adaptive structures while limiting search space and time. We search for a single optimized network that serves as multiple task adaptive sub-networks using our three-stage training process. To make the network compact and discretized, we propose a flow-based reduction algorithm and a squeeze loss used in the training process. We evaluate our optimized network on various public MTL datasets and show ours achieves state-of-the-art performance. An extensive ablation study experimentally validates the effectiveness of the sub-module and schemes in our framework.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 MTL 框架，该框架搜索针对具有不同图拓扑的多个任务优化的结构，并在任务之间共享特征。我们设计了一个基于 DAG 的受限中央网络，具有读入/读出层，以构建拓扑多样化的任务自适应结构，同时限制搜索空间和时间。我们使用我们的三阶段训练过程来寻找一个作为多任务自适应子网络的优化网络。为了使网络紧凑和离散，我们提出了一种基于流的缩减算法和在训练过程中使用的挤压损失。我们在各种公共 MTL 数据集上评估我们的优化网络，并证明我们的网络实现了最先进的性能。广泛的消融研究通过实验验证了我们框架中子模块和方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态神经网络框架，用于在多样化的网络拓扑中进行多任务学习，通过共享特征和优化结构提升多任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多任务学习方法难以有效处理具有不同图拓扑结构的任务，且搜索空间和时间成本较高，需设计更高效且适应性强的框架。
AI.method: 基于受限DAG的中心网络，结合读入/读出层构建拓扑多样化的子网络；采用三阶段训练流程，并引入流式压缩算法和挤压损失函数以优化网络结构。
AI.result: 在多个公开多任务数据集上达到最先进性能，消融实验证明了子模块和方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结构搜索与压缩算法有效平衡了多任务学习的适应性与效率，为复杂拓扑场景提供了新思路。

We evaluate our optimized network on various public MTL datasets and show ours achieves state-of-the-art performance. authors_text: Gang Chen
title: Optimal and Heuristic Min-Reg Scheduling Algorithms for GPU Programs
title_zh: GPU 程序的最优启发式 Min-Reg 调度算法
abstract: Given a basic block of instructions, finding a schedule that requires the minimum number of registers for evaluation is a well-known problem. The problem is NP-complete when the dependences among instructions form a directed-acyclic graph instead of a tree. We are striving to find efficient approximation algorithms for this problem not simply because it is an interesting graph optimization problem in theory. A good solution to this problem is also an essential component in solving the more complex instruction scheduling problem on GPU. In this paper, we start with explanations on why this problem is important in GPU instruction scheduling. We then explore two different approaches to tackling this problem. First we model this problem as a constraint-programming problem. Using a state-of-the-art CP-SAT solver, we can find optimal answers for much larger cases than previous works on a modest desktop PC. Second, guided by the optimal answers, we design and evaluate heuristics that can be applied to the polynomial-time list scheduling algorithms. A combination of those heuristics can achieve the register-pressure results that are about 17\% higher than the optimal minimum on average. However, there are still near 6\% cases in which the register pressure by the heuristic approach is 50\% higher than the optimal minimum.
summary: Given a basic block of instructions, finding a schedule that requires the minimum number of registers for evaluation is a well-known problem. The problem is NP-complete when the dependences among instructions form a directed-acyclic graph instead of a tree. We are striving to find efficient approximation algorithms for this problem not simply because it is an interesting graph optimization problem in theory. A good solution to this problem is also an essential component in solving the more complex instruction scheduling problem on GPU. In this paper, we start with explanations on why this problem is important in GPU instruction scheduling. We then explore two different approaches to tackling this problem. First we model this problem as a constraint-programming problem. Using a state-of-the-art CP-SAT solver, we can find optimal answers for much larger cases than previous works on a modest desktop PC. Second, guided by the optimal answers, we design and evaluate heuristics that can be applied to the polynomial-time list scheduling algorithms. A combination of those heuristics can achieve the register-pressure results that are about 17\% higher than the optimal minimum on average. However, there are still near 6\% cases in which the register pressure by the heuristic approach is 50\% higher than the optimal minimum.
abstract_zh: 给定一个基本的指令块，找到一个需要最少数量的寄存器进行评估的调度是一个众所周知的问题。当指令之间的依赖关系形成有向无环图而不是树时，问题是 NP 完全的。我们正在努力为这个问题找到有效的近似算法，不仅仅是因为它在理论上是一个有趣的图优化问题。这个问题的良好解决方案也是解决 GPU 上更复杂的指令调度问题的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们首先解释为什么这个问题在 GPU 指令调度中很重要。然后我们探索两种不同的方法来解决这个问题。首先，我们将此问题建模为约束规划问题。使用最先进的 CP-SAT 求解器，我们可以为比以前在普通台式电脑上进行的工作更大的案例找到最佳答案。其次，在最佳答案的指导下，我们设计和评估可应用于多项式时间列表调度算法的启发式算法。这些启发式方法的组合可以实现比最佳最小值平均高约 17% 的寄存器压力结果。然而，仍有近 6% 的情况下，启发式方法的寄存器压力比最佳最小值高 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于GPU程序的最优和启发式最小寄存器调度算法，以解决指令调度中的寄存器压力问题。
AI.motivation: 在GPU指令调度中，最小化寄存器使用数是NP完全问题，且对复杂调度至关重要，因此需高效近似算法。
AI.method: 将问题建模为约束规划问题，利用CP-SAT求解器获取最优解，并基于最优解设计启发式规则应用于多项式时间列表调度算法。
AI.result: 启发式方法平均寄存器压力比最优解高17%，约6%的案例高达50%的差距。
AI.conclusion: 启发式算法在多数情况下有效，但仍有改进空间，需进一步优化以减少寄存器压力差异。
